entries.title: Four-Theme Newborn Portrait Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a 2x2 square collage of four highly realistic fine-art newborn photography portraits featuring the same newborn baby, with the baby's face intentionally covered by a soft-edged square privacy blur in each panel while preserving a warm, dreamy, premium studio look.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image, divided into exactly 4 equal panels with no visible border lines, each panel a different themed newborn setup. Photorealistic DSLR newborn portrait style, shallow depth of field, soft diffused lighting, warm highlights, creamy bokeh, extremely detailed fabrics and props.

Subject: The same newborn baby appears in all four panels, tiny and peacefully posed, with delicate hands and feet visible. Use warm light-to-medium newborn skin tone. The face in every panel must be obscured by a centered square blur/privacy block matching nearby skin colors, so no facial details are visible.

Layout and exact panel count: Use exactly 4 panels.
1. Top-left panel: A dreamy night-sky moon setup. The baby sleeps curled on a large ivory crescent moon prop, wrapped in a soft powder-blue knit swaddle with a matching blue sleeping cap. The background is deep navy with small golden stars, fluffy white clouds, and glowing fairy lights. Include the baby's folded arms and blue pom-pom wrap details.
2. Top-right panel: A woodland nest setup. The baby is wrapped in muted sage-green fabric and nestled inside a chunky woven basket or nest, wearing a beige knit bonnet. Surround the baby with dark green foliage, small wildflowers, warm golden firefly-like lights, tree bark textures, and an enchanted forest atmosphere. Visible tiny hands and bare feet peek out from the wrap.
3. Bottom-left panel: A soft ivory-and-blush princess setup. The baby lies on a plush white feathered blanket, dressed in pale pink lace and embroidered tulle with pearls and delicate beadwork, wearing a matching ornate bonnet. Surround with pastel pink flowers, white feathers, cream clouds, soft drapery, and a fairytale nursery background with very bright airy lighting.
4. Bottom-right panel: A floral garden basket setup. The baby rests on a pink knitted cushion in a wicker basket, wearing a sheer blush lace outfit and a pink floral crown. Surround with roses, pale pink blossoms, greenery, and a softly blurred white garden bench or crib in the background. The baby's arms rest in front, with a serene posed newborn photography composition.

Visual style: Luxury newborn photography, whimsical fairytale themes, ultra-realistic fabric texture, soft pastel palette, cinematic warm glow, high detail, gentle vignetting, creamy background blur, professional studio retouching.

Constraints: Generate exactly four distinct themed newborn portraits in one 2x2 collage. Keep all faces covered by square privacy blur blocks. No text, no watermark, no logos, no extra panels, no adult hands, no distorted limbs. Overall mood should be tender, magical, and elegant. Use soft pastel blue, sage green, ivory, and blush pink and warm diffused fairy-tale studio lighting.
entries.description: Creates a photorealistic 2x2 fine-art newborn collage with moon, woodland, princess, and floral basket setups for baby portrait concepts.

entries.title: Ethereal Rowboat Pastoral Fairytale
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
An adult woman reclining inside a vintage wooden rowboat on a calm lake, fair skin, pale blue eyes, long copper-golden red hair flowing naturally, wearing a cream white ethereal chiffon dress with off-shoulder neckline, soft puff sleeves, delicate ruching and flowing layered skirt. She leans lazily against the side of the boat, gazing into the distance with a quiet dreamy expression. A bouquet of white and pale blue flowers rests beside her. In the background, a white swan glides across the dark reflective water, surrounded by hanging willow branches forming a lush green curtain. Golden hour sunlight, warm backlight glowing through her hair and dress, soft reflections on the water, romantic pastoral fairytale mood.

Hyperrealistic photography, cinematic natural light, soft golden sunset, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, visible fabric weave and folds, film photography look, warm highlights, slightly cool green shadows, natural lens softness, 50mm lens, vertical 3:4 composition, high detail, dreamy romantic atmosphere

entries.title: Anime Streetwear Poster Design
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a cinematic anime inspired streetwear poster featuring a confident young man standing in the center in a relaxed pose with one hand in pocket. He wears black sunglasses, a light blue oversized denim shirt layered over a white tank top, faded charcoal washed jeans, white sneakers, silver chain necklace, and a modern urban hairstyle with trimmed beard.

Background features a massive vintage textured Straw Hat Pirates skull logo from One Piece, blending into a gritty brown parchment wall with distressed textures, scratches, dust, and dark vignette edges. Add hand drawn anime doodles of Monkey D. Luffy around the composition with rough sketch aesthetics.

Poster design should feel like a premium Gen Z fashion editorial mixed with anime street culture. Include cinematic shadows, moody warm brown tones, grunge overlays, faded ink textures, and dramatic contrast.

Typography elements:

Large distressed bold text saying "OUTFIT CHECK"

Small handwritten phrases and pirate themed quotes

Japanese vertical typography on the side

Barcode element at bottom corner

"Gear Fifth" graffiti text

Minimal fashion magazine layout styling

Style: ultra detailed, anime streetwear editorial, cinematic poster art, gritty urban fashion campaign, textured vintage paper aesthetic, modern hypebeast design, high contrast lighting, premium composition, realistic human proportions, sharp focus.

Aspect ratio: 4:5 portrait.

entries.title: Gothic Anime Symbolism Infographic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a dark gothic anime infographic poster explaining the symbolic meaning of スティルインラブの『宿縁の罪科』. The design should feel like an ornate occult character-analysis card about fate, blood, moonlight, and original sin, with a somber romantic tone.

Canvas: Square 1:1 poster, high resolution, black and deep burgundy palette with ivory Japanese typography, red accents, silver moonlight, antique gold filigree borders, subtle grunge texture, rose petals, sparkles, and a Victorian gothic frame.

Layout: Top title band with large Japanese headline, subtitle, and decorative flourishes. Center hero character in front of a huge full moon. Left and right vertical symbolic panels flank the character. A wide middle-lower panel labeled 背徳 spans beneath the character. Below that, a section labeled シナリオへの影響 contains exactly 4 numbered boxes connected left-to-right by arrows. Bottom contains a concluding quote paragraph in a bordered box with roses in both lower corners.

Central subject details: Draw Still in Love as a beautiful anime horse-girl idol, waist-up, centered, with long flowing chestnut brown hair, red eyes, soft melancholic expression, horse ears decorated with red ribbons, a small frilled headpiece, and a red-and-white gothic idol dress with off-shoulder sleeves, blue bow accent, choker jewel, bracelets, and lace details. She holds one hand near her chest as if restraining emotion. Backlight her with a luminous full moon and drifting red-black particles.

Top text: Large headline: スティルインラブの『宿縁の罪科』. Subtitle below: 『血・月・背徳』が意味するもの.

Left symbolic panel: Exactly 1 left panel titled 血. Visual: crimson-black tree shaped like veins or blood vessels, red ribbons of blood, shadowy running horse silhouettes at the bottom, circular gothic frame. Text inside: 血統・本能・競走への衝動. Smaller text: 自分の意思を超えて流れ込む、競うための力.

Right symbolic panel: Exactly 1 right panel titled 月. Visual: blue-black night sky with a bright full moon over dark water and a distant traditional building or bridge, quiet clouds, cool moon glow, circular gothic frame. Text inside: 夜・覚醒・隠された本性. Smaller text: 普段は抑えた衝動が、静かに目を覚ます.

Middle-lower symbolic panel: Exactly 1 wide panel titled 背徳. Visual: left side black rose wrapped in thorns, right side pale hand reaching through thorns with a small drop of blood, ornate elongated frame. Main text: 愛の危うさ・独占・越境. Smaller text: 愛が深まるほど、相手との境界を越えそうになる.

Scenario impact section: Include exactly 4 numbered boxes, each with a small circular number medallion and ornate border, connected by arrows. Box 1 text: "理性的な私"と"紅の衝動"の二面性. Box 2 text: 愛は救いであると同時に呪いでもある. Box 3 text: 彼女の苦しみは性格ではなく、宿命として描かれる. Box 4 text: 物語は『克服』ではなく『受容』へ向かう. Emphasize the key red words 紅の衝動, 呪い, 宿命, 受容.

Bottom conclusion text: 『宿縁の罪科』とは、血と運命から背負わされた愛と衝動の原罪。スティルインラブの物語は、それを消すのではなく、抱えたまま愛し、共に生きる物語である。

Visual style: Detailed Japanese anime illustration mixed with dark fantasy editorial infographic design, sharp readable typography, symmetrical composition, ornate gold corner decorations, black marble texture, red roses, thorn vines, subtle embers, cinematic moonlight, high contrast, elegant and tragic mood.

Constraints: Use exactly the listed 3 symbolic panels and exactly 4 scenario boxes. Keep all Japanese text legible and placed as specified. Do not add logos, watermarks, extra characters, extra panels, or modern UI elements.
entries.description: A square gothic anime infographic poster analyzing a character through blood, moon, and taboo symbolism for social media or fandom commentary.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的社交快照条目《Gothic Anime Symbolism Infographic》。 关键词：cinematic、editorial。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

entries.title: Natural Recharge Drink Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a premium conceptual beverage advertisement for Chivita Active, showing the drink as a natural energy recharge solution.

Canvas: Square 4:5 vertical social ad composition, deep cobalt-blue studio background and matching glossy blue tabletop, clean Apple-like commercial lighting, lots of negative space in the upper half.

Layout: Place the main human subject on the lower left and center: exactly 1 exhausted young Black man in a plain white long-sleeve shirt, seated at a table with his head down on folded arms, body leaning forward, face mostly hidden, curly short hair visible. Place exactly 1 tall beverage carton upright on the lower right, sharply lit and fully readable. Between the man and carton, add exactly 1 glowing orange-yellow energy cable that arcs from the carton cap toward the man's shoulder and forms exactly 1 luminous battery icon over his upper arm. The battery icon should contain 6 filled charge bars plus a small terminal on the right, glowing like neon.

Product details: The carton is a 1 liter fruit juice carton with white upper packaging, orange fruit graphics at the bottom, citrus and grapefruit imagery, a white screw cap, splashes of orange liquid near the top, and vertical blue lettering reading "active"; include smaller red brand text "chivita," a side phrase "power of 6," and small text "fortified with vitamin C." Keep the carton realistic, glossy, and photographed like a professional FMCG packshot.

Text content: Add exactly 2 text areas. Top left headline reads "recharge naturally." with "recharge" in thin white lowercase, "naturally" in bold white lowercase, and the period in orange. Bottom center tagline reads "active starts here." with "active" bold white, "starts here." thin white, plus a small turquoise accent above the word active.

Visual style: Cannes Lions-level conceptual drink advertising, minimalist luxury still life, photorealistic studio photography, crisp product rendering, saturated blue-and-orange complementary palette, soft shadows, subtle tabletop reflection, high contrast, precise typography, no clutter.

Constraints: Use exactly 1 person, 1 beverage carton, 1 glowing cable arc, 1 battery icon with 6 bars, and 2 text areas. Do not add extra products, hands holding the carton, additional logos, extra people, scenery, or watermark.
entries.description: A polished conceptual beverage advertisement showing a tired person being recharged by a fruit drink through a glowing battery visual.

entries.title: Gothic Still in Love Analysis Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a dark gothic anime infographic poster in Japanese about スティルインラブの『宿縁の罪科』, themed around cursed love, blood, moonlight, and hidden virtue.

Canvas: Square 1:1 poster, ornate black background with deep red accents, high-detail fantasy UI framing, antique gold filigree borders, roses, thorn vines, faint cracks, blood droplets, and a dramatic full moon behind the central character. Use a polished visual-novel / gacha character-analysis card style.

Main subject: Center a beautiful anime horse-girl heroine inspired by Still in Love: long flowing chestnut brown hair, red eyes, pale skin, soft melancholic smile, horse ears with ribbon ornaments, red-and-white gothic idol dress, choker with jewel, frilled sleeves, red bows, and delicate bracelet. She stands front-facing from thighs up, one hand near her chest, framed by the glowing moon and smoky red-black atmosphere.

Layout: Use exactly 6 major content zones: 1 large top title band, 1 central character portrait, 2 vertical side concept panels, 1 wide middle-lower virtue panel, and 1 bottom scenario-impact section with four numbered cards. Keep the design symmetrical and dense but readable.

Text content: All visible poster text should be Japanese, using elegant serif Mincho-style typography with white, pale pink, and crimson emphasis. Include these key phrases as the visible copy: top headline スティルインラブの『宿縁の罪科』; subtitle 『血・月・背徳』が意味するもの. Left panel title 血 with smaller copy "血統・本能・競走への衝動" and "自分の意思を超えて流れ込む、競うための力". Right panel title 月 with smaller copy "夜・覚醒・隠された本性" and "普段は抑えた衝動が、静かに目を覚ます". Center-lower wide panel title "背徳" with copy "愛の危うさ・独占・越境" and "愛が深まるほど、相手との境界を越えそうになる". Bottom heading "シナリオへの影響".

Counted bottom cards: Include exactly 4 numbered rectangular cards connected left-to-right by small arrows. Card 1 label "1" with text ""理性的な私"と"紅の衝動"の二面性". Right side panel shows a bright full moon over a dark lake or racetrack at night, reflected in water with a distant bridge or building lights.

Middle-lower imagery: Wide virtue panel contains exactly 2 symbolic images: a dark red rose entangled in black thorns on the left, and a pale feminine hand on the right with black lace/thorns and a single red blood drop from the fingertip.

Visual style: Deep black, burgundy, antique gold, ivory, and moonlit blue palette; cinematic lighting; soft glow around the moon and character; intricate gothic border ornaments at corners; subtle sparkles and dust; dramatic but elegant, not horror-gore. Keep all Japanese text crisp and legible, with red emphasis on key words such as 呪い, 宿命, 受容, 原罪, 愛し, 共に生きる.

entries.title: Cinematic Frontline Warrior Last Stand
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a hyper-detailed cinematic vertical action scene of a frontline warrior making a desperate last stand in the center of the frame, standing wide-legged on the crushed hood of a wrecked dark car. The hero wears custom-fitted tan tactical combat gear: plate carrier with 4 front magazine pouches, armored shoulder and elbow pads, gloves, utility belt, thigh holster, knee pads, combat boots, and a gas mask hanging from the left hip. The hero grips a black pump-action shotgun at chest height, firing toward the right edge of the image with a bright muzzle flash, sparks, and recoil smoke. Use a sharp realistic adult male face, partially shadowed by smoke for the face. Surround the hero with exactly 5 visible undead enemies: 1 crouched zombie on the left near flames, 1 standing zombie behind the car on the right, 1 darker blurred zombie farther right near police lights, and 2 foreground zombies seen from behind at the lower left and lower right edges. The environment is an urban disaster battlefield with burning debris, orange flames, thick gray smoke clouds filling the sky, damaged vehicles, and a police car in the background with red and blue emergency lights glowing through haze. Lighting should be dramatic and cinematic, mixing warm firelight from below and cool smoky daylight from above, with shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the warrior, gritty textures, realistic fabric dirt, soot, embers, and high-contrast Hollywood action color grading. Composition: vertical 2:3 poster crop, full-body hero centered, low camera angle, intense heroic presence, no text, no watermark.

entries.title: Zen Tea Cup Ink Wash
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a minimalist zen-style Japanese ink wash illustration on a vertical canvas. Use warm aged rice paper as the background with subtle beige watercolor stains and abundant negative space. Place a single rustic ceramic tea cup in the lower-right area, rounded and slightly imperfect, with speckled beige clay texture, a thin dark rim, a visible amber-brown tea surface, and a soft gray ink shadow beneath it. From the cup, draw one graceful column of steam made of thin, translucent, flowing S-shaped black-gray brush lines rising upward. On the left side, include one slender bamboo branch entering diagonally from the lower-left edge and reaching toward the upper-left and center, with exactly 3 visible stem segments and exactly 12 narrow bamboo leaves in muted black, charcoal, and pale gray ink tones. Add 2 small ink dots near the lower-left of the cup. Keep the composition quiet, asymmetrical, meditative, and elegant, with soft organic brush textures, sumi-e linework, light watercolor washes, no hard outlines except the expressive ink strokes, no text, no border, no watermark.

entries.title: Pastel Anime Celebration Jar Visual
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical 2:3 commemorative fantasy character visual packed with cute character motifs, like an ornate anime merchandise celebration illustration.

Canvas: Portrait 2:3 composition, bright pastel blue sky with soft white clouds, sparkling light effects, glassy reflections, and a delicate lace-and-crystal border around all four edges.

Main subject: Center a petite anime girl sitting on top of a huge transparent faceted glass jar. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered pale lavender square censor block. She has very long flowing silvery white with pale blue tint hair styled into twin tails or long side sections, decorated with blue gingham ribbons, small blue flowers, pearls, and strawberry ornaments. Her pose is front-facing, legs dangling down, hands resting lightly to each side, graceful and doll-like.

Outfit: A lavish sweet-lolita dress in sky blue, white, blush pink, crystal clear, and strawberry red. Include puff sleeves, layered ruffles, lace trim, blue gingham panels, tiny bows, pearl chains, berry and flower embroidery, a corset-like bodice, and a short tiered skirt. Add white thigh-high stockings with blue bows, platform Mary Jane shoes decorated with strawberries, flowers, pearls, and blue ribbon ties.

Central prop: The girl sits on a large transparent glass candy jar with a thick lid rim under her skirt and a faceted base. Inside the jar, show many miniature concept items: blue and white flowers, strawberries, pearls, tiny ribbons, crystal pieces, a small teacup or cake-like ornament, heart charms, and pastel sweets. On the jar front, place an ornate gold-and-blue heart jewel brooch.

Balloons: Include exactly 12 visible balloons behind and around the character: 2 pink heart balloons, 2 blue heart balloons, 4 round blue balloons, and 4 transparent iridescent round balloons filled with tiny strawberries, flowers, and confetti. Tie them with fine strings and blue bows so they frame the girl like a celebration bouquet.

Surrounding objects: Add exactly 8 major decorative gift/display objects around the base: 1 blue-and-white wrapped gift box on the lower left, 1 crystal perfume-bottle-like ornament on the lower left, 1 faceted blue heart crystal ornament on the far lower left, 1 hanging gift tag on the jar reading Present for you, 1 ornate framed strawberry illustration on the lower right, 1 blue glass bottle or vial on the far lower right, 1 small envelope/card with strawberry art on the lower right, and 1 loose strawberry near the bottom edge. Add scattered pearls, small flowers, lace paper, and tiny gems on the reflective floor.

Style: Extremely detailed Japanese anime illustration, dreamy shoujo aesthetic, watercolor-like pastel rendering, transparent glass effects, iridescent highlights, fine line art, luminous sparkles, ornate lace, ribbons, pearls, and crystalline decorations. The mood should be sweet, celebratory, ethereal, and precious.

Text: Keep the visible English tag text "Present for you" in elegant cursive. Optional faint decorative script on the left may read Dream Garden. Avoid adding any other readable text.

Constraints: Vertical 2:3 ratio, centered symmetrical composition, no dark colors, no modern UI elements, no photorealism, no extra characters, keep the face covered by the simple square block, and make every accessory feel tied to strawberries, blue flowers, glass crystals, gifts, and ribbons.
entries.description: Generates a dreamy vertical anime commemorative character illustration filled with balloons, crystal gifts, strawberries, ribbons, and ornate pastel lolita details.

entries.title: Anime Idol in Mirror Room
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 high-resolution anime idol illustration of a cheerful blonde magical idol girl posing cutely in a room where the floor, walls, and ceiling are entirely covered in mirror panels. Use a dramatic low-angle perspective with strong wide-angle depth, making the character appear close to the viewer while her reflections repeat into the background on every side. The character has long flowing golden blonde hair with curled ends, a large translucent blue bow on top, and a sparkling blue-and-white stage costume. Outfit details: exactly 8 main visible outfit pieces - 1 large hair bow, 1 glittering blue corset bodice, 1 layered short frilly skirt with translucent overskirt, 2 white gloves, 2 white knee-high boots, and 1 small waist bow. Pose: she balances on one leg, one knee lifted, one hand making a V-sign toward the viewer and the other hand pointing near her face in a playful idol gesture. The face area is intentionally covered by a plain skin-tone rectangular block, while the rest of the illustration remains highly detailed. The mirrored room should show many reflections of the same character from different angles, with visible reflected copies behind her and to both sides. Lighting is bright, icy blue, and magical, with countless star-like sparkles, lens flares, glitter particles, and crystalline highlights bouncing across the mirror seams. Visual style: polished Japanese anime key visual, glossy idol-card aesthetic, delicate line art, luminous blue palette, shimmering fabric texture, intricate ruffles and bows, dynamic composition, ultra-detailed reflections, no text, no watermark.

entries.title: Poolside Swimsuit Story Photobook
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a 4-page narrative swimsuit snapshot photobook featuring the character from the attached image, following them at the hotel poolside from morning to evening. Maintain the character's facial features to ensure they look like the same person. Describe them as an adult female. The entire set should be a magazine-style photobook showing the transition of swimsuit styles and expressions throughout the day. Add variations in swimsuit color, pattern, and shape on each page, creating changes linked to the time of day. Page Layout: Page 1: Morning, waving by the pool with a bright smile and morning sunlight. Page 2: Noon, in the pool looking at the camera with a ponytail. Page 3: Afternoon, ennui expression, wearing sunglasses under a parasol. Page 4: Evening, sipping a tropical drink with the sunset in the background and an updo hairstyle. Vary the poses and compositions, mixing close-up snapshots and wider shots. Include headlines and catchphrases for each time period. The overall theme is a photobook that feels like spending the whole day together by the pool.

Canvas: Wide horizontal web banner, 2:1 aspect ratio, approximately 1000×500 px. Use a dense, colorful composition with cinematic lighting, sparkles, stars, lens flares, and a festive concert-stage atmosphere.

Main text: Place large bold Japanese headline text across the top in thick white letters with a heavy black drop shadow: ChatGPTによる画像生成が\n大幅アップデート!. Under it, centered in smaller bold white text with black outline: GPT-Image-2が無料で使える. Make the typography oversized, glossy, and attention-grabbing, occupying the upper third of the banner.

Layout and subjects: Show exactly 5 anime-style band members across the bottom half, arranged left to right:
1. A blue-haired keyboard player on the far left, long blue hair, white blouse, sitting or standing behind a keyboard/synth, face covered by a soft rectangular blur mask.
2. A pink twin-tail idol singer left of center, frilly pink outfit, flower hair accessories, holding a microphone, cheerful expression, fully visible face.
3. A central golden-yellow-haired drummer/front idol, bright yellow cropped jacket and star accessories, holding drumsticks, smiling widely toward the viewer, most prominent character, positioned in front of a drum kit.
4. A dark green-haired bassist/guitarist right of center, black and green outfit, holding a guitar, face covered by a soft rectangular blur mask.
5. A black-haired purple-themed guitarist on the far right, gothic black outfit with straps and accessories, holding a purple electric guitar, face covered by a soft rectangular blur mask.

Background: Put a glowing OpenAI-style knot logo in the center behind the characters, surrounded by a golden circular light halo. Add futuristic monitor panels on both far sides: left monitor with neon interface rings and control panels, right monitor with colorful image-generation style artwork and UI panels. Include stage lights, musical notes, star icons, confetti-like sparkles, bokeh dots, and diagonal light streaks throughout.

Visual style: Vibrant anime illustration, glossy digital art, concert poster energy, saturated pink, gold, purple, and blue palette, dramatic backlighting, high contrast, crisp outlines, polished promotional thumbnail style.

Constraints: Use exactly 5 band members and exactly 2 lines of headline/subtitle text. Keep the Japanese text readable and dominant. Do not add extra logos except the abstract OpenAI-style glowing emblem. No watermark.

entries.title: Japanese GPT-Image-2 Anime Concert Banner
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a high-energy Japanese promotional banner announcing an image generation update for ChatGPT / GPT-Image-2, styled like an anime idol rock concert advertisement.

Canvas: Wide horizontal social media banner, approximately 2:1 aspect ratio, cinematic 1024×512 feel. Fill the frame edge to edge with no white margins.

Layout: Place huge bold Japanese headline text across the top two-thirds, centered and slightly arched with heavy black drop shadow and white fill. Under it, place a smaller centered subtitle. The bottom half is an anime band performance scene with five visible characters and a drum kit, surrounded by glowing UI panels, stars, sparkles, and neon concert lighting.

Text content: Main headline in Japanese: ChatGPTによる画像生成が 大幅アップデート!. Subtitle in Japanese: GPT-Image-2が無料で使える. Use thick rounded sans-serif display lettering, bright white with black outline/shadow, designed for maximum readability over a busy background.

Subject details: Include exactly five anime band members across the lower half: 1) far left, a blue-haired keyboardist in a pale blue-and-white outfit behind a keyboard; 2) left-center, a pink twin-tail idol singer holding a microphone, wearing a frilly pink stage dress with flower hair accessories; 3) center-right foreground, the main blonde/yellow-haired energetic idol drummer/front performer, smiling, holding a drumstick, wearing a cropped yellow jacket, white top, star motifs, and hair clips; 4) right-center, a dark-haired green-accented guitarist/bassist in a black streetwear outfit; 5) far right, a black-haired female guitarist in a black off-shoulder rock outfit holding a purple electric guitar. Put a golden drum kit behind the two central characters. The center performer should be the most prominent and brightly lit.

Background and effects: Behind the band, show a glowing circular golden OpenAI-like knot logo as a stage backdrop. Add futuristic interface screens on the left and right edges, with colorful dashboards, rings, waveform-like graphics, and thumbnail panels. Use a deep black and purple concert background with orange, pink, gold, and blue neon beams. Scatter many glowing five-point stars, music notes, lens flares, confetti sparkles, and light streaks throughout.

Visual style: Polished modern anime illustration, idol concert poster, saturated colors, glossy highlights, dramatic rim lighting, high detail, dynamic composition, celebratory mood, crisp typography, strong contrast. Make it look like a viral Japanese tech-news thumbnail about AI image generation.

Constraints: Keep the text legible and dominant, do not add extra headline lines beyond the two specified text lines, keep exactly five band characters, avoid photorealism, avoid watermarks, avoid unreadable tiny text except decorative UI elements.

entries.title: Five Hanfu Noblewomen Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a refined cinematic group portrait of exactly five young noblewomen in traditional Chinese Hanfu standing in a shallow V formation, with the central woman slightly forward and tallest. Their faces should be intentionally anonymized with soft rectangular skin-toned blur masks, while the clothing and hair remain highly detailed. Each woman wears an elegant layered Hanfu with wide flowing sleeves, cream and ivory outer robes, teal-blue skirts, muted coral-red sashes, and delicate floral embroidery; include exactly five distinct outfits: left woman in ivory robe with teal skirt and coral band, second woman in pale aqua robe with cream chest panel and red skirt accents, center woman in the most ornate ivory robe with peach floral borders over teal and coral layers, fourth woman partly behind in teal upper robe with ivory collar and orange sash, right woman in ivory robe over deep teal and rust-red skirt with large floral embroidery. Style their hair in traditional high black updos with long straight hair sections and ornate gold-and-flower hairpins, dangling ornaments, and small white blossoms. Set them indoors against a soft teal-green wall with dark wooden architectural details on the right and blurred pale pink cherry blossoms framing the upper corners. Use warm diffused studio lighting, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric texture, embroidered details, serene ceremonial atmosphere, symmetrical composition, full-body to three-quarter framing, painterly photorealism, no text, no watermark. Overall color palette: ivory, teal, coral, rust red, soft pink, warm gold. Main clothing style: Chinese Hanfu. Number of women: five. Background setting: elegant teal indoor palace backdrop with cherry blossoms. Face treatment: soft anonymized rectangular blur masks over the faces.

entries.title: Ookami Mio Wedding Dress Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create an elegant anime-style wedding dress character design sheet for 大神ミオ, themed as a Hololive wolf-girl bride, with a romantic shrine-garden atmosphere and premium fashion-catalog presentation.

Canvas: Vertical poster layout, approximately 4:5 aspect ratio, warm ivory and blush color grading, high-resolution detailed illustration. The top half is a dramatic hero illustration; the bottom half is a structured fashion reference board with multiple panels.

Main hero illustration: Show Ookami Mio as a mature anime wolf-girl bride seated gracefully in a glowing Japanese garden or shrine corridor at dusk. She has long dark hair, black wolf ears with soft white inner fur, a voluminous dark wolf tail, floral hair ornaments, and a translucent lace veil flowing around her. She wears a luxurious white wedding dress with gold embroidery, lace appliqué, off-shoulder sleeves, sheer fabric, a high slit, thigh garter lace, gold ribbon cords, red accent cords, and a bouquet-like flower ornament at the waist. Her pose is elegant and slightly alluring: one hand near her lips, one leg bent forward, the other arm resting at her side. Background includes shoji-style frames, warm lanterns, arched architecture, falling cherry blossom petals, and soft pink cherry trees.

Top-left title area: Add refined Japanese typography and decorative serif script. Include exactly 4 visible text elements: small subtitle "大神ミオ ウェディングドレス", large Japanese name "大神ミオ", cursive English name "Ookami Mio", and English label "Wedding Dress". Below that, include a short vow-style Japanese copy block with the line "誓いの花嫁、永遠を君と共に。" and three small bullet-point descriptions in Japanese. Use delicate floral dividers and thin gold lines.

Bottom layout: Create exactly 3 main reference sections across the lower half.

Section 1, Dress Style: Place on the bottom left and make it the largest lower section. Include exactly 2 tall full-body panels labeled "Front" and "Back". The front panel shows the full bridal outfit from the front with bouquet waist ornament, slit skirt, lace veil, heels, wolf ears, and flowing hair. The back panel shows the back view with long veil, exposed upper back, train, gold lace patterning, and the large dark tail cascading down the center.

Section 2, Details: Place in the bottom center. Include exactly 3 stacked close-up detail panels: 1 close-up of the bodice and lace neckline, 1 close-up of the waist bouquet and red-gold cords, and 1 close-up of the thigh slit, garter lace, and layered sheer skirt. Add narrow vertical Japanese annotation text beside the detail images.

Section 3, Accessories: Place on the bottom right. Include exactly 3 accessory cards: 1 card for the head dress and veil with a small portrait crop showing wolf ears and white flowers, 1 card for the bouquet with white flowers and red-gold ribbons, and 1 card for shoes and anklet showing a white high heel with gold straps and a delicate ankle ribbon. Each card should have a Japanese heading and short Japanese description.

Bottom extras: Add exactly 2 small footer areas: a "Color Palette" strip with exactly 5 diamond swatches in ivory white, pale cream, warm gold, deep red, and dark charcoal; and a framed handwritten-style message box titled "ミオからのメッセージ" with a short Japanese quote. Decorate the footer with small cherry blossom line art.

Visual style: Highly polished anime illustration, soft painterly rendering, romantic lighting, delicate lace detail, warm lantern glow, sakura petals, premium bridal catalog design, ivory paper texture, thin gold borders, floral ornaments, elegant typography. Keep the character recognizable as a black-haired wolf-girl idol bride while preserving a refined wedding fashion sheet aesthetic.

Constraints: Use exactly 2 tall dress-style panels, exactly 3 detail close-ups, exactly 3 accessory cards, exactly 5 color swatches, and exactly 2 footer extras. Do not add extra characters. Avoid modern UI elements, watermarks, logos, or clutter. The overall mood should be romantic, ceremonial, soft, and luxurious.
entries.description: A structured prompt for generating an elegant anime bridal character design sheet with hero art, dress views, detail close-ups, accessories, and palette notes.

entries.title: Shirakami Fubuki Bridal Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create an elegant anime bridal fashion collection sheet for Shirakami Fubuki, presenting a white fox-girl idol in a luxury wedding dress design.

Canvas: Vertical poster layout, 3:4 aspect ratio, pale icy blue and white palette, ornate wedding stationery aesthetic, high-resolution anime illustration with delicate linework, soft glow, translucent fabrics, floral borders, snowflake motifs, and a bright glass-chapel background filled with white roses and blue hydrangeas.

Main composition: On the left half, place one large full-body bridal illustration of the character walking forward in a graceful pose, holding a bouquet in her left hand and lifting the skirt or veil lightly with her right hand. She has long silver-white hair, large white fox ears, a fluffy white fox tail with a dark black tip, pale skin, and a serene bridal presence. Dress her in a pure white and ice blue lace wedding dress with a fitted sweetheart bodice, crystal snowflake appliques, off-shoulder lace sleeves, translucent layered overskirt, asymmetrical high-low front revealing one leg, long cathedral veil, ribbon accents, pearl chains, and sparkling lace-up heels. Add a blue-and-white bouquet of roses, small flowers, greenery, and trailing blue ribbons.

Top typography: Large title text across the top: "WEDDING DRESS Collection". Under it, smaller subtitle: "Shirakami Fubuki Bridal Style 2024". Use refined serif capitals for "WEDDING DRESS" and elegant script for "Collection". Include a small fox or butterfly-like emblem centered above the title and thin ornamental flourishes.

Right-side fashion sheet layout: Create a clean panel grid on the right half with exactly 3 upper view panels labeled "FRONT", "SIDE", and "BACK". The FRONT panel shows a small full-body front view of the bride with bouquet and dress train. The SIDE panel shows the profile view emphasizing layered veil, bodice, leg slit, and tail. The BACK panel shows the rear view emphasizing the long veil, open-back lace, flowing train, and large fox tail with black tip.

Details section: Below the three view panels, create exactly 6 small detail cards labeled: "BOUQUET" showing the blue-white rose bouquet with ribbons; "BODICE" showing a close-up of the sweetheart corset, lace, pearls, and snowflake crystals; "TAIL SILHOUETTE" showing the fluffy white tail with black tip; "VEIL & LACE" showing translucent lace layers and embroidery; "SHOES" showing silver-white lace-up bridal heels; "BACK STYLE" showing the open back, ribbon bow, veil, and lace train.

Lower information panels: Add a "DESIGN POINT" box with four short decorative bullet lines using snowflake and butterfly icons, written in small delicate Japanese-style placeholder text or tiny unreadable ornamental text. Add a "COLOR PALETTE" box with exactly 5 circular swatches labeled "Pure White", "Ice Blue", "Silver", "Pearl", and "Sky Blue". Add a small cursive quote inside the palette area: "For the day you shine the brightest."

Additional visible text: On the left near the bride, add a delicate cursive quote: "With you, in a world of white, my heart finds its true north." At bottom left, add a logo-style name block: "SHIRAKAMI FUBUKI" and "BRIDAL STYLE". Along the bottom border, add the tagline: "PURE AS SNOW, BRIGHT AS STARS - YOUR ETERNAL PROMISE."

Visual style: Premium character design reference sheet, romantic bridal catalog, icy blue fantasy wedding theme, soft bloom lighting, detailed lace and crystal rendering, ornate thin borders, subtle snowflakes, butterflies, floral corner decorations, clean editorial spacing. Keep all panels readable and symmetrical, with no extra characters and no modern UI elements.

entries.title: Japanese Pool Interview Thumbnail
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a realistic Japanese YouTube-style variety/interview thumbnail at an outdoor public swimming pool, showing three adult women in competitive one-piece swimsuits standing on a pool deck during a sunny summer day.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 image, bright daylight, high-resolution photorealistic look with a slightly over-saturated online thumbnail finish. Include a thin computer-window title bar at the very top with small system text, as if the image is a screenshot.

Main subjects: Exactly 3 adult women stand in the foreground, all with intentionally blurred/pixelated faces for privacy. Left woman: short black hair, navy blue athletic one-piece swimsuit with white side accents, standing turned slightly toward the center. Center woman: tied-back brown hair, glossy taupe/gray one-piece swimsuit, one hand raised near her chest, standing on a green pool mat. Right woman: tall woman with shoulder-length black hair, black one-piece swimsuit with bright blue side panels and thin gray curves, hands behind her back, facing toward the center. The three subjects should appear to be casually talking during an interview, not posing like a fashion shoot.

Background: Outdoor public pool complex with pale concrete deck, turquoise swimming pools, many distant swimmers and families, blue traffic cones around the deck, a white arched pedestrian bridge over the pool, chain-link fence on the left, dense green trees, blue sky with light clouds, and summer event atmosphere.

Text content: Add large Japanese variety-show thumbnail text. Top-left headline in two lines: フレッシュプール撮影会 and 水着美女にインタビュー!!. Use bold rounded Japanese lettering with white fill, thick black outline, and bright pink/yellow accent strokes. Bottom caption across the lower third: 『ちっぱい番付』に出ています. Make the bottom caption very large, white and pink characters with a heavy black outline and slight drop shadow, matching Japanese TV variety aesthetics.

Visual style: Photorealistic camera shot, wide-angle documentary composition, bright summer colors, crisp poolside details, strong thumbnail contrast, playful entertainment-news design. Keep the faces blurred as rectangular soft mosaic blocks. Do not add extra people in the foreground beyond the 3 women, and do not add any logos or watermarks other than the small swimsuit brand-like marks already implied by the suits.

one dramatic black-and-white close-up portrait with intense expression

entries.title: 3x3 Redhead Portrait Contact Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a square 3x3 contact-sheet grid of consistent studio portrait photos showing the same woman in nine different facial-expression poses, with her facial area intentionally obscured by solid skin-toned rectangular blocks.

Canvas: 1:1 square image, divided into exactly 9 equal panels in a 3 columns by 3 rows layout. Use thin white grid lines between panels, no outer border, no captions, no watermark.

Subject details: The same stunning adult redhead woman with wet, messy shoulder-length curly hair appears in every panel. She has tanned skin, bare shoulders, a white ribbed tank top or camisole, and a delicate thin necklace. Lighting is consistent across all portraits: soft direct flash or studio light, neutral gray wall background, realistic skin texture, damp hair strands, intimate close-up framing from upper chest to head.

Facial-expression set: Include exactly 9 separate portrait panels, each with a distinct pose or expression implied by head angle and hand placement: 1) neutral front-facing close crop, 2) slightly raised shoulders and centered gaze pose, 3) hand touching cheek or mouth in a surprised/shy pose, 4) both arms lifted with hands behind head, 5) centered portrait with head slightly lowered, 6) head angled down and to the side with hair falling forward, 7) shoulders squared with a subtle smile implied, 8) straight-on calm portrait with wet hair framing the face, 9) head tilted with one hand resting under the chin or along the cheek.

Face obscuring: In every one of the 9 panels, cover the face with a single opaque rectangular censor block in a warm tan skin color, aligned vertically over the central face area. The rectangles vary slightly in size and position according to head angle but fully hide eyes, nose, and most of the mouth while leaving hair, neck, shoulders, and hands visible.

Visual style: Photorealistic editorial contact sheet, high-resolution digital photography, natural imperfections, wet auburn hair texture, muted gray background, warm skin tones, consistent subject identity, consistent camera distance and lighting across all nine panels.

Constraints: Use exactly 9 panels and exactly 9 face-covering rectangles. Do not add text labels, UI elements, extra people, props, logos, or decorative backgrounds. Keep all panels visually cohesive like a single photoshoot series.
entries.description: Generates a photorealistic 3x3 portrait grid of the same redhead woman in nine poses with consistent lighting and intentionally obscured faces.

entries.title: AI Saws Enterprise Developers Branch
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a single-panel political-cartoon style meme illustration in a square-ish 4:3 canvas. Show a large sturdy tree on the left with rough brown bark and green leaves at the top, against a bright blue sky with a few soft white clouds. A thick horizontal branch extends from the trunk to the right. On the trunk, place bold white meme text with a black outline reading Enterprise. On the branch, place bold white meme text with a black outline reading Developers. Sitting on top of the branch near the trunk is a casually dressed adult man representing AI, wearing a dark navy sweater with the large white text "AI" on the chest, a white collared shirt underneath, dark jeans, and brown shoes. His face should be intentionally obscured by a plain rectangular skin-tone blur block, like an anonymized meme edit. He holds a hand saw angled downward and is sawing through the branch between the trunk and himself, with small wood chips and sawdust falling below the cut. Make the pose clear: he is seated on the branch he is cutting, one hand on the saw and the other bracing on the branch. Use a clean, colorful, hand-drawn editorial cartoon style, high contrast outlines, readable typography, humorous meme composition, no extra captions, no watermark.
entries.description: A political-cartoon meme showing AI sitting on and sawing off a tree branch labeled Developers connected to Enterprise.

entries.title: Chibi Knight Reaction Sticker Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a cute chibi mascot sticker sheet featuring Helena, an anime-style young female knight rendered as friendly social-media reaction stickers.

Canvas: White background, landscape 4:3 format, arranged as a clean 3-row by 4-column sticker sheet with generous spacing. Each sticker is a bust-up chibi character with large head, small armored body, and colorful handwritten Japanese greeting text above or around her.

Character details: Brown hair in a high side ponytail tied with a large white ribbon, soft bangs and long side locks, fair skin, cute rounded chibi proportions, wearing shiny silver plate armor with dark gloves and a small blue cape accent. Use glossy anime shading, soft outlines, expressive pose language, and a cheerful mascot feel.

Layout and exact sticker count: Include exactly 12 discrete stickers, ordered left to right, top to bottom:
1. 「おはよう!」 in orange, morning greeting, waving hand, orange sun doodle and rays.
2. 「こんにちは!」 in pink, daytime greeting, waving hand, small pink flower doodles.
3. 「こんばんは!」 in blue, evening greeting, calm pose, yellow crescent moon and small stars.
4. 「おやすみなさい」 in purple, good-night pose, eyes closed, hands clasped near face, small stars and moon.
5. 「ありがとう!」 in pink, thank-you reaction, hearts around the character.
6. 「よろしくね!」 in green, friendly introduction, one eye winking, thumbs-up pose, small sparkle marks.
7. 「了解!」 in blue, acknowledgement, raised fist pose, energetic blue emphasis lines.
8. 「がんばって!」 in orange, encouragement, smiling with eyes closed, raised fist, yellow sparkles.
9. 「ごめんね...」 in blue, apologetic pose, shy downward mood, blue sweat-drop marks.
10. 「大丈夫?」 in purple, worried question, concerned posture, purple question marks.
11. 「おつかれさま!」 in orange, good-work greeting, relaxed appreciative pose, yellow sparkle accents.
12. 「またね!」 in pink, goodbye, waving hand, pink hearts.

Visual style: Polished Japanese LINE sticker aesthetic, soft watercolor-like marker text, bright pastel accent colors, clean white negative space, crisp transparent-sticker feeling, cute and wholesome. Keep the character consistent across all 12 stickers, with varied poses and expressions. If censoring is desired, cover the face area of most stickers with a soft rectangular blur while leaving the fourth, sixth, and eighth stickers visibly expressive.

Text constraints: Preserve the Japanese phrases exactly as written. Use hand-drawn rounded lettering in the specified colors. Do not add extra captions, logos, borders, watermarks, or background scenery.
entries.description: A prompt for generating a 12-piece Japanese chibi mascot sticker sheet with greeting and reaction phrases for chat or social media use.

entries.title: Japanese Graffiti Street Fashion Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-detail portrait poster in a bold Japanese graffiti-inspired art style, combining modern urban street aesthetics with expressive Japanese visual culture. The poster should feature dynamic graffiti typography, layered spray-paint textures, hand-drawn symbols, abstract paint splashes, neon brush strokes, urban sticker elements, Japanese calligraphy accents, and decorative ornaments that strongly reinforce the energetic atmosphere of the design. The overall composition should feel artistic, rebellious, fashionable, and visually striking, while still maintaining a premium editorial poster quality instead of looking messy or overdone. Humanity somehow turned vandalism into luxury wall art. Impressive species. The subject must not replicate the exact pose or expression from the reference photo. Instead, create a completely new pose that feels natural, confident, and full of life. The expression should appear emotionally expressive, charismatic, and engaging, avoiding stiff, awkward, flat, or emotionless body language. The pose should reflect the elegance and sophistication commonly seen in international fashion models, with stylish posture, natural movement, and subtle attitude that enhances the overall cinematic fashion aesthetic. The outfit should feature contemporary stylish casual fashion with strong visual appeal. Avoid plain or repetitive clothing designs. Use fashionable layering, modern streetwear inspiration, premium casual styling, and a balanced combination of colors, patterns, textures, and fabric types that create a rich and non-monotonous appearance. The clothing should feel trendy, fashionable, youthful, and visually premium while still fitting naturally into the Japanese graffiti poster concept. The background and poster decorations should be filled with thematic urban Japanese-inspired visual elements such as graffiti walls, spray textures, painted symbols, urban signage, layered stickers, modern Japanese graphic motifs, abstract shapes, paint drips, street fashion aesthetics, and stylish decorative compositions that enhance depth and artistic intensity without distracting from the subject. Lighting should feel cinematic and fashionable, with strong contrast, clean highlights, realistic skin texture, and high-end editorial poster quality. The final result must look like a premium modern street-fashion campaign poster with highly detailed textures, balanced composition, vibrant color harmony, realistic proportions, ultra-sharp focus, and immersive visual storytelling. Ultra-detailed, highly aesthetic, premium composition, realistic texture rendering, fashionable urban atmosphere, cinematic quality, poster-ready design, 8K ultra high resolution.
entries.description: Generates a vibrant, high-end editorial poster that blends urban Japanese street aesthetics with dynamic graffiti typography and modern fashion.

entries.title: Neon Anime Idol Fan Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a vivid, high-density anime-style digital illustration of a neon idol fan poster centered on a fashionable cyberpunk girl named Neo.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 composition, close-up waist-up framing, intense magenta, purple, cyan, and black color palette, glossy lighting, crowded concert atmosphere, glowing rounded rectangular neon border around the entire image.

Main subject: A stylish anime girl with short dark purple-black hair with electric violet highlights and some cyan streaks, wearing yellow-rimmed goggles on top of her head. She wears a black cropped top with a purple skull-bunny emblem, a black-and-purple oversized jacket covered with small punk patches, bunny/skull motifs, zippers, pins, and glossy reflections, plus a choker with a small purple flower-like charm. Her two hands are raised close to the camera and form a heart shape in front of her face, heavily foreshortened and softly blurred by depth of field. Place a large muted mauve square censor/placeholder block over the central face area, covering most facial features while leaving hair, goggles, hands, neck, chest, and outfit visible.

Visible text and graphic elements: Include exactly 3 major glowing fan-message elements: 1) a pink neon heart speech bubble in the upper left containing Japanese text 「今日はネオだけ見ててね?約束だよっ♡」, 2) a black round fan sign in the lower left with bright pink neon Japanese text 「ネオ」 and smaller white text 「しか勝たん」 plus tiny hearts and bunny doodles, 3) a rounded neon nameplate in the lower right containing a small pixel heart, the cyan-and-white Japanese name 「ネオ」, and a pink skull-bunny icon. Use the character name consistently in these signs if customized.

Foreground crowd details: Show exactly 4 visible glow sticks at the bottom/front: two bright purple sticks near the center, one cyan-blue stick at the lower right edge, and one small pink/purple stick partially visible. Add soft bokeh, luminous hearts, scribbles, and concert light streaks in the background.

Style: Hyper-saturated Japanese anime illustration, glossy idol-concert aesthetic, sharp detail on clothing and neon signage, soft motion blur on the hands and glow sticks, vibrant rim lighting, high contrast, energetic composition, cute-yet-edgy cyberpunk-punk mood.

Constraints: Keep the central mauve square face block clearly visible and rectangular; do not add extra large signs beyond the 3 specified message elements; keep the overall image packed with neon details but maintain the main heart-hand pose as the focal point.
entries.description: Generates a high-energy anime concert fan poster with a cyberpunk girl, glowing Japanese signage, and hands forming a heart.

entries.title: Neon AI Influencer Studio Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a visually explosive vertical 3D social media advertisement render of a stylish young male AI influencer standing confidently in a futuristic Instagram-inspired creator studio. The central subject is Dilshad Hussain, full body from head to thighs, facing forward, one hand lifted to an earpiece near his ear, wearing a glossy gradient bomber jacket in cyan, lavender, and pink over a black shirt, with taupe cargo pants and black cuffs. Use realistic 3D character proportions and cinematic lighting; keep the face centered and realistic, or use an uploaded facial reference if provided. The studio is a circular high-tech room with curved cyan LED dot-matrix walls, transparent glass panels, magenta neon trim, a glowing pink circular ceiling ring, smoky atmosphere, reflective dark floor, and strong blue-pink rim lighting. Add large floating neon typography across the lower center in two lines: the first line says Dilshad Hussain in bright cyan outlined glow, and the second line says Ai influencer in hot pink neon glow, angled slightly across the subject. Surround him with exactly 10 floating social media UI elements: 1 Instagram app logo near the upper right, 1 follower count speech bubble reading 24.3K near the upper right chest area, 4 pink heart notification bubbles placed left middle, right middle, bottom right, and a large blurred foreground one at bottom left, and 4 Reels/play icons placed upper left, lower left, bottom left, and lower right. Include a subtle futuristic holographic HUD panel glowing on the subject's chest. Make the image vibrant, glossy, premium, high contrast, depth-of-field, volumetric haze, and suitable for a social media promotion poster. Avoid extra text, avoid watermarks, and keep the composition centered and dramatic.
entries.description: A cinematic 3D Instagram-style creator studio advertisement featuring a stylish AI influencer surrounded by neon social media icons.

entries.title: WhatsApp AI Influencer 3D Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a cinematic stylized 3D render in a futuristic WhatsApp-inspired digital communication hub. A confident young male AI influencer named Dilshad Hussain stands full-body in the center, leaning casually against a large glowing translucent cube with neon green internal light and black reinforced corner brackets. He wears a glossy green-and-black varsity-style jacket with a small WhatsApp logo on the chest, a black t-shirt, black jogger pants with a side cargo pocket and silver chain, green-and-white sneakers, a wristwatch, bracelets, rings, and layered silver necklaces. His pose is relaxed and charismatic: one elbow resting on the cube, one leg crossed in front, one hand holding a smartphone showing a social media/chat interface. Use a highly polished toy-like yet realistic 3D character style, dramatic teal and emerald rim lighting, reflective sci-fi floor panels, glowing green strips, and a dark high-tech room with wall monitors and control consoles.

Place bright holographic text above and behind him: the WhatsApp logo and word "WhatsApp" at the top, then a huge cyan neon outlined name reading "Dilshad Hussain", and below it "AI Influencer". Surround the character with exactly 13 floating communication elements: 1 large green WhatsApp icon, 1 left-side WhatsApp sign on a wall screen, 3 blue chat/message bubbles, 2 white chat/message bubbles, 2 blue envelope/message icons with red notification badges, 1 white envelope icon, 1 yellow bell with a red notification badge, 1 white bell with a red notification badge, and 2 emoji reactions, one laughing smiley and one heart-eyes smiley. Keep the composition vertical, poster-like, centered, energetic, and highly luminous, using emerald green, cyan, black, and dark teal as the dominant palette. Make the environment feel like a premium futuristic social media studio, with shallow depth of field and sharp neon highlights. Do not add extra people, do not add watermarks, and keep all visible text limited to WhatsApp, the name, and AI Influencer.
entries.description: A cinematic neon 3D poster of a confident young male influencer in a futuristic WhatsApp-themed digital communication environment.

entries.title: Bilingual Prompt Comparison Gallery
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a wide screenshot-style comparison panel showing image-generation results for the same prompt in two languages.

Canvas: Use a horizontal 1199×461 px composition on a very light gray/off-white background, like a social media screenshot or web gallery capture.

Layout: Arrange the left 75% as a 2-row by 4-column gallery of exactly 8 rounded-corner photo cards, with narrow white gutters between cards. Each card is a square-ish portrait photograph of two women sitting close together, facing each other or angled inward, each placing one index finger on the other person's lips in a mutual "shh" gesture. On the right 25%, place two stacked prompt description blocks aligned with the two gallery rows.

Gallery details: Include exactly 8 distinct generated-photo cards:
1. Top-left: two women seated on the floor against a blue studio backdrop, one in a floral dress, one in an orange outfit.
2. Top-second: two women in casual sweaters, one dark-haired and one blonde, seated close together against a pale gray background.
3. Top-third: warm cinematic dark teal/orange image, both women wearing hats, faces partially obscured by large soft blur rectangles.
4. Top-fourth: two women on a white background, one in white clothing and one in a mustard cardigan with striped shirt.
5. Bottom-left: two young women seated indoors near a window, soft casual snapshot lighting.
6. Bottom-second: two young women in black and pale pink tops, close-up casual indoor portrait.
7. Bottom-third: two young women seated on chairs, one in a dark dress and one in a light cardigan, against a plain wall.
8. Bottom-fourth: two young women in white and gray sweaters, seated indoors against a light wall.

Face treatment: All visible faces in the 8 cards should be anonymized with soft rectangular mosaic/blur blocks over the face area, matching the screenshot-like privacy masking.

Right-side text content: At the top right, show the English prompt text: "Two women are sitting facing each other. They are each placing their index finger on the other's lips." Under it, place two small rounded gray tags reading "raw" and "v 8.1". Below, aligned with the second row, show the Japanese prompt text: "二人の女性が向かい合って座っている。お互い相手の唇に人差し指をあてている" Under it, place two matching gray tags reading "raw" and "v 8.1".

Visual style: Photorealistic generated-image thumbnails, varied lighting and wardrobes, clean UI spacing, rounded image corners, sans-serif interface text in dark gray, small pale-gray pill tags. The overall image should look like a captured comparison grid demonstrating prompt-following consistency, not a polished poster.

Constraints: Use exactly 8 photo cards, exactly 2 text blocks, and exactly 4 pill tags total. Do not add logos, watermarks, browser chrome, captions inside the photo cards, or extra UI elements.

entries.title: Subway Birthday Billboard Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a realistic candid photo in a subway or underground station hallway showing a young woman posing beside a large digital birthday advertisement billboard for herself.

Canvas: Horizontal 16:9 photo, eye-level perspective, wide framing. Beige tiled station wall with grout lines and a polished gray floor. Fluorescent ceiling reflections and clean public-transit interior lighting.

Main subject: One young Korean woman stands on the left side of the frame, full body visible from head to upper thighs. She has long dark hair and wears a fitted black long-sleeve top, light blue high-waisted denim shorts with frayed hems, and a small black shoulder bag. Her face is covered by a rectangular soft blur privacy block. She smiles/poses toward the camera and points with both hands toward the billboard.

Billboard: One large horizontal digital screen mounted on the wall to the right, with a thick black frame. The billboard shows a pastel birthday fan-ad design for 윤슬. The design is pink on the left blending into blue on the right, with dreamy clouds, sparkles, hearts, bubbles, and a large portrait of the same woman on the right side of the billboard. The portrait face is also covered by a large rectangular soft blur privacy block.

Text content on billboard: Include exactly 6 visible text groups: 1) small English text "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" near the upper left, 2) very large Korean name "윤슬" centered-left in pink and blue bubble lettering, 3) date "1996.02.15" below the name, 4) pink ribbon label "여신 탄신일", 5) small handwritten Korean line near the lower left, "세상에서 가장 빛나는 순간, 언제나 윤슬과 함께할게 ♡", 6) handwritten Korean message on the right, "윤슬아, 생일 축하해! 너의 모든 순간을 응원해. 사랑해 ♡".

Visual style: Photorealistic smartphone travel snapshot, natural station lighting, slight wide-angle lens, realistic reflections on the billboard glass, subtle depth of field but most elements readable. The birthday billboard should look professionally designed and luminous, while the surrounding subway wall remains neutral and realistic.

entries.title: Character Emotional Performance Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a clean 4x4 emotional performance grid using the provided character as the fixed identity reference.

Visual style:
Clean modern graphic design layout. Elegant serif header at the top, soft off-white background, even spacing, small readable handwritten-style labels centered below each panel.

Header text:
"MY CUTE ↔ CRAZY SCALE"

Preserve strict facial identity consistency across all 16 panels.

Follow the exact emotional progression from top-left to bottom-right.
Do not randomize expressions or intensity.

GRID ORDER:

Row 1:
1. soft innocent cute
2. shy cute
3. playful cute
4. teasing cute

Row 2:
5. energetic cute
6. chaotic playful
7. emotionally intense
8. unstable smile

Row 3:
9. overly excited
10. wild eyes
11. manic happiness
12. emotionally unhinged

Row 4:
13. chaotic stare
14. dangerous excitement
15. beautiful insanity
16. fully crazy

Format:
4x4 grid, cinematic portrait photography style, neutral background, tight close-up framing, shallow depth of field, no watermark.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a realistic documentary-style outdoor photograph of a partially open silver laptop resting on a rough concrete curb beside dense wild grass. Surround the scene with tall tangled green weeds, thin stems, and small white daisy-like wildflowers, with a dry brown leaf on the right and a dark vertical object barely visible at the far left edge. Use muted natural colors, overcast soft light, shallow depth of field, realistic textures on the mossy stained curb, and a slightly eerie "many tiny animals gathered around an abandoned object" mood. Horizontal 16:9 composition, low eye-level angle, no people, no added text, no watermark.

entries.prompt: Create a realistic, slightly unsettling beach photograph in late-afternoon natural light: a blue-green and white striped towel lies on rippled golden sand, with a closed matte black laptop or tablet centered on the towel at a slight diagonal angle. Use 38 visible animals, closed matte black laptop with a cute car sticker, blue-green and white striped towel, warm low-angle late-afternoon sunlight, and realistic, crowded, slightly creepy but natural beach snapshot. Shoot from a low oblique overhead angle, wide horizontal composition, shallow but not extreme depth of field, high detail in sand texture, fabric weave, shadows, crab legs, and shells. No humans, no text overlay, no watermark.

entries.title: Elegant Rose Anime Female Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
An adult fantasy female character, in an exquisite 2D illustration style, 9:16 vertical composition, half-body to thigh view. The character appears in a side-back standing pose, back to the camera, body slightly turned, waist naturally twisted, and head gently looking back at the audience. The posture is elegant, light, and composed, emphasizing feminine beauty and a smooth S-curve. The neck is slender, the back lines are natural, and the slim waist and elegant curves form a soft but distinct visual rhythm. The vibe is mysterious, romantic, and charming.

She has refined Eastern fantasy features, fair skin, and a high-end anime girl face with large, clear red rose eyes and long lashes. Her expression is gentle and dreamy with a cinematic look of glancing back in the wind.

She has bright rose red / dark red long hair, with strands blown strongly to the left, creating a strong sense of flow. The hair needs clear anime structures, fine highlights, and translucent rim lighting, like a high-quality animated film character design.

She wears a wide light beige straw wide-brimmed hat with an elegant texture, decorated with red flowers, gold leaves, and white feathers, giving it a high-fashion fantasy resort feel.

Her outfit is a black and white backless halter dress connected by thin gold chains and a blue crystal pendant. The skirt is layered with black and silver-white tulle and silk, adorned with dark blue ribbons and gold chains. The hem is blown by the wind, following her curves to create an airy, dreamy arc.

The background is a bright high-rise window space with a blurred city skyline. Sunlight streams in from behind, creating soft backlighting and a warm glow. Red petals drift in the air, enhancing the romantic atmosphere.

The lens language is a cinematic side-rear close-up. The composition highlights her back lines, waist-hip curves, and the dynamic tension of her hair and dress flowing in the wind.

The overall style is high-quality 2D digital illustration, clean line art, soft cel-shading, delicate light and shadow, and transparent skin tones. It should have the quality of a high-end animation poster or a romantic fantasy fashion illustration.

Negative prompts: low resolution, blur, noise, facial distortion, deformed eyes, finger errors, extra limbs, stiff poses, plastic skin, broken clothes, deformed hat, messy hair, messy background, overexposure, text, watermarks, logo, low quality, cheap 2D feel, AI look, suggestive content.

entries.title: Kawaii Mother's Day Bento Food Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create an ultra-detailed handcrafted edible art world celebrating Mother's Day in a kawaii Japanese spring bento style, transforming a full meal into a cute character centerpiece made entirely from real foods.

Canvas: Square 1:1 overhead food photography composition, bright pastel color palette, soft natural light, shallow depth but all main foods readable, festive blue tablecloth background covered with cherry blossoms, pink carnations, doodled hearts, clouds, sparkles, and tiny celebration decorations.

Main centerpiece: In the center of a large round pink bento plate, make one large edible girl character: rice face with shiny black eyes, lashes, rosy cheeks, smiling mouth, long blonde hair made from thin omelet/noodle strands, pink flower hair decoration, pink heart earrings, kimono-like outfit made from pink ham and blue rice/crepe layers, holding a bouquet of pink carnation flowers tied with a bow. The character should feel like a lovingly made Mother's Day food-art doll.

Food elements to include, exactly 15 visible edible feature groups: 1) central girl character, 2) two smiling rice-ball onigiri behind her with nori rectangles and green shiso leaves, 3) small basket of strawberries with one halved strawberry, 4) heart-topped custard pudding on a pink saucer, 5) red sausage octopus with a face and bow tie, 6) cluster of cherry tomatoes and vegetable flowers, 7) pink carnation bouquet in the character's hands, 8) rolled omelet/noodle roses near the top center, 9) pink bowl of fruit containing green grape, orange segments, and a pink heart sweet, 10) heart-shaped tamagoyaki block with two small red hearts, 11) two breaded fried shrimp with orange tails, 12) broccoli and lemon wedge garnish, 13) pink fluted cup of spaghetti napolitan with peas and flower-shaped toppings, 14) small rice or dumpling hand beside the pasta, 15) separate small plate at bottom right with sakura mochi wrapped in a leaf and topped with a pink flower.

Non-food props and decorations to include, exactly 8 visible groups: 1) teacup at upper right with warm tea and a cute anime girl illustration plus floral print, 2) woven coaster under the cup, 3) triangular pink bunting flags across the upper background, 4) two small fluffy white cloud cutouts near the Japanese writing, 5) floral greeting card sign in the strawberry basket, 6) floral apology/thanks card at bottom left tied with a pink ribbon, 7) two carp-streamer decorations at bottom center, 8) pink-handled small brush on floral paper at bottom right.

Text content: Add handwritten Japanese text in the sky area reading おかあさんへ いつもありがとう!!. Add a pink heart speech bubble near the top right reading だいすき だよ〜♡. Add a small floral card in the strawberry basket reading Happy Mother's Day. Add a bottom-left floral card reading 感謝をこめて.... Keep text hand-drawn, cute, slightly imperfect, and integrated naturally into the scene.

Visual style: Hyper-detailed kawaii edible miniature art, Japanese bento craftsmanship, pastel pink and sky blue, glossy rice grains, crisp fried textures, soft omelet strands, realistic fruit and tea, abundant sakura and carnation motifs, whimsical hearts and sparkles. Make everything look handmade from food, cheerful, warm, and celebratory.

Constraints: Use an overhead flat-lay angle, no humans, no utensils except the small decorative brush, no watermark, no extra text beyond the specified messages, keep all counted food and prop groups clearly visible.

entries.title: Comic Cartoon Video Call
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a stylized cartoon version of a video meeting screenshot, like a comic-book Zoom call with exaggerated expressions and blurred private identities.

Canvas: Square image with a dark rounded-corner video-call application window on a light background. Add three small gray window control dots at the top left. Inside the window, arrange exactly 5 participant video tiles: 4 tiles in a 2-by-2 grid on top, and 1 wider centered tile along the bottom. Use thin black gutters between tiles. The top-left tile has a bright green active-speaker border.

Visual style: High-energy digital comic illustration, bold ink outlines, semi-realistic cartoon portraits, saturated colors, manga speed lines, sticker-like reaction icons, glossy highlights, and dramatic lighting. Faces must be covered by large rectangular blur blocks to preserve anonymity, while hair, poses, clothing, and backgrounds remain visible. Add small blurred name labels in the lower-left corner of most tiles, with one readable label: Bear Liu.

Layout and subject details: Include exactly 5 cartoon participants. Tile 1, top left: a blond wavy-haired person in a blue shirt, raising one hand in a rock gesture, orange energetic background, yellow waving-hand icon in the upper left, two white sparkle icons, green speaker outline, blurred name tag at bottom left. Tile 2, top right: a dark-haired person wearing earbuds and a dark jacket, surprised reaction, brown motion-blur hallway-like background, white speech bubble with "?!" on the left, three white stress marks above the head on both sides, lower-left name strip with a muted microphone icon and the readable name Bear Liu. Tile 3, middle left: a seated person in a light gray hoodie in an office chair, hand on chin thinking, pale purple curtain background, thought bubble containing a yellow light bulb, blurred name label bottom left. Tile 4, middle right: a muscular person in a sleeveless black athletic shirt and beige Nike cap, tattooed arm visible, hand on chin, muted green studio background, thought bubble with a black scribble, vertical anxiety lines above the head, blurred name label bottom left. Tile 5, bottom center: a person in a black hoodie and black cap, writing with a white stylus on a tablet, purple burst background, large yellow comic text LET'S GO! at left, two white sparkle icons, desk boxes and a black object in the right background, blurred name tag bottom left.

Text and icons count: Show exactly 5 video tiles, exactly 5 face-blur rectangles, exactly 4 visible lower-left name labels, exactly 1 readable participant name label, exactly 1 large comic slogan, exactly 3 thought/speech bubbles/icons with symbols or text: waving hand, "?!", light bulb, plus one scribble thought bubble. Keep all private names other than the one specified blurred or pixelated.

Constraints: Do not show realistic unblurred faces. Do not add extra tiles, extra people, watermarks, captions outside the meeting window, or interface controls beyond the three top-left dots and tile name labels. Keep the overall look like a playful AI-generated cartoon avatar conversion of a video conference screenshot.
entries.description: Generates a comic-book style cartoon video meeting screenshot with five anonymized participants and exaggerated reaction icons.

entries.title: Modern Mojito Recipe Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a visually stunning modern recipe card for Mojito, presented as a luxurious tropical social-media recipe poster.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 portrait layout, bright white background with soft beach-and-ocean blur behind the hero drink, airy margins, watercolor lime-green splashes around the edges, subtle mint leaf textures, gold ornamental line accents, and a fresh upscale cocktail-bar aesthetic.

Layout: Top-left title area with a tiny gold cocktail icon, the small uppercase label "CUBAN SUMMER DRINK," a huge flowing dark-green script title "Mojito," then the tagline "cool • citrusy • refreshing." Under it add a short description: "A classic Cuban cocktail with crisp mint, zesty lime, and a splash of sunshine." Add a handwritten line: "Sip. Relax. Repeat." On the right side place a tall crystal highball glass filled with crushed ice, lime wedges, mint leaves, bubbles, and condensation, garnished with a lime wheel and mint sprig; include tropical palm shadows and limes/mint on the table.

Ingredients section: Create one elegant bordered card labeled "INGREDIENTS" with exactly 6 ingredient rows, each with a small watercolor-style icon and text: 1) "1 Lime" with subtext "cut into wedges," 2) "10-12 Mint Leaves" with subtext "fresh & fragrant," 3) "Soda Water" with subtext "to top up," 4) "2 tsp Sugar" with subtext "adjust to taste," 5) "60 ml White Rum" with subtext "(2 oz)," 6) "Crushed Ice" with subtext "as much as you love."

Tip card: To the right of the ingredients, add one smaller pale-green bordered card with mint illustration and exactly 2 text blocks: top label "TIP" with the note "Lightly crush mint - don't over-muddle," and bottom label "PERFECT BALANCE" with "1 Lime : 2 tsp Sugar" plus handwritten text "sweet, citrusy, just right!"

How-to section: Along the lower half, add the heading "HOW TO MAKE THE PERFECT MOJITO" and exactly 5 numbered illustrated steps connected by small gold arrows: 1) muddling mint, sugar, and lime in a glass with a wooden muddler, caption "Muddle mint leaves with sugar and lime. Gently press to release the flavors." 2) filling a glass with crushed ice, caption "Fill glass with crushed ice. Crushed ice = maximum chill." 3) pouring white rum and soda water into the glass, caption "Pour white rum and soda water. Add rum, then top up with soda water." 4) stirring with a bar spoon, caption "Stir gently for balanced flavor. Mix lightly to keep it refreshing." 5) finished mojito with mint sprig and lime wheel, caption "Garnish with mint sprig and lime wheel. The final touch of summer."

Footer: Add small uppercase text "REFRESHING • VIBRANT • TIMELESS" and handwritten gold script "Made for sunny days and good vibes!" with a small heart doodle. Decorate the corners with watercolor lime slices, mint sprigs, ice cubes, bubbles, and splashes.

Visual style: Minimal yet artistic, polished editorial recipe-card design, watercolor botanical accents mixed with realistic cocktail photography, fresh lime green, mint green, white, pale aqua, and muted gold. Use elegant serif/sans-serif typography paired with large hand-lettered script for the title.

Constraints: Keep all text legible, maintain the exact counts of 6 ingredient rows, 2 tip-card text blocks, and 5 numbered preparation steps. No people, no watermark, no extra recipe steps, no clutter.
entries.description: A tropical luxury cocktail recipe card for a Cuban mojito, ideal for social media sharing and summer drink content.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的社交快照条目《Modern Mojito Recipe Card》。 关键词：portrait、editorial、beach。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。
