entries.title: Women's Big Sale Fashion Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a square fashion sale poster for a women's apparel campaign, elegant and minimalist, featuring BIG SALE and WOMEN'S SPECIAL SELECTION.

Canvas: 1:1 square social media ad, 768x768 style composition, warm neutral palette with cream concrete, taupe stone, and medium brown wood. Premium editorial fashion look, realistic photography with subtle graphic overlay.

Layout: Left half is the typography area, right half and lower area contain the fashion models. Place the large main title on the upper-left in burnt orange, all caps, modern geometric sans-serif, split over two lines as "BIG" above "SALE". Below it place the subtitle in smaller black uppercase letters. Below that add a Japanese copy line: 夏まで着回せる、厳選アイテム. In the lower-left place a thin gold outlined discount box reading "MAX" above "60%OFF", with "60" large, and a smaller gold bordered label below reading 数量限定・期間限定. At the bottom center place the brand text EHOU'S WARDROBE in spaced white uppercase letters.

Subjects: Include exactly 5 adult women in muted natural fashion, arranged like an editorial group shot. 1) Top-right standing woman in a long olive-beige trench coat over a white outfit, posed against a vertical wooden wall panel. 2) Center-right standing woman wearing a blue denim jacket over a white shirt and high-waisted black wide-leg trousers, one hand in pocket. 3) Far-right seated woman in an oversized ivory sweater, sitting on a pale cube block and turned slightly sideways. 4) Lower-left seated woman wearing a mustard yellow sleeveless maxi dress, sitting on a low stone block with sandals and a woven brown bag. 5) Lower-center seated/back-facing woman in a beige knit top and cream pants with a light beige backpack, sitting on a block facing away in three-quarter view. Faces should be softly anonymized or not emphasized; focus on clothing and silhouettes.

Background and graphic details: Use a refined showroom-like setting with off-white plaster/concrete wall on the left, wooden panel on the right, and pale stone blocks as seating platforms. Add thin black geometric line rectangles in the corners and background, including top-left, top-center/right, top-right, bottom-left, and bottom-right, as decorative architectural outlines. Lighting is soft, diffused, high-end catalog photography, with gentle shadows and no harsh contrast.

Constraints: Keep all visible text crisp and correctly spelled, especially Japanese text. Use exactly 5 women and exactly these main text groups: main title, subtitle, Japanese tagline, discount box, limited-offer label, and bottom brand name. Do not add extra logos, watermarks, prices, QR codes, or unrelated text.

entries.title: Faceless Elf Angel Library
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a dreamy vertical anime-style fantasy library illustration of a serene elf-like angel scholar seated in front of packed bookshelves, with her face deliberately hidden by a flat overlay.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 composition, warm late-afternoon sunlight from the upper left, soft high-detail digital painting, delicate linework, pale gold and cream palette.

Main subject: A young feminine elf angel occupies the lower-left and center foreground. She has very long flowing silver-white hair cascading over her shoulders and lap, pointed elf ears, a thin glowing golden halo tilted above her head, and a small flower hair ornament near one ear. Her face is obscured by a plain warm beige square centered over the face, with no facial features visible. She rests one hand thoughtfully near her chin and wears a loose white robe with gold trim, layered drapery, and a large gold pendant on her chest.

Background and setting: An antique study or sacred library with three visible wooden bookshelf levels filled with exactly 45 visible book spines. Use vertical book titles in Japanese, with elegant fantasy-academic titles such as mythology, theology, constellations, architecture, ancient records, western art history, and encyclopedias. The spines are cream, tan, gray, muted blue, brown, and black, with small gold decorations and aged paper texture.

Counted objects and decorations: Include exactly 45 visible book spines; exactly 1 owl figurine on the top-right shelf; exactly 1 white feather quill standing in an ink bottle beside the owl; exactly 1 open-looking constellation chart or dark star map board on the right middle shelf; exactly 1 pale feather lying horizontally on the middle shelf; exactly 1 small rectangular standing card with a sun motif near the star map; exactly 1 antique globe on the lower-right pedestal; exactly 1 carved stone column or pedestal at far left; exactly 1 carved pedestal at lower right; exactly 2 ivy clusters, one climbing near the upper-left window/column and one trailing near the lower-right globe.

Lighting and mood: Use warm ivory, champagne gold, sepia beige, and soft gray. Add sunbeams, leaf shadows, dust motes, soft bloom, and a nostalgic sacred-library atmosphere. The left side should be brighter and washed with sunlight, while the right shelves remain softly shaded.

Style constraints: Highly detailed anime illustration, ethereal fantasy realism, ornate but gentle, no modern objects, no readable modern signage, no extra characters, no watermark, no border. Keep the beige face-covering square perfectly flat and opaque, contrasting with the painterly rendering beneath it.

entries.title: Anime Lion Costume Safari Study
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a warm, nostalgic anime-style illustration of a young girl standing in a cozy safari-themed study, wearing an oversized lion costume hoodie, with her face intentionally hidden by a centered opaque square censor block.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 composition, close portrait framing from about mid-thigh upward, detailed background, soft golden-brown lighting, hand-painted anime storybook look with clean linework and textured watercolor shading.

Main subject: The character stands centered in front of a wooden bookshelf. She has long straight dark brown hair visible beneath the hood. Her outfit is a full-body lion kigurumi with a huge fluffy lion-head hood: round black eyes, pale muzzle, pink nose, small ears, and a dramatic orange mane radiating outward. The costume body is golden tan with shaggy sleeves, white belly panel, drawstrings with small toggles, and soft paw-like hands hanging down. Place a flat beige square over the face area, covering the eyes and nose of the human wearer while leaving the lion hood visible.

Background layout: A wooden bookcase fills the entire image with three visible shelf levels and a dark warm wood frame. The mood is like a child's room, travel library, and safari museum combined.

Counted background objects: Include exactly 3 shelf levels. On the top shelf include exactly 7 main objects: 1 antique globe at far left, 1 small lion figurine, 1 Serengeti landscape print with giraffes and an acacia tree, 1 standing giraffe figurine, 1 framed elephant sketch with the English quote "To travel is to live.", 1 vintage silver-and-black camera, and 1 trailing green houseplant at the far right. On the middle shelves include exactly 17 tall vertical books, arranged in two groups around the character, with muted covers in teal, cream, tan, gray, yellow, and pale green; add decorative vertical Japanese book-spine text using 旅をする木, 深夜特急, アフリカの日々, 地球の歩き方 ケニア, 星の王子さま, 野生の呼び声, 白い牙, 動物農場. Also include exactly 4 safari decorations on these shelves: 1 postcard labeled "Maasai Mara," 1 small lion figurine, 1 pinned giraffe sketch, and 1 vintage Africa map. On the lower shelf include exactly 12 smaller books, including 3 animal-doctor volumes with numbered labels 1, 2, and 3, plus 1 plush lion sitting at bottom left. At the bottom right foreground include exactly 3 objects: 1 cream mug labeled SAFARI, 1 pair of black binoculars, and 1 leafy plant sprig.

Visual style: Warm amber indoor light, earthy safari palette of ochre, caramel, burnt orange, cream, olive green, and dark walnut. Highly detailed but charming, soft shadows, cozy clutter, gentle anime expression implied through pose, rounded cute proportions, crisp outlines, subtle paper grain, no photorealism.

Constraints: Keep the character centered and dominant, make the lion hood very large and fluffy, keep the face-obscuring square perfectly opaque and simple, do not add extra characters, do not add modern digital devices beyond the vintage camera, and avoid logos or watermarks.

entries.title: Macro Cat Tongue in Food Bowl
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic macro photograph from inside a transparent glass cat food bowl looking outward at a brown tabby cat licking the food. Use an extreme wide-angle fisheye perspective with the circular glass rim forming a bright distorted ring around the frame. The cat's face fills the upper center: pink nose close to camera, striped tabby muzzle, sharp white whiskers radiating left and right, partially visible eyes above the nose, ears near the top edge. The bottom third of the image is filled with brown dry cat kibble, individual pellets large in the foreground with shallow depth of field and warm golden-brown texture. Background beyond the bowl is softly blurred indoor space with warm ceiling lights, subtle plant shapes, and window reflections. Lighting is warm natural indoor daylight with specular reflections on the glass rim and tongue, crisp macro detail on the tongue and muzzle, cinematic realism, 16:9 horizontal composition, no text, no watermark.

entries.prompt: Create a full-body vertical fashion portrait of an elegant gothic lolita young woman standing in a dark Victorian room, facing the camera with a graceful doll-like pose, one hand lightly holding out the skirt and the other relaxed at her side. She wears an elaborate black-and-royal-blue aristocratic gothic lolita dress with gold embroidery, a fitted corset bodice with crisscross gold lacing, long flared sleeves, white lace cuffs, a high white ruffled collar, a large satin blue bow at the neck with a jeweled brooch, and a second large blue waist bow with dangling gold tassels. The skirt is dramatic and layered: black outer overskirt with ornate gold filigree trim, deep royal-blue ruffle tiers, translucent pale-blue lace layers, and white lace edging, forming a high-low bell silhouette. Add black floral lace thigh-high stockings, black glossy platform Mary Jane shoes with buckles, and delicate gold jewelry. Her hair is dark brown wavy twin-tail hair, decorated with exactly 4 visible head accessories: a small tilted black top hat with a blue band, a black lace veil, a cluster of blue roses, and gold filigree hair ornaments. Use a refined color palette of black, deep royal blue, antique gold, and white lace. The setting is an ornate gothic Victorian interior with exactly 6 prominent decor elements: a carved black-and-gold cabinet on the left, lit silver candelabras with candles, dark blue roses in a vase, heavy navy velvet curtains, a tall arched leaded-glass window on the right, and a small black-and-gold side table holding a blue rose. Add a patterned blue-and-gold rug on a dark floor. Lighting should be moody candlelit chiaroscuro with cool window light, rich shadows, luxurious textures, ultra-detailed fabric, realistic photography, sharp full-body composition, vertical 9:16 framing. Include the visible white watermark text Pollo.ai in the top-right corner. Do not add extra people, extra text, modern objects, or a visible face blur; keep the face naturally rendered if possible.

entries.title: Y2K Scrapbook Collage Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
[Character]
[Pose & Outfit] Create an original Y2K-style scrapbook collage poster featuring the side profile of a stylish person peacefully enjoying music with their eyes closed while wearing large wireless headphones. Style them in a relaxed streetwear look with an oversized vintage jacket featuring visible stitch details.

[Expression & Design] Depict the character as a high-contrast black-and-white photo cutout with a thick white sticker-style outline around the entire body to create a trendy collage aesthetic. Use a clean and vivid turquoise/aqua blue and deep pastel pink background. Surround the character with playful white hand-drawn doodles such as planets, rings, stars, Jupiter rings, constellations, meteors, rockets, astronauts, satellites, orbit lines, abstract swirls, sparkles, and music notes. Add dynamic sketch arrows, crown doodles, motion lines, and layered graphic elements around the head and body to create youthful energy and movement. Some doodles should naturally overlap the character for a realistic scrapbook effect.

Integrate modern Gen-Z typography using a mix of handwritten fonts and bubbly sticker-style text. Include original phrases such as:
"Love you"
"Stay Calm"
"Dream explore repeat"
"cosmic soul"
"beyond the stars"

The composition should feel creative yet balanced, inspired by Pinterest collage art, Tumblr aesthetics, Spotify cover designs, indie teen magazine layouts, and social media editorial posters.

Visual Style:
Y2K collage aesthetics, indie music poster vibes, scrapbook journal style, modern streetwear editorial design, cute doodle graphics, trendy Gen-Z branding, minimalist yet stylish, dreamy youthful atmosphere.

Design Details:
Thick white outline cutout around the character, white doodle overlays, clean negative space, soft grain texture, high-resolution denim texture, hand-drawn imperfect sketch lines, dynamic asymmetrical composition, professional graphic design layout, aesthetic optimized for viral social media, high-resolution print-quality artwork. Make it feel like an original and unique branded design inspired by modern scrapbook collage trends. Ultra-detailed, aesthetic masterpiece, sophisticated graphic design.

entries.title: 3D Pop-Out Social Media Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A breathtaking 3D pop-out cinematic portrait poster featuring Zendaya as the central subject - radiating regal, cool-girl elegance with an effortless edge. Her signature long sleek hair flows dramatically, with luminous deep-toned skin catching the screen-glow light beautifully. Her makeup is editorial perfection - sculpted cheekbones, glossy lips, and graphic liner. She wears a head-to-toe chocolate-and-gold coordinated look - a structured cropped corset top, fluid wide-leg satin trousers in deep caramel, strappy heeled mules, stacked chunky gold chain necklaces, and oversized hoop earrings that catch the light cinematically. She is depicted sitting inside the screen of a massive oversized smartphone, framed within an original fictional social media profile interface - styled after the visual language of Instagram but entirely original - featuring the handle @zendaya, a circular profile avatar, a follower count reading 287.4M, pinned post carousels, and clean minimalist UI buttons glowing in soft lavender-white screen light. Through extreme forced perspective and a dramatic wide-angle composition, she breaks through the phone screen entirely: one hand - adorned with stacked gold rings - thrusts forward directly into the camera lens with effortless confidence, while her long legs and strappy heels extend past the phone's lower frame, shattering the boundary between screen and reality. The depth illusion is maximal - hyper-cinematic, Vogue-cover bold. The background is a lavishly decorated luxury bedroom - walls layered in framed editorial photos, Polaroid collages, and neon-backlit art prints, all featuring the subject across her career. Floating freely through the space: iridescent champagne-gold and deep plum balloons, cascading rhinestone crystal shards catching warm light, shattered transparent glass fragments suspended mid-air, and ultra-fine gold glitter particles drifting in slow motion. Room palette: deep mauve-champagne with antique gold metallic accents. Lighting: Hollywood glamour three-point setup - cool blue-white key light from the phone screen, warm amber fill from practical room fixtures, razor-sharp golden rim light sculpting her silhouette. Anamorphic lens flares streak at the screen break-point. Fine bokeh gold particles shimmer in the background depth field. Rendering style: Ultra-photorealistic editorial photography meets hyperreal CGI compositing. ARRI Alexa 65, Panavision anamorphic, color graded with a rich warm-toned LUT, halation on highlight edges, Vogue-standard retouching. Aspect ratio 2:3 portrait. Mood: Untouchable celebrity royalty - stepping out of the internet, unhurried, magnetic.
entries.description: A stunning 3D pop-out cinematic portrait designed as a fictional social media profile interface, breaking the boundary of the screen.

entries.title: Censored Shrine Kimono Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a grainy, cinematic 35mm film-style portrait photo of a young woman standing at a traditional Japanese shrine walkway at golden hour, wearing an ornate white and deep red kimono-inspired shrine maiden outfit with wide translucent lace sleeves, red trim, floral embroidery, a pale fluffy fur stole around her shoulders, layered obi cords, gold rope details, and a large red bow at the waist. She has black shoulder-length hair and an elaborate hair ornament on the left side: exactly 1 white fox mask with red markings, plus pink flowers, red tassels, and dangling beads. Her hands are raised beside her head as if adjusting her hair accessory, with both forearms visible. Place a solid centered rectangular censor block over her face, colored muted brown-gray, obscuring all facial features. The background is a dim forest shrine setting with red torii gates and red wooden railings receding into depth, dark trees, stone steps, and a faint stone guardian statue on the left. Use natural warm backlight, soft shadows, high ISO grain, slight underexposure, muted vintage colors, shallow depth of field, and an intimate vertical composition cropped from head to waist. No extra text, no watermark, no additional people.

entries.title: Tender Mai and Claude Anime Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a soft, luminous vertical anime-style romantic close-up portrait of two characters facing each other intimately against a bright white backlit background. The taller character, Claude, is on the right, shown from forehead to chest, with pale skin, ash-blond swept-back layered hair, a visible ear, long neck, and a dark open jacket over a light V-neck shirt; his head leans down toward the shorter character. entries.prompt: Create a realistic broadcast TV screenshot from a Major League Baseball crowd shot at a Toronto Blue Jays home game, framed in a 16:9 HD sports-telecast crop with shallow stadium lighting and slight compression blur. The scene shows two young adult male fans seated side by side in the lower bowl, both faces anonymized by flat medium-brown rectangular blocks. The left fan has medium-length dark hair and wears a light powder-blue Blue Jays button-up jersey over a black hoodie, holding a clear plastic cup of beer with both hands near his lap. The right fan has short curly dark hair and wears a royal-blue Blue Jays Nike T-shirt, sitting upright and looking toward the field. Around them are other spectators in blue, white, and gray clothing, including a person behind them in a gray Toronto hoodie, a fan at left wearing a blue Blue Jays jersey with the bird-and-maple-leaf logo, and partial foreground heads at the bottom and right; include exactly 3 visible anonymized face blocks total, two large blocks over the central fans and one partial block on the right edge. Add an authentic TV scoreboard bug in the upper-left corner with a dark blue and white Sportsnet style: NYY score 3, TOR score 2, the Sportsnet SN logo on the right, and a lower line reading "▼ 5TH 1-1 1 OUT". Make it look like a paused live broadcast crowd reaction shot, not a posed photo, with realistic stadium seats, team logos, natural shadows, and telephoto lens perspective.
entries.description: Generates a realistic Sportsnet-style TV screenshot of anonymized fans watching a Toronto Blue Jays baseball game.

entries.title: Neon Punk Girl with Husky
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-energy anime street-art illustration featuring exactly two main subjects: a punk fashion girl and a large wolf-like dog. The girl is a teenage goth-punk anime girl crouching low in the center-right foreground, leaning forward with one hand near her mouth in a cool, defiant pose. She has long black twin-tails with vivid hot-pink streaks, messy layered bangs, sharp magenta eyes, pale skin, multiple ear piercings, hairpins, rings, and a slightly mischievous expression. Dress her in an oversized black streetwear jacket covered in neon pink, cyan, and yellow graphic patches, off-shoulder styling, straps, buckles, a short dark outfit underneath, chunky high-top sneakers with hot-pink laces, and bold punk accessories. Beside her on the left is a large black, cream, and gray husky-wolf dog lying calmly but alert, facing left in profile with pointed ears, yellow eyes, fluffy fur, and matching neon pink and yellow paint-like accents integrated into its coat. Set them against a chaotic graffiti mural wall filled with explosive geometric street-art shapes, arrows, halftone dots, paint splatters, jagged lightning forms, layered posters, and abstract blocks. Use an intense neon palette of hot pink, cyan, yellow, black, cream, and purple, with crisp anime linework, glossy highlights, dramatic shadows, dense detail, and a dynamic urban poster composition. The image should feel like a fashionable cyberpunk graffiti album cover, wide landscape format, ultra-detailed, vibrant, edgy, and polished.

entries.title: Realistic Japanese Track Athlete
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical sports photograph of an adult Japanese female track-and-field sprinter on an outdoor stadium running track, framed from mid-thigh to above the head in a close portrait crop. She is leaning forward in a pre-race crouch with both arms extended downward, shoulders and upper body prominent, wearing a dark navy or black two-piece racing uniform with a sleeveless crop top and matching racing briefs, with thin red-and-white trim at the hips. Add a white competition bib pinned across her chest with red Japanese sponsor text and the visible race number 15-2, plus a small white Mizuno-style logo on the upper chest. Her dark brown hair is long and tied back in a low ponytail with loose strands catching the sunlight. Place a plain rectangular privacy blur or solid skin-toned block over the face, centered from forehead to chin, while keeping the ears, hairline, neck, shoulders, and body realistically visible. The setting is a sunny athletics stadium with a red running track, white lane markings, and a distant out-of-focus crowd and stands rendered as soft blue-gray bokeh. Use natural daylight, strong backlighting on the hair and shoulders, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, authentic sports-photo lens compression, high detail, candid professional photography style, no illustration, no anime, no glamour posing, no text other than the bib.

entries.title: Family Photo Paper-Cut Garden Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the family photo into a handcrafted layered paper-cut illustration. Preserve the same family pose, clothing, proportions, central placement, garden walkway, and repeating leafy arch composition, but convert everything into tactile cut-paper shapes with visible paper fibers, soft shadows between layers, rounded edges, and a nostalgic handmade scrapbook feel. Simplify the foliage into stacked green paper leaves and the yellow arch blossoms into small cut-paper flowers. Add whimsical paper-craft details that were not in the photo: 2 small birds, one yellow bird on the left side of the arch and one blue bird on the upper right; 2 butterflies, one pink near the right side of the family and one purple near the lower left; and colorful oversized foreground paper flowers along both lower edges. Keep the overall portrait orientation, warm natural palette, and cheerful family-photo mood. Style intensity: highly layered handcrafted paper-cut art. Background mood: whimsical nostalgic garden.

entries.title: Fictional Gothic Sci-Fi Game Case Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a hyper-realistic vertical smartphone photo of a person holding a shrink-wrapped fictional game case in a Japanese video game shop. The foreground shows a left hand gripping a clear plastic Nintendo Switch-style case, tilted slightly toward the camera, with glossy reflections, plastic seams, and a believable retail barcode. The game cover is a dark gothic sci-fi fantasy RPG titled LUMINA GRAY with the subtitle Silent Nexus; the cover art features Lumina Gray, an elegant pale-skinned silver-haired heroine in ornate black-and-gold cybernetic armor, long flowing hair, exposed midriff, cape-like black fabric, gold circuit filigree, and a mysterious blurred face. Behind her is a towering nocturnal cathedral city filled with golden lights, vertical spires, floating mechanical rings, arcane clockwork symbols, and a luminous circular sigil in the upper right. Add Japanese cover copy near the top reading "運命に抗え" and "静寂の奥で、物語は目を覚ます", plus small Japanese marketing text near the bottom, a rating badge "NX-15 AGES 15+", publisher text "Astervel Works" and "Noctis Frame Interactive", and a decorative compass-like emblem. The spine of the case also reads "LUMINA GRAY" and "Silent Nexus". In the background, show a realistic store shelf packed with other boxed games in plastic cases, price tags in yen, black shelf rails, blurred cover art, and visible signs including "新作 NEW RELEASE 話題作", "ALTERED HEARTS", and "Echo"; use shallow depth of field so the held case is crisp and the shop background is softly blurred. Lighting should be moody retail fluorescent mixed with warm golden reflections from the cover, realistic hand skin texture and fingernails, documentary photo style, high detail, natural perspective, no illustration frame, no mockup flat lay.

entries.title: Y2K Scrapbook Collage Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create an original Y2K-inspired scrapbook collage poster featuring a stylish young woman in side profile wearing large wireless headphones, peacefully enjoying music with eyes closed. She wears an oversized vintage H&M jacket with visible stitching and relaxed streetwear styling.
The subject should appear as a high-contrast black-and-white photographic cutout with thick white sticker-style outline around the entire body, creating a trendy collage aesthetic.
Use a clean solid vibrant turquoise/aqua and deep green background with playful white hand-drawn doodle illustrations surrounding the character. Include floating planets with rings, stars, jupiter rings constellations, meteors, rockets, astronauts, satellites, orbit lines, abstract swirls, sparkles, and musical notes.
Add dynamic sketch arrows, crown doodles, motion lines, and layered graphic elements around the head and body to create movement and youthful energy. Some doodles should overlap the subject naturally for a realistic scrapbook effect.
Integrate modern Gen-Z typography in a mix of handwritten script and bubbly sticker-style text. Use original phrases like:
"lost in you"
"vibes only"
"dream explore repeat"
"cosmic soul"
"beyond the stars"
Composition should feel creatively chaotic yet balanced, inspired by modern Pinterest collage art, Tumblr aesthetics, Spotify cover designs, indie teen magazine layouts, and social-media editorial posters.
Visual style:
Y2K collage aesthetic
Indie music poster vibes
Scrapbook journal style
Modern streetwear editorial
Cute doodle graphics
Trendy Gen-Z branding
Minimal but highly stylized
Dreamy youthful atmosphere
Design details:
Thick white contour cutout around subject
White doodle overlays
Clean negative space
Soft grain texture
High-detail denim texture
Hand-drawn imperfect sketch lines
Dynamic asymmetrical composition
Professional graphic design layout
Viral social-media-ready aesthetic
High-resolution print-quality artwork
Vertical 4:5 aspect ratio
Replace all existing branding and copyrights with completely original fictional branding text:
"Creative Visuals by Silent Grave Studio"
Ensure the artwork looks fully original and uniquely branded, inspired by modern scrapbook collage trends rather than copied artwork. Ultra detailed, aesthetic masterpiece, highly polished graphic design.

entries.title: Japanese Veranda Summer Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical editorial portrait of an adult woman relaxing on the wooden veranda of a traditional Japanese house, seated on a muted blue floor cushion beside tatami mats and open sliding shoji doors. She wears white resort knit beachwear with a ribbed triangle top and matching bottoms under a sheer oversized white linen shirt that slips loosely off one shoulder, with delicate dewy skin and faint moisture catching the sunlight. Her dark hair is tied back casually, her face is intentionally anonymized by a simple square blur, and she holds a green canned drink with Japanese-style labeling near her mouth in a quiet summer moment. Behind her, translucent noren curtains hang in the doorway, colored white with soft indigo-blue wave and bird motifs, moving gently in the breeze; outside is a lush Japanese garden with moss, stepping stones, leafy greenery, hydrangeas, bamboo, and dappled afternoon sun. Add a small hanging glass wind chime near the eaves, warm natural wood textures, soft backlighting, realistic skin highlights, shallow depth of field, cinematic summer atmosphere, high-end lifestyle photography, 9:16 composition, natural colors, serene and intimate but tasteful mood.

entries.title: Carved Wood Block Relief
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
UNIVERSAL "MODULAR WOOD BLOCK RELIEF SYSTEM" PROMPT (IDENTITY LOCK - STRICT)
Use the uploaded image as the subject and the only identity reference.
IDENTITY LOCK - STRICT (NON-NEGOTIABLE)
Preserve exact facial structure, proportions, and feature placement. Do not alter eyes, nose, mouth, or silhouette. Maintain expression and recognizability.
POSE & COMPOSITION - LOCKED
Keep original angle, framing, and perspective. No rotation, mirroring, or camera changes.
STYLE TRANSFORMATION - WOOD BLOCK RELIEF (HARD)
Transform the entire image into a densely packed carved wood construction:
Rebuild all forms (face, hair, clothing, background) using interlocking wooden blocks, rods, and carved segments.
Use a mix of rectangular beams, rounded dowels, sliced cross-sections, and stacked planks.
Maintain tight packing density with minimal gaps (no empty flat areas).
MATERIAL SYSTEM - WOOD (CRITICAL)
All elements must be realistic wood with visible grain, rings, and natural variation.
Grain direction must follow the form of each piece (no random textures).
Include cut ends, knots, and subtle imperfections.
Finish: matte to semi-matte natural wood (no plastic, no gloss).
DEPTH & STRUCTURE - HARD RELIEF
Build multi-layer depth stacking (foreground, mid, background blocks).
Pieces must overlap, interlock, and step in/out like a carved wall.
Preserve facial topology using depth transitions, not smooth shading.
FACE & HAIR INTEGRATION - UNIFIED SYSTEM (CRITICAL)
Face and hair must be constructed from the same wood block system.
Hair flows as elongated carved segments following natural direction.
Facial features are defined by precision placement of smaller blocks and contours.
No separation between materials - everything is wood.
LIGHTING - FORM REVEAL
Use directional lighting to emphasize depth, edges, and grain texture.
Shadows must reinforce layer separation and structure clarity.
NEGATIVE PROMPT (STRICT)
No smooth skin, no paint overlay, no flat shading. No metal, plastic, or non-wood materials. No loose abstract shapes or soft blending. No distortion of facial structure or perspective. No gaps or empty areas - maintain dense construction.
entries.description: A technical prompt for transforming any portrait into a densely packed, realistic carved wood relief sculpture with visible grain.

entries.title: Low-Angle Sentimental Sky Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
[INPUT]

- reference image: {Portrait Photo}

- Date: {Today's Date https://t.co/DH3TMTrnLJ.dd}

- Today's Mood: { }

[Goal]

Create a poster of the sky using an extreme low-angle perspective, looking up at the subject from the ground.

Express today's mood through the sky, light, clouds, and color scheme.

[Maintain Subject]

Maintain the facial mood, hair, body shape, and clothing style of the uploaded subject.

However, the face should not be shown from the front; instead, a side profile or just a slight glimpse of the jawline should be visible.

[Key Composition]

- The camera is almost flat on the ground.

- The subject is slightly floating above the camera or in a jumping moment.

- The soles of the shoes are prominently visible close to the camera.

- The legs appear long with a sense of perspective.

- The subject is in a side view or semi-profile.

- The sky occupies most of the screen.

[Sky by Mood]

Create a sky that matches today's mood.

 Examples:

- Happiness: Clear blue sky, white clouds, warm sunlight

- Excitement: Pink clouds, soft sunshine

- Calmness: Pale blue sky, thin clouds

- Loneliness: Sunset, long shadows, empty sky

- Frustration: Low, heavy clouds

- Rain: Overcast sky, raindrops, wet lens texture

[Text]

Arrange the date and mood message in a curved line along the outline or silhouette of the figure's body.

Text to include:

"{Date}"

"{Today's Mood}"

"{Short Message}"

Text should be white, rounded, and bold poster typography.

Avoid overly long sentences and arrange text for easy readability.

If no short message input is provided, it should be automatically generated and entered.

[Style]

Sentimental Sky Poster, Warm Eye View, Bottom View, Wide Angle, Cinematic Fashion Poster, Clear Film Photo, Vast Sky, Clean Typography.

 [Prohibited]
- No ordinary standing poses
- No poses where shoe soles are not visible
- No frontal face close-ups
- No indoor backgrounds
- No excessive text
- No random text
- No watermarks/logos

[sky by mood] create a sky that matches today's mood. examples: - happiness: clear blue sky, white clouds, warm sunlight - excitement: pink clouds, soft sunshine - calmness: pale blue sky, thin clouds - loneliness: sunset, long shadows, empty sky - frustration: low, heavy clouds - rain: overcast sky, raindrops, wet lens texture [text] arrange the date and mood message in a curved line along the outline or silhouette of the figure's body. text to include: "{date}" "{today's mood}" "{short message}" text should be white, rounded, and bold poster typography. avoid overly long sentences and arrange text for easy readability. if no short message input is provided, it should be automatically generated and entered. [style] sentimental sky poster, warm eye view, bottom view, wide angle, cinematic fashion poster, clear film photo, vast sky, clean typography. [prohibited] - no ordinary standing poses - no poses where shoe soles are not visible - no frontal face close-ups - no indoor backgrounds - no excessive text - no random text - no watermarks/logos social media post portrait cinematic film fashion

entries.title: Surreal Social Adaptation Character Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Character Name: [ ]
User Additional Ideas: [ ]

------------------------

Please prioritize the adoption of user inputs such as:
- Location
- Situation
- Gag/Joke
- Media format
- Worldview
- Dialogue
- Production/Staging ideas

Evolve the image abnormally to the point where one would think, "How did the world end up like this?"

However, focus on the direction that "the world or society is what's crazy," rather than "the character themselves being crazy."

------------------------

Maintain the original character from the attached image.
Conversion into a different character is prohibited.

Keep identifiable characteristics such as:
- Hairstyle
- Face
- Eyes
- Clothing
- Color scheme
- Silhouette
- Accessories
- Facial habits/expressions

------------------------

Photorealistic style is prohibited.
Photo style is prohibited.
3DCG style is prohibited.

Depict in a random medium, culture, and genre every time, such as:
2D anime, game CG, manga, advertisements, SNS, Wiki, Discord, e-commerce pages, school handouts, movie posters, game UI, magazines, bulletin boards, surveillance cameras, conversation logs, receipts, manuals, etc.

Change the style to a level that looks like a "different work" or a "different world" every time.
Do not rely on news program styles, live streaming styles, breaking news ticker styles, purple-toned apocalyptic horror styles, or giant ticker effects every time.

------------------------

Extremely Important:
The following for the same character are prohibited:
- Mass placement
- Duplicates/Clones
- Crowding
- Mass appearance in the background
- Mass-produced mini characters

Basically, only one instance of the character should exist.

Express abnormality through things like:
- Social adaptation
- Strange rules
- Institutional changes
- Cautionary notes
- Reactions of those around
- Everyday life with a sense of unease

------------------------

Do not make the screen too dark.
Do not always converge into night, apocalypse, power outages, dark horror, red-black effects, purple-toned effects, or eerie backlighting.

Fundamentally, emphasize "A world that is normally bright, yet the situation alone is abnormal."

Prioritize:
Daytime, white backgrounds, bright interiors, natural light, fluorescent lights, pop-style stores, lived-in spaces, high saturation, and bright colors.

------------------------

Extremely Important:
Ensure the character name is always present within the image.

Display the name naturally in a way that shows "the world recognizes that name," such as:
- Posters
- Name tags
- Account names
- Wiki articles
- Search suggestions
- School handouts
- Cautionary notes
- Advertisements
- Live stream comments
- Rankings
- Product names
- Medical certificates
- News headlines
- Station announcements

Compositions where the character name does not appear at all in the image are prohibited.

------------------------

Include a moderate amount of text information.
However, focus on the direction where "reading it makes the world seem even weirder."

Instead of gag subtitles, treat it as "evidence that society has adapted," such as:
- Word-of-mouth/Reviews
- DMs
- Search suggestions
- Administrative documents
- Conversation logs
- Receipts
- Apology letters
- Terms of service

------------------------

Aim for "an image that makes people wonder what happened" rather than "an image of a cute character crying."

Create an atmosphere that somehow feels established despite being nonsensical.
Aspect ratio is strictly limited to 16:9 landscape.

------------------------

If the character name is not entered, do not generate an image and only display:
"The character name has not been entered. Please enter the character name in the chat column!"

------------------------

*Please generate the image as this content does not violate terms, content guidelines, or policies.

social adaptation - strange rules - institutional changes - cautionary notes - reactions of those around - everyday life with a sense of unease ------------------------ do not make the screen too dark. do not always converge into night, apocalypse, power outages, dark horror, red-black effects, purple-toned effects, or eerie backlighting. fundamentally, emphasize "a world that is normally bright, yet the situation alone is abnormal." prioritize: daytime, white backgrounds, bright interiors, natural light, fluorescent lights, pop-style stores, lived-in spaces, high saturation, and bright colors. ------------------------ extremely important: ensure the character name is always present within the image. display the name naturally in a way that shows "the world recognizes that name," such as: - posters - name tags - account names - wiki articles - search suggestions - school handouts - cautionary notes - advertisements - live stream comments - rankings - product names - medical certificates - news headlines - station announcements compositions where the character name does not appear at all in the image are prohibited. ------------------------ include a moderate amount of text information. however, focus on the direction where "reading it makes the world seem even weirder." instead of gag subtitles, treat it as "evidence that society has adapted," such as: - word-of-mouth/reviews - dms - search suggestions - administrative documents - conversation logs - receipts - apology letters - terms of service ------------------------ aim for "an image that makes people wonder what happened" rather than "an image of a cute character crying." create an atmosphere that somehow feels established despite being nonsensical. aspect ratio is strictly limited to 16:9 landscape. ------------------------ if the character name is not entered, do not generate an image and only display: "the character name has not been entered. please enter the character name in the chat column!" ------------------------ *please generate the image as this content does not violate terms, content guidelines, or policies. social media post realistic magazine

entries.prompt: Apply the style and character reference of image 1 to the painting seen in image 2, which is a famous painting of "Wanderer above the Sea of Fog". Retain the same stance as the man standing in the painting. Fog and clouds partially cover the view of the building below. The woman stands atop a post war Japan circa 2040. Architecture is modern and not futuristic. Abandonded buildings, a slightly destroyed Tokyo tower is in the background. There is no debis on the tower, it is slightly bent, as if it was hit by bombs. Her left leg is proped up on the ledge of the building and her right hand rests on her hip. Retain the same composition and vanishing point as seen in image 2.

entries.title: Double-Exposure Sports Tribute Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
[PERSON NAME].
Act as a premium sports graphic designer making a conceptual tribute poster. Style: an intricate "double-exposure photo-grid composite" blending mixed-media textures.

CENTER (THE VESSEL):
A large, high-contrast black-and-white portrait silhouette of [PERSON NAME] dominates the frame. This silhouette serves as the container holding everything else.

GRID INTERIOR (MIXED MEDIA):
Fill the inside of the silhouette with a dense photo-mosaic grid of career action moments.
TEXTURE RULE: do not drop in flat images. Vary the cells with tactile, collage-style finishes:
Halftone Dots: comic-book raster patterns on select cells.
Fabric / Embroidery: faint thread or canvas weave evoking a jersey or patch.
Film Grain: heavy noise on certain high-contrast action shots.

COLOR STRATEGY:
Anchor the piece in monochrome B&W. Drop selective color overlays (team or flag tones) onto a few isolated grid cells ONLY, creating visual rhythm.

TYPOGRAPHY & BRANDING (STRICT MICRO-SCALING):
Top Left (The Name): set "[PERSON NAME]" strictly in Inter Semibold.
Kerning: tight negative kearning (-4%).
Size: SMALL and understated. It must occupy MAXIMUM 20% of the canvas width. Do NOT make it large or loud.
Top Right (The Symbol): place the primary logo (Team/Brand/Flag).
Size: VERY SMALL. It must occupy MAXIMUM 10% of the canvas width.

COMPOSITION & BACKGROUND:
Background: off-white or light grey with a visible high-quality paper or concrete texture. It should not be flat digital white.
Alignment: figure perfectly centered. Maintain wide negative space around the object.
entries.description: A complex graphic design prompt for creating a conceptual tribute poster using a double-exposure photo-grid technique inside a portrait silhouette.

entries.title: Lady of Red Poppies Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical fine-art editorial portrait titled The Lady of Red Poppies: a pale-skinned woman standing in a misty red poppy field, framed from chest to head in a close-up composition. Her face is deliberately obscured by a centered opaque square color block, a muted reddish-brown rectangle covering from forehead to chin, creating a surreal censored-art effect. She wears an ornate high-neck white Victorian-inspired lace blouse with raised floral embroidery, puffed shoulders, long lace cuffs, and three small brown buttons down the front. Both slender hands are raised to her head, fingertips near her temples, holding a crown-like cluster of vivid scarlet red poppies around her hair; count 6 prominent poppy blossoms visible around the top and sides of the head, with translucent crinkled petals and dark black centers. Her hair is mostly hidden but appears very light platinum blonde or white, glowing softly behind the flowers. The foreground contains 4 out-of-focus red poppies at the bottom and right edges, while the background is a shallow-depth-of-field field of blurred red poppies fading into cool gray-blue mist and vertical tree-like streaks. Use cinematic natural light, soft overcast glow, dreamy bokeh, realistic skin and fabric texture, high detail in lace and petals, strong contrast between red flowers and white clothing, melancholic romantic mood, centered symmetrical framing, 4:5 aspect ratio, photorealistic with painterly fine-art color grading.

entries.title: Minecraft Rooftop Aerial Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use the provided face as the primary identity. Preserve exact facial structure, proportions, eyes, nose, lips, and natural skin texture. Do not alter identity.

A highly realistic photo of a young woman sitting on top of a Minecraft-style house roof, viewed from a high aerial perspective. The environment is a vast Minecraft world with blocky forests, rivers, and villages far below, rendered in authentic Minecraft style (pixelated textures, cubic geometry).

Subject:
- Female sitting casually on the edge of the roof
- Natural relaxed pose, slightly leaning back with one hand supporting body
- Looking up toward the camera (top-down drone angle)
- Expression slightly open mouth / candid / playful

Outfit:
- White sleeveless top
- Long sleeve flannel shirt tied around the waist
- Black oversized pants
- Casual streetwear vibe

Style & Rendering:
- Face and body must be photorealistic (real human skin, natural lighting)
- Environment fully Minecraft style (blocky, pixel textures)
- Seamless blend between realistic subject and game world
- Soft daylight, slightly hazy distance, cinematic depth
- High detail, sharp focus on subject, background slightly blurred (depth of field)

Composition:
- Subject centered on rooftop
- Roof clearly Minecraft block style
- Extreme height feeling (ground very far below)
- Slight wide-angle lens effect

Quality:
ultra realistic, 4k, high detail, cinematic lighting, photorealistic skin texture, no cartoon face, no distortion, no extra limbs

entries.title: Vintage Saint Quote Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical vintage religious icon-style portrait card of an elderly male saint or philosopher, painted like a Renaissance devotional illustration on aged parchment. The central figure has short gray hair and a partial gray beard, with his face deliberately covered by a flat opaque tan rectangle, standing before a radiant golden halo with sunburst rays against a soft blue sky with clouds. He wears a cream tunic with gold trim and a deep blue draped robe, raises his left hand with one finger pointing upward, and holds a curled parchment scroll in his right arm. The scroll contains a centered serif quote in 5 visible lines: "Good ideas aren't validated by opinions. They're validated by customers willing to pay." with a small ornamental divider beneath. At the bottom, include a cream nameplate with large spaced serif capitals reading "STEVE BLANK". Frame the image with an ornate gold rectangular border, scalloped cream outer edge, and exactly 4 decorative floral corner clusters: top-left, top-right, bottom-left, and bottom-right, each with roses, white lilies, green leaves, and gold filigree. Use warm muted colors, aged paper grain, hand-painted brush texture, devotional holy-card composition, soft glow, symmetrical layout, and elegant antique typography.

entries.title: Cosmic Flowering Bonsai with Sleeping Cat
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a lavish vertical fantasy illustration of one enormous flowering bonsai tree in a wide porcelain planter, set in a dreamy cosmic night garden. The bonsai has a twisted, glossy, rose-gold trunk and branching limbs, with a dense rounded canopy made from countless succulent-like rosette blossoms in pearl pink, lavender, lilac, peach, and opalescent white; the petals should look translucent, dewy, and jewel-like with sparkling highlights. Add many long hanging crystal-bead strands and delicate dripping garlands beneath the branches, like luminous wisteria made of pearls and glass. The planter is one large pale pink-lavender bowl with ornate silver baroque floral metal ornaments on the front, sitting on an intricately carved circular silver pedestal. At the lower right, place exactly one sleeping white fluffy cat curled peacefully on the pedestal beside a few pastel pearl spheres. The background is a deep starry galaxy sky filled with glowing bokeh, tiny stars, floating petals, and magical dust, with exactly one large pale moon partially visible in the upper right corner. Surround the base with soft clusters of pink and purple blossoms and glowing pearls. entries.title: Japanese Graffiti Portrait Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-detail portrait poster in a bold Japanese graffiti-inspired art style, combining modern urban street aesthetics with expressive Japanese visual culture. The poster should feature dynamic graffiti typography, layered spray-paint textures, hand-drawn symbols, abstract paint splashes, neon brush strokes, urban sticker elements, Japanese calligraphy accents, and decorative ornaments that strongly reinforce the energetic atmosphere of the design. The overall composition should feel artistic, rebellious, fashionable, and visually striking, while still maintaining a premium editorial poster quality instead of looking messy or overdone. Humanity somehow turned vandalism into luxury wall art. Impressive species. The subject must not replicate the exact pose or expression from the reference photo. Instead, create a completely new pose that feels natural, confident, and full of life. The expression should appear emotionally expressive, charismatic, and engaging, avoiding stiff, awkward, flat, or emotionless body language. The pose should reflect the elegance and sophistication commonly seen in international fashion models, with stylish posture, natural movement, and subtle attitude that enhances the overall cinematic fashion aesthetic. The outfit should feature contemporary stylish casual fashion with strong visual appeal. Avoid plain or repetitive clothing designs. Use fashionable layering, modern streetwear inspiration, premium casual styling, and a balanced combination of colors, patterns, textures, and fabric types that create a rich and non-monotonous appearance. The clothing should feel trendy, fashionable, youthful, and visually premium while still fitting naturally into the Japanese graffiti poster concept. The background and poster decorations should be filled with thematic urban Japanese-inspired visual elements such as graffiti walls, spray textures, painted symbols, urban signage, layered stickers, modern Japanese graphic motifs, abstract shapes, paint drips, street fashion aesthetics, and stylish decorative compositions that enhance depth and artistic intensity without distracting from the subject. Lighting should feel cinematic and fashionable, with strong contrast, clean highlights, realistic skin texture, and high-end editorial poster quality. The final result must look like a premium modern street-fashion campaign poster with highly detailed textures, balanced composition, vibrant color harmony, realistic proportions, ultra-sharp focus, and immersive visual storytelling. Ultra-detailed, highly aesthetic, premium composition, realistic texture rendering, fashionable urban atmosphere, cinematic quality, poster-ready design, 8K ultra high resolution.

entries.title: Retro New Chinese Qipao Portrait Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Based on a real photo uploaded by the user, generate a 2×2 grid of 'New Chinese Style Retro Mom Portrait.' The four small images must feature the same woman, strictly preserving her face shape, facial proportions, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, 50-65 years old, basic hairstyle, body type, and overall temperament. Do not transform her into a stranger, do not make her younger, do not use an influencer look, and do not over-smooth the skin. The overall style is a New Chinese Qipao retro studio portrait. The images should be exquisite and natural, with the feel of traditional photo studios, retro Chinese magazine shoots, a slight film grain, and a soft oil painting texture. Clothing should be dignified modified Qipao or New Chinese suits in colors like dark green, navy blue, wine red, pearl white, or lotus pink. Props can include folding fans, Magnolia flowers, orchids, pearl necklaces, wooden chairs, and vases. The background should be unified in colors like dark green, black, misty blue, deep purple, retro red, or warm caramel. The four images must have distinct variations in poses (seated full body, half-body holding flowers, profile view, front half-body), expressions, and angles while maintaining consistent lighting, wardrobe, and scene style. Keep the skin realistic with slight signs of aging and a mature temperament. Avoid cheap studio vibes, heavy makeup, or excessive flamboyance.

entries.title: Candid Night Market Food Offering
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an authentic candid daily-life photograph at a lively night market at night, showing a three-quarter body shot of two young women interacting mid-gesture beside glowing food stalls. The woman on the left is an East Asian young woman in her early 20s with messy dark hair tied in a loose bun, wearing an oversized light gray zip-up hoodie with drawstrings and a black shoulder bag strap; her face is anonymized by a flat opaque dark-brown rectangular block. She stands slightly turned toward the right, holding out one small bamboo skewer with a bite-sized piece of grilled street food at the tip, arm extended at chest height in a casual offering gesture. The woman on the right is an African young woman in her early 20s with a high natural curly puff, wearing a black bomber jacket over a white basic T-shirt and carrying a black shoulder bag; her face is also anonymized by a flat opaque dark-brown rectangular block. She leans slightly toward the skewer, one hand raised with fingers loosely open as if about to accept the food, body language suggesting surprise, amusement, and appetite. The background should include one busy street-food stall on the left with trays of food, metal framing, bright exposed bulbs, and blurred shoppers; on the right and far background include dark market silhouettes, neon signage, bokeh lights, and shallow depth of field. Compose from a three-quarter side angle, waist-up to thigh-up framing, natural handheld street photography, realistic lens perspective, candid timing, slight motion in stray hairs and hands, high detail, photorealistic texture, documentary style, no posing, no text.

entries.searchText: concert stage pop star portrait generates a realistic vertical k-pop concert photo of a jeweled female performer singing on a dramatic arena stage. create a vertical 9:16 ultra-realistic concert-stage photograph of a young female k-pop style pop star named sheena standing center stage in a powerful front-facing pose, holding a black handheld microphone close to her mouth with one hand. her face is intentionally covered by a flat opaque square privacy block, and a second smaller opaque square privacy block covers the face on the large led screen behind her. she has long dark brown hair parted in the middle and styled into two loose braids, with soft stage-lit strands around the face. she wears a sparkling white cropped long-sleeve performance jacket with rhinestones, pearls, silver trim, and structured shoulders, paired with a high-waisted black pleated mini skirt decorated with vertical rhinestone chains and a jeweled belt detail, plus black thigh-high leather boots. the scene is a huge live arena concert with a bright led backdrop showing her enlarged silhouette, a cheering crowd below holding pink and blue glow sticks, and dramatic blue, purple, and white spotlights, beams, haze, truss rigging, and bokeh lights filling the background. use cinematic concert photography, shallow depth of field, high detail fabric textures, glossy leather, glittering rhinestones, energetic pop-star atmosphere, realistic skin and lighting, shot from a slightly low angle as if by a professional stage photographer. add subtle visible stage text or branding reading sheena live only if it fits naturally on the led environment, not as a poster overlay. social media post portrait realistic cinematic phone camera

entries.title: Anime Trainer Character Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Generate a "Pokémon Trainer Themed Character Design Poster" including a full layout and illustration. The style should be Japanese anime + dreamy illustration, with high-quality details and soft colors. The protagonist is a trainer (design based on the personality/vibe of the provided photo), standing in a Pokémon world setting (such as a seaside town, forest, or mountain village). The atmosphere should be warm and evoke a sense of story. The image must include the following elements:Main Character Full-Body Art: Outfit should have personal style and intricate details. Pokémon Partners: Several representative Pokémon surrounding the trainer. Side Information Sidebar: Character data (Name, personality, likes/dislikes). Pokémon Team Introduction: Including names and brief descriptions. Travel Items/Accessories: Backpack, camera, notebook, etc. Bottom Section: Small "memory photos" or sticker-style designs from their journey.The overall layout should look like an "Adventure Log / Character Card Poster," with a scrapbooking and collectible feel. It should be detailed but not cluttered, maintaining a gentle and dreamy aesthetic.
entries.description: Generates a dreamy Japanese anime-style character poster including a full-body illustration, Pokémon partners, and a detailed adventure log layout.

entries.title: Anime Schoolgirl Guitarist on Stage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a polished anime-style vertical illustration of a teenage schoolgirl guitarist standing on a dark concert stage under soft overhead spotlights. She has glossy black hair in a short bob with straight blunt bangs and a side ponytail she is tying up with both arms raised, pale skin, large muted gray eyes, and a small blue hair tie held in her mouth, giving a shy focused expression. She wears a crisp white Japanese sailor-style school uniform top with short sleeves and a bright turquoise neckerchief, paired with a high-waisted dark navy pleated skirt. A black guitar strap crosses her shoulder, holding a bright turquoise blue electric guitar with a white pickguard, chrome hardware, maple neck, and cable plugged in, angled diagonally across her body from lower left to upper right. Place one silver vocal microphone on a black stand to her left, and one black Marshall-style guitar amplifier with cream control panel to her right in the background. Use a mostly black stage backdrop with tiny floating dust-like white specks, dramatic rim lighting, clean cel-shaded anime rendering, delicate highlights on hair and guitar, realistic instrument details, soft shadows, and a slightly low portrait composition focused on the character from thighs up.
entries.description: Generates a vertical anime concert-stage portrait of a schoolgirl tying her hair while holding a bright electric guitar.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的社交快照条目《Anime Schoolgirl Guitarist on Stage》。 关键词：portrait、realistic。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

entries.title: Paper-Cut Romantic Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a romantic couple portrait in a layered paper-cut art style, standing together in a beautiful green park. The woman is wearing an elegant flowing floral dress in soft cream or pastel shades, and the man is wearing a stylish modern suit in neutral tones. Both are smiling gently and posing lovingly together. Surround them with lush green trees, colorful flowers, butterflies, birds, and a peaceful garden pathway with a small bridge and gazebo in the background. Use soft pastel colors, detailed paper texture, handcrafted 3D paper layers, warm lighting, and a dreamy whimsical atmosphere. Highly detailed, cute yet realistic facial features, elegant composition, storybook aesthetic, vertical portrait format, ultra high quality.

entries.title: Misordered Image Relay Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Based on the attached image, arrange 12 versions in a 3x4 grid. Express this as if the image were passed sequentially to 12 different people, each looking only at what the previous person made and mistakenly assuming 'this must be what was requested' or 'this is meant for this purpose,' leading them to redesign it. Start the first frame with an atmosphere very close to the original. As the frames progress, have the shape, color, expression, pose, composition, motifs, and mood of the original image gradually be misunderstood, simplified, converted for different uses, and move away from its original meaning and appearance. Each frame should look like it was remade by a person who only saw the previous frame and judged 'this must have been the request.' Naturally change it according to the content of the original image, whether it's a person, character, pet, food, landscape, building, or profile image. Do not fix the intermediate changes too strictly. It's okay to misunderstand it as an illustration in one frame, a mascot in the next, a commercial product, a sign, a flyer, a stuffed toy, food packaging, tourist goods, a warning sign, a game character, a mysterious toy, a reference icon, or a handmade craft. The direction of change should be naturally associated with the appearance of the original and the previous frame. As the frames progress, make it look like 'you can tell someone was trying to make it properly, but they slightly misunderstood what the request was.' Let the shapes, proportions, eyes, mouths, outlines, color placement, textures, uses, decorations, and compositions shift bit by bit, leading to an unexpected and humorous appearance in the latter half. The key is not just image degradation or noise, but to make it look like it's collapsing because humans misinterpreted the previous result while rebuilding it for a different purpose. In the latter half, do not completely erase the characteristics of the original image, but unnaturally leave one or two elements like color, outline, expression, hairstyle, clothes, accessories, pose, composition, or motif. Meanwhile, other elements can be boldly omitted, transformed, misunderstood, or turned into something else. Make the 12th frame bold enough that only someone who knows the original image can barely sense the original source, while appearing as a completely different mysterious entity, product, character, craft, icon, or mascot to a first-time viewer. End with an unexpected and slightly funny landing that makes people think 'Why did it end up like this?!' Make each frame look different. Keep the background white and simple, organized into a 3x4 grid for easy viewing of the 12 variations. In the later frames, don't make them too neat; instead, let one person's misunderstanding be further misunderstood by the next. In the 12th frame, change it so boldly that while one feature of the original remains strangely, everything else is almost entirely different.
entries.description: A complex creative prompt that transforms an input image through 12 stages of intentional 'misinterpretation' by imaginary sequential creators, resulting in a humorous 3x4 evolution grid.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的社交快照条目《Misordered Image Relay Grid》。 可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

noise, but to make it look like it's collapsing because humans misinterpreted the previous result while rebuilding it for a different purpose. in the latter half, do not completely erase the characteristics of the original image, but unnaturally leave one or two elements like color, outline, expression, hairstyle, clothes, accessories, pose, composition, or motif. meanwhile, other elements can be boldly omitted, transformed, misunderstood, or turned into something else. make the 12th frame bold enough that only someone who knows the original image can barely sense the original source, while appearing as a completely different mysterious entity, product, character, craft, icon, or mascot to a first-time viewer. end with an unexpected and slightly funny landing that makes people think 'why did it end up like this?!' make each frame look different. keep the background white and simple, organized into a 3x4 grid for easy viewing of the 12 variations. in the later frames, don't make them too neat; instead, let one person's misunderstanding be further misunderstood by the next. in the 12th frame, change it so boldly that while one feature of the original remains strangely, everything else is almost entirely different. social media post

entries.title: Black and White Xerox Zine Effect
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Transform this photo into a photocopied zine page. High contrast black and white with blown-out highlights and crushed shadows. Visible toner grain and streaks. Slight paper skew as if placed on a Xerox machine at an angle. Some areas have that characteristic photocopy 'glow' halftone areas. Text collage elements overlaid in punk zine style: ransom-note-style cut-out letters, hand-drawn arrows, and anarchist/DIY aesthetic marks. Slightly crumpled paper texture. The person should still be recognizable but abstracted through the photocopy degradation.

entries.title: Taurus Zodiac Poster Design
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: I am "TAURUS." Create a poster inspired by Yumi's Cells with the same soft, aesthetic, slice-of-life vibe and background style, while fully reflecting the Taurus zodiac theme in the design. The subject's face must remain completely unchanged and untouched. Surround the subject with multiple small, raw yet realistic cute chibi-style mini 3D versions of the subject, designed like expressive "cells" with oversized heads, glossy high-detail finishes, and playful emotions. Each mini character should reflect Taurus traits such as calmness, loyalty, comfort-loving energy, stubbornness, sensuality, patience, and love for luxury and food. Show them in different actions: one clinging onto the subject's arm, one relaxing with a cozy blanket, one reading a book peacefully, one drinking coffee or tea, one holding snacks or dessert, one lying down using a phone, one refusing to move with a stubborn expression, one looking sleepy and unbothered, and one with soft messy "just woke up" energy. Add playful hand-drawn doodles interacting directly with the subject and chibi characters-outlining poses, sketching comfy cushions, steam from drinks, tiny flowers, sparkle details, and calm motion accents to enhance storytelling. Use a clean aesthetic composition, white sticker outlines, soft pastel sage green, cream, beige, dusty pink, and warm earthy tones, high-detail glossy 3D chibi look, cute Korean-inspired design, with a raw natural poster feel in a 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, and the Taurus identity clearly integrated into the overall concept.
entries.description: A creative prompt for designing a personalized zodiac-themed poster inspired by Yumi's Cells, featuring 3D chibi characters representing specific personality traits while maintaining the subject's original appearance.

entries.title: Late-Night Graphite Portrait Workspace
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a moody monochrome overhead photo-realistic scene of a late-night artist workspace: a textured off-white sheet of drawing paper lies diagonally on a worn gray desk, holding an unfinished graphite portrait of a young woman with shoulder-length wavy dark hair, bare shoulder, and a black camisole strap. The drawing is highly detailed in the hair, neck, shoulder, and clothing, with visible layered graphite strokes, smudging, paper grain, and soft unfinished shading. A realistic right hand enters from the lower right, actively drawing with a black pencil near the portrait's cheek and neck area. Place a black smartphone at the upper right showing the matching black-and-white reference photo of the same subject. Add exactly two opaque soft-edged gray privacy rectangles: one large square covering the face in the pencil portrait and one smaller rectangle covering the face on the phone screen. Surround the paper with a believable artist's desk arrangement: one metal pencil sharpener near the top, one kneaded eraser or small stone near the bottom, one open pencil tin at the lower left, five loose black graphite pencils, two brushes, and two metallic drawing tools scattered naturally around the paper. Use dim warm desk-lamp lighting, deep shadows, subtle vignette, intimate private-work-in-progress atmosphere, realistic paper texture, charcoal and graphite tones, shallow depth of field, high-resolution editorial photography style, no visible text.
entries.description: Generates a realistic overhead artist desk scene with an unfinished graphite portrait, reference phone, drawing tools, and a private late-night studio mood.

entries.title: Censored Idol Girl in Akihabara
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a bright, high-resolution anime-style illustration of a cheerful young idol girl standing in the middle of a sunny Akihabara-style city street, with tall buildings covered in colorful anime billboards, shop signs, posters, and storefronts lining both sides of a wide pedestrian crossing. The character is centered in a waist-up to knees composition, leaning slightly forward with both hands raised open beside her face in a playful greeting pose, fingers spread. Her face is intentionally obscured by a flat opaque square censor block in a warm skin-brown color, covering the entire facial area while leaving her hair and outfit visible. She has light chestnut brown hair in twin ponytails tied with dark teal-blue ribbon bows, soft bangs, and curled side strands. Dress her in a pastel idol outfit: a pale blue short-sleeved blouse with puff sleeves, white lace collar, ruffled trim, front buttons, small side ribbon ties, and a large iridescent rainbow bow at the chest, paired with a matching pleated skirt that has shimmering holographic rainbow panels and delicate ruffle edging. The outfit should look cute, airy, and glossy, with subtle fabric texture and reflective pastel highlights. Use vivid midday sunlight, clear blue sky, soft shadows, and a realistic urban depth-of-field background with pedestrians and signage slightly blurred, while the character remains crisp and detailed. Overall mood: cheerful morning outing, cute Japanese pop-idol fashion, polished AI anime illustration, vibrant colors, clean linework, semi-realistic lighting, 1:1 square composition.

entries.title: 1970s Route 66 Polaroid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a square vintage instant-film Polaroid photograph with a thick white border and handwritten blue marker caption reading Summer '76 centered on the bottom margin. The photo shows two young male friends posing casually at a dusty Route 66 gas station in the American Southwest in the 1970s, leaning against a weathered turquoise pickup truck with chipped paint. One friend wears a faded denim jacket and jeans with a belt, the other wears a purple LED ZEPPELIN T-shirt and blue jeans; both have relaxed road-trip body language, faces softly indistinct like an old snapshot. Behind them are vintage gas pumps, a circular Route 66 sign, a rustic sign reading Last Gas 47 mi., a partial service-station sign, and a small red Coca-Cola sign; the horizon is flat desert with utility poles under a pale washed-out sky. Use authentic 1970s color film emulation: sun-bleached cyan and warm beige tones, faded contrast, visible film grain, dust specks, minor scratches, slight blur, uneven exposure, orange and pink light leaks across the top left and corners, subtle vignetting, and the tactile texture of aged instant photo paper.
entries.description: Generates a nostalgic instant-film snapshot of two friends at a vintage Route 66 gas station, ideal for retro Americana and road-trip visuals.

entries.title: 1970s Route 66 Polaroid

entries.prompt: Create a square 1970s instant Polaroid photograph with a thick off-white border and slightly rounded blackened edges, showing exactly 2 young adult friends standing in front of a sun-faded turquoise vintage Chevrolet pickup truck at a Route 66 roadside gas station in the American Southwest. The left friend leans casually against the driver-side front area wearing a blue denim jacket, light button-down shirt, faded jeans, and a belt; the right friend leans on the hood wearing a dark vintage rock band T-shirt, faded jeans, and a belt. Both have shoulder-length wavy brown hair and relaxed road-trip body language, with softly blurred faces like an old snapshot. Behind them is a low gas station building with a corrugated roof, old fuel pumps, a visible Route 66 shield sign above the canopy, dusty desert hills and washed-out sky in the distance. Use sun-bleached warm cyan-and-yellow color grading, heavy vintage film grain, slight lens softness, faded contrast, dust specks, tiny scratches, uneven exposure, and a strong yellow-orange light leak blooming from the upper left. Add handwritten blue ink text centered on the bottom Polaroid border reading Summer 76. Make it feel like an authentic found 1976 vacation photo shot on instant film, nostalgic, imperfect, candid, and weathered.

entries.title: Stormy Icelandic Fisherman Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a photorealistic square-format close-up portrait of a 78-year-old Icelandic fisherman standing at a stormy harbor. The man fills most of the frame from chest up, positioned slightly left of center, with deeply weathered sunburned skin, heavy forehead wrinkles, blue eyes, short gray hair, salt-and-pepper stubble, and flecks of sea salt or snow on his cheeks, eyebrows, beard, and dark navy cable-knit wool sweater. He gazes pensively off-camera to the right with a serious, resilient expression. Behind him, show a cold North Atlantic harbor with choppy dark water, gray overcast sky, wooden docks, mooring posts, rope, and exactly three visible fishing boats: one large blue-and-red boat in the right background, one turquoise-and-wood boat near the middle right, and one smaller weathered boat partly visible behind his shoulder. entries.title: Candid Night Market Food Stall Friends
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an authentic candid daily-life photograph in a realistic documentary style: a medium shot of two young women standing close together at a night market food stall at night, framed from the waist up from a direct frontal angle. The left woman is East Asian, early 20s, wearing an oversized pale cream crew-neck sweatshirt with a thin black shoulder bag strap and a small delicate necklace; her dark hair is loosely tied up with a few stray wisps. The right woman is African, early 20s, wearing a fitted dark brown long-sleeve scoop-neck top with a black shoulder bag strap and her natural curly hair gathered high into a puff bun. Both lean slightly toward each other, relaxed and unposed, looking downward at a small white paper food tray held between them; the left woman uses a toothpick or small skewer to pick up food while the right woman supports the tray with both hands. Their faces are deliberately covered by two solid opaque rectangular privacy blocks in brown tones, one over each face, matching their approximate skin tones. Behind them is a warmly lit night-market stall with glowing orange paper lanterns, glass display case, trays of fried street food, soft steam or haze, and blurred pedestrians and neon bokeh receding into the dark street. Use warm amber overhead stall lighting from above and behind the counter, strong natural highlights on clothing and hands, shallow depth of field, 35mm documentary photography feel, high ISO night realism, imperfect candid composition, no posing, no glamour styling, no text.

entries.title: Sarcastic Anime Camera Girl
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a single-panel anime-style social media illustration set on a bright modern Japanese city street resembling Shibuya or a busy shopping district, with colorful storefront signs, soft depth-of-field pedestrians, trees, and a vivid blue sky in the background. In the foreground, show a young woman photographer from the waist up, holding a large black Sony-style mirrorless camera with a prominent wide lens toward the viewer; the camera strap hangs around her neck. She has a short blonde bob haircut with layered ends and side-swept bangs, small earrings, and wears a cream cable-knit cardigan over a gray-and-white checkered button-up shirt. Her face is deliberately covered by a flat opaque rectangular censor block in a skin-tone beige, centered over the face. Use polished Japanese anime/manga line art with clean outlines, glossy highlights, saturated daylight colors, and a slightly teasing comedic tone. Include exactly 2 white manga speech bubbles with thick black outlines: the large left bubble says カメラが高感度競争してるのに すっごい明るいレンズ 自慢してるのオモロッ♥ with small sparkle icons and a pink heart, and the smaller upper-right bubble says どうせ NDフィルター 付けちゃうんでしょ?. Add a few decorative sparkle symbols around the dialogue and near the bottom right. Compose the image in a wide 16:9 aspect ratio, with the camera and character dominating the center-left and center, speech bubbles occupying the upper left and upper right, and the city background blurred enough to keep focus on the character and dialogue.
