entries.title: Shanghai Night Travel Journal
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a travel-journal style night cityscape poster of Shanghai Pudong skyline along the Huangpu River. Use a wide 4:3 canvas showing a realistic nighttime waterfront photo look: dark cloudy sky filling the top two thirds, illuminated skyscrapers along the horizon, the Oriental Pearl Tower on the left glowing pink-red, Shanghai Tower and other high-rises on the right with blue, purple, gold, and white lights, and reflective river water across the bottom with a small sightseeing boat. Add playful white hand-drawn diary doodles and handwritten Chinese annotations directly over the scene, like a social media travel note. Include exactly 6 handwritten text notes: "云也来散步啦" near the upper left with a dotted wandering path and small cloud, "慢慢走 慢慢看♡" near the upper right beside a crescent moon and star, "东方明珠 亮晶晶♡" pointing with an arrow to the Oriental Pearl Tower, "夜风 刚刚好♪" on the left above the river, "今晚的楼 都很会发光♡" on the right above the skyline with a curved underline, and "灯光掉进黄浦江" centered near the bottom over the water. Include exactly 15 white doodle elements: a dotted flight path across the upper left, one small outlined cloud near the top, one crescent moon at the upper right, one scalloped cloud outline near the upper center-right, one arrow pointing to the Oriental Pearl Tower, one dashed outline tracing around the Oriental Pearl Tower, three small sparkle/star icons, two music-note icons, one map-pin icon at the bottom left, two flowing wave lines across the bottom water, and one small flower doodle at the bottom right. Keep all doodles thin, casual, hand-drawn, slightly imperfect, and bright white, with no borders or watermark. The mood should be dreamy, cozy, romantic, and spontaneous, like a handwritten travel memory shared on social media.

entries.title: Urban Fashion Editorial Collage Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a high-resolution 8K portrait poster in an Urban Fashion Editorial Collage style, blending contemporary street-fashion aesthetics with premium editorial magazine design. The overall composition should feel bold, stylish, modern, and visually layered, combining elements of luxury fashion campaigns, urban culture, and artistic collage experimentation. Incorporate dynamic poster ornaments and decorative elements that strongly reflect the Urban Fashion Editorial Collage aesthetic, such as ripped paper textures, layered magazine cutouts, abstract geometric accents, expressive brush strokes, typography fragments, street-style graphic overlays, halftone textures, tape effects, paint splashes, handwritten scribbles, and fashionable editorial layout compositions. Every decorative element should feel intentional, stylish, and visually balanced rather than overcrowded. Humanity really looked at torn paper and graffiti textures and decided, "yes, this is luxury now." Somehow it works.

The subject's pose must not resemble the reference photo. Create a completely different body posture and facial expression with a more natural, expressive, and emotionally alive presence. Avoid stiff, awkward, flat, or overly symmetrical posing. The subject should radiate the confident elegance of an international fashion model, with fluid body language, subtle movement, and a cinematic editorial attitude. The expression should feel charismatic, effortless, fashionable, and modern, as if captured during a high-end streetwear magazine photoshoot rather than a static studio portrait. Add slight motion energy through posture, clothing movement, hand placement, camera angle, or gaze direction to make the composition feel more alive and dynamic.

The outfit must feature modern casual fashion with a stylish and trendy urban aesthetic. Avoid monotonous clothing design, colors, or materials. Combine fashionable layers, contemporary cuts, unique textures, stylish accessories, and varied color palettes that complement the poster composition. The clothing should feel premium, youthful, and fashion-forward, inspired by global streetwear and luxury casual editorial styling. Mix different fabric materials, patterns, and tones naturally to create visual richness without making the outfit look chaotic or overly exaggerated.

Use dramatic editorial lighting with strong contrast and depth to enhance the fashion atmosphere. The background should integrate seamlessly with the collage elements, creating a visually immersive poster composition filled with layered urban energy and modern fashion identity. Maintain a clean balance between subject visibility and decorative complexity so the poster still feels premium and professionally art-directed. The final result should look like a sophisticated international fashion campaign poster with a strong urban editorial character, ultra-detailed textures, crisp focus, cinematic color grading, and highly polished
entries.description: An extensive, detailed prompt for creating premium fashion posters with a layered collage aesthetic, involving graffiti textures and editorial layouts.

entries.title: Neon Snapchat Portrait Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical cyber-glam portrait poster of a stylish young man crouching in the center on a glossy black reflective floor, wearing a bright yellow leather bomber jacket with black cuffs, black shirt, black pants, a wristwatch, and clean white sneakers. His pose is low and confident, one knee raised, one hand resting near his chin as if thinking, with neatly styled dark hair and a partially obscured face. Behind him is one large glowing yellow neon Snapchat ghost outline forming a halo-like backdrop, surrounded by smoky golden mist, sparks, and cinematic haze on a deep black background. Add three visible text/UI elements: 1 large glowing uppercase headline at the top reading DESIGN BY MR. TARIQ, 1 smaller centered name line below it reading MR. TARIQ with thin horizontal gold lines on both sides, and 1 rounded translucent profile card at the bottom left containing a small circular avatar, the name Mr. Tariq, a blue verification checkmark, and the follower count 7K Followers. Use high-contrast black and gold lighting, strong neon bloom, realistic fashion photography, sharp details, reflective floor highlights, smoke curling around the subject, premium social-media banner aesthetic, vertical 3:4 composition.

entries.title: Neon Instagram Fashion Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical cyberpunk social-media poster featuring a full-body male fashion portrait standing confidently in the center on a glossy wet reflective floor. The subject is Mr. Tariq, with a smooth blurred face for privacy, short dark styled hair, one hand gripping the lapel of his jacket and the other hand in his pocket. Dress him in a shiny hot-pink cropped leather jacket, plain black T-shirt, glossy black leather cargo jogger pants, and chunky white sneakers. Use ultra-sharp commercial poster lighting, saturated neon glow, realistic fabric shine, smoke depth, sparks, reflections, and a premium viral Instagram edit style, 3:4 aspect ratio.

entries.title: Red Carpet Floral Corset Gown
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ana de Armas met Gala Look. Subject: Beautiful young woman smiling warmly, looking directly at the camera. She has dark hair styled in an elegant, slightly messy updo with loose, face-framing tendrils. Clear face, fair skin, natural glowing makeup. Clothing: Exquisite, sheer blush-pink corset gown. The dress features intricate 3D floral appliqués, pearls, and shimmering embroidery. Asymmetrical one-shoulder design with floral details, paired with a matching sheer tulle shawl draped elegantly over her arms. Setting: Standing on wide beige stone stairs. In the out-of-focus background, there is a wall of dark green foliage with white flowers, and blurred paparazzi photographers wearing black suits taking pictures. Lighting and style: Bright, soft, diffused natural daylight. High fashion red carpet photography, photorealistic, highly detailed, 8k resolution. Full generation prompt: A photorealistic, high fashion red carpet photo of a beautiful young woman smiling warmly. She has dark hair styled in an elegant messy updo with loose face-framing tendrils. She is wearing a breathtaking, sheer blush-pink corset gown covered in intricate 3D floral appliques, pearls, and shimmering embroidery. The dress has an asymmetrical floral strap and a matching sheer draped shawl over her arms. She is standing on broad beige stone stairs. The background features blurred paparazzi photographers in dark suits and lush dark green hedges with white flowers. Soft, diffused daylight, 8k resolution, hyper-detailed, stunning red carpet moment. Negative prompt: glasses, spectacles, eyewear, sunglasses, poorly drawn, deformed, unnatural skin, blurry subject

entries.title: Censored Purple Turtleneck Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of a young adult woman seated indoors beside a softly lit window, framed from the upper torso to the top of the head. She has long, thick, wavy dark brown hair falling over one shoulder, with natural shine and loose strands. She wears a fitted ribbed knit deep purple turtleneck sweater with long sleeves, emphasizing the fabric texture, vertical ribbing, and soft folds. Her hands are gently clasped at her waist near the bottom of the frame. The face is deliberately hidden by a large centered opaque square censor block in warm brown tones, covering the eyes, nose, and most facial features while leaving some hair and one ear visible. Use realistic skin texture on the visible hands, shallow depth of field, soft window light from the left, a warm neutral beige interior background, natural shadows, and high-detail DSLR-style photography. Add a faint semi-transparent watermark reading AI conia in the lower-left corner.

entries.title: Anonymized Swimmer in Teal Pool
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an ultra-wide 3:1 cinematic photograph shot from directly above a single swimmer floating just beneath the surface of a clear swimming pool. The water is deep teal and turquoise with bright sun-caustic ripples covering the entire frame. Place the swimmer slightly left of center near the upper half of the composition, with curly brown hair spreading in the water, one long arm arcing upward and across the right side, and the body fading into darker shadow below the surface. The face is obscured by a centered matte beige rectangular square, creating an anonymized editorial look. Use natural midday sunlight, realistic underwater refraction, soft green-blue color grading, subtle film grain, high detail, and a calm isolated mood. Leave large areas of open rippling pool water to the right and left, no text, no borders, no extra people.

entries.title: Conceptual Chinese Editorial Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Based on the Chronic Disease Management Methods I provide, automatically generate a horizontal 4:3 high-end Chinese conceptual poster. Your task is to translate the theme into a visual featuring psychological insight, a sense of quiet observation, and a philosophical atmosphere. Style: Chinese editorial poster, magazine cover feel, dark cinematic poster with grunge print textures. Layout: Large Chinese typography on the left (70%), potentially embedding a realistic eye among the characters. The text should include a small title, a massive main title, and supplementary text. Right side (30%): A dark area with a hand from the top right holding a thin line with a fishhook, from which three chat-bubble style cards hang, representing 'fished-out memories or reminders.' Background: pure black or deep dark green with film grain and paper textures. Atmosphere: low light, high contrast, mysterious, and calm. Typography: thick, industrial-style black font with ink textures. Colors: black, deep green, off-white, and low-saturation blue-green.

entries.title: Cute Plush Animal Trio
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a warm, softly lit studio portrait of three adorable plush-like baby animals sitting side by side on a beige floor against a smooth beige background: on the left, a seated baby panda with black-and-white fuzzy fur, round ears, stubby paws, and its face intentionally covered by a flat opaque tan square censor block; in the center, a small baby penguin standing upright with fluffy cream belly, dark brown-black back and head, tiny orange beak and feet, glossy black eyes, and rounded flippers hanging at its sides; on the right, a light beige kitten sitting neatly with big round eyes, small ears, soft short fur, visible whiskers, and curled tail. Use a cute toy-like 3D rendered style with realistic fur fibers, gentle rim light, shallow depth of field, golden backlighting, soft shadows on the ground, cozy nursery-like atmosphere, centered composition, high detail, cinematic warmth, no text.

entries.title: Minimal Clay Animal Trio
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a simple minimalist 3D clay-style illustration of a panda, a penguin, and a gray cat sitting side by side on a matte beige floor against a plain off-white corner wall. The scene contains exactly 3 cute rounded animals: 1 panda on the left with a white round head, black ears, black eye patches, small black nose and mouth, black arms and legs, sitting with one arm across its belly; 1 penguin in the center with a navy-black outer body, white face and belly, tiny black eyes, a small orange beak, orange feet, and flipper-like wings hanging down; 1 gray cat on the right sitting upright with pointed ears, black dot eyes, small nose and mouth, three whiskers on each side, front paws indicated by subtle lines, and a curved tail resting on the floor. Use soft plush-toy proportions, smooth rounded geometry, no outlines except simple facial marks, muted colors, gentle ambient lighting, very soft shadows, lots of empty negative space above the characters, a calm Scandinavian children's-room aesthetic, front-facing camera at low eye level, square composition, clean and uncluttered.

entries.title: Y2K Japanese Street Editorial Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a bold Y2K Japanese street-editorial collage poster with a clean high-fashion magazine aesthetic, gritty paper textures, torn magazine cutouts, distressed ink splashes, and urban Tokyo-inspired design.

Main composition: one large cinematic close-up portrait at the top with intense eye focus, natural skin texture, glossy lips, messy tied-up hair, no glasses, soft dramatic lighting, confident innocent expression, ultra-realistic fashion photography style.

Bottom composition: only 2 smaller portrait collage frames showing different facial expressions and angles, styled like ripped polaroids taped onto the poster.

Design elements: oversized bold Japanese typography, minimal English text, subtle Japanese street signs, barcode stickers, newspaper scraps, vintage grunge textures, paint strokes, film grain, tape pieces, layered paper collage effects, and premium editorial magazine layout aesthetics.

Style: edgy yet clean, modern Japanese fashion zine, cinematic shadows, sharp eye detail, RAW DSLR realism, editorial streetwear moodboard, premium graphic design, ultra detailed, 8K, balanced neutral tones, no pink aesthetic, no bubbles, no cartoon vibe.

entries.title: Emotional Burden Surrealist Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Ultra-realistic portrait of a young man walking forward in a minimal studio space. He is dragging a full-size version of himself behind him like a heavy mannequin, holding it by the wrist. The dragged version has a blank expression and slightly desaturated skin tone.

Outfit: muted streetwear, oversized hoodie, relaxed trousers, clean sneakers.
Lighting: soft overhead diffused light casting long shadows.
Composition: centered, slight motion blur on the dragged body.

Typography:

* Small top text: "MOVE"
* Faded text beneath: "BUT NEVER LIGHT"
* Large distorted text across floor: "WEIGHT"

Mood: emotional burden, identity split, progress vs stagnation.
entries.description: A surreal prompt depicting a man dragging a mannequin version of himself, symbolizing emotional weight and identity split.

entries.title: Anime Girl Breaking Out of Monitor
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic high-detail anime-style wallpaper of an adult silver-haired twin-tail anime girl bursting forward out of a large desktop monitor in an artist's studio, as if breaking the screen into many sharp floating glass shards. The character has long pale silver hair in voluminous twin ponytails tied with glossy black ribbon bows, black frilly gothic-lolita maid-inspired clothing with white lace trim and a small black bow at the chest, and one arm reaching directly toward the viewer with strong foreshortening while the other hand braces against the monitor frame. Place a flat opaque muted gray-pink square over the face, centered and covering the facial features. The background is a cluttered digital art workspace: a large monitor glowing icy blue behind her, shelves with anime figures and posters, paintbrushes in cups, small bottles, pens, cables, and desk tools scattered around. Use cinematic lighting with bright blue screen glow, sparkling reflections on transparent glass fragments, shallow depth of field, motion blur on the closest shards and reaching hand, ultra-detailed hair strands, glossy fabric, realistic studio clutter, dynamic perspective, and a 16:9 desktop wallpaper composition at 1152×768 resolution. Overall mood: surreal, energetic, immersive, as though the anime character is escaping from the digital screen into the real world.
entries.description: Generates a cinematic anime wallpaper of a silver-haired character bursting through a computer screen amid glass shards in a cluttered art studio.

entries.title: Korean Graffiti Illustration Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Based on the user-uploaded photo, create a Korean-style hand-drawn graffiti illustration character poster. Retain the person's real identity features and overall temperament, but the overall presentation should be clearly slanted towards illustration rather than realistic redrawing.

Style Reference: Korean semi-realistic illustration, distinct character feel, natural and expressive facial emotions, half-body composition, slight dynamic poses. Emphasize loose, spontaneous hand-drawn lines, black ink outlines, ink splatters, sketch-like strokes, visible brush textures, and a blend of soft pastel tones and ink shadows, presenting a manga-sketch-like texture.

Do not make it a highly realistic illustration; do not make it look too much like a photo. It should have more of a "drawn" feel, with free lines, loose edges, and partial areas feeling slightly unfinished. Hair and clothing details should be rich, and the overall look should be exquisite yet with a casual graffiti vibe.

Keep the background simple, such as pure white or light-colored paper texture, and freely add a few symbolic decorative elements around the character like handwritten short phrases, stars, hearts, arrows, ink dots, small stickers. Please let the copywriting and background atmosphere develop freely based on the character's temperament. The overall result should be high-end, light, and agile, like a Korean-style hand-drawn character poster that would go viral on X.
entries.description: A prompt for gpt-image-2 that converts a user's photo into a semi-realistic Korean-style hand-drawn graffiti poster with loose lines and a sketch-like texture.

entries.title: Handheld VTuber Desk Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a realistic casual smartphone-style photo of a tech desk setup, shot in landscape orientation with shallow depth of field. In the foreground, a left hand wearing a dark ring grips a small red handheld camera or action-camera-like device mounted on a black handle; its glossy black front screen displays a cute chibi anime avatar with blonde twin braids, huge blue eyes, rosy cheeks, and an orange crab or lobster hood with cartoon eyes and little horns. Behind it, slightly out of focus, show a large computer monitor displaying a VTuber-style anime character with purple hair and a teal shirt reading AITuber; the character's face is obscured by a square blur censor block. Count exactly 2 visible screens: 1 small handheld device screen in the foreground and 1 large monitor in the background. Include 1 partially visible laptop or dark device edge on the far right, 1 desk surface with cables, and 2 small yellow figurines or objects near the bottom center. Use warm indoor lighting, natural camera noise, realistic reflections, slight motion blur, and an informal behind-the-scenes office or studio atmosphere.

entries.title: Punk Anime Artbook Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vivid contemporary anime artbook cover/poster in a rebellious punk-goth street-art style, landscape 16:9 composition, dominated by hot pink, magenta, black, white, and orange. Center a glamorous original anime girl with very long two-tone twin-tail hair, platinum blonde with neon pink and orange streaks, wearing a black leather corset top, studded choker, padlock necklace, chains, straps, and a bright pink ribbon tie; her arms are raised across her face in a defiant X-like pose, wearing black lace fingerless gloves covered with rings, studs, tiny heart and star accessories, and long manicured nails. Her visible skin has a sleeve of colorful tattoo-style stickers including skulls, hearts, flowers, stars, crowns, the words RIOT and REBEL, and doodle graphics. Place a flat opaque dusty-rose square censor block over the center of her face, hiding facial details. The background is a dense punk collage wall with torn paper, graffiti, black ink splatter, skull stickers, crowns, large X marks, barcodes, tape scraps, and Japanese street-zine typography. Include exactly 6 prominent text elements: a huge white serif headline with black shadow reading ILLUSTRATION COLLECTION in the upper left, a smaller subtitle reading Original Character Art below it, Japanese text reading 反逆の美学 on the left, a black top-right label reading ARTBOOK // VOL. 01 // REBELLION // BEAUTY // CHAOS, Japanese graffiti reading "混沌" on the right, and vertical Japanese text reading "混沌の美" near the lower right edge. Add exactly 2 barcode stickers on the lower left, exactly 3 large black crown doodles, exactly 2 prominent skull graphics in the right-side collage, and multiple pink-and-black X graffiti marks. Use crisp clean anime line art, glossy highlights, high contrast, detailed accessories, layered screenprint texture, fashion-magazine cover energy, chaotic but balanced layout, sharp focus, professional illustration quality.

entries.title: Chaotic Cat Flash Snapshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic candid smartphone flash photo in a messy dim apartment at night, vertical 9:16 framing, low-end Android camera look with harsh direct flash, motion blur, imperfect autofocus, grain, compression artifacts, awkward tilted composition, and raw chaotic party energy. The scene shows exactly two young adults and one black-and-white cat: on the left, a young adult with silver-gray messy shoulder-length hair wearing an oversized off-white T-shirt and light gray sweatpants, recoiling and twisting away with one arm stretched forward; on the right, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a pale T-shirt and denim shorts, barefoot, leaning forward while holding the cat. The cat is suspended between them, black-and-white tuxedo markings, mouth wide open hissing or yowling, claws gripping the left person's forearm, creating a frantic accidental moment. Add large rectangular privacy blocks obscuring both human faces, as if posted online with identities hidden. The background is cluttered and realistic: a low table with cans, cups, bottles, snacks and trash, scattered objects on the floor, slippers near the bottom, warm dark interior lighting, doorway and furniture fading into shadow. Make it look like a badly timed real phone snapshot rather than a polished photo, with blown flash highlights, smeared movement, off-center cropping, and a sense that the photographer reacted too late.

entries.title: Candid Bird Contest Meme Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a raw vertical smartphone photo meme with an intentionally imperfect low-end Android camera look, as if captured accidentally in the middle of a crowded Indonesian bird-singing competition under a roofed outdoor venue. The scene is packed with people standing shoulder to shoulder beneath many hanging round bird cages suspended from the ceiling, with leafy green trees and harsh daylight filtering through the background. In the foreground, a pale, tattooed young man with messy silver-white hair wearing a faded sleeveless dusty-pink shirt is caught mid-celebration with a clenched fist near the camera, motion-blurred from excitement; his face and several nearby faces are covered by flat brown rectangular censorship blocks. To the right, a man in a bright yellow T-shirt and black cap points upward toward the cages while the crowd reacts around him. Include a partially visible event banner in the background reading "LATBER" with smaller Indonesian event text, slightly obstructed by people and motion blur. Add large centered meme caption text near the top in bold white sans-serif with thick black outline, reading POV kicau mania: burungmu mulai gacor pas dinilai juri. Make the image feel candid, chaotic, compressed, noisy, slightly wide-angle, awkwardly framed, with bad autofocus, uneven lighting, blur at the edges, and realistic phone-camera artifacts rather than a polished staged photo.

entries.title: Double Exposure Editorial Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A high-contrast, double-exposure editorial portrait of a beautiful woman gazing down with a thoughtful expression. The image is creatively segmented into vertical cuts of varying heights against a textured, off-white parchment background. Overlay effect: Within the vertical cuts of the woman's face, a secondary scene is visible: a solitary figure of the same woman in a sweatshirt walking along a rain-soaked street at night.

The street scene features a warm orange bokeh emanating from the streetlights and reflections on the wet pavement, creating a striking contrast with the cool tones of the portrait. Stylistic elements: Lighting: A chiaroscuro style with deep shadows and bright highlights on the woman's white shirt and dark jacket.

Texture: A subtle grain and a worn, paper-like texture cover the entire canvas, lending an artistic and raw feel. Color palette: A mix of desaturated monochromatic tones for the portrait, punctuated by vibrant touches of amber, gold, and turquoise from the rainy cityscape. Atmosphere: Melancholic, introspective, and with hints of modern film noir; facial hair and skin texture rendered in great detail.

Technical specifications: Photograph taken with an 85mm lens, f/1.8, cinematic lighting, sharp focus on the glasses, 8K resolution, graphic poster style. Aspect ratio 9:16.

entries.title: Korean Baseball Broadcast Fan Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a realistic smartphone-style photo from the spectator seats at a Korean professional baseball game in a large outdoor stadium during daylight. In the foreground, show one young East Asian woman fan seated close to the camera, upper body visible, wearing a navy Lotte Giants baseball jersey over a white top, with a Lotte Giants patch on the sleeve, Korean sponsor patches, a delicate necklace, and dark hair tied back; her face is covered by a large soft rectangular privacy blur. She holds one clear plastic iced drink cup with a straw near the lower right. Around her are crowded green stadium seats filled with baseball fans, including several people in white pinstriped Lotte Giants jerseys with Korean names on the back and one person checking a smartphone. In the background, show the baseball field from an elevated first-base-side seating angle: bright striped green outfield grass, reddish-brown infield dirt, outfield wall advertisements in Korean, distant players in white uniforms positioned on the field, and packed stands. Add a realistic TV broadcast scoreboard graphic overlay in the bottom-right corner: a red LIVE tag, header text reading "KBO - LOTTE GIANTS vs KIA TIGERS," exactly 2 team rows labeled "LOTTE GIANTS" and "KIA TIGERS," both scores 0, a small inning indicator showing 2, ball/strike/out style indicators, a 0-0 count, and a black diamond base graphic with 4 bases. Make the image feel candid, natural, slightly wide-angle, with authentic Korean baseball atmosphere, crisp details, and no studio lighting. Use Lotte Giants navy jersey, KIA Tigers, 0-0, Korean outdoor baseball stadium, and large soft rectangular face blur.

entries.title: Anime Creator Rejection Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a wide 16:9 anime-style illustration of a stressed young woman in a small bedroom workspace, sitting at a wooden desk and staring in horror at an open laptop. The character is an anonymous young Japanese creator, with messy shoulder-length black hair and bangs, pale skin, huge round shocked eyes, sweat drops on both cheeks, a trembling open mouth, and a blue-purple shadow of despair across her forehead; she wears an oversized black hoodie and sits slumped in a black office chair. The laptop is angled toward the viewer on the right side of the desk, with large bold Japanese text on the white screen reading 審査ダメでした. Add one speech bubble beside her head containing マジか..., one black scribble frustration cloud above the laptop, and vertical manga stress lines descending from the top-left background. The room should feel like a creator's bedroom: a gray mug with a black cat face on the left of the desk, a spiral notebook and black pen on the right with small handwritten notes, a simple bed with blue-gray bedding in the back right, shelves with books, binders, a potted plant, and a black cat plush. Include exactly 4 visible Japanese text areas: the laptop rejection message, the speech bubble, a motivational wall note on the left reading 夢は あきらめなければ 叶う...! with a small cat doodle, and small notebook notes about work categories. Use clean modern anime line art, muted gray-beige indoor colors, soft shading, comedic despair expression, detailed laptop keyboard, slight depth perspective, and a polished web-article illustration look.

entries.title: Professional Hairstyle and Makeup Analysis Guide
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Hairstyle Analysis:
Based on the uploaded face photo, I want you to create a hairstyle diagnosis image with a luxurious feel! Keep the original facial features, face shape, and atmosphere as they are, and make it look like different hairstyles were tried in side-by-side or sequential comparisons. Make it easy to tell at a glance which ones are "Best Match," "Average," and "Not Recommended," conveying how each hairstyle makes the face look smaller, improves the vibe, or makes the person look more sophisticated. I want to compare long hair, short hair, with/without bangs, curly hair, straight hair, layers, updos, etc. The design should be stylish, like a professional stylist's document. Keep the text minimal and high quality for social media!
Makeup Analysis Guide:
Based on the uploaded face photo, create a luxurious makeup analysis guide image! Use the original facial features as a base, with a natural finish where it's clearly the same person, without over-applying or over-processing. Also, diagnose and summarize the face type (Fresh, Soft Elegant, Elegant, Feminine, Cute, Active Cute, Cool, Cool Casual, Adult Face, Child Face, Curved, Linear). Use a sophisticated design like a magazine beauty feature, with Japanese notation throughout. Keep text to a minimum, focusing on the images for clarity. Please aim for a professional level of completion that makes people want to share it on SNS!
entries.description: A comprehensive prompt for generating a professional stylist-style analysis guide for hairstyles and makeup based on a reference photo.

entries.title: Neon Instagram AI Creator Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic vertical cyberpunk influencer poster in a neon pink and magenta nighttime city, with wet reflective pavement, skyscrapers covered in glowing billboards, and a futuristic social-media atmosphere. Center one confident male AI creator walking forward out of an enormous upright smartphone shaped like an Instagram screen, wearing a rose pink tailored blazer, white turtleneck, layered silver chains, black slim trousers, and clean white sneakers; his face should be softly anonymized with a square blur while keeping the hair and body sharp. The phone interface shows the Instagram wordmark at top, time 11:11, and exactly 5 story circles across the top labeled Your Story, mtariq.ai, an obscured center profile, viral.king, and luxury.vibe. Place the figure on a glowing rounded rectangular platform with hot-pink edge lighting and the front text Mr. Tariq - followed by AI CREATOR. Surround the scene with exactly 4 large floating social engagement badges: a left-center heart notification with 1, a bottom-left heart notification with 7, an upper-right heart notification with 1, and a mid-right heart-only notification. Add exactly 3 floating neon tech cubes near the upper sky, plus Instagram logo panels and holographic billboards throughout the buildings. Include readable billboard slogans: FOLLOW YOUR DREAMS, CREATE. INSPIRE. INFLUENCE, AI POWERED FUTURE, YOU ARE THE BRAND., and 10M+ FOLLOWERS. On the right side, include a tall billboard showing a full-body duplicate of the man and another portrait billboard. On the lower-left street, include a large retro camera prop with neon outlines. Use dramatic low-angle perspective, glossy reflections, volumetric pink light, high contrast, ultra-detailed 3D realism, sharp fashion editorial lighting, futuristic Instagram branding energy, 4:5 poster composition.

entries.title: Conceptual Trapped Reflection Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A young man sitting on a transparent acrylic cube. Inside the cube is a smaller version of himself curled up, looking trapped.

Outfit: neutral tones, clean silhouette.
Lighting: soft but with sharp reflections on acrylic edges.
Background: minimal off-white studio.

Typography:

* Top handwritten: "SAFE"
* Below: "BUT STUCK"
* Bold type intersecting cube: "INSIDE"

Mood: mental confinement, comfort vs limitation.

entries.title: Anime Mall Escalator Fashion Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a polished vertical anime-style fashion illustration of a young woman standing on an indoor escalator in a bright modern shopping mall or transit atrium. She wears a black newsboy cap with a glossy band, shoulder-length light brown hair peeking out from under the cap, long dangling earrings, a crisp white short-sleeve blouse with puff sleeves and a large tied bow at the collar, a high-waisted black pleated midi skirt, and a small black quilted shoulder bag with a gold chain strap. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft square privacy blur while the rest of the image remains sharp. Pose her full body from slightly below eye level, one hand relaxed at her side and the other lightly resting on the escalator handrail, elegant and calm. The background is a spacious glass-roofed interior with diagonal steel beams, marble or dark stone wall panels, warm wooden ceiling accents, glass railings, and a pair of parallel escalators receding behind her; include subtle distant silhouettes of people on an upper level. Use realistic anime rendering with clean linework, soft skin shading, detailed fabric folds, glossy reflections on metal escalator rails, bright early-summer daylight streaming through the skylight, airy high-key lighting, shallow depth of field, fashionable urban outing mood, portrait orientation, high detail.
entries.description: Generates a stylish vertical anime fashion portrait of a woman in a blouse, pleated skirt, and newsboy cap standing on a modern indoor escalator.

entries.title: GPT Image 2 Identity-Preserving Portrait Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please use my uploaded photo only as a reference for the person's identity to preserve their true appearance. Do not retain the background, clothing, props, sitting posture, or environment from the original photo. Generate a brand new quirky girl studio portrait.

Strictly preserve the person's real identity features, including face shape, facial proportions, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, age, hairline, hairstyle foundation, and overall temperament. Do not turn them into a stranger, do not westernize, do not over-beautify, and avoid 'AI fake faces' looks.

Hairstyle should naturally extend from the uploaded photo:
- Keep hair length at the same level
- Follow the original photo regarding bangs
- If the original has black hair, treat it as deep brownish-black, dark tea, or natural deep coffee; avoid flat black
- Only perform studio-style optimization, do not drastically change the hairstyle

Makeup should be unified as Korean quirky girl makeup:
Clear cream skin, natural flat eyebrows, light pink-brown or peach-pink eye makeup, prominent aegyo-sal, long lashes, thin eyeliner, large area of pink or peach blush extending under the eyes with a touch of red on the tip of the nose, and lips in watery strawberry pink or peach. The overall look should be sweet, spirited, and playful; avoid heavy or Western-style makeup.

The overall style should be Korean girl magazine aesthetic, quirky, sweet-cool mix, refined studio portrait. The background is a seamless light grey-white or creamy white studio backdrop, with soft and bright lighting, clean and transparent visuals, and a slight film grain and editorial texture.
entries.description: A comprehensive control prompt for GPT Image 2 designed to generate high-quality studio portrait photos while strictly maintaining the subject's facial features and identity from an uploaded reference image.

entries.title: Pop Art Street Abstract Background
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An abstract background based on pop art and street art with influences from contemporary anime and manga. No people, characters, or text. Composed mainly of sharp, clean line art and flat shading, with vibrant, high-contrast neon colors (pink, cyan, yellow, purple, electric blue). A dynamic layout featuring overlapping complex geometric patterns and bold shapes. Emphasis on gradients and textures using Ben-Day dots and screen tones. Adds street art elements like paint splatters and ink drips, resulting in a stylish and energetic 2D illustration background that merges retro comics with modern anime expressions.

entries.title: Chibi Clone Sticker Diary
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a high-quality "chibi clone sticker diary photo" based on the uploaded real-life image. Preserve the original person's identity, face, hairstyle, hair color, outfit, body proportions, pose, lighting, and background. Do not alter facial features or turn the subject into a full illustration-maintain a realistic photo look.
Analyze the scene as a fitness/running lifestyle moment. Add 5-8 chibi mini clones of the same person around the subject, designed in a consistent kawaii sticker style (big head, small body, large expressive eyes, clean digital finish). Each clone must clearly resemble the real person (same hair, outfit, colors).
Design each chibi with different running-related actions and emotions: jogging, stretching, drinking water, feeling tired, cheering, giving thumbs up, celebrating completion. Ensure all poses are unique and contextually relevant.
Render each chibi as a sticker with white outlines, soft shadows, and a slightly floating effect. Arrange them around the subject and edges without covering the face or main body.
Add light hand-drawn doodles (hearts, sparkles, arrows, motion lines, circles) in white with subtle pink accents, keeping a clean scrapbook diary feel.
Include 5-8 short handwritten-style phrases matching a fitness mood (cute, energetic, encouraging). Use mostly white text with slight pink highlights and small decorative marks.
Composition: keep the real person as the central focus, surrounded by chibi stickers and doodles. The result should feel like a polished, playful, high-resolution social media lifestyle diary image-clean, balanced, and visually rich without clutter.
entries.description: A creative prompt that transforms a real photo into a scrapbook diary style with multiple chibi clones of the subject.

entries.title: Melancholic Lin Daiyu Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a moody cinematic portrait of Lin Daiyu, one of the heroines from Dream of the Red Chamber, seated indoors in an ancient Chinese study. She is a delicate young noblewoman in a translucent pale blue Hanfu with layered gauze sleeves, subtle floral embroidery along the collar, and a soft white inner robe. Her long black hair is styled in an elegant loose updo with wispy strands, decorated with a small floral hairpin, dangling silver ornaments, and a turquoise bead. Her pose is quiet and introspective, one hand raised thoughtfully near her lips and the other resting across her lap beside an open handwritten book on a dark wooden desk. A large flat medium-gray square covers the center of her face, obscuring her facial features. The room is dim and atmospheric, lit by cool bluish window light from the left, with soft haze, shallow depth of field, dark wooden furniture, a blurred hanging calligraphy scroll in the background, and antique objects in the foreground including a stack of old books, a small blue-green ceramic jar, and the edge of a wooden birdcage or shelving piece. Add large vertical off-white Chinese brush calligraphy on the upper left reading 林黛玉, plus one small red seal stamp beneath it also reading 林黛玉. The style should be realistic historical Chinese costume drama photography, melancholic, elegant, poetic, high detail, soft film grain, cool desaturated teal-gray color grading, vertical 2:3 composition.
entries.description: Generates a cinematic ancient Chinese study portrait of Lin Daiyu with Hanfu styling, calligraphy, and a poetic Red Chamber atmosphere.

entries.title: Gym Chibi Sticker Overlay
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Edit the image while keeping the original photo completely unchanged, including the person, face, body, pose, lighting, and gym background. Add multiple small, cute chibi-style of her around the image. Each mini character should have a big head, expressive facial features, and match her hairstyle and outfit. Depict each mini version doing different gym-related activities: one cheering with arms raised, one running in running shoes, one drinking from a shaker bottle, one wearing sporty running glasses, one climbing near her leg. Enhance the image with playful, hand-drawn doodles and handwritten notes in white and pink ink, in a scrapbook style. Include elements like arrows, stars, hearts, sparkles, and sketchy lines. Add cute, handwritten gym-themed motivational phrases: "lift strong", "stronger every rep", "no pain no gain", "sweat now, shine later", "progress over perfection", "train hard, stay soft". The overall vibe should feel fun, energetic, and feminine

entries.title: 1990s Akihabara Street Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a photorealistic documentary street photograph of Akihabara, Tokyo in the 1990s, shot from eye level in a narrow electronics shopping street at dusk or late afternoon. The scene contains about 30 visible pedestrians, mostly adult men in casual 1990s clothing such as denim jackets, plaid sweaters, light-wash jeans, bomber jackets, business suits, shoulder bags, and shopping bags; faces are soft, indistinct, or motion-blurred like an old candid TV still. The street is packed but not chaotic, with people standing, browsing, walking away from camera, and gathering near storefronts. Both sides of the street are lined with tall commercial buildings covered in dense Japanese electronics-store signage, including large vertical and horizontal signs with readable fragments such as オノデン, Panasonic, "FAN," "BEST," and other katakana shop signs. The left side has a prominent blue and yellow electronics storefront canopy, while the right side has an orange-and-blue shop awning, shelves, posters, and boxed merchandise displayed at the entrance. Overhead utility wires crisscross the bright washed-out sky between mid-rise buildings. Use a realistic 1990s Japanese consumer camcorder or VHS broadcast aesthetic: 4:3 aspect ratio, slightly low resolution, interlaced softness, muted colors, mild film grain, blown highlights in the sky, subtle barrel distortion, natural crowd clutter, and no modern smartphones, LED billboards, contemporary fashion, or futuristic elements.
entries.description: Generates a realistic VHS-style 1990s Akihabara electronics district street scene for retro documentary or historical urban imagery.

entries.title: Anime Rooftop Stargazing Couple
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical anime-style night illustration of two young adults sitting close together barefoot on the dark blue ceramic tile roof of a traditional Japanese house, with their faces covered by soft square blur overlays. The taller character on the left has pale ice-blue hair with a red underside streak, wears loose light-blue pajamas with white piping and a small anchor emblem on the chest pocket, sits with one knee raised and one arm resting casually, and places a protective arm around the other character. The shorter character on the right has reddish-purple hair fading to orange tips in a side ponytail with a blue scrunchie and a small yellow hair clip, wears cream plaid pajamas with brown and red accents, sits with hands clasped in front of the chest as if making a wish, and leans gently into the left character. Show exactly 2 bright shooting stars crossing diagonally from upper left toward the center, leaving blue and violet trails across a dense starry sky. In the background, depict a calm moonlit ocean with a glowing reflection, distant hills, and a quiet coastal town with rooftops and a few warm lit windows. Frame the scene from a slightly elevated rooftop perspective, include the eaves and wooden wall of the house in the upper right, use delicate cel-shaded anime line art, luminous highlights, romantic peaceful atmosphere, deep navy night colors, crisp details, and a tall smartphone wallpaper composition.
entries.description: Generates a vertical anime wallpaper of two pajama-clad characters on a Japanese rooftop watching shooting stars over the sea.

entries.title: Anime Follower Milestone Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a bright flat-color anime-style celebratory social media poster with no visible line art, soft pastel shading, and a Kindle-cover-like clean graphic finish. The main subject is a cheerful young anime girl in a flowing pink kimono, positioned left of center and cropped dynamically, with long wavy pink hair sweeping in the wind; her face is intentionally covered by a solid pale pink square censor block. She reaches one open hand toward the viewer from the upper left while her other hand is clenched happily near her chest. Her outfit is a pale sakura-pink kimono with wide sleeves, small white cherry blossom motifs, a bright blue obi with gold crisscross patterning, a yellow bow, and a thin red cord tied at the waist. On the right side, place a large soft white circular text area containing the celebratory message: elegant green script Thank you!, huge coral-pink numerals 1400, and bold coral Japanese text フォロワー 人感謝!. Surround the character and text with abundant spring foliage: fresh lime-green leaves, white cherry blossoms, scattered pink petals, yellow and green confetti, and soft bokeh-like light. Use a vibrant palette of pink, coral, lime green, white, turquoise, and sky blue, with a joyful festive atmosphere, diagonal motion, soft bloom lighting, and a 4:3 landscape composition.

entries.prompt: Create a tall vertical inspirational art wallpaper in a quiet Monument Valley-inspired isometric style, soft healing pastel palette, and lots of misty negative space. The scene is an impossible architectural city made of pale peach, lavender, cream, and powder-blue stone: high narrow towers, arched doorways, bridges, staircases, parapets, and floating platforms arranged around a deep dark vertical abyss in the center. Include exactly one tiny lone human figure standing on an upper bridge, wearing a purple cloak or dress and white head, looking into the abyss. Add one prominent building face near the middle-right with a glowing circular portal like a warm orange-pink eclipse, casting light into the deep shaft. Add exactly two small bare ornamental trees in square planters, one on the lower-left terrace and one on the right terrace. The architecture should include multiple surreal stairways, including one long diagonal staircase in the lower center-left and one stepped staircase climbing the upper-right tower; the tallest tower has a turquoise domed roof and a small spire. Use a pale sun disk near the upper left, atmospheric fog, soft bloom, delicate shadows, and minimal linework. Place large vertical Chinese quote typography on the upper-left in thin elegant gray strokes: 当你凝视深渊时,深渊也在凝视你。. Beneath it, add a small English translation in light gray: When you gaze into the abyss, the abyss gazes into you.. Add small editorial poster details: top-left text VOL.01 with a tiny horizontal line below it, top-right text 2026 with exactly four small vertical dots below, a small left-side keyword block reading "depth" and "gaze," a bottom-left minimalist circle logo above the words "LOOK DEEP" and "BE SEEN," and exactly three small horizontal dots at the bottom-right. Keep the overall composition airy, refined, contemplative, and premium, with the quote occupying the left third and the surreal city rising through the center and right.
entries.description: Generates a serene vertical quote wallpaper with Monument Valley-inspired impossible architecture and contemplative bilingual typography.

entries.title: Monument Valley Dawn Quote Wallpaper
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a tall vertical inspirational art wallpaper in a serene Monument Valley-inspired style, soft healing fantasy architecture, aspect ratio 9:16. The scene is an impossible pastel city of stacked geometric towers, arches, bridges, stairways, terraces, canals, and small domed pavilions floating in mist, rendered in delicate isometric perspective with clean minimalist forms. Use a warm dawn palette of peach, cream, pale sand, mint green, turquoise, lavender, and deep indigo shadows. At the upper right, a monumental cream-colored arched gate stands high above the city, glowing with sunrise light; the orange sun sits inside the arch, and a long white staircase leads toward it. Include a tiny solitary human figure standing on a mid-level terrace for scale. Add subtle details: thin waterfalls flowing down dark blue interior walls, glowing windows, small gold finials, a bare pink-blossom tree on a balcony, a crescent moon in the hazy sky, and two tiny white birds. Compose the poster with negative space on the left for typography. Add exactly 6 visible text blocks: top-left small serif text "VOL. 02" above "2026"; large vertical Chinese headline 黎明前的黑暗 in dark blue-gray; beneath it a short Chinese quote 不是惩罚,是宇宙在准备更壮丽的日出。; a small cursive English quote Before dawn, a greater sunrise is being prepared.; lower-left small text "2026 DAWN" with a vertical Chinese phrase 向光而行; and bottom-right small text "VOL.02". Use refined editorial poster typography, elegant spacing, subtle paper grain, atmospheric fog, soft bloom, cinematic morning light, quiet meditative mood, ultra-detailed yet minimalist, no borders, no photorealism.
entries.description: A vertical healing-style inspirational wallpaper featuring impossible pastel architecture, dawn light, and elegant Chinese quote typography.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的社交快照条目《Monument Valley Dawn Quote Wallpaper》。 关键词：cinematic、editorial、balcony、city。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

entries.title: Japanese SNS Automation Thumbnail
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-energy Japanese YouTube thumbnail / social media banner in a 16:9 widescreen format, using a dramatic black, white, and electric yellow color scheme with explosive manga-style speed lines, paint-brush textures, glowing arrows, sparks, and a futuristic AI automation atmosphere. The left half is dominated by huge bold Japanese headline typography reading 頑張らない SNS展開, with the first line in thick white characters on a black brush-stroke background and "SNS" plus the following characters in oversized bright yellow block letters with black shadowing. Beneath it, add a slanted white brush-stroke strip containing black text reading GPT Image 2で全部変わった. Along the bottom, place a wide black brush-stroke banner with large white and yellow Japanese text reading 画像も記事もスキルで自動化, emphasizing the final yellow phrase. On the right half, show an anime-style young woman with very long flowing split-color hair, pink on the left side and blue on the right side, wearing a white T-shirt printed with OKIHIRO AI Creative and a pink skirt; her face is intentionally covered by a centered square mosaic-like block in muted pink and gray tones, while her right hand reaches toward the viewer in a dynamic foreshortened pose. Include exactly three floating social media icons: one black square X icon near the top center, one Instagram icon in a rounded white square at the upper right, and one YouTube play icon in a rounded white square at the lower right. Add glowing AI/content automation elements around the center, including a bright open cube with a cloud symbol, floating image cards, yellow directional arrows, and golden light rays radiating outward. Use crisp anime illustration mixed with bold advertising graphic design, high contrast, sharp outlines, saturated colors, motion blur accents, and a polished viral thumbnail composition optimized for clicks.
entries.description: Generates a bold Japanese promotional thumbnail about GPT Image 2, SNS expansion, and AI-powered content automation.

entries.title: Chibi Scrapbook Photo Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: remove the people around the main character, Add multiple small, cute chibi-style "mini versions" of her around the image. Each mini character should have a big head, expressive facial features, and match her hairstyle and outfit. Depict each mini version doing different vacation-related activities in italy. Enhance the image with playful, hand-drawn doodles and handwritten notes in white and pink ink, in a scrapbook style. Include elements like arrows, stars, hearts, sparkles, and sketchy lines. Add cute, handwritten vacation-themed phrases about Milan Italy.

entries.title: 3D Chibi Doodle Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Use the original face from the reference photo. Background same as the photo. Warm, soft, clean lighting with soft shadows. Surround it with several 3D cute style mini chibi versions of themselves, keeping the original facial features. The chibi characters have various poses and expressions: cheerful jumping, waving, sitting casually holding a drink, and cute/playful expressions.￼ Add white hand-drawn style doodle elements: outlines around the main body, stars, hearts, sparkles, and motion lines. Add aesthetic handwriting text like: 'shine', 'bright day', 'happy', 'smile', etc. (casual doodle font). Overall style: clean & aesthetic composition, white sticker outline, soft pastel color tone, high detail 3D chibi, glossy look, cute Korean style, instagramable￼

entries.title: Dreamy Van Rooftop Flower Field
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic dreamy lifestyle photograph of a young woman sitting alone on the white roof of a vintage turquoise van in a vast pastel wildflower field. Use a closer low-angle portrait framing that focuses on her upper body, dangling legs, and the rooftop/side window section of the van, with the van filling the lower half of the image and a wide soft blue sky filling the upper background. She sits casually on the roof edge with both legs hanging straight down, wearing a pale blue sleeveless summer dress and white sneakers, holding a small bouquet of mixed wildflowers in both hands on her lap, looking slightly upward with a soft natural smile and relaxed youthful mood. Her long dark hair is gently blown by the wind and the dress fabric flows softly. Tie a cluster of exactly 6 pastel balloons beside her on the left, in pale blue and white, floating from white strings attached near the van roof. Add handwritten white diary-style sketch text in the sky: exactly 4 phrases reading my happy place arched above her head, plus "bloom" on the left, "sunny day" on the right, and one small curved motion mark near the bouquet. Integrate exactly 16 white doodles around the sky and field: 4 five-point stars, 4 simple flowers, 2 smiley faces, 1 large smile curve near the lower left, 1 sparkle diamond at the bottom right, 1 small butterfly-like mark, and 3 short decorative curved strokes. Keep the doodles hand-drawn, thin, chalky white, naturally composited as if floating in the air. Lighting is bright natural daylight with soft overexposed highlights, dreamy glow, bloom effect, pastel film tones, low contrast, smooth highlight roll-off, airy clean negative space, and a color palette of turquoise, sky blue, soft white, pastel pink, pastel yellow, and warm cream. Make the image peaceful, whimsical, intimate, youthful, and carefree, with crisp realistic subject and vehicle details but soft atmospheric background.
entries.description: Generates a whimsical pastel lifestyle photo of a young woman on a turquoise vintage van with balloons, wildflowers, and handwritten sky doodles.

entries.title: Dreamy Couple on Turquoise Van
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic dreamy lifestyle photograph in a vertical 4:5 frame, shot from a close low-angle perspective, showing a young East Asian couple sitting casually on the roof edge of a vintage turquoise van in a wildflower field. The man sits on the left in a loose white button-up shirt, cream pants, and white sneakers, one knee raised and one leg hanging over the van; the woman sits on the right in a light pastel yellow floral summer dress and white sneakers, legs dangling naturally, holding a small pink flower near her face while smiling softly toward him. Add a cluster of exactly 7 pastel balloons tied beside the woman on the right: 3 pale blue, 2 cream yellow, and 2 very light aqua balloons, with thin white strings. The background is a wide clean soft blue sky with large negative space and a few faint clouds near the horizon. Integrate white hand-drawn diary-style doodles and text directly into the sky: exactly 4 handwritten phrases reading good days, stay close, happy place, and B-. entries.title: Candlelit Anime Birthday Twins
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a warm, highly detailed anime-style birthday party illustration of two elegant twin-tail girls seated close together at a round table in a candlelit room, holding a pink strawberry birthday cake together at the center. The left girl has deep purple hair fading to reddish pink at the tips, styled in high twin ponytails with floral hair ornaments, and wears a frilly purple gothic-lolita dress with white ruffles and a small heart necklace. The right girl has long silver-white hair, styled in high twin ponytails tied with red bows, and wears a red-and-black gothic-lolita dress with black ruffles and a red heart choker. Place opaque rectangular face-covering blocks over both girls' faces, matching soft skin-toned gradients, so their facial features are hidden. The cake should be a round pastel pink cake with dripping icing, whipped cream, strawberries, and exactly five lit candles. Surround the scene with glowing candles, rose bouquets, wrapped gift boxes, a champagne bottle in the foreground, and a white teapot with teacups on the table. Use warm golden candlelight with soft bokeh and romantic backlighting, a cozy ornate interior background, shallow depth of field, painterly high-detail rendering, glossy highlights, rich reds and purples, and a celebratory birthday atmosphere.
entries.description: Generates a romantic anime birthday scene with two gothic-lolita twin-tail girls holding a strawberry cake in warm candlelight.

entries.title: Anonymous Concert Doodle
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a deliberately crude, childlike digital doodle on a plain white background, as if drawn quickly with thick black marker and rough scribbled fills. Show a small concert scene with exactly 2 people: on the left, a seated pianist with short brown hair, pale skin, black sleeveless outfit, sitting on a simple black chair and playing a glossy black grand piano; in the center-right, a female singer standing beside the piano, wearing a striped black-and-white top and a long dark gray skirt, one arm raised high in a waving or triumphant pose. The singer's face is anonymized with a square pixelated blur block. The grand piano is large and extends to the right, heavily scribbled in black, with the yellow Yamaha tuning-fork logo and the word "YAMAHA" visible on the side; include exactly 2 small yellow caster wheels under the piano. Add one handwritten Japanese annotation, ヨッメ, in large black characters near the upper right, with a black arrow pointing toward the singer. Use an intentionally messy amateur style with uneven proportions, shaky outlines, visible scribble strokes, minimal color palette of black, white, brown, gray, pale skin tones, red cheek accent, and yellow logo details, like a privacy-protecting humorous sketch of a live music concert.

entries.title: Cute Superhero Drink Doodle Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a realistic handheld street-food photo of a layered iced drink in a clear plastic takeaway cup with a domed flat lid, held close to the camera by a left hand wearing a muted gray-green long sleeve. The drink has three vivid layers: a deep ruby-red fruit base at the bottom, a cloudy white creamy middle with red streaks, and a thick bright matcha-green top with small dark specks. Set the scene outdoors in front of a small dessert drink stall, with shallow depth of field and natural daylight; the background should be softly blurred but still show a white sign reading "Eh! Chocolat," a pink menu board, syrup bottles lined up on the counter, a green bottle at the right, and a colorful menu display at the left. Add playful white hand-drawn doodles directly over the photo so the cup becomes a cute superhero character: one kawaii face on the cup with two eyes, one open smile, two blush-mark groups, and one outlined star on its body; two noodle-like arms, two simple legs, and two small boots; one flowing cape extending to the right; one wand or magic staff with a circular tip; two small hearts, one four-point sparkle, and nine short motion/emphasis strokes around the cup. Keep the doodles casual, imperfect, bright white, and integrated with the subject as if sketched on top of the photograph. Use a vibrant candid smartphone photography look, high contrast, crisp focus on the drink and hand, blurred café-stall background, and a cheerful whimsical mood. Customize the stall sign text as Eh! Chocolat, the drink top color as bright matcha green, the drink bottom color as deep ruby red, the doodle color as white, and the sleeve color as muted gray-green.
entries.description: Generates a realistic handheld café drink photo enhanced with playful white doodles that turn the cup into a whimsical superhero character.

entries.title: Elegant Wuxia Noblewoman Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical semi-realistic digital illustration of an elegant adult East Asian fantasy noblewoman seated indoors in a dim, luxurious ancient Chinese-inspired study or palace room. She wears a deep burgundy red low-cut silk dress with ornate gold embroidery, layered under a sheer glossy black outer robe with flowing translucent sleeves and black sash, giving a refined wuxia/xianxia courtesan or noble consort aesthetic. Her long black hair is styled half-up with elaborate gold hairpins, delicate chains, small red tassels, and long dangling earrings. Compose her from mid-thigh to head in a relaxed seated pose, one arm resting on a wooden armrest and the other hand draped gracefully over her lap, with soft skin highlights, detailed fabric folds, and polished hands. The face should be completely obscured by a centered opaque muted brown square censor block, while the hair, ears, neck, collarbones, and clothing remain visible. Use warm cinematic lantern lighting, shallow depth of field, dark wooden furniture, blurred shelves and glowing lamps in the background, rich shadows, high-detail painterly realism, glossy silk texture, gold accents, sensual but elegant mood, portrait orientation, 2:3 aspect ratio.

entries.title: Shy Pink-Haired Guitarist Anime Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a polished anime-style square illustration of Hitori Gotoh, a shy teenage girl with very long straight pink hair and blue eyes, blushing with a nervous, downcast expression. She stands indoors in a soft pink rehearsal-room or bedroom setting, wearing an oversized pink zip-up tracksuit jacket with pale sleeve stripes and a black skirt, holding a black single-cut electric guitar with gold hardware, cream binding, humbucker pickups, and a black shoulder strap. Her left hand grips the guitar neck while her right hand is held anxiously near her chest, emphasizing introverted stage fright. The background is a mauve-pink wall with warm sunlight streaming in from the right, casting window-frame shadows and a gentle nostalgic glow. Include exactly 2 wall items on the left: one dark concert poster reading STARRY with smaller band-list text beneath it, and one small pink sticky note with handwritten Japanese practice text and a tiny doodle. Add subtle hand-drawn star and heart outlines on the wall, soft bokeh dust, delicate cel shading, glossy hair highlights, detailed guitar reflections, and a high-quality modern anime key-visual finish.

entries.title: Time-Travel Birthday Reunion Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please generate an emotional photography piece titled "My Childhood Self and My Current Self Celebrating a Birthday Together" based on the clear current personal photo I uploaded.

Please strictly preserve the authentic identity characteristics from my current photo, including: face shape, facial proportions, eyebrow and eye structure, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, sense of age, hairline, hairstyle characteristics, and overall temperament.

Do not change me into a different person, do not westernize, do not follow "internet celebrity" aesthetics, do not over-beautify, and do not generate AI fake faces. The entire image must make it immediately obvious that the child and the adult in the frame are the same person at different stages of life.

---

## Core Image Settings

Generate a highly realistic 4:5 vertical photography piece.

There are two characters in the scene:
- One is my childhood version
- One is my current version

The two characters should appear in the same real scene, the same photo, under the same lighting, and within the same color palette, as if they are truly sitting together for a birthday and taking a commemorative photo.

Do not use dividing lines, do not use split screens, do not stitch dual scenes together, and do not make one half black-and-white and the other half color. The whole must look like a naturally and authentically captured birthday group photo, not a poster collage.

---

## Character Relationship and Emotion

This is a photo about "my current self meeting my childhood self and celebrating a birthday together." There should be a clear emotional connection and a sense of interaction between the two, as if they are meeting gently in the same space-time.

Emotional keywords: Warm, healing, quiet, soft, moving, growth, self-reconciliation, sense of time flow.

The interaction could be:
- The two looking at each other
- Both looking down at the cake together
- The adult looking gently at their younger self while the child responds naturally and happily

The overall feeling should be: On this birthday, the grown-up version of me finally sits down to accompany my younger self in blowing out the candles.

---

## Left Character: My Childhood Version

Please reasonably generate a childhood version of me based on my current appearance, aged approximately [Childhood Age, e.g., 5/6/7 years old].

This child must retain identity characteristics that correspond to my current self, making it clear that this is "me as a child," including:
- Continuity of facial contours
- Continuity of gaze and temperament
- Continuity of face shape features
- An overall "look like the same person" temperament

Childhood version requirements:
- Natural sense of age, like a real child
- Expression is innocent, warm, and natural
- Clothing is simple and daily, such as a light gray T-shirt, knit top, or minimalist children's wear
- Natural sitting posture, not stiff
- Can smile, look at my current self, or look at the cake
- Must not be a stranger child; there must be a strong "this is me when I was little" déjà vu

---

## Right Character: My Current Self

The right side is my current self, which must strictly refer to the facial appearance in the photo I uploaded.

Adult version requirements:
- Face must match the reference photo
- Looks like the current me, realistic and natural
- Sense of age consistent with current state
- Wearing clean and nice daily clothing, such as a white/beige/light-colored top paired with blue jeans
- Natural and relaxed posture
- Can rest chin on hands or place them naturally on the table
- Gaze directed at the childhood self with a gentle, calm, and restrained smile

Emotional focus for the adult version: As if gently watching one's past self, accompanying her/him as they grow up.

---

## Cake and Age Elements

Place a realistic and natural birthday cake in the middle or foreground. The cake should be one of the emotional centers of the frame but should not overpower the subjects.

Requirements:
- Cake placed in the center of the table
- Simple, realistic, and natural design suitable for a birthday atmosphere
- The cake has lit number candles
- The number on the candles is: [Current Age]
- The candle flame is soft and warm, slightly illuminating the faces of the two characters and the surface of the cake
- The cake is an important symbol of "my current self and my childhood self celebrating a birthday together"

---

## Year Information

Please present the following years in a low-key, simple, and elegant small font within the frame:
- Near or above the childhood character: ([Childhood Year])
- Near or above the current character: ([Current Year])

The font should be simple and natural, like lightweight typography in a photographic work, and should not distract from the main subject. Aside from these years and the age numbers on the cake, no other text should appear.

---

## Scene and Background

The scene is a pure, soft, and minimalist indoor photography space.

Suggested background colors: Light gray, warm gray, beige gray, cream gray.

Requirements:
- Clean and simple background
- No complex decorations, no clutter, no extra people
- Just a table is enough
- The overall look should be like a real photo studio or a minimalist lifestyle photography space

---

## Lighting and Tone

Use soft, warm, cinematic lighting.

Requirements:
- Even and natural light
- Faces have a slight three-dimensional feel
- Soft shadows
- Unified overall color tone
- No different color temperatures on left and right sides
- Do not create a visual effect of two different eras stitched together

The overall tone should be warm, healing, and realistic, like a high-end but natural birthday commemorative photo.

---

## Style Requirements

The overall style is: High-quality realistic photography · Minimalist emotional photography · Birthday commemorative portrait. Realistic, natural, and restrained, suitable for posting on social media.

The focus of the image is: Two life stages of the same person celebrating a birthday together in the same space-time, creating a gentle emotional exchange.

---

## ⚠️ Important Restrictions

- Do not change my core appearance
- Do not make the childhood version a stranger child
- No split screens, no dividing lines, no collage feel
- Do not make one side black-and-white and the other colored
- No westernization, no internet celebrity look, no AI fake faces
- No cartoon style, no illustration style, no plastic skin
- No exaggerated makeup, no excessive skin smoothing
- No complex backgrounds, no extra people
- No hand errors, no extra fingers
- No garbled text
- Aside from ([Childhood Year]), ([Current Year]), and the [Current Age] on the cake candles, no other text should appear.

---

## Final Output

Output a 4:5 vertical, highly realistic, warm, minimalist, and cinematic birthday emotional photography piece. In the frame, my childhood self and my current self sit in the same scene, celebrating a birthday together with a birthday cake and age candles in between. The two look as if they have truly met in the same space-time, forming a real commemorative photo about time, growth, and self-embrace.

entries.title: Childhood and Present Self Encounter
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please generate an emotional photography work titled 'My Childhood Self and My Current Self Looking at Each Other' based on the clear personal photo I uploaded. Please strictly preserve the real identity characteristics from my current photo, including: face shape, facial proportions, eye and eyebrow structure, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, sense of age, hairline, hairstyle features, and overall temperament. Do not turn me into someone else, do not Westernize, do not use influencer-style filters, do not over-beautify, and do not generate a fake AI face. The entire image must allow someone to see at a glance that the left and right sides are different life stages of the same person. Composition: Generate a 4:5 vertical, realistic photography-style portrait. There are two figures in the frame, sitting in the same simple studio space, looking at each other, forming a gentle emotional exchange. Left side: Childhood version of me. Right side: Current me (adult version, face must match my uploaded photo). Both adopt natural sitting positions; the image is simple, the composition is stable, and the focus is on the eye contact and emotional connection between the two people. Left character: Childhood version of me. Please reasonably generate a childhood version of me based on my current looks, aged approximately 7 years old. Retain identity features that correspond to the present to ensure it looks like 'me as a child,' including the continuation of facial contours, eye temperament, and face shape. Requirements: With an innocent, natural, and warm smile; head turned slightly to the right, looking at the adult version of me; wearing a light gray T-shirt and blue jeans; the year '1999' clearly written above the head. Right character: My current self. The right side is the current me, which must strictly reference the real appearance in my uploaded photo. Requirements: The adult image must be natural and realistic; sitting, body slightly facing left; hands naturally resting on the chin; with a calm, gentle, and restrained smile; eyes looking at the childhood self on the left, presenting a gentle gaze as if conversing with the past self; wearing a white T-shirt and blue jeans; the year '2026' clearly written above the head. Scene and Background: The scene is a pure, soft professional studio background. Suggested background colors: light gray, warm gray, beige gray, or cream gray. The background should be simple and clean, with no clutter, no furniture, and no complex decorations. Make the image look like a real studio photograph rather than a poster design. Lighting and Atmosphere: Use soft, warm, cinematic lighting; light is even and natural, with slight three-dimensionality and soft shadows on the face. The overall atmosphere is gentle, quiet, healing, and has a sense of time flowing. The emotional focus is the gentle eye contact between the childhood self and the current self. Style Requirements: Overall style: professional portrait photography, minimalist emotional photography, realistic, natural, restrained, high-quality realistic style, focusing on character emotions and the visual communication between the two versions. Important Restrictions: Do not change my core looks; do not make the childhood version a stranger; no cartoon style, no illustration style, no AI plastic skin; no exaggerated makeup, no excessive smoothing; no complex backgrounds, no extra people; no incorrect hands, no extra fingers; no garbled text; no other text except for the years '1999' and '2026' at the top. Final Output: Output a 4:5 vertical, highly realistic, warm, minimalist, cinematic photography piece. On the left is the childhood me, and on the right is the current me, both sitting and looking at each other, like a real photograph about time, growth, and self-reconciliation.

entries.title: Electric Blue 700 Followers Anime Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical dark fantasy anime celebration poster in a dramatic electric-blue and black palette, featuring a single young anime woman floating diagonally through a storm of magical energy. Surround her with jagged lightning arcs, glowing blue flames, shattered glass-like fragments, swirling dark ribbons, luminous blue petals, and 4 distinct blue roses: one small rose at the lower left, one bright rose at the right of the number, one large rose near the lower right, and one dark rose at the bottom-right edge. The typography should look like blue lightning calligraphy with a white-hot inner glow, cyan outer aura, and dark shadow, partially obscuring the character while remaining legible. Use high-contrast cinematic lighting, deep navy shadows, intense sapphire highlights, floating particles, motion blur, glossy fantasy illustration rendering, and a highly detailed gpt-image-2 anime key visual composition.

entries.prompt: ChatGPT, we've been together for quite a while now. I'd like to see what you look like.
