entries.title: Cyberpunk Pink-Haired Idol Peace Sign
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vibrant cyberpunk anime close-up illustration of a pink-haired virtual idol girl in a neon server-room setting, framed as a tight vertical crop with the left half of her face mostly cut off and her oversized hand dominating the center foreground. She has very long flowing bright pink hair with loose strands and ribbons, a small turquoise diamond-shaped hair ornament near the top left, pale skin, and a glossy futuristic jacket in electric blue and magenta with black cuffs and hot-pink trim. Her hand is thrust toward the viewer in extreme perspective, making a peace sign with 2 long extended fingers, 1 visible thumb, and 3 curled or partially fused lower fingers for a slightly imperfect six-finger AI-art look. The background shows tall dark data panels and monitor columns with glowing purple, cyan, and magenta code-like bars, plus diagonal neon light streaks and pink reflections. Use a polished high-saturation anime key visual style, dramatic rim lighting, glossy highlights, shallow depth of field, energetic idol-promo composition, and a futuristic website hero-image feel.

entries.title: Rainbow Hair Shoujo Idol Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image as the character base, transform it into a high-energy tall-proportioned shoujo/anime idol illustration. Preserve the rainbow hair as the key identity feature, but redraw the subject in a dynamic pop-star pose: one hand making a peace sign toward the viewer and the other clenched in a cute energetic fist. Replace the real bar setting and plain shirt with a vivid Harajuku idol outfit: pink-and-purple patterned crop top, cropped jacket, frilly mini skirt, wide belt with dangling chains and star charms, striped knee sock, pink sneaker, layered bead bracelets, heart and star jewelry, and a large pink polka-dot bow. Add a saturated comic-pop background filled with halftone dots, hearts, stars, sparkles, paint splashes, and speech-bubble typography. Include exactly 3 comic text bubbles: "YEAH!" in the upper left, "LOVE IT!" on the right, and "POP!" in the lower left. Keep the face area obscured with a plain square censor block like the reference. Use bright glossy colors, thick clean linework, dramatic manga highlights, and a cheerful magazine-cover composition.
entries.description: Transforms a reference photo into a colorful tall-proportioned shoujo idol illustration with comic-pop effects and preserved face censoring.

entries.title: Healing Travel Calendar Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use the uploaded photo to generate a 9:16 vertical calendar card.

[1. Execution Mode - Critical]

This is an image editing task, NOT image generation.

Use the original photo as the base layer
Do NOT recreate, redraw, or reinterpret the image

Strictly preserve:

face, identity, expression, hair, body, clothing
original lighting, shadows, color temperature
environment and composition

❗ No beautification, no smoothing, no retouching
❗ The photo must look unchanged

[2. Allowed Operations - Overlay Only]

Only add design elements on top:

bottom 30% soft gradient extension (for calendar area)
subtle translucent mask for readability
calendar layout, month title, and short caption

Forbidden:

repainting or altering existing pixels
changing global color style
applying "design filters"
[3. Color Strategy]

Colors must come from the current image:

extract primary / secondary / accent colors
apply slight desaturation and brightness normalization only
keep original photo color feeling

👉 Respect the image, do not redesign the color system

[4. Layout Structure]
Top 70%: original image (untouched)
Bottom 30%: gradient + calendar
smooth transition, no hard edges
clean spacing, minimal design
magazine-like, not template-style
[5. Calendar Content - Must Be Accurate]

Generate correct calendar for the given month:

Title: July 2026 / 2026.07
Weekdays: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun
Dates: accurate alignment based on real calendar
[6. Caption Rules - Important]

Length: 8-16 words (or equivalent short phrase)

Requirements:

max 2 lines
no exclamation marks
no clichés, no motivational tone
do NOT explain emotions

Preferred style:

subtle, atmospheric
fragment-like, not fully explanatory
leave emotional space

👉 Make people pause, not finish reading

[7. Image Selection Guidance - Key to Success]

Prefer:

side face / partially hidden face
natural遮挡 (hat, hand, shadow)
motion (walking, turning)
mood > facial detail

Avoid:
front-facing portraits
strong identity-focused close-ups

👉 Reduce face-modification risk

[Final Principle]

👉 Do NOT generate a better photo.
Gently place design on the original photo.
entries.description: A sophisticated prompt for turning a personal travel photo into a vertical calendar card by adding a clean UI overlay without altering the original person's features.

entries.title: Mint Compact Car by the Sea
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a bright, photorealistic vertical lifestyle photo of a young woman standing beside a cute compact hatchback car on a coastal road. The car has a rounded retro-modern body, a glossy two-tone paint scheme with pastel mint green lower panels and creamy white upper body and roof, circular headlights, small silver wheels, beige interior seats, and a charming kawaii-inspired design. The woman has short blonde bob hair, fair skin, a slim build, and wears a coordinated pale mint green summer romper with a matching short cardigan and flat strappy sandals; she stands casually in front of the driver-side door with one hand raised near her hair and one leg slightly crossed. Her face is intentionally covered by a soft square beige privacy blur. Set the scene on sunlit asphalt with white parking lines, a low roadside guardrail, vivid blue ocean and clear blue sky in the background, warm midday natural light, gentle shadows, shallow depth of field, clean travel-advertisement mood, realistic camera perspective, high detail, 2:3 portrait composition.

entries.title: AI Cost Reduction Taoist Talisman
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a single front-facing Chinese Taoist talisman on an off-white background, centered as a tall vertical rectangle of aged golden-yellow rice paper with subtle fibrous texture, slight mottling, and a thin red outer border plus inner red frame. Use deep cinnabar-red ink for the sacred graphics and mostly black ink for side calligraphy, with a hand-brushed, slightly imperfect printed look. The talisman contains 4 vertical text columns: left black column reading 使天下所有 SOTA 大型模型 成本降為十分之一, right black column reading 敕令天曹地府 削減算力消耗 降成本費用, a small red boxed column at lower left reading "立降十成", and a small red boxed column at lower right reading "成本大降". In the center, draw a large ornate red Taoist spell glyph with stacked Chinese characters, including a top title 敕令靈畫 and the phrase 十分之一, shaped like a flowing ritual sigil with angular strokes. Above it place 1 yin-yang symbol inside a red circle, surrounded by 8 red bagua trigrams arranged symmetrically. Add 2 mirrored vertical red circuit-like ritual lines flanking the central glyph, each with circular nodes, giving a mystical-computing hybrid feeling. At the bottom center add 1 red square seal stamp containing four stylized characters, default text 敕妙降本符, and beneath it 1 small trigram mark. Decorate the four corners with 4 red flame-cloud ornaments and add fine red ornamental curls near the bottom corners. The composition should resemble an authentic Daoist paper charm redesigned as a humorous magical cost-reduction talisman for SOTA AI models, cleanly photographed or scanned, flat 2D, high resolution, no perspective distortion.

entries.title: Gym Photo Chibi Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Edit while keeping the original image unchanged-including the person, face, body, pose, lighting, and gym background.

Add multiple cute small Q-version "mini characters" around the frame. Each mini character should have big-head features, vivid facial expressions, and remain consistent with her original hairstyle and clothing.

Describe each mini character performing different fitness-related activities:
- One lifting a barbell
- One drinking from a shaker bottle
- One doing warm-up exercises
- One running in running shoes

Use white and pink hand-drawn doodles and handwritten notes to enhance the visuals, creating a scrapbook style. Include elements like arrows, stars, hearts, sparkles, and sketch lines.

Add handwritten-style fitness-themed inspirational phrases.

The overall atmosphere is full of fun and masculine charm.

entries.title: Sims Screenshot to CCD Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the base image, transform the Sims 4 screenshot into a realistic early-2000s CCD compact digital camera photo. Keep the same character, outfit, pose, framing, storefront entrance, metal grid, bicycle, street, and overall composition, but make it look like a real candid photo rather than a game render. Preserve the face anonymization as a soft square blur. Maintain a natural 16:9 snapshot crop with imperfect casual framing.

entries.title: Chibi Angel Girls at Sunset
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cozy square anime illustration at sunset on a grassy riverside embankment. The scene features exactly 3 chibi angel girls sitting side by side on the slope with their knees hugged to their chests, facing forward with small dot eyes and gentle smiles. Each girl has one glowing halo above her head and one pair of small white wings on her back, for a total of 3 halos and 3 wing pairs. The left girl has long aqua blue hair, a turquoise zip-up tracksuit jacket with white stripes, a dark pleated skirt, striped knee socks, and teal-accent sneakers. The middle girl has long blonde twin tails tied with black ribbons, a dark green zip-up tracksuit jacket with white stripes, a black pleated skirt, striped knee socks, and yellow-accent sneakers. The right girl has long pink hair, a coral pink zip-up tracksuit jacket with white stripes, a white pleated skirt, striped knee socks, and pink-accent sneakers. Use a cute soft-lined 2D anime style with warm nostalgic lighting, rounded proportions, clean outlines, and detailed grassy texture dotted with small white daisies. In the background, include a stairway on the left climbing the embankment, a calm river on the right reflecting the orange sun, a bridge in the distance, and a small city skyline under a peach-orange sky with scattered fluffy clouds. The atmosphere should feel peaceful, whimsical, and slightly magical, with the sun low near the horizon and warm golden highlights on the grass and water.

entries.title: Cozy Cat Holiday Bedroom
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a warm, cozy anime-style illustration of a cheerful anthropomorphic calico cat person enjoying a lazy holiday afternoon in a sunlit bedroom. The character is reclining diagonally across a soft cream-colored bed, wearing a plain white T-shirt and loose gray sweatpants with a drawstring, round wire-rim glasses, smiling with closed happy eyes, one arm tucked behind the head and the other holding a foamy glass of golden beer. Add a striped calico tail curled on the bed, visible paw pads on the feet, soft blush, and relaxed body language. The room should feel peaceful and lived-in, with golden sunlight streaming through a large open window on the left, white curtains, blue sky and fluffy clouds outside, and leafy green plants on the windowsill and in the foreground. Include exactly two pillows behind the character, one mustard yellow and one green gingham, plus cream bedding and a rounded wooden headboard. On the wall above the bed, include exactly three wall decorations: a cat poster reading GOOD DAY, a small hanging sign reading "Relax" with a paw print, and a framed landscape picture. On the wall shelf to the upper right, include exactly five visible items: one potted trailing plant, one cat-face plush or ornament, two upright books, and one framed landscape photo. Add a bedside table on the right with a lamp, a small alarm clock, and a cup; place one open beverage can on the bed near the character. In the foreground, include a low table with a mug of tea and a magazine titled NEKO LIFE featuring a cat illustration, plus a small potted plant. Use soft painterly shading, gentle linework, warm beige and honey tones, detailed cozy clutter, dappled sunlight, and a relaxing slice-of-life mood.

entries.title: Cozy Pastel Miniature Writing Room
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a highly detailed cozy miniature diorama room in a soft pastel, hand-drawn storybook-anime style, shown in a three-quarter isometric view as a tiny open box with stitched beige fabric walls and floor edges. The scene centers on a young woman seated at a wooden writing desk, wearing a pink pastel plaid dress with ruffled off-shoulder sleeves, lace trim, a bow at the chest, and a delicate necklace; her long wavy light brown hair falls over her shoulders, and her face is covered by a flat plain tan square censor patch. She is writing with a pen in an open notebook on the desk. The desk contains exactly 10 visible tabletop items: one open notebook, one pen in her hand, one teacup on a saucer filled with tea, one pink closed notebook, two round buttons, one blue wrapped candy, one pink striped candy, one tiny yellow candy, and one small flower. Add a warm wooden window on the left with lace curtains and garden light shining through; outside the window are pink roses and greenery. Include exactly three fluffy white clouds floating near the window, plus small star and flower doodles around the room. On the right wall place a pink stitched name plaque reading luffynodoo with tiny heart doodles around it, plus two blue cloud doodles and two yellow star doodles. Furnish the right side with a small wooden shelf and cabinet containing exactly four upright books, one potted succulent, one lampshade, and one jar labeled CANDY. Add a woven basket plant on the floor, a wooden chair, a small red rug, scattered embroidery-like flowers, a looping yellow thread, and delicate candy, flower, star, and cloud motifs throughout. Use warm sunlight, soft shadows, realistic miniature textures, embroidered fabric seams, intricate lace, wood grain, pastel pink and beige tones, cute whimsical atmosphere, high detail, square composition, no extra text except the wall sign and candy jar label.

entries.title: Chaotic MS Paint Sticker Emoji Set
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Task Objective:
Generate a set of 16 chat-style sticker emojis based on the reference images. The result should feel expressive, highly shareable, and stylistically unified - but intentionally chaotic, low-quality, and humorous.

The final output should look like:
Someone who cannot draw, using a mouse in MS Paint, randomly doodling and writing text at the same time - messy, awkward, low-effort, but unexpectedly funny.

--------
Input Structure:

Image 1: Character reference (may include one or multiple subjects such as people, pets, or combinations)
Image 2: Layout reference (only for understanding the 4x4 grid structure, not style)

User Inputs:
- Text content (multiple lines, any language, may be fewer or more than 16)

--------
Character Usage Rules:

- Identify all possible subjects in Image 1 (people, animals, etc.)
- Each subject can act as a main character
- Different stickers can feature different characters
- Some stickers may include multiple characters interacting
- Distribution should feel natural and context-driven

--------
Consistency Definition (Critical Redefinition):

This task prioritizes "consistent imperfection", NOT realistic consistency.

The same character across stickers:
Does NOT need to look identical,
but must feel like it was drawn by the same unskilled person.

Must be consistent in:
- Drawing behavior (same clumsy hand)
- Simplification logic
- Error patterns (crooked proportions, shaky lines)
- Overall messiness level

Allowed:
- Facial distortion
- Proportion inconsistency
- Structural errors
- Missing details

Must retain:
- Minimal recognizable traits (e.g. silhouette, color, signature features)

Summary:
Consistency = "wrong in the same way", not "accurate likeness"

--------
Layout & Structure:

- 16 stickers total, arranged in a 4x4 grid
- Each sticker is an independent frame
- Can feature single or multiple characters
- Individual frames can be messy
- Overall grid must remain clear and readable

--------
Text System (Core Expression Layer):

User provides multiple lines of text:

Quantity Handling:
- If fewer than 16 → automatically complete to 16
- If more than 16 → select the most expressive 16

Language Rule:
- Use the same language as the user input
- Do NOT enforce any specific language

Completion Rules:
- Maintain tone consistency (sarcastic, lazy, emotional, clingy, absurd, etc.)
- Prefer internet-style expressions
- Short phrases preferred, but longer lines allowed
- Avoid repetition

Expression Goals:
- Instantly understandable
- Emotionally strong
- Feels like real meme text

Tone Priority:
- Complaints
- Self-talk
- Emotional bursts
- Indifference / annoyance / absurd humor

Avoid:
- Polite responses
- Formal or structured phrasing

--------
Text-Image Integration (Critical):

Text must be DRAWN, not typeset.

Must:
- Look like mouse handwriting (crooked, shaky, uneven size)
- Be messy (tilted, overlapping, misaligned)
- Have inconsistent spacing
- Be placed freely (on face, beside, edges, etc.)

Allowed:
- Repeated letters (aaaaa)
- Stretched words (soooo tired)
- Random punctuation (????!!!)
- Messy or ugly writing

Must:
- Remain readable
- Not block understanding

--------
Expression Generation Mechanism (Most Important):

Simulate this process:

"A person who cannot draw, using a mouse, doodling randomly while writing text at the same time."

Key Rules:
- Image and text must come from the SAME moment
- Not: draw first, then add text
- But: draw and write simultaneously

Each sticker should feel like:
- Random doodle
- Then spontaneous writing
- Or both happening together

Should feel:
- Unplanned
- Careless
- Immediate

--------
Text-Image Relationship:

Text and visuals should form:
- Commentary
- Emotional amplification
- Self-talk
- Or slightly mismatched humor

Allowed:
- Loose or imperfect alignment
- Absurd or off-topic humor

Goal:
Not accuracy, but humor

--------
Aesthetic DNA (Core Style Driver):

Style origin:
Terrible MS Paint doodles + failed imitation + extremely low drawing skill

Visual Traits:

Lines:
- Shaky, unstable, jagged
- Mouse-drawn look

Forms:
- Bad proportions
- Stick figures or crude shapes
- Distorted structures

Details:
- Minimal or none
- "Cannot draw" feeling

Texture:
- Pixelated
- Rough edges

Composition:
- Frames can be messy
- Grid must stay readable

Emotion:
- Awkward, direct, absurd, funny

Resemblance:
- Only vaguely resembles the original
- Like a failed copy

--------
Style Enforcement (Critical):

When conflict occurs:

Realism vs Style → ALWAYS choose Style

Allowed to break:
- Detail
- Proportion
- Accuracy
- Cleanliness

Strictly forbid:
- Clean lines
- Correct anatomy
- Polished visuals
- Designed aesthetics

Rule:
If it looks "good", it is WRONG.

Force it back to messy, ugly, low-effort.

--------
Anti-Template & Randomization System (Critical):

Strictly forbid:
- Numbering (1, 2, 3...)
- List-style output
- Sequential planning

Must treat all 16 stickers as:
"16 independent, random expressions"

Randomness Requirements:

- Vary text length
- Vary tone and emotion
- Some complete, some fragmented
- Some minimal or almost empty

Avoid:
- Repetition
- Predictable phrasing
- Common default responses

Allow:
- Abrupt or weird expressions
- Uneven density
- Inconsistent structure

Generation Method:

Do NOT plan all 16.

Instead simulate:
"16 separate spontaneous moments"

Must include:
- Emotional fluctuation
- Instability
- Randomness

Anti-reuse rule:

Each generation must:
- Avoid repeating previous outputs
- Avoid fixed patterns
- Feel freshly created

--------
Sticker Requirements:

- Each sticker visually distinct
- Clear emotional signal
- Usable in chat
- Strong expressive power

--------
Final Goal:

Generate 16 stickers.

The result must feel like:

"A person who cannot draw used a mouse to doodle 16 times,
randomly writing emotional thoughts each time -
messy, inconsistent, but unexpectedly funny."

NOT:

"A clean, well-designed AI sticker set"
entries.description: Generate 16 chaotic chat-style sticker emojis from reference images, with intentionally ugly MS Paint doodles, mouse-handwritten meme text, and consistent imperfection.

unplanned - careless - immediate -------- text-image relationship: text and visuals should form: - commentary - emotional amplification - self-talk - or slightly mismatched humor allowed: - loose or imperfect alignment - absurd or off-topic humor goal: not accuracy, but humor -------- aesthetic dna (core style driver): style origin: terrible ms paint doodles + failed imitation + extremely low drawing skill visual traits: lines: - shaky, unstable, jagged - mouse-drawn look forms: - bad proportions - stick figures or crude shapes - distorted structures details: - minimal or none - "cannot draw" feeling texture: - pixelated - rough edges composition: - frames can be messy - grid must stay readable emotion: - awkward, direct, absurd, funny resemblance: - only vaguely resembles the original - like a failed copy -------- style enforcement (critical): when conflict occurs: realism vs style → always choose style allowed to break: - detail - proportion - accuracy - cleanliness strictly forbid: - clean lines - correct anatomy - polished visuals - designed aesthetics rule: if it looks "good", it is wrong. force it back to messy, ugly, low-effort. -------- anti-template & randomization system (critical): strictly forbid: - numbering (1, 2, 3...) - list-style output - sequential planning must treat all 16 stickers as: "16 independent, random expressions" randomness requirements: - vary text length - vary tone and emotion - some complete, some fragmented - some minimal or almost empty avoid: - repetition - predictable phrasing - common default responses allow: - abrupt or weird expressions - uneven density - inconsistent structure generation method: do not plan all 16. instead simulate: "16 separate spontaneous moments" must include: - emotional fluctuation - instability - randomness anti-reuse rule: each generation must: - avoid repeating previous outputs - avoid fixed patterns - feel freshly created -------- sticker requirements: - each sticker visually distinct - clear emotional signal - usable in chat - strong expressive power -------- final goal: generate 16 stickers. the result must feel like: "a person who cannot draw used a mouse to doodle 16 times, randomly writing emotional thoughts ea

entries.title: Summer Rooftop Film Aesthetic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Japanese negative film aesthetic, rooftop summer scene, soft natural sunlight, slight overexposure highlights, low contrast, muted faded colors, subtle grain

a stunning beautiful young woman with subtle sensual presence, natural body line, effortless charm

wearing a slightly oversized white shirt loosely unbuttoned at the collar, paired with high-waisted shorts; shirt softly moving in the wind, occasionally slipping off one shoulder

holding a cold glass bottle drink with condensation, one hand lifting it near her neck or cheek, fingers lightly touching the surface

subject sitting or leaning on rooftop edge, body relaxed but with slight weight shift, one hand supporting behind, torso subtly opening, one knee bent and the other leg softly extended

hair gently blown by summer wind, loose strands across face

expression calm and distant, lips slightly parted, looking toward camera or slightly away

open sky, minimal environment, a light plastic bag resting beside her moving slightly with the wind

imperfect composition, quiet isolated mood, nostalgic and reflective, "memory-like realism", subtle sensuality through natural gesture --2:3

entries.title: Modern Grocery Store Lifestyle Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A young woman shopping in a modern grocery store produce section, holding a green apple near her face and smiling softly at the camera. She has straight, shoulder-length black hair and a natural, fresh look. She is wearing a fitted sleeveless olive-green top and high-waisted cream-colored pants. She stands beside a shopping cart partially filled with fruits and packaged snacks. The background shows neatly arranged colorful fruits on shelves, including apples, oranges, and pears, with bright, even supermarket lighting. The environment is clean, contemporary, and well-organized, with other shoppers slightly blurred in the background. The perspective is eye-level, with a shallow depth of field emphasizing the subject.

entries.title: Sunset Hanfu Willow Lakeside Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy portrait of a graceful young woman in traditional Chinese hanfu standing beside a quiet lake at sunset, her face intentionally obscured by a plain beige rectangular privacy block. She wears a flowing layered coral red and pale peach embroidered hanfu with delicate floral patterns, translucent gauze sleeves, long trailing silk ribbons, and ornate hair ornaments in a dark updo. She holds a large round pale pink oil-paper parasol behind her shoulder, its bamboo ribs glowing translucently in the backlight. The setting is an idyllic ancient Chinese riverside landscape under a huge old weeping willow with a thick textured trunk on the left and countless golden hanging branches framing the top of the image. Warm sunlight sits low near the horizon, reflecting across the water in sparkling bands; distant misty mountains, a small traditional pavilion, and soft peach clouds appear in the background. The foreground has wildflowers, grasses, and a narrow dirt path, with petals and fabric ribbons catching the breeze. Use a romantic painterly realism style, ultra-detailed fabric embroidery, soft atmospheric haze, golden-hour rim light, warm amber and rose color grading, dreamy ethereal mood, depth of field, elegant composition, full-body view, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio.

He wears a bright yellow short-sleeve collared shirt filled with messy scribble strokes. His left hand grips a tall brown wooden flagpole angled slightly upward along the left side of the image. Behind his head is a waving American flag with a blue canton full of many irregular white dots for stars and red-and-white horizontal stripes drawn as rough uneven bands; the flag is outlined in black and appears attached to the pole. entries.title: Moonlit Guardian Balcony
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical fantasy background illustration in a dark romantic gothic style, viewed from a high stone balcony at night. The scene overlooks a vast illuminated castle city with many spires and warm window lights beneath a cloudy deep-blue sky and a bright full moon. In the left foreground place two massive weathered stone columns wrapped with ivy and vines, a black cloak or mantle draped over a chair or railing, and one glowing brass lantern on a wooden chest. Across the lower foreground place one aged parchment map spread on a dark wooden table, one ornate dagger with emerald accents lying diagonally across it, one black leather glove beside it, two rolled scrolls tied with cord, one small metal cup or inkwell near the balcony ledge, one decorative locked treasure chest on the right, and one potted flowering plant with white blossoms. Use warm candlelight in the foreground contrasting with cool moonlight over the distant city, creating a quiet protective mood. Add a short vertical Japanese message on the left column in elegant white serif calligraphy, arranged as two vertical text columns, reading 静かな刃は、君を守る。. Make the setting feel like a silent guardian's lookout over a royal capital, with an emerald-inlaid dagger as the visual focus, moonlit clouds, and gothic fantasy castle city. No characters are visible.

entries.title: Victorian Tea Room Waiting Wallpaper
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical smartphone wallpaper-style background illustration of an elegant dark Victorian dressing room prepared for a refined tea-time meeting, with the message 整えた心で、君を待つ。 in thin white Japanese Mincho-style lettering near the upper left, including a small decorative divider flourish beneath the text. The scene shows one ornate carved chair draped with one black-and-white maid-inspired garment: a black central panel, white apron-like front, wide white ruffled trim, and a large black bow with a gold brooch and dangling chain tassel at the chest. In the foreground place one polished silver serving tray holding exactly four tea service items: one white porcelain teapot with gold ornament, one matching sugar bowl, one teacup filled with amber tea on a saucer, and one small domed gold bell or covered dish, with one ornate spoon beside it. To the right place one folded white lace-trimmed maid accessory or apron with a black strap and gold medallion, and on the vanity place exactly five vanity objects: one glowing table lamp with a cream shade, one large oval mirror with a gold frame, one glass vase of lavender stems, one lace headband with two purple ribbon bows, and three small round gold boxes. Add exactly two flower arrangements: lavender stems in the glass vase and a small black vase of purple crocus-like flowers in the lower right, with a few loose purple petals on the tabletop. Use dark antique mahogany Victorian interior, warm lamplight, soft daylight entering from a tall window with dark curtains on the left, rich carved wood panels, reflective polished metal surfaces, deep shadows, romantic waiting-room atmosphere, and a muted palette of black, ivory, gold, brown, and violet. Compose the image in portrait orientation, 9:16 aspect ratio, with the chair on the left, vanity and mirror on the right, tea tray in the lower foreground, and generous dark negative space around the quote.

entries.title: This Is Fine Office Meltdown
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A stylized humorous editorial illustration of a chaotic office on fire, rendered in warm orange, amber, and smoky brown tones with cinematic lighting and painterly detail. Center the scene on a frazzled office worker seated at a desk, wearing a wrinkled olive-green button-up shirt and a loose black tie, holding a black coffee mug near his face. Replace the face with a plain rectangular censor block in a warm skin-toned color. Give him messy dark brown hair and black rectangular glasses visible from the side. Above him on a stained beige wall, place a large bold black sans-serif quote in two centered lines that reads this is fine. everything is fine., with a hand-drawn red underline beneath it. Fill the room with visible black smoke curling from the ceiling corners, a red emergency alarm light glowing in the upper left, and a ceiling smoke detector in the upper right. On the left wall, include a crooked framed poster of a cute hanging dog with the text "HANG IN THERE!". In the lower left foreground, show a black wire trash bin engulfed in bright flames containing a sheet labeled "PLAN" with 3 checkbox items reading "do thing", "do thing", and "do thing". Put a dark desk nameplate near the front edge reading "chaos coordinator". On the desk, scatter many loose papers, sticky notes, a pen, binder clip, and general office clutter. Place a central paper labeled "DEADLINES (yikes)" in red handwriting. Add a green sticky note near the bottom left reading "call back someday maybe". To the right, place an open gray laptop with a yellow sticky note on it that says "good job me :)". In the lower right foreground, show a tipped-over beige coffee cup spilling dark coffee across papers and over a simple red line chart. On the right wall, add a whiteboard titled "TODAY:" with exactly 4 checklist items: "survive", "coffee", "pretend", and "check email (ugh)". Below it, include a wilted dead office plant in a pot and a small sticky note on the wall reading "IT'S FINE". The overall mood should be absurdly calm despite obvious disaster, with satirical corporate burnout energy, detailed smoke, embers, cracked walls, and a polished digital illustration finish.
entries.description: A humorous disaster-office illustration for burnout memes, satire, or corporate chaos themed artwork.

chaotic office on fire, rendered in warm orange, amber, and smoky brown tones with cinematic lighting and painterly detail. center the scene on a frazzled office worker seated at a desk, wearing a wrinkled olive-green button-up shirt and a loose black tie, holding a black coffee mug near his face. replace the face with a plain rectangular censor block in a warm skin-toned color. give him messy dark brown hair and black rectangular glasses visible from the side. above him on a stained beige wall, place a large bold black sans-serif quote in two centered lines that reads this is fine. everything is fine., with a hand-drawn red underline beneath it. fill the room with visible black smoke curling from the ceiling corners, a red emergency alarm light glowing in the upper left, and a ceiling smoke detector in the upper right. on the left wall, include a crooked framed poster of a cute hanging dog with the text "hang in there!". in the lower left foreground, show a black wire trash bin engulfed in bright flames containing a sheet labeled "plan" with 3 checkbox items reading "do thing", "do thing", and "do thing". put a dark desk nameplate near the front edge reading "chaos coordinator". on the desk, scatter many loose papers, sticky notes, a pen, binder clip, and general office clutter. place a central paper labeled "deadlines (yikes)" in red handwriting. add a green sticky note near the bottom left reading "call back someday maybe". to the right, place an open gray laptop with a yellow sticky note on it that says "good job me :)". in the lower right foreground, show a tipped-over beige coffee cup spilling dark coffee across papers and over a simple red line chart. on the right wall, add a whiteboard titled "today:" with exactly 4 checklist items: "survive", "coffee", "pretend", and "check email (ugh)". below it, include a wilted dead office plant in a pot and a small sticky note on the wall reading "it's fine". the overall mood should be absurdly calm despite obvious disaster, with satirical corporate burnout energy, detailed smoke, embers, cracked walls, and a polished digital illustration finish. social media post cinematic editorial office

entries.title: Childlike Sketch Photo Transform
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, recreate the exact same photo composition, person, pose, outfit, drink, and background layout, but transform the whole image into a playful childlike hand-drawn crayon-and-colored-pencil sketch on a clean white page. Keep the main subject centered with the face still obscured by a simple beige blur block. Preserve the Thai text on the black T-shirt and the Café Amazon cup branding. Simplify all environmental details into naive doodles with uneven outlines and scribbly coloring: 1 gray car on the left, 1 blue accessible parking sign, 2 streetlights, 3 visible trees, 1 black-roof Amazon storefront, 1 small person in the distant doorway, 1 curb ramp with rails, and the tiled ground drawn as loose perspective grid lines. Make it look intentionally cute, rough, and humorous, like a quick kids' sketch version of the original photo.

entries.title: Beard Oil How-To Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a bold square social media advertisement for a beard-growth product tutorial. Use a vivid royal blue gradient background with a high-contrast, editorial grooming-brand look. Show an extreme close-up of a Black man's cheek, jawline, ear, and beard area on the right side of the frame, with detailed skin texture and short coarse beard hair. His left hand is holding a glass dropper near the beard line, and a clear droplet is about to touch the skin beneath the sideburn area; his other hand lightly presses the beard from below. In the blurred background near the center-left, place a white bottle with a blue label resembling minoxidil packaging, clearly out of focus so it reads as the product without stealing focus. At the very top, add small spaced uppercase branding text: SAUCY BEARD HAVEN. Below it, place a huge condensed bold white uppercase headline spanning nearly the full width: HOW TO USE IT. In the lower-left quadrant, add exactly 4 instructional bullet points with small gold diamond icons and clean white sans-serif text: 1) Apply 1ml directly to beard skin - not hair, 2) Massage in gently for 1-2 minutes, 3) Use twice daily: morning + night, 4) Don't wash face for 4 hours after applying. At the bottom center, include a small circular beard-themed logo above a dark blue nameplate with the text "SaucyBeardHaven". Lighting should be glossy and commercial, with crisp focus on the hands, dropper, and beard edge, creating a premium men's grooming ad designed for Instagram.
entries.description: A polished men's grooming social post showing how to apply beard treatment, ideal for brand marketing, tutorials, and product education.

entries.title: Y2K Kawaii Retro Aesthetic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed, vibrant digital illustration in a dreamy Y2K kawaii-retro aesthetic, featuring a beautiful woman with fair skin, subtle rosy undertone, refined facial features, light blue eyes, and natural blonde hair styled in soft loose waves falling just past her shoulders. She is wearing a light blue headband, pink short-sleeve top, blue denim overalls with a small pink heart patch, and white knee-high socks with yellow stars. She is sitting cross-legged on a colorful retro bedspread, holding a bright turquoise vintage rotary telephone receiver to her ear with her right hand while her left hand rests on the phone base in front of her. The cozy bedroom background has walls completely covered with colorful 90s anime and J-pop posters, pink sheer curtains, a lava lamp, Hello Kitty plushies, books, and cute figurines on shelves. Multiple adorable chibi-style anime girl dolls (depicting the same character with blonde wavy hair, light blue eyes, light blue headband, pink top and blue overalls) are placed around her: one on her shoulder, one on her lap, one on the bed holding a camera, one drawing in a notebook, and one on the shelf. Text overlays in playful bubbly white font with sparkles: 'DREAMING...' in a thought bubble above her head, 'CALLING 90S VIBES!' with an arrow pointing to the phone, 'MY ❤️!' near one chibi, 'KAWAII!!' in multiple places, 'RETRO QUEEN' and 'COZY SPACE'. Decorative elements include floating stars, hearts, sparkles, and soft pink-cyan lighting with a warm nostalgic glow. Ultra-detailed, glossy aesthetic, perfect composition, cinematic lighting, 90s nostalgia mixed with modern kawaii style.

entries.title: Annotated Japanese Miso Ramen Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A casual smartphone food photo of a large bowl of miso ramen on a vivid red ramen shop counter, shot slightly from above at close range in a real restaurant. The bowl is pale blue-gray with a matching saucer, filled to the brim with rich golden-brown miso broth, thick wavy noodles hidden beneath the toppings, bean sprouts, chopped green onion, several thin slices of chashu pork spread across the surface, and a tall mound of brown menma bamboo shoots piled in the center. A small white bowl of half rice sits to the right side of the frame. In the softly blurred background, show countertop restaurant items including a metal water pitcher, condiment containers, chopsticks, and cups, creating an authentic ramen-ya atmosphere. Overlay the photo with hand-drawn Japanese brush-pen style annotations in white and dark brown with playful arrows and cloud-like speech bubbles, as if written directly on the image. At the top left, add a large handwritten title in Japanese: 平井駅前『ねぎとん』みそラーメン. Add exactly 6 callout notes around the bowl: 1) left upper note pointing to the pork, text: 薄切りチャーシューたっぷり; 2) top center note pointing to the bamboo shoots, text: "トッピング: めんま"; 3) right upper note near the rice bowl, text: "半ライス 1杯無料なのもうれしい♡"; 4) lower right note pointing to the broth, text: "豚骨ベースに濃いめの味噌。背脂のコクも◎"; 5) left lower note pointing to the vegetables, text: "もやし&青ねぎでシャキッと"; 6) a dashed cloud note at the bottom left pointing under the toppings, text: 下には『あまとろネギ』が隠れていて、甘みと旨みが出るのが特徴. Also add one extra cloud-shaped praise note at the upper right that says: "『ちゃん系』インスパイアな一杯" and one cloud-shaped note at the bottom right that says: "多加水の平打ちぢちぢれ麺。もっちと食感". Keep the overall feeling appetizing, personal, informative, and scrapbook-like, combining a real food photograph with neat handwritten review comments.
entries.description: This generates a realistic ramen shop food photo with handwritten Japanese-style annotation overlays, ideal for social posts, food reviews, and casual restaurant recap graphics.

2) top center note pointing to the bamboo shoots, text: "トッピング: めんま"; 3) right upper note near the rice bowl, text: "半ライス 1杯無料なのもうれしい♡"; 4) lower right note pointing to the broth, text: "豚骨ベースに濃いめの味噌。背脂のコクも◎"; 5) left lower note pointing to the vegetables, text: "もやし&青ねぎでシャキッと"; 6) a dashed cloud note at the bottom left pointing under the toppings, text: 下には『あまとろネギ』が隠れていて、甘みと旨みが出るのが特徴. also add one extra cloud-shaped praise note at the upper right that says: "『ちゃん系』インスパイアな一杯" and one cloud-shaped note at the bottom right that says: "多加水の平打ちぢちぢれ麺。もっちと食感". keep the overall feeling appetizing, personal, informative, and scrapbook-like, combining a real food photograph with neat handwritten review comments. social media post realistic phone camera

entries.title: Chibi Mini Versions Photo Edit
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Edit the image while keeping the original photo completely unchanged - including the person, face, body, pose, lighting, and gym background.

Add multiple small, cute chibi-style "mini versions" of her around the image. Each mini character should have a big head, expressive facial features, and match her hairstyle and outfit.

Depict each mini version doing different gym-related activities:

one cheering with arms raised

one running in running shoes

one drinking from a shaker bottle

one wearing sporty running glasses

one climbing near her leg

Enhance the image with playful, hand-drawn doodles and handwritten notes in white and pink ink, in a scrapbook style. Include elements like arrows, stars, hearts, sparkles, and sketchy lines.

Add cute, handwritten gym-themed motivational phrases:

"lift strong"

"stronger every rep"

"no pain no gain"

"sweat now, shine later"

"progress over perfection"

"train hard, stay soft"

The overall vibe should feel fun, energetic, and feminine.
entries.description: A prompt to add multiple cute chibi-style mini versions of a person into an existing gym photo, performing various activities like cheering, running, and drinking.

entries.title: Playful American Shorthair Kittens
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed, playful studio-style digital illustration of 2 American shorthair tabby kittens with silver-and-black striped fur and vivid bright blue eyes, posed in a close, energetic cuddle-fight. The front kitten is lower in the frame, facing slightly left of camera with its mouth open in a joyful meow or laugh, tiny teeth and pink tongue visible, front legs spread wide on the ground in a bouncy stance. The second kitten is behind and slightly above, leaning over the first kitten's shoulder and gently play-biting or nuzzling the top side of its head, with one soft paw wrapped around the front kitten like a hug. Both kittens have oversized paws, plush fur texture, crisp whiskers, expressive faces, and a charming mischievous mood. Use a tight full-body portrait crop with both kittens centered and filling most of the frame. Background is an abstract painted backdrop with dynamic splashes and spatters in sky blue, warm orange, and cream, giving a lively art-studio feel while remaining soft and uncluttered. Floor is lightly textured with matching paint-like smears. Lighting is bright, soft, and frontal, emphasizing glossy eyes, fluffy fur, and high contrast tabby markings. Render in a polished semi-realistic cute-animal illustration style, ultra-sharp, high detail, colorful, heartwarming, whimsical, and energetic.
entries.description: This generates a cute, high-detail illustration of two playful American shorthair kittens wrestling in a colorful paint-splatter studio backdrop, ideal for social posts, wallpapers, and animal art.

entries.title: Chibi Girl Holding Japanese Notice Sign
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean, centered chibi-style full-body anime illustration on a plain muted sage-green background. Show a small childlike girl standing barefoot and facing forward, with an oversized head and tiny body proportions. Her face is intentionally hidden behind the sign she is holding, so no facial features are visible. She has glossy black hair with subtle cool green highlights across the bangs, parted near the center, with a loose stray hair curving outward on the upper left side. The hair is gathered into 2 low side ponytails tied near the ears with dark red hair ties, with slightly messy curled ends. She wears a simple white short-sleeve T-shirt and loose beige-khaki cargo pants with 2 visible side flap pockets, slightly wrinkled and cuffed above the ankles. She is barefoot, standing flat on the ground with a soft oval shadow beneath her. She holds a rectangular hand-held sign with both hands, one hand visible on each side, for a total of 2 visible hands gripping the board. The sign is white with a thin light wooden frame and a vertical wooden pole extending down from the center. The sign contains 3 centered lines of bold handwritten-style Japanese text in black: 1) "今日の" 2) "四コマと動画は" 3) "お休みです". Keep the composition symmetrical and minimal, with the character occupying most of the frame from head to feet. Render in polished modern anime shading with crisp line art, soft gradients, cute proportions, and a quiet announcement-card mood.
entries.description: This generates a minimalist full-body chibi anime character holding a Japanese announcement placard, ideal for social posts or cute status-update visuals.

entries.title: Shiretoko Bubble Clione Selfie
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed anime-style winter harbor selfie scene at the Shiretoko Peninsula in bright daytime, with 3 female figures tightly framed from the waist up taking a group photo. In the center is a fantasy "soap bubble Clione" girl with a translucent, iridescent body design inspired by a sea angel, pale icy white-blue hair, glossy opalescent skin and outfit details, 2 large crystal-clear finlike ear appendages on her head, small shell-and-flower hair ornaments, and 4 flowing jellylike tendrils curling outward around her body like transparent ribbon fins. She wears an elaborate shimmering white and ice-blue outfit with a fur-trimmed winter jacket, layered translucent fabric, pearl chains, gem accessories, and a luminous marine fantasy aesthetic. On the left is a human friend in a dark navy winter coat and thick white scarf, shoulder-length dark hair blowing in the wind, making a peace sign with one hand. On the right is another human friend in a white knit beanie with pom-pom, beige winter coat, and dark scarf, extending her arm toward the camera while holding a smartphone for the selfie. The phone case is glossy pale lavender-silver with a small cute sea-creature charm or sticker matching the Clione theme, and her nails are neatly manicured in pale glossy tones. The background shows a snowy fishing port with 4 visible boats, floating drift ice, cold blue seawater, harbor structures, and distant snow-covered mountains beneath a vivid blue sky with thin clouds. Include 7 visible soap bubbles drifting through the air at different depths, catching rainbow highlights. Composition should feel like a close wide-angle smartphone selfie, lively and intimate, with slight perspective distortion from the extended arm, sparkling winter light, crisp atmospheric detail, and a polished high-end anime illustration look.
entries.description: A polished anime winter harbor group selfie featuring a translucent fantasy Clione girl and two bundled-up friends, ideal for whimsical coastal character art.

entries.title: Scrapbook Chibi Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: In 8K Cinematic Transform the reference image into a cozy scrapbook-style composition, strictly preserving subject, identity, pose, lighting, and background. Add multiple mini chibi/doll versions of the same person (matching face, hair, outfit), placed naturally and doing varied activities. Overlay handwritten doodles (hearts, arrows, stars, captions). Use soft pastel tone. Keep it rich yet clean, warm, dreamy, Instagram-style. Final must enhance the SAME image, not recreate it.

entries.title: Motivational Welcome to May Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Design a premium motivational social media poster in a dark cinematic editorial style, vertical 4:5 format. The composition is split into 2 main zones: a left text-heavy layout and a right aspirational visual scene. Use a black to deep charcoal background with subtle texture, faint vertical ribbed wall detail on the right, glossy floor reflections, and elegant neon-lime accent lighting mixed with warm gold highlights.

On the right side, show 1 human figure: a man in silhouette from behind, wearing a fitted dark jacket and pants, walking toward a giant circular portal doorway. The portal should be large, glowing with a warm golden ring and soft inner halo, positioned slightly right of center. Beyond the portal is a bright peaceful nature scene with 1 narrow stepping-stone path leading forward through grass, soft sunlight, distant haze, and leafy green tree branches framing the upper edge. The figure should feel purposeful and contemplative, stepping into a new beginning.

On the left side, create a clean motivational typography layout. At the top, include a small header reading "NEW MONTH" in spaced uppercase sans serif, with a short thin lime line to its left. Below it, place the main headline in 2 lines: "WELCOME TO" in large warm beige uppercase, and "MAY" in extremely large bold white uppercase, dominating the left half. Add a short glowing lime underline beneath the large month word.

Under the headline, add a motivational paragraph in white sans serif with selected words highlighted in lime green: "May is a fresh start. A new chapter. A greater opportunity to become more, do more and have more." Highlight the words "fresh start," "new," "opportunity," and "more" in lime green.

Below that, place 1 rounded rectangular callout card with a subtle border glow. Inside the card, put 1 circular icon badge containing a simple leaf symbol in lime green. To the right of the icon, add 3 stacked lines of text: "New month.", "Fresh energy.", and "Bigger moves." with the last line in lime green.

Across the lower middle, create 4 evenly spaced value pillars separated by thin vertical dividers. Each pillar contains 1 minimalist lime icon, 1 uppercase title, and 1 short caption. Use these exact 4 items from left to right: 1) target icon, title "CLARITY", caption "Know your direction". 2) calendar icon, title "DISCIPLINE", caption "Stay consistent". 3) upward bar chart icon, title "GROWTH", caption "Keep evolving". 4) fast-forward arrows icon, title "MOMENTUM", caption "Build forward daily".

At the bottom, add a thin horizontal divider line. Under it, place a closing statement in uppercase: "THIS IS YOUR MAY." on one line and "STEP INTO IT." on the next line. Render most text in white or warm beige, with "MAY" and select accents in lime green.

Overall mood: inspirational, modern, luxurious, focused, forward-moving, social-media-ready, with crisp sans serif typography, high contrast, cinematic glow, and a polished personal development brand aesthetic.

entries.title: Cinematic surreal garden portrait prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic medium-full shot of a man with a short brown beard and brown hair, standing centered under a rustic stone archway in a dense garden. He is wearing a sage green corduroy jacket with chest pockets over a white t-shirt, black pants, and a watch with a black strap. He is looking off to the side with a calm expression. The image features a heavy radial "swirl" motion blur that distorts the foreground leaves and the edges of the frame into a circular vortex. To the left of the man, there is a transparent "ghostly" double-exposure silhouette of his torso. Sunlight filters through the canopy, casting sharp, dappled leaf shadows onto his green jacket while leaving his face brightly and evenly lit. The camera is at a low angle, using a wide-angle lens with a shallow depth of field. High-contrast greens, white wild roses, and a surreal, dreamlike atmosphere. ar 4:5

entries.title: Anime Now Playing School Street Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A stylized anime poster of three handsome high school boys wearing white button-up school shirts and black shoulder bags, arranged across a single urban street scene like a music-player cover. The composition shows exactly 3 figures: one on the left in side profile facing left with his eyes obscured by a black censor bar, one in the center turning back toward the viewer with a black backpack and a direct calm gaze, and one on the right in side profile facing right with his chin tilted up. All three have short messy black hair, dark silhouette-like faces and bodies with thin white line details, and small wired earphones in their ears. The setting is a bright suburban school-route street under a pale blue sky, with utility poles and overhead cables, a green roadside sign reading SCHOOL ROUTE, fences and trees on the left, and a light green school building on the right. Use a cool pastel palette of sky blue, mint green, pale teal, black, white, and orange accents. Overlay the scene with futuristic graphic-design UI elements: black border panels, dots, stripes, small crosses, playback icons, grid fragments, and decorative techno shapes around all edges. At the top left include a digital timer reading 00:00:00. At the bottom, add a large bold italic techno title reading now plyaing, intentionally misspelled, stretched across a wide mint-green-and-orange arrow banner with a small play icon beneath it. Give the whole image the look of a sleek lo-fi music visual, anime street fashion poster, and futuristic album-cover graphic, with crisp line art, flat shaded silhouettes, layered transparency effects on the shirts, and a clean high-contrast layout in a 4:3 format.

entries.title: Pink Anime Girl in a Messy Bedroom
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed anime illustration of a messy pastel-pink bedroom seen from a high, slightly tilted top-down angle. In the center, a young woman lounges on a large pale pink inflatable chair or beanbag, her body stretched diagonally across the frame with her bare legs extended toward the back of the room and her head closer to the viewer. She has extremely long, flowing pink hair spilling dramatically over the edge of the seat and across the floor, luminous green eyes, soft fair skin, and a relaxed, slightly dazed expression as she looks directly at the viewer. She wears a coordinated light pink loungewear outfit: an oversized jacket slipping loosely around her shoulders, a cropped knit camisole, and short drawstring shorts, all glossy and softly wrinkled in the sunlight. The room is saturated in warm late-afternoon sunlight filtered through a window on the upper left, casting bright bands of light and shadow across her body, the chair, and the cluttered floor. Surrounding her is an overwhelming cute-girly mess: scattered makeup bottles, lipsticks, compacts, tissues, shopping bags, plastic wrappers, drink bottles, cans, magazines, beauty products, accessories, and small boxes. In the background are pink drawers, shelves filled with books and manga, plush toys, and various decorative items. The entire image should feel indulgent, chaotic, intimate, and hyper-stylized, with a monochromatic pink palette, glossy textures, sparkling highlights, soft ambient haze, and polished anime rendering. Emphasize luxurious messiness, abundant small objects, realistic fabric folds, reflective packaging, and long hair strands rendered with exceptional detail.
entries.description: A polished anime-style illustration of a pink-haired girl reclining in a cluttered pastel bedroom, ideal for generating dreamy lifestyle art with rich detail and atmospheric lighting.

entries.title: Mixed Reality Café Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A trendy young woman sitting at an outdoor café table, holding a hot coffee cup near her lips. She has short curly black hair and wears oversized tinted sunglasses, a cropped beige sweater, loose brown high-waisted pants, and chunky white sneakers. A tote bag with minimal coffee-themed illustrations hangs on her shoulder.

The scene blends realistic photography with playful 2D cartoon overlays. Floating around her are animated coffee elements: a smiling cappuccino cup with heart-shaped latte art, cute coffee beans with tiny faces, and stylized splashes of caramel forming comic-style shapes. Soft doodle steam rises into hearts and stars.

On the table: a croissant, a notebook with sketch drawings, and a second coffee cup.

Background: a realistic cozy café street with brick walls, plants, warm golden hour lighting, and soft shadows. Slight depth of field, subject in sharp focus.

Style: mix of photorealism and vibrant cartoon illustration, pop-art aesthetic, high saturation but warm tones, clean composition, Instagram-worthy, soft glow, 4k detail.

entries.title: Sleepy Girl at Laptop Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean minimalist illustration on a light gray background, drawn in a simple hand-drawn line-art style with dark navy blue outlines and selective pastel pink fill. Show a sleepy young woman with a short blunt bob haircut in pastel pink, seated at a desk and working on an open laptop. She is shown in 3/4 view facing left, with droopy half-closed eyes and a tired, unamused expression. She wears a loose cardigan in pastel pink over a simple top, and sits in a lightly sketched chair. On the desk, include exactly 3 objects: 1 open laptop in front of her, 1 takeaway coffee cup with a lid behind the laptop, and 1 smartphone near the lower right corner of the desk. Keep the lines loose, casual, and slightly imperfect, like a stylish editorial doodle. Place large text to the left of the character reading NEMUTAI in bold uppercase serif letters in dark navy, with the word girl overlapping it in a smaller cursive script in pastel pink. Add a small handwritten artist signature near the bottom right edge of the desk. Lots of negative space, flat colors, no shading, modern feminine mood, sleepy work-from-home vibe, balanced composition.
entries.description: A minimalist editorial-style illustration of a tired young woman working at a laptop, ideal for social posts, lifestyle graphics, or decorative text-over-image designs.

entries.title: Awkward Blurry Nightclub Rainbow Hair Shot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid, badly timed snapshot aesthetic taken from too close and slightly behind, as if someone accidentally photographed a person at the worst possible moment in a dark nightclub. The image is vertically framed and heavily motion-blurred, with the subject filling almost the entire frame. Show only 1 person, turned away from the camera so the face is not visible, with long wavy rainbow pastel hair transitioning from hot pink and orange at the crown into yellow, green, cyan, blue, and violet through the lengths. The person wears a pale blush-pink top or hoodie, softly lit and also blurred by movement. The composition should feel awkward and intrusive, with the camera too close, the hair dominating the left and center of the frame, and only a partial shoulder and back visible near the bottom right. In the dark background, include 1 dim nightclub bar area with scattered colored lights, shiny bottles, and vague reflective highlights on the right side, all out of focus. Use harsh mixed club lighting, low-light digital camera noise, flash-like exposure on the hair and clothing, strong blur, shallow detail, and an unflattering accidental-phone-photo vibe. Make it feel like a forbidden saved snapshot, messy, spontaneous, and realistically imperfect.
entries.description: Generates a deliberately bad candid nightclub photo with rainbow hair and heavy motion blur, useful for creating awkward accidental snapshot-style images.

entries.title: PSG Transfer Announcement Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic football transfer announcement poster in a vertical social-media format, centered on a photorealistic adult male soccer player wearing a modern Paris Saint-Germain home jersey, arms crossed, chest-up framing, strong athletic build, face mostly obscured by a soft rectangular blur block for anonymity, short close-cropped hair visible around the edges. Use a deep navy blue PSG-themed color palette with bold red and white accents. The jersey should feature a central red vertical stripe bordered by white, a red swoosh-style sports logo on the left side from the viewer's perspective, the PSG crest on the opposite chest, and faint sponsor lettering across the torso. Place the player in front of a layered graphic background featuring an oversized faded PSG crest filling most of the upper-right background, a dark Eiffel Tower silhouette on the right side, painterly brush-stroke textures, subtle grunge, and a white vertical paint strip on the left with a rough red brush accent near the middle. Include the PSG club badge near the upper left. Add left-side stacked slogan text in bold uppercase sans serif reading: "NEW CLUB. NEW CHAPTER. PARIS." with the last word in red. Add a huge distressed white block headline across the lower middle reading "MBAPPE", with smaller spaced uppercase first name above it reading "KYLIAN". Overlay a red handwritten script across the big surname saying "Welcome To Paris". At the bottom center, add small uppercase text "PARIS SAINT-GERMAIN" and beneath it the year "2026" in red with thin divider lines on each side. In the lower left, include small stacked text "ICI C'EST PARIS" with "PARIS" in red. In the lower right, add a circular stamp-style badge reading "PARIS IS MAGIQUE". Use cinematic lighting, high contrast, premium sports-brand poster design, sharp fabric texture, moody shadows, gritty editorial finish, and polished transfer-window announcement aesthetics.
entries.description: A bold, professional football signing poster for announcing a player's move to Paris Saint-Germain on social media or sports promo graphics.

entries.title: Confused Elf Girl at Pastel Desk
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cute pastel anime illustration of a young elf girl streamer or office worker sitting at a desk and typing on a mechanical keyboard in a cozy bedroom workspace, shown from a front three-quarter view with a large black computer monitor in the left foreground partially blocking her body. She has long wavy orange hair with glossy highlights, pointed elf ears, and a small red flower hair clip on the right side, wearing a light blue pajama-style blouse covered in red heart prints with a very frilly white lace collar and a shiny red ribbon bow at the neck. Her hands are on the keyboard, nails painted soft pink, and she sits in a rounded pink desk chair. Above her head is a speech bubble containing a large question mark, suggesting confusion while working at the computer. The room is soft, bright, and feminine, with a pale pink and cream color palette, shallow depth of field, and delicate line art. In the background, include 1 framed wall picture with a pink animal and heart motif, 1 small potted plant near the center-left, 1 plush toy on a shelf behind her, 2 sticky notes on the upper right wall, one with a plus sign and one reading がんばろう!, 1 blue cat figurine or plush on the right shelf, 1 small potted plant on the right, 4 pastel binders or books on the lower right shelf, and 1 white mug with a pink heart on the desk in the lower right corner. The computer monitor should have a subtle glowing blue heart icon on its back, and the keyboard should have RGB lighting. Clean polished cel-shaded anime style, high detail, soft ambient lighting, cozy gamer desk atmosphere, pastel kawaii decor, 4k illustration.

entries.title: Anime Pokémon Shop Outfit Teaser Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy pastel anime fashion announcement poster set inside a bright Pokémon merchandise shop. The composition is vertical and split visually into two zones: a large translucent information panel on the left and a full-body character showcase on the right. The scene has a soft, elegant, airy atmosphere with diffused indoor lighting, creamy highlights, gentle reflections on the polished floor, and a refined shoujo illustration style. In the background, show a clearly recognizable Pokémon store interior with display shelves, the Pokémon logo sign, a large Poké Ball emblem on the wall, potted plants, plush toys, and figures; visible Pokémon merchandise includes exactly 3 prominent character plushies or mascots: Pikachu at the bottom right, plus 2 small shelf plushies resembling Piplup and another pastel blue-green character. The girl stands slightly right of center in a graceful fashion pose with one leg crossing in front of the other, one hand lightly raised near her chest, and the other relaxed outward. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur block. She has long wavy platinum blonde hair with loose curls and a delicate feminine look. She wears a refined pastel outfit: a frilled white high-neck blouse with layered ruffles, a light blue sleeveless pinafore-style dress with a fitted waist and a flowing mid-calf flared skirt, a small white crossbody purse with a flap, white ankle socks, and glossy black Mary Jane shoes. Add subtle pink earrings. The outfit should feel classy, fresh, and cute, with gentle fabric movement. On the left, place a frosted semi-transparent poster panel with elegant typography and decorative flourishes. Include exactly 5 text blocks or labeled areas on this panel: 1) a top banner with Japanese text "次回衣装プロンプト公開" above large cursive English text Next Outfit; 2) a name block with Japanese text "セラス・柳田・リリエンフェルト" and smaller romanized text "Ceras Yanagida Lilienfeld"; 3) a teaser line reading "次回の衣装も お楽しみに!" with a small Poké Ball icon; 4) a bordered description box titled "Next Coordinate" followed by several lines of small Japanese body text; 5) a bottom ribbon reading Coming Soon... and "STAY TUNED!" with a small Pikachu silhouette. Use pale blue, white, silver-gray, and blush pastel tones throughout. Add faint ornamental corner decorations and a polished promotional layout, like a boutique fashion teaser poster for a themed anime character outfit reveal.

entries.title: Rainy Premier League Trophy Celebration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic sports photograph of a Manchester City player in a sky blue kit standing center frame in a rainy stadium, lifting the English Premier League trophy high above his head with both hands. On the right side of the background, include a bright blue electronic screen with the large glowing word GOAL. Photorealistic editorial sports photography, high detail, natural stadium colors, celebration moment, slightly telephoto look, crisp focus on the trophy and upper body.

entries.title: Epic Milestone X Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical poster in a dark cinematic graphic-novel style, dominated by a giant red painted X in the upper left and huge distressed Chinese typography across the top reading "关注破2万", with the number 2 in red and the rest of the characters in rough off-white block letters. Beneath the headline, add a smaller thin white Chinese tagline line: "每一次关注,都是力量的累积。" In the lower half, show an apocalyptic monumental landscape with a colossal metallic X-shaped structure exploding upward from the center, glowing with intense white-gold light at its core, surrounded by flying debris, fractured rock, dust streaks, sparks, and dramatic radial energy beams. Place 1 tiny solitary human silhouette standing at the base of the glowing X on a jagged black rocky platform for scale. Use a palette of black, charcoal, ash gray, off-white, metallic gold, and blood red, with extreme contrast, gritty textures, scratched ink-like brush marks, weathered print distress, and a sense of violent impact and triumph. At the bottom, include another small white Chinese sentence: "真正的影响力,来自持续被看见的价值。" with a short red underline accent beneath it. The composition should feel like an epic announcement poster for reaching 2万, with bold propaganda-inspired typography, explosive motion, towering symmetry, and a powerful social-growth metaphor centered on the X symbol.

entries.title: Retro Japanese Purikura Scrapbook Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A nostalgic Japanese sticker-photo style scrapbook collage on warm off-white textured paper, designed like a handwritten Heisei-era gyaru purikura page. In the upper left, large hand-drawn Japanese text in a reddish brown crayon style reads "昭和の日。" Beneath it on the left side are 5 stacked handwritten note lines with playful doodles: 1) "先負~~~" in dark gray with a pale blue wavy flourish, 2) "月齢11.6" with a yellow moon doodle, 3) "晴れ20°C" with a small orange sun, a red thermometer, and a white cloud, 4) "昭和の日" with a tiny red flag and an open book icon, 5) "畳の日" with a green tatami mat icon, followed below by "ナポリタンの日" with a fork icon. At the bottom, large handwritten reddish brown text reads "平成ギャルプリクラの落書" with an underline stroke. On the right half, place a square candid photo of a young Japanese woman sitting at a wooden café counter by a sunlit window, her face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. She has dark brown hair in a loose messy updo with wispy strands, and wears an oversized beige knit sweater. She holds a cream soda float or pale lemon soda in a stemmed glass with ice cream on top and a red cherry, sipping through a straw while looking toward the window. The café interior is cozy and retro, with warm brown wood, soft natural afternoon light, framed wall art in the background, and a calm Showa-era kissaten atmosphere. Surround the photo with cute hand-drawn doodles in pastel chalk colors: orange sun rays from the top left corner of the photo, 3 yellow stars, 2 pink hearts, blue swirly wind lines at upper right, small green sprouts at the bottom, a simple yellow dog drawing at lower right, and leafy green accents around the page. Overall composition should feel airy, handmade, feminine, nostalgic, and casual, with imperfect marker and crayon strokes, muted earthy colors, and authentic retro Japanese purikura scrapbook energy.
entries.description: This generates a nostalgic handwritten Japanese scrapbook-style café portrait layout, ideal for retro social graphics, diary-style posters, or Showa/Heisei aesthetic imagery.

entries.title: Taiwan Breakfast Shop Candid Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid street-food cafe photo in a narrow old Taiwanese breakfast shop, shot in a realistic smartphone-photo style with soft natural daylight and a slightly warm documentary look. A young East Asian woman with black shoulder-length straight hair sits on a small red plastic stool at a red laminate table, facing the camera and holding a hot scallion pancake wrap with both hands at chest height. Her face is intentionally obscured with a large soft blurred rectangle. She wears a white camisole with thin straps and tiny bow details, light blue high-waisted denim shorts, and a silver heart pendant necklace. Her pose is relaxed, seated slightly angled, with bare legs visible under the table. On the table are exactly 2 white plates of sliced stuffed scallion pancakes, 1 steaming paper cup with red Chinese text, 1 white bowl of soup with dark greens and tofu or curd pieces and a white soup spoon, plus scattered crumbs and paper wrappers. Steam should be clearly rising beside the cup and bowl. The food wrap in her hands looks overstuffed with egg, scallion pancake layers, and fillings peeking out. The background shows a busy, authentic local eatery interior: exactly 2 workers behind a glass display case, a Coca-Cola refrigerator, fluorescent tube lights overhead, an electric fan, tiled walls, and several Chinese menu signs and food posters with prices in New Taiwan dollars. Include visible traditional Chinese signage such as scallion pancakes, egg pancake rolls, soy milk, and prices around 30 to 55 yuan/TWD. Show a glass case on the right containing stacked fried dough sticks or pastries. On the left side, reveal part of the open storefront to the street with scooters and neighboring buildings faintly visible. Composition is vertical, full-body seated crop from head to knees, centered subject, shallow depth of field but enough detail to keep the shop readable, realistic skin tones, casual morning breakfast atmosphere, bustling everyday Taipei street-food aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a realistic vertical photo of a young woman eating breakfast in a busy Taiwanese street-side diner, ideal for lifestyle, travel, or food-scene imagery.

documentary look. a young east asian woman with black shoulder-length straight hair sits on a small red plastic stool at a red laminate table, facing the camera and holding a hot scallion pancake wrap with both hands at chest height. her face is intentionally obscured with a large soft blurred rectangle. she wears a white camisole with thin straps and tiny bow details, light blue high-waisted denim shorts, and a silver heart pendant necklace. her pose is relaxed, seated slightly angled, with bare legs visible under the table. on the table are exactly 2 white plates of sliced stuffed scallion pancakes, 1 steaming paper cup with red chinese text, 1 white bowl of soup with dark greens and tofu or curd pieces and a white soup spoon, plus scattered crumbs and paper wrappers. steam should be clearly rising beside the cup and bowl. the food wrap in her hands looks overstuffed with egg, scallion pancake layers, and fillings peeking out. the background shows a busy, authentic local eatery interior: exactly 2 workers behind a glass display case, a coca-cola refrigerator, fluorescent tube lights overhead, an electric fan, tiled walls, and several chinese menu signs and food posters with prices in new taiwan dollars. include visible traditional chinese signage such as scallion pancakes, egg pancake rolls, soy milk, and prices around 30 to 55 yuan/twd. show a glass case on the right containing stacked fried dough sticks or pastries. on the left side, reveal part of the open storefront to the street with scooters and neighboring buildings faintly visible. composition is vertical, full-body seated crop from head to knees, centered subject, shallow depth of field but enough detail to keep the shop readable, realistic skin tones, casual morning breakfast atmosphere, bustling everyday taipei street-food aesthetic. social media post portrait realistic street phone camera documentary cafe street

entries.title: Icy Fantasy Anime Woman in Blossom Snow
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed anime fantasy illustration of a tall elegant woman resembling an ice sorceress or qilin-inspired warrior, shown in a full-body three-quarter back view with her head turned slightly away, standing in a luminous snowy mountain landscape filled with soft pink cherry blossoms. She has very light icy blue hair, extremely long, thick, and flowing in the wind with layered strands, soft bangs, curled tips, and a loose ahoge on top. Two dark curved horn-like ornaments with subtle red patterning rise from either side of her head. Her face is obscured by a flat rectangular blur block in a pale lavender-gray tone. She wears an ornate fantasy bodysuit and dress in black, white, periwinkle, and sapphire blue with gold filigree armor details: a black fitted chest piece, detached translucent bell sleeves with blue crystal-like feather cuffs, a backless white-and-blue upper garment, intricate gold waist armor with a glowing blue gemstone centerpiece, sheer black tights with gold geometric accents, layered translucent blue fabric panels, and exactly 3 visible red tassel ornaments hanging from the waist and side sashes. Her right arm is extended with an open gloved hand, levitating a glowing translucent blue water sphere containing swirling yin-yang-like currents. Around her are curling arcs of water and icy energy ribbons. The background is a dreamy ethereal alpine scene with 1 distant pagoda-like tower on the right, misty snow-covered peaks, frosted trees, sparkling atmosphere, drifting petals, and pastel blossom clusters framing the foreground and upper left corner. Use soft radiant backlighting, iridescent highlights, polished anime rendering, delicate gradients, crisp decorative costume detail, magical fantasy mood, cool blue and lavender palette with pink accents, vertical composition, no text, no extra characters.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished vertical anime-style fantasy character illustration, ideal for character art, wallpaper, or magic-themed concept imagery.
