entries.title: Blue Pen Campaign Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic Brazilian political campaign poster in a square social-media format, hyper-stylized and cinematic, with a dark blue and black color grade, intense contrast, gritty textures, and heroic propaganda-poster composition. On the right half, a middle-aged man wearing a bright royal-blue polo shirt faces the camera from the chest up, extending one hand toward the viewer and prominently holding a blue ballpoint pen upright as the central symbolic object. His pose is confident, assertive, and campaign-like, with the pen close to the lens for forced perspective. Behind him, two large waving flags fill the upper background: the Puerto Rico flag on the upper left side behind the subject and the Brazil flag on the upper right side. The lower background shows a dark crowd silhouette and a distant city skyline at sunset with glowing orange light on the horizon, adding a rally atmosphere. On the left side, create a vertical stack of 4 bold campaign statements, each preceded by a large blue X marker. The 4 text blocks must read exactly: "ELE NÃO TEM A MIDIA", "ELE NÃO TEM PROJETOS", "ELE TAMBÉM NÃO TEM O POVO", and "O RESTO ELE VAI DESCOBRIR NA HORA". Use condensed uppercase typography, mixing white and electric blue emphasis words, with each statement separated by thin horizontal blue divider lines. At the bottom, place an oversized distressed headline in uppercase reading "CANETA AZUL", with "CANETA" in weathered white and "AZUL" in vivid blue, spanning almost the full width. Below it, add a secondary subtitle in uppercase blue italic condensed text reading "PARA DEPUTADO", flanked by thin blue horizontal lines. The overall design should feel like a viral meme campaign ad, bold, satirical, aggressive, and highly shareable, with dramatic rim lighting, sharpened details, realistic skin and fabric texture, and polished poster-quality compositing.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic meme-style political campaign poster for social media featuring a man holding a blue pen, bold Portuguese slogans, and Brazilian patriotic visual cues.

entries.title: Summery Beach Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A young woman with long red hair sitting on a towel at a sunny beach. She is wearing a fitted beige tank top and light blue denim shorts with a brown belt. She holds sunglasses in one hand and looks off into the distance while the other hand rests in her hair. The background features soft sand, palm trees, and a clear blue sky with warm golden sunlight casting natural highlights. A small handbag sits beside her. The atmosphere is bright, summery, and relaxed.

entries.title: Papercut Wat Arun at Sunset
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed layered papercut artwork of Wat Arun in Bangkok, Thailand at dusk, viewed from across the river in a centered, symmetrical composition. The image should look like handcrafted 3D paper sculpture and kirigami, with stacked cut-paper layers, visible paper edges, soft relief depth, delicate shadows between layers, and crisp ornamental architectural detail. Place the grand central prang of the temple rising dramatically in the middle, surrounded by 4 smaller prangs, dense dark green-black tree masses at the base, a riverside promenade with small pavilions, and multiple Thai flags lining the waterfront. In the foreground, show the Chao Phraya River as stylized rolling paper waves in deep navy and charcoal, with 1 long traditional river boat crossing from left to right near the bottom center. The sky is filled with many horizontally stretched layered clouds cut from paper, framing a low setting sun partially hidden behind the temple on the right side of center. Use a warm sunset palette of golden yellow, amber, burnt orange, peach, terracotta, coral, and deep blue-black. Keep the style elegant, intricate, cinematic, and richly textured, with a handcrafted paper diorama feel, high contrast between glowing sky and dark foreground, and an overall refined Asian decorative art aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a richly layered paper-cut style illustration of Wat Arun at dusk, ideal for decorative travel art, posters, or stylized cultural landscape imagery.

entries.title: Winter Deer Papercut Forest
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed layered papercut diorama illustration of a deer family standing on a narrow forest path in deep winter. Show exactly 4 deer facing forward: 1 large stag with tall branching antlers positioned slightly right of center, 1 adult doe on the left, 1 smaller young deer in the middle foreground, and 1 young deer on the right. The scene is built entirely in intricate cut-paper craft style with stacked paper layers, crisp cut edges, sculpted contours, and soft dimensional shadows between layers. The animals are made from warm brown, chestnut, tan, and cream paper with delicately layered chest fur, white muzzles, alert ears, and small patches of snow resting on their heads, backs, and shoulders. Surround them with a dense winter forest of tall bare trees and fir trees, all rendered in layered paper silhouettes. Snow heavily coats the branches, bushes, rocks, and ground. Compose the trees as an enclosing corridor that frames the deer symmetrically, with the snowy path leading from the foreground into the group. Use a restrained cold palette for the environment: white, off-white, pale gray, slate gray, and charcoal, contrasted by the warm brown deer. Add subtle depth haze in the distant trees, clean studio-like lighting, and a calm storybook atmosphere. Ultra-detailed craftsmanship, elegant winter scene, realistic paper texture, refined 3D paper sculpture look, vertical composition.
entries.description: This prompt generates a refined layered paper-cut illustration of four deer in a snowy winter forest, ideal for seasonal art prints, editorial illustration, or decorative wall art.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Fallen Angel Samurai
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper-detailed symmetrically composed anime-inspired cyberpunk illustration on a flat, saturated crimson red background. Centered in the frame, a solitary androgynous warrior sits slouched on a dark wooden chair, legs apart, hands relaxed between the knees, projecting calm menace and fallen-divinity energy. The face is intentionally obscured and unreadable, framed by an elaborate black samurai-style horned helmet with 2 curved horns and dense mechanical ornamentation. The figure has 2 large white feathered wings spread outward from the back. Behind and around the seated body, the composition splits into two contrasting organic-tech masses: on the left side, a chaotic storm of 1 dense tangle of teal and dark blue cables, wires, plugs, circuit fragments, and techno-organic tendrils; on the right side, 1 explosive bloom of pink cherry blossoms, petals, curling branches, and ribbon-like floral swirls. Place 1 upright katana behind the figure on the right side, angled slightly inward, with a black handle and visible guard. Dress the character in a mixed streetwear and armored outfit: a split-tone jacket with the left half in dark cyan-black circuitry patterns and the right half in pale pink floral patterns, black fitted pants with asymmetrical detailing, mismatched striped socks in cyan and pink, and chunky high-top sneakers with oversized soles, one predominantly cyan-black and the other predominantly pink-white, both covered in graphic paneling and straps. The hands should look partly mechanical or armored, with long sharp fingers. Flood the image with tiny decorative fragments, petals, paint-like flecks, and micro-details so the entire scene feels intricately hand-inked. Use a high-contrast palette dominated by teal blue, pink, black, and white against the red field. Render in an ultra-detailed manga-meets-graffiti style with crisp linework, dense textures, poster-like frontal framing, and a balanced fusion of angelic, demonic, floral, and cybernetic motifs.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic single-character poster illustration for album art, key visuals, or striking social media concept art.

entries.title: Romantic Cottage Window Garden Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy romantic illustration of a young woman leaning out of an open cottage window, perfectly emphasizing the contrast between the sunny flower garden outside and the cozy room inside. She rests both elbows on the white-painted windowsill and cups her face in her hands, centered in the composition, with her face hidden by her pose and hair. She has very long wavy light brown hair with small white flowers tucked into it, and wears a soft vintage cream-beige floral dress with puffed sleeves and delicate lace trim. The window is a white wooden double casement window opened outward on both sides, framed by sheer lace curtains that billow gently inward and outward. The exterior wall is white painted brick or plaster, covered with climbing vines and many small white blossoms around the top and sides of the window. In the foreground outside, show a lush spring garden with an exact mix of 5 flower groups: pale pink tulips, cream-white tulips, small white daisies with yellow centers, soft lavender flower spikes, and layered pale pink garden roses or peonies, with a short white picket fence peeking up along the bottom edge. Through the window, clearly show the interior as a separate indoor space: a warm, softly lit shabby-chic room with muted beige tones, framed botanical prints on the wall, a wooden cabinet or shelf with vases and flowers, and a small delicate chandelier hanging in the background. Use gentle morning sunlight, soft shadows of vines across the wall and sill, airy pastel colors, highly detailed painterly anime-inspired realism, ethereal floral fantasy mood, serene and nostalgic atmosphere, vertical composition.
entries.description: This prompt generates a soft, floral, anime-inspired illustration of a girl at an open window with a clear indoor room and outdoor garden, ideal for showcasing complex spatial composition.

entries.title: Anime Park Date Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A polished anime-style illustration of Gilgamesh and Enkidu on a quiet park date, shown from the thighs up while walking side by side along a sunlit stone path beside a lake. The left character is a tall, slender young man with short straight golden blond hair, wearing a black open overshirt, a loose white V-neck T-shirt, and beige khaki pants with both hands in his pockets. The right character is a slim and ethereal young person with very long flowing soft green hair streaming to the right in the breeze, wearing an oversized white hoodie with black drawstrings and one hand gesturing naturally while walking. Their mood is gentle, intimate, and slightly romantic, like an ambiguous casual date. Place them centered in the foreground with the blond character on the left and the green-haired character on the right, both looking toward each other or slightly ahead. The background is a beautiful public park in bright late-morning or early-afternoon summer light: tall leafy trees arch overhead, creating dappled shadows on the path; a calm lake runs along the left side behind a black metal fence; a small arched bridge appears in the mid-distance; flowerbeds with white and purple blossoms line the walkway; 2 park benches are visible on the left side; 1 lamppost stands near the water; and 1 tiny distant pedestrian walks on the right side of the path. Use a vivid blue sky with small white clouds, lush greenery, high-detail foliage, soft cinematic sunlight, clean linework, and refined painterly shading. SFW, elegant, serene, visually rich anime key art, with a romantic slice-of-life atmosphere and a vertical composition.

entries.title: Minimal Coding Study Group Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean, warm, minimalist promotional poster for a coding study meetup, in a soft lifestyle-photography plus editorial design style. Show 3 young adults seated around a light wooden table in a bright neutral room, collaborating with laptops and notebooks. The group consists of 2 men and 1 woman, all casually dressed in muted colors; the person on the left wears a dark navy sweater, the woman in the center-right wears an off-white knit top, and the person on the far right wears a light gray hoodie in side profile. Their faces are softly obscured and not detailed. Place 2 open silver laptops on the table, 2 ceramic mugs, 2 notebooks, 1 smartphone, and 1 pen visible near the right person's hand. Compose the people on the right half of the image, with a large pale sage-green organic blob shape behind them as a graphic backdrop. Keep the lighting soft, natural, airy, and slightly warm, with lots of negative space on the left. On the left side, add large elegant headline typography reading Claude Code on one line and 勉強会 below it in large Japanese characters. Under the headline, add a thin dotted horizontal divider line, then 2 lines of smaller Japanese body text reading 集まって、学んで、つくって、\n一緒にスキルをアップデートしよう。. Add playful hand-drawn doodles in thin dark lines around the layout: 1 hanging lamp centered near the top, 1 handwritten note in the upper left saying Let's coding!, 1 small laptop icon in the upper right, 1 steaming coffee cup icon beside it, 1 potted plant icon in the lower left, and 3 long curving decorative squiggle lines distributed across the page. Use an off-white background, restrained Japanese cafe-meets-tech branding, balanced whitespace, and a polished social-media event flyer aesthetic with a 16:9 horizontal composition.
entries.description: A warm, modern event flyer showing three people studying with laptops, ideal for promoting a coding meetup or tech workshop on social media.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A soft, airy studio photograph on a warm off-white background with a minimalist Japanese greeting-card aesthetic. Show a small child, about toddler to preschool age, running joyfully toward the camera from left-center, with one arm raised high holding a tall pole with 2 carp streamers attached: 1 large blue koinobori on top and 1 smaller red koinobori below. The child wears a simple handmade samurai helmet folded from paper, a loose long-sleeve ivory shirt, light beige pants with rolled cuffs, and white sneakers. Surround the child with delicate hand-drawn doodle illustrations in thin gray pencil-like lines and faint pastel accents: 2 puffy clouds, 1 flying bird, 1 small origami crane near the text, 4 drifting leaves, 2 curved wind-line clusters, 1 small house, 2 tall trees, 2 purple iris flowers with grass at the bottom left, and sparse grass marks along the ground. On the right side, add elegant Japanese handwritten text reading こどもの日, beneath it smaller Japanese text すこやかな\n成長を願って。, and below that the English subtitle Children's Day in a light handwritten script. Use a clean editorial layout with abundant negative space, natural soft lighting, muted cream and beige tones, subtle pastel blue and red accents, gentle shadows, and a calm premium lifestyle-photography look suitable for a seasonal holiday card or social media post.

entries.title: Retro AI Creative Brand Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a retro cinematic personal-brand poster in a distressed 1970s propaganda-meets-film-advertising style, landscape orientation, with a thick worn black border and heavy paper grain, ink bleed, halftone texture, scuffed edges, and aged print imperfections. Use a bold limited palette of deep black, warm cream, saturated poster red, and mustard yellow. The composition is a single unified poster with a large cropped portrait of HOSSEIN on the left half, shown from chest up, wearing dark sunglasses, a dark shirt, a chain necklace, and a mustard yellow jacket, with short dark hair styled up; the face is intentionally obscured by a centered rectangular block in muted taupe-gray, creating an editorial anonymized look. On the far left, place a vertical black panel containing 2 stacked "AI" blocks and 1 subtitle: top block reads "AI", beneath it the subtitle reads "CREATIVE AGENT", lower down another large "AI" sits over a gold circuit-board graphic. Across the center-right, place the main diagonal cream title band with huge black condensed lettering for the name HOSSEIN and an oversized red "AI" at the far right of the band. Beneath the large name, add a small stretched subtitle line reading "AI CINEMATOGRAPHER · ADVERTIVE FOR BRAND". In the top-right corner, add a 3-line stacked headline reading AI CINEMATOGRAPHER ADVERTIVE FOR BRAND in bold cream text on red. On the red field below the title band, include exactly 4 stacked black label boxes with cream text: "CINEMATOGRAPHER", "AI CREATOR", "VISUAL ARTIST", and "BRAND ADVISOR". Near the right side, add a handwritten white script note with exactly 3 lines: "Visual Storyteller", "Brand Builder", and "AI Explore". In the lower area, arrange exactly 6 creative-tech objects: 1 circular orange graphic icon, 1 white audio waveform/equalizer graphic, 1 black film clapperboard labeled with "AI", 1 open silver laptop, 1 pair of black headphones, and 1 large professional cinema camera body with visible "RED" marking; also include the edge of a music keyboard/controller at the bottom right. In the bottom-right corner, place a small dark terminal-style text block with tiny white monospace lines suggesting AI-generated visuals and analytics. Keep the whole design bold, gritty, and highly graphic, like a premium personal branding poster for an AI creative director and visual storyteller.

entries.prompt: A soft, dreamy anime illustration of a cute teenage girl standing centered on a park path lined with blooming cherry blossom trees in full spring. She faces the viewer and holds a handmade white sign at chest height with the Japanese text 3,500 フォロワー ありがとう♡ written in large rounded pink lettering, decorated with small sakura flowers, hearts, and tiny confetti-like marks. The girl has medium brown hair styled in high twin ponytails tied with pink ribbons, straight-cut bangs, and loose curled ends. Her face is intentionally blank and featureless, a smooth shaded skin-toned oval with no eyes, nose, or mouth. She wears an oversized off-shoulder knit sweater in pastel pink, with a thin camisole strap visible on one shoulder, a short white pleated skirt with a soft ruffled hem, and a delicate small necklace. Her pose is gentle and symmetrical, both hands gripping the left and right edges of the sign. The setting is a sunlit sakura avenue with 2 visible benches on the right side and 1 vintage lamppost on the left, petals drifting through the air and scattered across the ground. Use warm backlighting, soft bloom, shallow depth of field, pastel pink and cream tones, romantic seasonal atmosphere, highly detailed anime rendering, polished linework, glossy hair highlights, subtle fabric folds, and a celebratory social-media thank-you mood.

entries.title: Paris Eiffel Tower Vacation Selfie
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: (9:16). Raw high-fidelity photograph, Low-angle worm's-eye perspective looking directly upward, Medium close-up environmental portrait, iPhone 17 Pro simulation, 24mm wide-angle lens, f/8 aperture for total structural depth, zero bokeh, everything SHARP, authentic digital grain. Medium close-up selfie; subject occupies approximately 50% of the frame, positioned in the lower center. Negative space: The upper 50% of the frame is dominated by the converging iron beams of a monumental tower; clear blue sky is visible through the iron latticework. Camera distance: Approximately 0.5 meters (arm's length) from the subject. Identity Lock: "Inherit ALL permanent facial features (face shape, bone structure, eye shape/color, nose shape, lip shape/volume, chin structure, skin tone, hair texture/color/volume, freckles, moles, and distinguishing marks) from the provided selfie." Photogenic Enhancement: Maximum epidermal clarity with natural texture preserved, even chromatic skin distribution, natural skin radiance with soft luminosity, periorbital brightness, gently refined jawline contour through natural shadow placement, subtly streamlined nasal highlight, slight vermilion border definition with minimal volume enhancement, soft zygomatic highlight through natural light placement, enhanced iris luminosity with natural catchlights, defined lash separation with natural density, naturally groomed brow arches, clean pearl-white dental luminosity, salon-finish hair texture with controlled flyaway management, lustrous strand separation with natural body. Bio-Fidelity: Epidermal physics including micro-pores on the nose and cheeks, fine vellus hair along the jawline, and a satin-finish hydration on the décolletage. Expression Sync: Apply a "dreamy and awe-inspired" expression to the selfie's face; gaze is directed toward the upper-left (approximately 45 degrees off-camera); lips are in a soft, relaxed neutral pout; head is tilted upward and turned toward her left shoulder. Hair: Inherit hair color and texture from the provided selfie; long, straight, layered hair with dynamic wind-blown physics; loose strands falling messily across the face and forehead; hair cascades over both shoulders and down the chest; high-intensity midday sunlight creating sharp specular highlights and detailed strand separation. Makeup: Natural travel aesthetic: minimalist foundation with natural skin texture preserved, defined lashes, subtle hydration on the lips. Accessories: Delicate thin silver-tone chain necklace. Outfit: Strapless tube-style crop top in a high-tensile rib-knit textile, soft baby-pink; paired with high-waisted technical shorts in crisp white fabric with gathered elastic waistband; realistic material tension and micro-folds across the bust; 20% enhanced definition of the waist-to-hip ratio and collarbone geometry; hyper-defined S-curve silhouette. Pose & Interaction: Torso leaning forward and downward toward the camera lens; head tilted upward and turned left; right arm extended downward holding the camera; relaxed shoulders; realistic finger articulation; skin-on-textile contact physics. Mood: Dreamy, adventurous, awe-inspired; palette: baby-pink, iron-brown, cerulean blue, crisp white; clear saturated blue sky; natural 5500K daylight wash; high contrast with sharp directional sunlight and defined shadows/highlights. Environment: Outdoors beneath the Eiffel Tower; intense direct sunlight illuminating face and chest; pixel-perfect underside of Eiffel Tower with intricate brown iron latticework, rivets, converging beams; cloudless deep blue sky; all surfaces sharp and structurally realistic.
entries.description: A photorealistic low-angle travel selfie prompt for generating a believable summer tourist photo beneath the Eiffel Tower.

entries.title: Dark Anime Boy with Pins and Prism Light
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark, moody anime-style illustration of a slim young man lying flat on a shadowy floor, shown from above in a vertical composition. He has messy short white hair and a pale body, with his face mostly obscured by shadow and cropped ambiguity, creating an eerie, poetic atmosphere. His white button-up shirt is soaked, wrinkled, and hanging fully open, exposing his chest and abdomen. Thin streams of blood run down from his neck across his torso and lower body, stylized rather than gory. Count exactly 10 sewing pins stuck through the fabric and around his body: 2 near the left shoulder and upper sleeve, 2 on the left lower side near the waist and forearm, 3 on the right chest and shoulder area, 1 on the right mid torso, and 2 near the lower right hem. Place 1 overturned wine glass in the upper left corner with red wine spilled beside it. Place 1 white butterfly resting gently on his lower abdomen. Add diagonal bands of rainbow prism light crossing the dark floor and parts of his body, with cinematic high contrast, soft painterly shading, delicate linework, and melancholic symbolic storytelling. The overall mood should be tragic, beautiful, ethereal, and unsettling, like a dramatic key visual from a psychological anime.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic single-panel anime illustration of a wounded young man on the floor with symbolic props and rainbow light, suitable for melancholic poster art or character key visuals.

entries.title: Professional Chinese Palmistry Analysis Chart
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please generate a high-definition 3:4 ratio Chinese palmistry analysis chart based on the first palm photo I uploaded, combined with the layout style of the second reference image. Core Requirements: Please use the real palm in the first image as the main object of analysis, trying to preserve the original palm's shape, finger proportions, palm type, skin tone, palm line directions, and realistic texture. The second image is for visual style reference only: Refer to its Chinese metaphysics infographic style, cream-white background, brownish-red font, traditional calligraphy titles, red circular numbering, dotted guide lines, palm line markings, right-side text analysis column, and bottom comprehensive conclusion box. Do not copy the palm from the second image, do not copy watermarks, and do not include platform logos. Visual Style: Overall, create a high-end Chinese metaphysics style 'Palmistry Analysis Chart'. Image Ratio: 3:4. Quality: High-definition, clear details, suitable for posting on Xiaohongshu. Background: Cream-white rice paper texture, faint vintage texture. Main Colors: Dark brown, reddish-brown, light gold, cream-white. Font Style: Titles use Chinese calligraphy style, body text uses clear and readable Chinese Songti/Kaiti style. Overall Feeling: Professional, classical, clean, and high-end, like a palmistry analysis card issued by a traditional fortune-telling master. Title Design: Write the main title at the top: 'Palmistry Analysis Chart'. Write the subtitle: 'Traditional Palmistry · Yi Principles Reference · Trend Analysis'. Add a small red seal next to the title with the text: 'Heavenly Mystery'. Write small text at the bottom: 'For traditional culture and entertainment reference only'. Palm Annotation Requirements: Please use thin reddish-brown lines, dotted lines, dots, and numbers on the palm to mark the following 12 key points. Each number must clearly correspond to the analysis content on the right. 12 points to be marked: 1. Life Line, 2. Wisdom Line, 3. Heart Line, 4. Fate Line, 5. Sun Line, 6. Health Line / Mercury Line, 7. Marriage Line, 8. Mount of Venus, 9. Mount of Jupiter, 10. Mount of the Moon, 11. Thumb Spread / Willpower, 12. Finger Morphology and Palm Type. Annotation Requirements: Lines must fit the general direction of the actual palm lines in the first image, do not draw randomly. Numbers and text must not obstruct the main body of the palm. Dotted guide lines must be clear like a professional diagram. There should be reasonable annotations on the left side, right side, and inside the palm. The overall layout should be like the second image, with the palm analysis diagram on the left and text explanations on the right. Right-side Analysis Text Requirements: Please generate 12 Chinese analyses on the right, each corresponding to a number. The text style should be like an analysis combining traditional palmistry, I Ching, and TCM constitution; the language should be professional, have a sense of warning, and a sense of metaphysics, but not too exaggerated. Each item should be controlled within 2-4 lines with clear and readable text. Please use the following analysis content: 1. Life Line: The arc is large and overall continuous, suggesting the basic physical energy is not bad and recovery under pressure is strong; if the middle and later sections appear fragmented, it suggests periodic fatigue and lifestyle imbalance, so be careful of vitality exhaustion. 2. Wisdom Line: The line is long and slants slightly downward, indicating delicate thinking and strong perception, with observation and imagination in doing things; but it is also easy to overthink, leading to repeated internal conflict under emotional stress. 3. Heart Line: The length is fair; if there is a slight split at the end, it represents being serious and slow-to-warm in relationships, valuing both investment and spiritual compatibility; sensitive at heart, prone to disappointment due to high expectations. 4. Fate Line: The vertical line in the palm is faint, indicating the path in early years was not found in one step, relying more on self-exploration and accumulation; it becomes more stable later, belonging to a pattern of trial and error before finalizing. 5. Sun Line: The sun line is thin, reputation and sense of achievement are late-blooming, not an overnight explosion, but gradually seen through works, reputation, and professional ability. 6. Health Line / Mercury Line: This line is relatively hidden; according to traditional TCM concepts, it mostly suggests that spleen, stomach, sleep, and emotional management should be prioritized; once stressed or staying up late, fatigue and a sense of qi and blood deficiency easily appear. 7. Marriage Line: If there is more than one fine line on the side edge, it represents choices and considerations in emotional experiences, not settling down easily; true stability often comes from value compatibility after maturity. 8. Mount of Venus: The base of the thumb is relatively full, indicating a person who values affection and family, with strong vitality and affinity; it also shows that security and realistic warmth are viewed as quite important. 9. Mount of Jupiter: There is a certain rise below the index finger, representing ambition, self-requirement, and a sense of responsibility that is not low; suitable for organizational, driving, and coordinating roles in a team. 10. Mount of the Moon: The texture below the palm edge is soft, indicating that intuition, empathy, and aesthetic sense are not weak; rich imagination, suitable for content, aesthetics, and communication-related matters. 11. Thumb Spread / Willpower: The angle of the thumb opening is natural, representing a clear sense of independence and executive will; not a follower, once the direction is clearly thought out, often able to continue moving forward. 12. Finger Morphology and Palm Type: The overall palm shape is long and the fingers are slender, belonging to a type that is rational with feelings, valuing both experience and logic; does not like to be too rough in doing things, and financial fortune is more suitable for steady progress. Bottom Comprehensive Conclusion: Please design a classical framed information box at the bottom, with the title: 'Comprehensive Conclusion'. Content: • The overall pattern is upper-middle, with much exploration and change in the early years, gradually becoming clear and moving towards stable accumulation in the middle and later periods. • The character is rational and pragmatic with empathy, suitable for establishing value through professionalism, aesthetics, communication, or long-termism. • Relationships value sincerity and spiritual compatibility, slow-to-warm but committed, easier to gain stable relationships after maturity. • The most important recent focus is adjusting routine, emotions, and spleen/stomach; keep your state, and your fortune will be smoother. Layout Requirements: Left side: Enlarge the main body of the palm, occupying 55%-60% of the screen. Right side: Place 12 numbered analyses, occupying 35%-40% of the screen. Bottom: Place the comprehensive conclusion box. Text must be clear, with no garbled characters, no typos, and no distortion. All numbers, lines, titles, and body text must have a unified Chinese aesthetic. The overall image should look like a professional metaphysical analysis chart, not like a standard phone screenshot. Do not include English. Do not include watermarks. Do not change the basic shape of the original palm. Finally, output a high-definition 3:4 Chinese palmistry analysis poster.
entries.description: A comprehensive prompt for creating high-definition Chinese palmistry analysis charts. It replicates traditional aesthetic styles with rice paper textures, calligraphy, and detailed line annotations for palm lines like life and wisdom lines.

entries.title: Cute Brains Frozen in Ice Cubes
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A whimsical clean cartoon illustration of 7 transparent ice cubes floating underwater against a vivid saturated blue background, each cube containing a cute pink brain character with oversized googly eyes and a small smiling mouth, as if the brains are frozen inside the cubes. Show the cubes drifting at different angles and depths in a loose vertical composition, with soft white highlights, glossy refraction, rounded cube edges, and a hand-drawn outlined look. Include many air bubbles of different sizes scattered throughout the scene, plus tiny white specks and soft splash-like dots to enhance the underwater feel. The brains should all have the same playful simplified design, bright pink color, black outlines, and expressive slightly goofy faces. Keep the style light, polished, and humorous, like a modern sticker illustration or cheerful editorial cartoon, with no text, no border, and a square composition.

entries.title: Lifestyle Portrait at Outdoor Café
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a hyper-realistic lifestyle portrait of a young woman sitting at an outdoor café. She has long, voluminous dark brown hair styled in soft waves, glowing skin, and natural elegant makeup with a subtle pink lip. Her expression is calm, confident, and slightly smiling while looking off to the side.
She is wearing a black top layered with a loose blue-and-white striped shirt, accessorized with a delicate pearl necklace and small earrings.
In front of her is a wooden café table with a minimal breakfast setup: a white ceramic bowl filled with yogurt topped with strawberries and pistachios, and a cup of tea in a white cup. A spoon rests on the plate beside the bowl.

entries.title: Fantasy Chibi Wedding Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy fantasy wedding collage in a soft pastel, high-detail anime game-art style, featuring two chibi lalafell-like newlyweds in an ornate chapel filled with warm bokeh lights, pale blue and blush tones, flowers, and floating pink petals. The central focus is a close-up side view of the bride and groom leaning in for a kiss, with the bride on the left and the groom on the right. The bride is a tiny elf-eared fantasy character with short dark brown hair, round cheeks with faint blush marks, and a large white floral headpiece made of 2 white roses, small white blossoms, and green leaves, plus a long white veil flowing behind her. She wears an elegant long-sleeved white lace wedding dress with delicate embroidery and a jeweled neckline. The groom is a tiny elf-eared fantasy character with short spiky brown hair, white lily flowers tucked into his hair, and red tassel earrings; he wears a white formal wedding suit with subtle layered tailoring and a white boutonniere with green leaves. Surrounding the main kiss scene are 3 tilted framed inset photos with cream-colored borders: 1 top-left portrait of the groom reaching his hand toward the viewer, 1 top-right portrait of the bride showing her hand forward with a ring visible, and 1 bottom inset two-shot of the couple seated together outdoors in soft sunlight. Add ornate swirling golden decorative lines and glowing sparkles weaving across the composition, with a bouquet cluster of pale cream and blush roses in the lower right foreground. The background is an opulent chapel interior with chandeliers, candles, soft floral arrangements, and luminous pastel haze. Make it romantic, ethereal, polished, and sentimental, with a luxurious wedding album feel and a vertical smartphone-friendly composition.
entries.description: This prompt generates a soft, ornate vertical wedding collage of two chibi fantasy newlyweds, ideal for romantic game-inspired commemorative portraits.

entries.title: Chibi Kendo Anti-Harassment Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bold Japanese anti-harassment awareness poster in a cute but forceful chibi anime style, square social-media graphic composition. In the center, a super-deformed kendo character in full navy blue bogu armor is mid-swing with a shinai, charging forward dynamically. The helmet has a dark indigo men with white grill bars and a red inner rim, the torso armor is deep blue with a red do, and the waist apron has the white hiragana text "けんどう" plus a small pink cherry blossom emblem. The character is striking hostile purple spiky monster balls that represent bad behavior. Show exactly 4 monsters with expressive faces and large Japanese labels on their bodies: top right monster labeled "誹謗中傷", lower right monster labeled "嫌がらせ", lower left monster labeled "差別", and left monster labeled "悪口". Each monster is being knocked away or smashed with explosive yellow-orange impact bursts, scattered black debris, motion lines, dust, and sweat tears on some of the monsters. Add a comic speech bubble on the left side containing the Japanese text "みんなが気持ちよく楽しめる場所を守るよ!". At the top, place a huge energetic headline in Japanese with thick outlined lettering: dark navy text for "誹謗中傷は" and bright red text for "絶対に許さない!". At the bottom, add 2 lines of Japanese text: first line in bold dark blue "ルールを守って、みんなで最高のコミュニティにしよう!" and second line in bold red "違反行為は厳正に対処します。". Place one yellow warning triangle icon on the bottom left and one on the bottom right, exactly 2 total. Use a pale pink radial burst background with manga-style speed lines and light texture. Make the overall look clean, high-contrast, friendly, and motivational, like a polished community guidelines illustration for a kendo community on social media, with thick white sticker-like outlines around major text and characters.
entries.description: A bold square Japanese community-guidelines poster showing a chibi kendo fighter defeating four labeled harassment monsters, ideal for social media safety messaging.

entries.title: Japanese Fashion Point Poster Edit
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, turn the photo into a soft feminine Japanese fashion-check infographic poster while keeping the same person, outfit, indoor window setting, and blurred face censorship. Create a scrapbook/editorial layout on a warm cream background with blush-pink and beige accents. Place the main full-body photo on the left as a slightly tilted printed snapshot with handwritten callouts. Add 4 circular close-up detail crops on the right showing: 1) neckline/chest area, 2) knit shoulder and sleeve texture, 3) waist and jeans area, 4) cardigan hem and pocket area. Add a small extra inset portrait near the bottom center using the same outfit and person in a casual leaning pose. Include Japanese magazine-style typography and decorative doodles throughout. The visible text should include these sections and labels: top headline 「このコーデの Fashion Point ♡」, ribbon subtitle 「ナチュラルに色っぽく見せる大人カジュアル」, right header 「POINT」, point labels 「Point 01」「Point 02」「Point 03」「Point 04」, left photo notes 「柔らかニットで女性らしい優しい印象に♡」「ナチュラルなのに視線を集める抜け感コーデ✨」, a tips box titled 「COORDINATION TIPS」 with 4 bullet lines, a box titled 「Instagrammable」 with 4 checklist lines, and a bottom tagline 「ナチュラルな色気と抜け感で、あなたらしい魅力を引き出して。」. For the point descriptions, write short Japanese copy praising the deep V-neck, soft knit, subtle midriff reveal, and basic color styling. Add small stars, hearts, sparkles, flowers, stitched lines, and a tiny camera icon. Make it look like a polished social-media fashion advice sheet, portrait orientation.
entries.description: This prompt transforms a reference portrait into a Japanese magazine-style fashion commentary poster for social posts, outfit breakdowns, and styling showcases.

entries.title: Oriental Fantasy Illustration Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An Oriental fantasy-style anime illustration. The main subject is a half-length portrait of a young Oriental girl. She wears a red modern Chinese-style halter cheongsam gown with a translucent light blue-white gauze shawl. Her skin is fair and delicate, with exquisite features and clear, bright blue eyes, expressing a cool and elegant demeanor. entries.title: Cute handwritten profile summary poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, turn the X/Twitter profile screenshot into a cute handwritten Japanese infographic poster that summarizes the account's personal brand and offerings. Keep the same person identity, pink feminine tone, AI/Udemy theme, cat motif, and the key achievement of 140 students, but replace the screenshot UI with an illustrated one-page flyer on a clean white background with soft pink doodle borders, hearts, sparkles, and sticky-note styling. Recreate the person as a friendly manga-style portrait in the upper left, still paired with the small chibi companions from the reference. Add a large handwritten headline with the account name and a subheadline about making difficult AI easy and helping beginners go from 0 to 1. Organize the content into 7 clearly separated sections: 1) top title area with short tag stickers, 2) a self-introduction memo card, 3) a speech-bubble profile summary, 4) "who this is for" with 4 bullet points, 5) "what problems can be solved" with 4 bullet points, 6) "core values" with 4 bullet points, 7) "achievements and strengths" with 4 bullet points. Also add 1 small notebook-style motivational quote card near the bottom center and 1 cute cat illustration with a name label at the bottom right. Include a large closing slogan across the bottom stating that AI supports people who are doing their best. Preserve the Japanese language throughout, use legible hand-drawn typography, warm pastel colors, and a polished social-media-friendly layout that feels approachable, practical, and beginner-friendly.

entries.title: Anime Characters in Real Izakaya Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid indoor restaurant photo in a realistic anime-inspired style, showing two young women seated at a small worn wooden table inside a cozy Japanese izakaya with vertical wood-paneled walls and a clear plastic tent-like curtain on the right side. The camera is slightly above table height and angled diagonally toward the table, creating a casual snapshot feeling. One woman is in the left foreground with her back mostly to the viewer, leaning forward over the table; she has long straight dark hair and wears a bulky dark navy or black puffer jacket with a large hood. The second woman sits across from her on the right, facing the camera with a relaxed posture and one arm bent on the table; she has shoulder-length dark brown to black hair, a center part, a black puffer jacket, and a light inner shirt. Replace only the people with clean, natural-looking anime characters while keeping the restaurant environment photorealistic and unchanged. Preserve the mixed-media look of anime characters composited believably into a real photo. On the table, include 2 stainless steel mugs, 2 pairs of chopsticks, 1 smartphone with a bright blue case near the center-left edge of the table, 1 cigarette pack near the right woman, 1 large oval plate with thinly sliced white onions and a lemon wedge, 1 small dish of green vegetables, 1 small plate of brown food, 1 small plate with toast or grilled bread, 1 small dark bowl, 2 small empty white bowls, and 1 printed handwritten Japanese menu sheet lying on the lower right corner of the table. In the upper left background, include a wooden counter with white ceramic bottles and dishes, plus 1 handwritten Japanese wall menu poster. Warm indoor lighting, everyday nightlife atmosphere, documentary realism, detailed wood grain, slightly cluttered tabletop, authentic casual dining scene in Japan.

entries.title: Absurd Tabloid Panther Newspaper Front Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A realistic, slightly humorous tabloid newspaper front page photographed from above on a wooden table, designed to look like a printed broadsheet with subtle paper texture, fold marks, and mild lens distortion. The masthead at top left reads "The Daily Metro", the date line near the top center reads "Friday, April 22, 2005", and the top-right section marker reads "CITY NEWS | 05". A red banner near the upper left says "EXCLUSIVE STORY". The dominant oversized black headline spans multiple lines: "Zoo Panther Caught Living Double Life - As a Charming Bar Hopping Casanova!" Below it, a large subheadline reads: ""Marquise" the Panther Escapes Zoo at Night, Spends Eveningsvlenlars, Becomes Heartthrob Among Lonely Women". The page layout should mimic a sensational tabloid with 1 huge headline area, 1 large main photo on the upper right, 1 small inset photo under the main text on the left, 3 narrow text columns with dense newspaper copy in the center-left, 1 pull-quote box in the middle, 1 lower-left secondary story block with a panther portrait, 3 small bottom photo thumbnails in a row, and 1 right-side sidebar box titled "What's Next For Mamquiss?". Keep most body text tiny and partly nonsensical or pseudo-legible like AI-generated newspaper filler, but preserve the major visible headlines exactly.

The main photo on the upper right shows the back view of a glamorous blonde woman in a silky champagne-colored dress standing at a bar beside a large black panther upright on a stool or standing with forepaws elevated near the counter. The bar background contains many liquor bottles and glassware on shelves, warmly lit. The woman's face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blur/block. The panther is sleek, glossy, and realistically rendered. The inset photo under the headline at left shows the black panther near a zoo exit or pathway sign at night. The lower-left portrait shows a close-up of the panther's face. The 3 bottom thumbnails show nightlife scenes: the panther moving through a bar interior, the panther seated near two women at a small round table, and the panther lounging in dim warm light.

Use an early-2000s tabloid aesthetic, high-contrast black headline typography, off-white newsprint, red accent rules, narrow columns, and slightly messy authentic newspaper composition. The overall tone is deadpan absurdist journalism, realistic enough to glance as a real newspaper, with the page filling most of the frame and photographed in natural indoor light.

dense newspaper copy in the center-left, 1 pull-quote box in the middle, 1 lower-left secondary story block with a panther portrait, 3 small bottom photo thumbnails in a row, and 1 right-side sidebar box titled "what's next for mamquiss?". keep most body text tiny and partly nonsensical or pseudo-legible like ai-generated newspaper filler, but preserve the major visible headlines exactly. the main photo on the upper right shows the back view of a glamorous blonde woman in a silky champagne-colored dress standing at a bar beside a large black panther upright on a stool or standing with forepaws elevated near the counter. the bar background contains many liquor bottles and glassware on shelves, warmly lit. the woman's face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blur/block. the panther is sleek, glossy, and realistically rendered. the inset photo under the headline at left shows the black panther near a zoo exit or pathway sign at night. the lower-left portrait shows a close-up of the panther's face. the 3 bottom thumbnails show nightlife scenes: the panther moving through a bar interior, the panther seated near two women at a small round table, and the panther lounging in dim warm light. use an early-2000s tabloid aesthetic, high-contrast black headline typography, off-white newsprint, red accent rules, narrow columns, and slightly messy authentic newspaper composition. the overall tone is deadpan absurdist journalism, realistic enough to glance as a real newspaper, with the page filling most of the frame and photographed in natural indoor light. social media post entries.title: Anime X Battle Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a dramatic anime-style social media battle poster inspired by X/Twitter, split vertically down the center into two opposing halves with a glowing lightning-like divide and a huge luminous VS at the bottom center. The composition is a tall smartphone-optimized promotional key visual with dense layered UI cards, speech bubbles, tweet screenshots, reaction counters, and explosive energy effects. At the top center, place a large X logo with the title text "BATTLE" and the Japanese subtitle "Xでレスバ中". The left side is a cool purple and black theme, the right side is a hot red and white theme, with sparks, streaks, embers, and motion lines flying across both sides.

Show 2 anime schoolgirl characters facing off. On the left, a calm, composed girl representing logical rebuttal: long dark black-to-purple gradient hair, straight bangs, pale skin, slim build, black sailor-style school uniform with purple neck ribbon, pleated skirt, black knee socks, loafers, holding a smartphone in one hand and touching her glasses or temple with the other. Her face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blur mosaic over the central face area. Her stance is reserved and still. Surround her with purple glowing tweet cards and speech bubbles. Her display name and handle should appear repeatedly as "雲居モヤ @kumoi_moya". Include exactly 3 large quoted statement boxes on her side with these Japanese texts: "それ、前提が雑だよね。", "感情だけでは通らないよ。", and "論点、そこじゃない。". Also include exactly 5 smaller purple UI/comment elements on her side: 1) a small comment bubble reading "それな 千代先輩、強すぎ...", 2) a small comment bubble reading "論理的で草 完全に正論パンチ", 3) a like card reading "いいね! 12.8K", 4) a repost card reading "リポスト 9,341", and 5) a dark trend card reading "おすすめトレンド #モヤVSエナ 42,857件のポスト". Add a central dark smartphone tweet panel tilted slightly, showing her tweet with profile icon, name, handle, the text "それ、前提が雑だよね。", and counters "312", "1,204", and "8,745".

On the right, show an aggressive, fiery girl representing emotional counterattack and confidence: vivid red hair in a high messy side bun with long loose hair, bright teal eyes, fair skin, energetic expression, open shouting mouth, pointing directly toward the opponent with one hand while the other hand rests on her hip. She wears a white blouse, black jumper-style dress or vest dress, oversized red bow tie, white loose socks scrunched around the ankles, and black loafers. Surround her with red glowing tweet cards and notification-style UI. Her display name and handle should appear repeatedly as "緋空エナ @hisora_ena". Include exactly 3 large quoted statement boxes on her side with these Japanese texts: "ちゃんと読んでから言ってる!?", "正論ぶってるだけでしょ!", and "逃げてないで答えて!". Also include exactly 6 smaller red UI/comment elements on her side: 1) a top notification badge card reading "通知 99+", 2) a small comment bubble reading "エナちゃん つよすぎるww", 3) a small comment bubble reading "言いたいこと全部言ってくれる!", 4) a like card reading "いいね! 18.7K", 5) a like card reading "いいね! 23.6K", and 6) a repost card reading "リポスト 11.2K". Add a red tweet panel near the center showing her tweet with profile icon, name, handle, the text "ちゃんと読んでから言ってる!?", and counters "278", "1,652", and "10.9K".

In the lower middle area, place exactly 3 central dark interface cards bridging both sides: 1) a quote-post card labeled "引用ポスト" showing both users and the exchange "論点、そこじゃない。" and "正論ぶってるだけでしょ!", 2) a reply count card reading "返信 1,876件", and 3) a bottom navigation bar styled like the X mobile app with home, search, notifications, messages icons and a blue button labeled "ポスト". The overall aesthetic should be glossy, high-contrast, highly rendered anime illustration with neon edge lighting, intense backlighting, dynamic perspective, layered translucency, and a chaotic viral-internet argument atmosphere. Use crisp Japanese UI typography, dramatic red-vs-purple color contrast, and polished promotional-poster quality.
entries.description: A dramatic anime poster of two schoolgirls arguing on X/Twitter, designed for viral social media battle visuals and stylized platform-themed key art.
entries.displayTitleZh: Anime X Battle 海报

entries.title: Gritty Boxer in Vintage Gym
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A gritty realistic fitness lifestyle portrait of a male athlete leaning casually but strongly on the ropes of a boxing ring inside an old-school gym. Mid shot, vertical composition, centered subject from about mid-thigh to head, with both forearms resting on the top red ring rope and hands loosely draped forward above a white and blue lower rope. The subject wears an oversized heather grey hoodie with the hood up, soft cotton texture, natural folds, slightly worn casual look, and black athletic boxing shorts barely visible at the bottom of frame. Both hands are wrapped in slightly worn white boxing wraps with realistic fabric tension and layered wrapping around wrists, palms, and knuckles. Hair is dark, short-to-medium length, slightly wet, with a few natural strands visible under the hood on the forehead. Expression should feel focused, calm, slightly tired, and determined, with neutral lips and a thoughtful, post-training mood. Natural athletic build with realistic muscle definition under the hoodie, broad shoulders, no exaggerated musculature. Background is a vintage boxing gym with exactly 3 visible ring rope colors in frame: red top rope, white middle rope, blue lower rope. Behind the subject are worn off-white walls, aged boxing posters, hanging training gear, and soft blurred gym details that suggest history and use. Lighting is soft natural indoor light mixed with dim ambient gym lighting, creating gentle shadows, muted contrast, and a cinematic documentary feel. Shallow depth of field, sharp focus on hoodie texture, wrapped hands, and ring ropes, realistic skin and fabric detail, earthy muted tones, authentic analog-like atmosphere, no glamour retouching.
entries.description: This prompt generates a realistic cinematic portrait of a hooded boxer leaning on ring ropes in an old-school gym, ideal for fitness branding, editorial sports imagery, and lifestyle campaigns.

entries.title: Gritty Boxer Leaning on Ring Ropes
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A gritty, realistic fitness lifestyle portrait of a male athlete leaning back against the ropes of an old-school boxing ring inside a worn vintage gym. Mid-length vertical composition, framed from about mid-thigh to slightly above the head, with the subject centered and facing the camera. He wears an oversized heather-grey pullover hoodie with the hood up, visible drawstrings hanging down, soft cotton texture, natural folds, and a front kangaroo pocket; black satin-like athletic boxing shorts with white trim and curved white piping near the hem; and white hand wraps on both hands, slightly frayed and loosely wound. His posture is relaxed but strong: both arms draped outward and resting on the ring ropes at left and right, shoulders open, torso square to camera, hands hanging naturally over the ropes. Hair is dark brown, short-to-medium length, slightly messy and visible under the hood at the forehead. The physique is natural and athletic with realistic proportions and understated muscle definition. The boxing ring shows exactly 3 visible rope colors: a red rope in the upper background, a pale grey-white rope crossing behind the hands and waist, and a dark blue rope across the lower foreground. Background is softly blurred with distressed beige walls, scattered vintage gym posters and banners, industrial wear, and dim training-space atmosphere. Lighting is soft natural indoor light mixed with ambient gym light, creating gentle shadows and a moody cinematic tone. Photorealistic texture, subdued earthy colors, shallow depth of field, high detail in fabric, wraps, skin, and ring ropes, editorial sports portrait style.

entries.title: Anime BL Promo Thumbnail
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bright, polished anime-style promotional thumbnail with a summer romance atmosphere. The composition is split visually, with large typography on the left and two handsome young men on the right. On the left side, place layered translucent white panels with soft glow and sparkles over a sky-blue background, featuring large elegant serif text "GPT" in a blue gradient at the top and "BL" in a lavender-to-violet gradient below. Add three lines of Japanese text arranged between and under them: "最新の画像生成で", "作って", and "遊んでみた", in deep blue calligraphic Japanese type. Include subtle decorative accents such as small star glints, diagonal light streaks, dotted texture, and a cyan underline swoosh beneath the middle text. On the right side, show 2 anime boys from the waist up, leaning casually together beside a chain-link fence under leafy trees. The taller boy has tousled dark brown hair, a navy overshirt worn open over a white T-shirt, layered silver necklaces, and holds 1 plastic cup of iced coffee with a straw. The shorter boy has messy silver-white hair, a white T-shirt with a small crest emblem on the chest, black backpack straps over both shoulders, layered silver necklaces, and one small earring. Their poses are relaxed and intimate, with the dark-haired boy's arm resting around the other. Use a luminous blue-and-white palette with soft sunlight, lens flare, bokeh, and a faint cityscape in the background, creating a clean social-media header or article thumbnail aesthetic.

entries.title: Warm Welcome Home Anime Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A warm, healing anime illustration of a gentle older-sister type woman welcoming the viewer home at the apartment doorway at night, drawn in a soft romantic shoujo style with glowing amber indoor lighting, delicate linework, painterly shading, and a cozy emotional atmosphere. She is shown from a slightly low eye-level perspective, leaning forward as if opening the door and reaching one hand toward the viewer in invitation, creating an intimate first-person point of view. Her expression should feel tender, affectionate, and reassuring. She has deep brown long slightly damp-looking wavy hair, loosely tied back with soft strands framing her face. She wears a cream cable-knit cardigan with large buttons over a white camisole and a high-waisted brown pleated skirt with a ribbon tie. The background is a warmly lit home interior with wooden floor, soft curtains, a floor lamp, framed wall art, and potted plants, all slightly blurred to keep focus on her. Add subtle sparkles, floral lace corner decorations, and a thin ornamental border framing the entire image like a vintage character poster. Include prominent Japanese text integrated into the design: large vertical glowing text on the left reading "おかえり、今日もおつかれさま。", a small speech bubble near the upper right reading "ほら、こっちおいで♡", a smaller comforting line in a translucent box reading "ここでは、強がらなくていいよ。", and a large elegant name title at the bottom reading "白瀬まどか" with romanized subtitle "Shirase Madoka". entries.title: Nostalgic Chinese School Shop Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly realistic documentary-style street photo in a small older Chinese town, showing a nostalgic elementary school convenience stall set against worn plaster walls and exposed brick. The main subject is a tiny roadside shop with a faded red hanging sign that reads "小卖部 便民商店", under a weathered clay-tile roof with rusted metal supports. In the right background, a concrete school gate bears a large red slogan reading "好好学习 天天向上" above a locked iron gate. In front of the stall, exactly 4 young schoolboys in matching blue-and-white Chinese school tracksuits stand in a loose line, viewed mostly from behind and in three-quarter rear angle, each carrying a backpack in different muted colors, as they browse toys and snacks after school. A shopkeeper sits inside the dim stall opening, partially obscured by merchandise. The storefront is densely packed with colorful hanging snack packets, candy, bubble gum, small toy capsules, plastic balls, lollipops, cheap stationery, children's books, and boxed goods. A glass display counter in front contains brightly colored toys, notebooks, small bottles, figurines, toy vehicles, and snack boxes; a metal bucket on the ground at left is filled with long colorful pens or pinwheels. The environment should feel candid and lived-in: cracked paint, peeling posters, dusty pavement, uneven concrete, old walls, soft afternoon sunlight, warm earthy tones, shallow depth of field, natural imperfections, authentic textures, and the visual feeling of a memory from the early 2000s. Photorealistic, cinematic realism, human-scale perspective, rich incidental detail, subtle haze, no stylization, no glamour, just believable everyday life in front of a school shop in a small Chinese town.

entries.title: Professional Tool Launch Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: 1. Design a modern tech-style poster for an "AI Agent tool launch," vertical 4:5 aspect ratio, with a clear and eye-catching main title and a subtitle explaining product value. Use a black, white, and gray color palette with fluorescent green accents. Include abstract networks, code windows, and agent nodes. The overall look should resemble a high-end SaaS launch poster, and text must be accurate and readable. 2. Generate a cover image suitable for an X/Twitter long-form post titled "2026 AI Tool Trends," horizontal 16:9 aspect ratio, with a clean and sophisticated style. Include the title and 3 keywords: Agent / Workflow / Automation. The background should be a combination of desktop workflows, browsers, terminals, and data panels, with a layout like a tech media header. 3. Generate an advertisement for a Web3 wallet security tool. The center of the image shows a phone displaying the wallet interface, surrounded by on-chain addresses, risk alerts, shield icons, and transaction path visualizations. The style should be professional and trustworthy, with the Chinese title: "Making every on-chain operation safer." 4. Create a Chinese infographic titled "The 5 Layers of AI Agent Capabilities," including: understanding tasks, calling tools, reading data, executing operations, and reviewing/optimizing. Show this in a clear hierarchical structure, each layer with a small icon, white background, and tech-blue accents. 5. Generate a one-page 4-panel comic strip about a creator going from manually searching for info, writing copy, and making images to completing the workflow automatically with an AI Agent. The style should be lighthearted and humorous, with consistent characters and short, clear Chinese dialogue. The last panel should highlight "double the efficiency." 6. Generate a roadmap visual for an AI x Crypto project, including three phases: Q2, Q3, and Q4: MVP, Agent Marketplace, and Onchain Automation. The style should look like a product page in a funding deck-clean, credible, futuristic, and with clearly readable text.

entries.title: Vintage Chinese General Store Interior
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A nostalgic cinematic photograph of a small old-fashioned Chinese general store interior, shot from customer eye level with a slightly wide framing. Warm sepia and amber tones, soft window light from the left, subtle film grain, faint vignette, and a slightly hazy vintage look. Behind a long dark wooden-and-glass display counter stands 1 shopkeeper, a woman with a short black bob haircut wearing a plain white short-sleeve blouse, shown in side profile while working with her hands at the counter. The store feels authentic, modest, and lived-in, like the late 1970s to 1990s. On the right side, a black vintage sewing machine sits on an upper shelf with a handwritten price sign in Chinese beside it reading "768元". Behind it are shelves packed with small colorful product boxes and tins. On the wall hang 1 large vertical handwritten price list in Chinese calligraphy and 2 old paper calendars or posters. The foreground glass cases display many old packaged goods: stacks of colorful tins and jars, several rectangular illustrated tins, 2 enamel wash basins with floral patterns, and multiple pairs of plain white canvas shoes arranged side by side on the bottom shelf. The left side of the frame shows bright wooden-framed windows and more countertop clutter, creating strong contrast between sunlight and the dim interior. Emphasize realistic documentary photography, richly textured wood, aged surfaces, retro packaging design, quiet everyday atmosphere, and a composition that leads the eye from the woman at center-left to the sewing machine and shelves at upper right.

Around him sit 6 other cats, each holding playing cards and dressed like underworld gamblers: on the far left a gray tabby in a textured flat cap and round dark sunglasses; next a ginger cat in a dark fedora, chunky gold chain, and dark glasses; to the right of center a fluffy gray cat in a brown fedora; further right a white-and-tabby cat in a dark New York Yankees baseball cap and pendant necklace; in the near right foreground a striped cat in a fedora and sunglasses seen in profile; all styled as mobsters. entries.title: Corporate Cash Private Jet Satire
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic satirical airport tarmac scene in daylight, shot vertically, showing a sleek white private jet parked with its door open and stairs visible on the left. On the side of the jet, large clean corporate lettering reads "Google | ANTHROPIC". In the foreground, 2 adult male executives in dark navy business suits embrace in a celebratory hug, centered slightly left. The man facing camera-left has curly dark hair and wears a charcoal suit; the other man, with short dark hair and a white dress shirt under a navy suit, holds a thick fan of U.S. $100 bills in one hand while hugging. Their expressions should feel triumphant and conspiratorial. In the midground and right side, 2 additional adult men in dark suits push 2 metal airport luggage carts overflowing with tightly bundled stacks of cash. The left cart has a black front panel labeled "Google" in multicolor corporate-style lettering, and the right cart has a black front panel labeled "Deep Pockets Division" in white sans-serif text. Count exactly 2 carts and show both piled high with money bricks wrapped in bank bands. The private jet extends across most of the background, with oval windows, a visible rear engine on the right, and a partly cloudy blue sky above. The ground is wet and reflective, adding glossy reflections under the people and carts. Editorial photojournalism style, ultra-realistic lighting, sharp focus, subtle depth of field, luxury wealth satire, corporate power imagery, high-detail textures on suits, aircraft metal, and cash bundles.

entries.title: Ethereal Piano Performance
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: In a vertical reverie elongated into a 9:16 frame, a vision of sublime aesthetic grace unfolds where light and shadow softly embrace the sleek contours of a magnificent Steinway & Sons black grand piano. Seated at the keys, a woman of mesmerizing elegance commands the scene, her lithe and delicate figure draped in the beautiful contrast of a bright Chocolatey sleeveless tank top and a tailored Pink tight short latex skirt. Her flawless profile reveals striking, high-arched cheekbones and her face watching in camera with an expression of serene focus, radiating the dewy freshness of her twenties and the transcendent allure of high fashion. A large, vibrant red rose is tucked into her cascading, waist-length dark blonde short hair, a vivid burst of color that softly mirrors her luminous, fair complexion and the gentle warmth of the surrounding light. Her hands, poised with natural grace, rest upon the contrasting ivory and ebony keys, suspended in a moment of quiet musical devotion. Behind this portrait of harmonious beauty, soft, dusky pink curtains fall in textured, rhythmic folds, while a lush, verdant floral arrangement blooms quietly in the lower corner, completing a seamless tapestry of visual poetry that elevates the visible world to a state of ethereal perfection.

entries.title: Victorian Animal Chess Match
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed cinematic portrait of an anthropomorphic pug and a chimpanzee sitting across from each other playing chess in a dim, old-world Victorian study. The dog is on the left, shown from the waist up, wearing a brown tweed suit jacket, white shirt, and bow tie, with a single round monocle and chain over one eye, resting one paw near the chessboard and gazing thoughtfully at the pieces. The chimpanzee is on the right, also dressed in a heavy brown tweed jacket over a shirt, leaning forward with one hand against its chin in a classic thinking pose, intensely focused on the board. Between them is an ornate carved wooden chess table with a full chess set mid-game, with exactly 32 pieces visible: 16 light wooden pieces on the left side and 16 dark wooden pieces on the right side, arranged in a believable strategic position rather than a starting layout. The room is rich with dark polished wood, leather armchairs, a warm amber table lamp on the far left, bookshelves in the background, a framed classical portrait painting centered behind them, and a small mantel clock beneath the painting. Use warm tungsten lighting, shallow depth of field, moody shadows, ultra-realistic fur and skin textures, fine wrinkles, reflective glass on the monocle, and a serious intellectual atmosphere with subtle humor. Symmetrical composition, eye-level camera, photorealistic, sharp focus on both faces and the chessboard, luxurious period details, dark brown and sepia color palette.

entries.title: Pink Office Transfer Announcement Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A glossy, feminine scrapbook-style office announcement poster inspired by a sitcom workplace promo, in a vertical 2:3 composition. The scene shows 1 central woman standing in front of a group of 7 office coworkers inside a warm beige office with venetian blinds, desks, and a visible Dunder Mifflin-style wall sign in the background. The central woman has blonde hair in a messy high bun, a light pink floral V-neck dress, folded arms, and a confident, celebratory pose. Behind her, the 7 coworkers are arranged in a loose semicircle, wearing office attire in muted blues, browns, black, and lavender. Build the image as a mixed-media collage with torn paper, taped notes, brush-lettered headlines, glitter textures, flowers, and pink-and-gold accents. At the top left, place a pink rectangular company card with a white office icon and the text "DUNDER MIFFLIN, INC" and "PAPER COMPANY". Across the upper center, place a large torn-paper headline reading "TRANSFER CONFIRMED" in expressive brush lettering, with "TRANSFER" in hot pink and "CONFIRMED" in black, plus pink underline strokes and a hand-drawn heart. At the top right, pin a small off-white note card with a pink pushpin and pink tape reading "NEW CHAPTER. NEW SCRANTON." Near the lower center, layer a bold title made of 4 stacked text strips: "PENNY" on a pink paint-stroke banner, "IS" on a small white strip with 2 tiny hearts, "JOINING" on a gold brush-stroke banner, and "THE OFFICE" on a pale pink strip. On the lower left, hang a tall pink transfer tag clipped with a gold paperclip, reading "FROM DUNDER MIFFLIN, INC PAPER COMPANY / SCRANTON, PA / EST. 1949" and below that "TO THE OFFICE / SCRANTON, PA", with a pink women-and-desk restroom-style icon at the bottom. On the lower right, place a pink note card with 3 labeled sections: "NEW ROLE" with "Sales Representative", "NEW TEAM" with "Same Paper", and "NEW MEMORIES" with "Let's make some!", each accented with small pink hearts. Along the bottom center, add a pink ribbon strip reading "DUNDER MIFFLIN, INC. WELCOMES PENNY♡". Beneath that, include 3 small icon-and-text items in one row: sparkle icon with "NEW JOB", group icon with "NEW TEAM", and heart icon with "NEW MEMORIES". At the bottom right, add large handwritten pink script saying "LET'S GO!". Decorate the corners with pink peonies, tiny white filler flowers, torn paper edges, soft glitter dust, and subtle gold foil flecks. Use a warm rosy palette with blush pink, cream, gold, and black, with polished poster compositing, soft glam lighting, and a cheerful celebratory mood.
entries.description: A scrapbook-style pink workplace announcement poster featuring a central female employee and her office team, ideal for parody promos, character edits, or celebratory transfer announcements.

entries.title: Office Transfer Announcement Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Design a dramatic square promotional poster in the style of a TV sitcom cast transfer announcement, with a dark navy and black office-themed background, gritty sports-poster energy, bold blue paint strokes, white distressed typography, and layered collage composition. At the center, place a confident woman named Penny standing from the waist up with arms crossed, wearing a light cream floral V-neck dress, messy blonde hair in a high bun, softly rim-lit with a subtle glow around her silhouette. Behind her, show exactly 8 office coworkers arranged as a blurred ensemble cast in staggered rows inside a corporate office interior with blinds, desks, and framed company signage; keep them secondary and slightly shadowed so the central woman dominates the composition. At the top left, include a tilted blue company logo block reading "DUNDER MIFFLIN INC. PAPER COMPANY" with a small office icon. Across the top center, add a huge distressed white headline "TRANSFER" and beneath it an even larger blue brush-script word "CONFIRMED". At the top right, add the small stacked slogan "NEW CHAPTER. NEW SCRANTON." On the left side, place a torn-paper transfer slip with a stamped, photocopied look; it should contain exactly 2 labeled sections, "FROM:" with "DUNDER MIFFLIN PAPER COMPANY, SCRANTON, PA, EST. 1949" and "TO:" with "THE OFFICE, SCRANTON, PA", plus a small office icon at the bottom. Add a hand-drawn blue arrow from this slip pointing toward the central woman. Across the woman's torso, place a blue paint-stroke nameplate with "Penny" in white script, followed by a small black strip with "IS", then a large stacked headline in distressed white and blue block text reading "JOINING THE OFFICE". On the right side, add a glowing dark info panel with exactly 3 labeled lines: "NEW ROLE" with "SALES REPRESENTATIVE", "NEW TEAM" with "SAME PAPER", and "NEW MEMORIES" with "LOADING...", plus a horizontal progress bar beneath. Along the bottom center, include a narrow blue banner reading "DUNDER MIFFLIN, INC. WELCOMES Penny". At the very bottom, create a footer strip with exactly 4 elements: a briefcase icon and "NEW JOB", a team icon and "NEW TEAM", a document icon and "NEW MEMORIES", and on the far right a handwritten blue script phrase "LET'S GO!". Use a high-contrast blue-white-black palette, cinematic compositing, subtle dust and texture overlays, energetic paint smears, and a premium fan-edit social media announcement aesthetic.

entries.title: Tech CEOs Awkward Meme Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A funny photorealistic meme-style candid outdoor photo of three well-known tech CEOs standing close together in an awkward, emotionally loaded triangle. On the left foreground, Sam Altman is shown in a close-up three-quarter view, with dark curly hair, light skin, a dark crewneck shirt, and an exaggerated smug, pleased, slightly teary-eyed grin as he looks toward the man on the right. In the center background, Satya Nadella stands between them, bald with glasses, medium-brown skin, wearing a dark zip-up jacket, giving a calm, knowing, faintly amused smile while looking toward the man on the right. On the right foreground, Elon Musk is seen mostly from the back and side, with short dark hair and a black leather jacket, his face largely turned away from the camera. A large hand from the left person rests on the right person's shoulder in the foreground, creating the comedic tension. entries.title: Japanese AI Creative Promo Slide
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a futuristic Japanese promotional hero graphic for an AI creative service, designed like a high-impact social media ad or presentation slide. Use a dark black-and-deep-blue cyber background with glowing circuit patterns, star-like particles, and neon light trails forming circular rings around a central editing screen. The composition is a single wide landscape layout with 6 distinct visual panels plus 1 human presenter on the right. At the top center, place a huge bold Japanese headline in distressed metallic gold and white text reading "鍵は画像" on the first line and "一瞬で伝わる" below it, with dramatic 3D depth, rough texture, and strong glow. In the center, place the largest panel: a luminous blue-framed desktop editing interface showing a vivid futuristic cityscape at sunrise, viewed from above with a river, greenery, sleek skyscrapers, warm orange sunlight, and a right-side vertical toolbar including sliders and a color wheel. Surround this centerpiece with 5 smaller glowing panels connected by curved gold arrows pointing outward from the center. Top left panel: a thumbnail example with a futuristic city image and Japanese text reading "未来を、いま創る。", smaller subtext "AI × Innovation" and "時代のソリューション", and a bright cyan label below the panel reading "サムネイル". Top right panel: a banner example with an abstract blue digital globe or network image and Japanese text reading "AIで、未来をデザインする。" with smaller subtext "テクノロジーで、社会にインパクトを。", and a cyan label below reading "バナー". Bottom left panel: a slide/document example with a business infographic style, title text "AIでビジネスを加速", three circular icon areas, an upward graph on the right, and a cyan label below reading "資料・スライド". Bottom center panel: an SNS post example showing a person standing on a mountain peak at sunrise with bold Japanese text "挑戦が、未来を変える。", small social media engagement icons and counts along the bottom bar, and a cyan label below reading "SNS画像". Bottom right panel: a flyer example with a dark blue event poster layout, title text "AI活用セミナー", smaller line "ビジネスの可能性を広げる", large date "6.15", time "10:00-17:00", a yellow circular badge reading "参加費無料", and a cyan label below reading "チラシ・パンフレット".
