entries.title: Fictional Design Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper-realistic modern magazine cover for a fictional design magazine titled FORM, shot like a premium editorial portrait in a minimalist architect's studio. The cover uses a clean, restrained European design aesthetic with lots of white space, sharp typography, and warm natural indoor lighting. At the top, place an enormous bold black sans-serif masthead spanning nearly the full width. Beneath the left side of the masthead, add small uppercase text reading "THE MAGAZINE OF DESIGN" and "APRIL 2026". The main cover line on the left reads The Last Analog Designer in large black sans-serif text stacked over multiple lines. Below it, add a smaller teaser paragraph: "In a world of algorithms and automated tools, one designer still believes in pencil, paper, and the power of thought." In the lower left, include 3 secondary cover lines in small white sans-serif text over the darker desk area: "MILAN PREVIEW" with "What to See in 2026", "MATERIAL INTELLIGENCE" with "The Next Surface Revolution", and "STUDIO VISIT" with "Inside the Practice of Space Popular". In the bottom right, add a realistic white barcode box with small price text above it reading "$8.99 US $10.99 CAN" and the issue number "04". The scene shows 1 seated middle-aged male designer at a worktable, wearing a dark navy or black knit sweater, with salt-and-pepper curly hair, leaning forward and sketching on white paper with a pencil. His face is obscured by a square blur block, creating an anonymous portrait. On the desk are exactly 8 visible object groups: scattered sketch papers with geometric chair drawings, 1 pencil cup holding several pencils, 1 rolled white blueprint on the right, 1 closed dark notebook on the left, 1 small brown eraser near the center, 1 blurred black object in the front-left foreground, 1 large flat book or material sample in the front-right foreground, and the active drawing sheet under his hand. Behind him is a warm wooden credenza with neat stacks of books, 1 white dome desk lamp on the far left, and a white wall displaying exactly 4 pinned design references: 1 small dark photo of a chair, 1 light sketch beneath it, and 2 larger minimal line drawings on the right. Use muted neutral tones, off-white walls, walnut wood, black clothing, and a calm contemplative mood. The composition should feel like a believable high-end magazine cover, straight-on and carefully art-directed, with editorial realism and no visible publisher logos other than the fictional masthead.
entries.description: This prompt generates a realistic editorial magazine cover featuring an anonymous designer in a minimalist studio, ideal for concept art, mock covers, and design-themed visual storytelling.

entries.title: AI Hanfu Poster Comparison
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark tech-comparison poster on a black background with a subtle gray square grid, showing two vertically oriented infographic images side by side for an AI image generation comparison. At the top, place two large bold yellow headings: "GPT image 2" above the left panel and "Nano Banana" above the right panel. The left panel is an elegant antique-style Hanfu reference poster on warm aged paper, with a large Chinese calligraphy title at the top reading "汉服·解构图鉴", smaller subtitle text beneath, and a full-body woman in pale traditional Hanfu standing in the center, her face intentionally blurred. Surround her with many small labeled diagram blocks, fabric swatches, embroidery closeups, accessory notes, silhouette studies, and fine Chinese annotations in a scholarly museum-poster layout. Use beige, cream, light gray-blue, and faded ink tones, giving the panel a refined archival aesthetic. The right panel is a cleaner modern infographic poster on light beige paper with a bold Chinese title across the top reading "中国传统汉服:大明朝服解构图谱". In the center, show a bright red Ming-style robe drawn as a technical exploded garment diagram with multiple callout arrows and labeled parts. Around it, include material samples, decorative pattern examples, a horizontal row of 6 circular color swatches, construction details, and a bottom strip with 4 small human figure diagrams showing wearing sequence or silhouette comparison. Make the right poster feel more graphic-design driven, with sharper contrast and more vivid red accents. At the bottom of the overall image, add a large rounded black text box with a thin white outline spanning most of the width. Attach a yellow rounded label tab on its upper-left corner containing the Chinese word "提示词" in bold black text. Inside the black box, place a dense paragraph of white Chinese text describing the test prompt for generating a Hanfu-themed decomposition chart, resembling a screenshot quote block. The whole composition should look like a social media comparison graphic, centered, cleanly aligned, high resolution, with strong contrast between the dark background and the two poster panels.

Visible foods include skewers, roast poultry, noodle dishes, clay pot dishes, rice rolls, dumplings, soups, and dessert bowls, with landmarks such as the Canton Tower and riverfront scenery integrated into the map. The right poster also has the Chinese title "广州 吃货暴走地图" and shows the same general idea but in a cleaner infographic-like map style with simplified roads, icons, floral and lychee border decorations, food callouts, a river, the Canton Tower, and approximately 12 labeled food illustrations around the map. Inside the black panel is a block of white Chinese text describing the image-generation prompt; it appears as a multi-line paragraph. The composition is centered, high contrast, and presented as a polished AI image comparison post for Chinese social media, with crisp typography, poster-like symmetry, and a clean test-benchmark aesthetic.

entries.title: Anime Shrine Maiden Dual Katana
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed anime fantasy illustration of a shrine maiden swordswoman in a dynamic low-angle action pose at a Japanese shrine during spring. She is a beautiful young woman with light brown very long flowing hair, blue eyes, a confident gentle smile, and ornate red floral hair ornaments. She holds 2 katana: one sword raised behind her head in her right hand and one sword extended forward toward the viewer in her left hand, with polished steel blades and elaborate black-and-gold hilts. Her outfit is a stylized, revealing red-and-white shrine maiden battle costume with 1 short pleated skirt, 1 cropped top with floral knot decorations, 2 oversized detached sleeves, 2 thigh-high stockings with red flower emblems, multiple red bows, white ribbons, and intricate ornamental trim. The scene is filled with motion: her hair and ribbons sweep dramatically through the air, cherry blossom petals fly around her, and glowing magical purple-pink light trails spiral around her body and swords. In the background, show 1 large red torii gate, 1 stone shrine path, dense green forest, blooming cherry blossom trees, and 1 warm lantern on the right side. Use brilliant cinematic lighting with sunbeams filtering through the trees, sparkling particles, glossy highlights, saturated colors, depth, and a polished premium gacha-game key visual aesthetic. Emphasize energetic composition, fantasy atmosphere, sharp linework, ultra-detailed costume design, and a vivid heroic shrine guardian vibe.

entries.title: Monika Anime Banner Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly polished anime banner illustration in a warm golden classroom-literature-club setting, wide cinematic composition. On the left half, a large elegant glowing script title reads Monika in oversized calligraphy, colored white and pale green with a soft neon glow, metallic highlights, decorative flourishes, hearts, sparkles, and swirling ornamental lines around it. On the right half, a beautiful anime schoolgirl inspired by Monika sits at a wooden desk, facing slightly left, with long flowing chestnut brown hair, a very large white ribbon bow, warm brown eyes, and a thoughtful, confident expression. She wears a Japanese high school uniform with exactly 4 visible clothing pieces: a brown blazer, white shirt, red ribbon tie, and brown argyle sweater vest. entries.title: Embarrassed Anime Girl on Tiny Stool
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A soft pastel anime illustration in a cute VTuber fanart style, showing a shy petite teenage girl with light brown hair in two short braids, fluffy bangs, a small ahoge, and tiny hair clips including a heart-shaped clip. She has large warm brown eyes, a deeply embarrassed expression, flushed cheeks, teary sweat drops, and a small trembling mouth. She is sitting hunched awkwardly on a tiny wooden stool in the center of a cozy streamer bedroom, knees together, hands clenched nervously in her lap, clearly self-conscious about her posture. She wears an oversized cream hoodie, a dark short skirt, black socks, and black low-top sneakers with white laces. From the left edge of the frame, only one large hand and forearm in a dark blue sleeve enters the scene, pointing at her accusingly or teasingly. Add comic-style stress symbols around the girl: 1 red scribble frustration cloud near her head, 2 wavy trembling marks near her body, and 6 blue sweat-drop marks floating around her. On the lower right, include 1 white speech bubble with Japanese text that reads "あうぅ...!姿勢...悪い?". The background is a softly lit pastel room with a cream beanbag chair on the left, a bookshelf filled with books, small figures, plush toys, and framed items, and on the right a desk with 1 monitor, 1 PC tower, and 1 microphone arm. Add wall art and character sketches behind the desk, a pink blanket draped over furniture on the far right, a pale rug on a wooden floor, and warm indoor lighting. Use a gentle pink-beige color palette, clean line art, subtle cel shading, slightly chibi proportions, and a wholesome but comedic embarrassed mood.

entries.title: Demon AI Intern Office Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic Chinese social-media poster in a warm amber office setting, featuring a stylish demon-themed female assistant character seated at a desk. The composition is a single vertical poster with dense graphic design, cinematic lighting, and a premium glossy illustration style mixing anime realism and commercial advertising. At the top, place a huge bold red Chinese headline reading 龙虾夏夏, with an elegant handwritten script overlay reading Xia Xia. Under it, add a strong black Chinese slogan: 嘴欠,但能交付. The character is centered, upper body visible behind a desk, with messy vivid red hair in a loose bun and many flyaway strands, small dark red devil horns, pale skin, black layered clothing, a lanyard ID badge, long red metallic claw gloves, and a tired but dangerous office-worker aura. Her face is intentionally obscured by a square censor block in the center. She props her cheek with one clawed hand and holds a branded black takeaway coffee cup in the other hand. Add subtle lobster-inspired details in the outfit and props, including segmented glossy red shell-like forms behind and around her chair. The desk contains exactly 7 visible items: 1 open laptop with a red lobster logo and the words "XIA XIA", 1 closed dark book stack beneath the laptop, 1 open notebook with handwritten sketches and Chinese notes, 1 black fountain pen, 1 rectangular black desk nameplate with Chinese text, 1 takeaway coffee cup with matching lobster logo, and 1 hanging employee badge card. In the left background, show a computer or presentation screen displaying a Feishu-style document interface with the Chinese title "内容创作流程" and a simple 3-step flowchart labeled exactly "场景", "流程", "资产", plus the sentence "Agent 是放大器,不是方向盘。" Add a sticky note near that screen reading "扣瑞芋". In the upper left, include a yellow annotation box with the Chinese text "黄叔雇来的毒舌但能干的AI实习生" and a playful doodled face beside it. In the right background, pin up 3 office notes: 1 clipboard-style intern profile card titled "实习生档案" with multiple bullet lines of Chinese profile text and a handwritten sign-off, 1 checklist board titled "今日待办" with 5 checkbox items and a red star on the final line, and 1 yellow sticky note reading "老板别演". Make all Chinese typography feel intentionally designed, as if for a meme ad campaign and character branding poster. At the bottom, add a bold centered Chinese footer slogan reading 不演龙虾,我就是龙虾。. Use orange sunset backlight, warm shadows, glossy reflections on the claws, a cluttered but stylish startup office atmosphere, black and burnt-orange color grading, and a humorous yet competent "sharp-tongued AI intern" vibe. Include visible branding text "XIA XIA" on the cup and laptop, and make the whole image feel like a high-end character promo poster for an assistant persona used in workplace AI marketing.

entries.title: Red Idol Concert Close-Up
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dynamic close-up concert photo of a young female J-pop idol on stage, shot from the audience perspective with a shallow depth of field. She is leaning toward the camera and reaching one hand forward in the foreground, creating dramatic foreshortening, while holding a black handheld microphone with a red accent ring in her other hand near her mouth. She wears a highly detailed red-and-white frilly idol costume: twin-tail dark brown hair with straight bangs, 2 fluffy red pom-pom hair accessories tied with ribbon bows, dangling red earrings, a red choker with lace and a small heart jewel, a cropped lace-trimmed top with 1 oversized satin bow at the chest, off-shoulder frilled sleeves, a corset-style midriff section with red ribbon lacing and small metallic charms, and a layered satin skirt with sparkling bead chains and 1 heart-shaped jeweled ornament at the waist. Her manicure is glossy red with cute white decorative nail art. The lighting is vivid pink and crimson stage lighting, with a glamorous live-idol atmosphere. The background is filled with soft bokeh, LED screens, rigging, and numerous glowing heart shapes and floating heart confetti, creating a dreamy romantic concert scene. Use a photorealistic style with crisp fabric texture, shiny satin highlights, lace detail, concert ambience, slight motion energy, and an overall red and pink palette. Include a subtle sense of excitement and fan-service stage charisma, like a promotional live-performance shot for a cute romantic idol concert.

entries.title: Anime Music Bootcamp Promo Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic Japanese anime-style promotional thumbnail poster for an event, vertical 4:5 composition, ultra-detailed, cinematic, neon-lit, high contrast, designed like a social media announcement image. The main subject is a beautiful anime girl centered slightly right, shown from the waist up, with long flowing deep blue hair blowing in the wind, decorated with small star hairpins, wearing a dark hoodie and large studio headphones around her neck, against a glowing sunset-to-night city skyline filled with sparkling lights, music-energy particles, lens flares, and flying glowing petals. Her face area is obscured by a soft rectangular blur block. Use a vivid palette of electric blue, violet, magenta, gold, and sunset orange. Fill the design with layered Japanese typography that is crisp, readable, and integrated into the art like a polished event advertisement. Include exactly 8 major text groups: top left copy reading 「始まるのは、キミと創る 音楽の物語。」 with a smaller subcopy beneath reading 「AIを使って、みんなで音楽をつくる特別な3日間。」; top right a glowing marquee sign reading 「GW連休!」 and a smaller neon box below reading 「みんなで最高の音楽をつくろう!」; center main title with small English text 「AI MUSIC BOOTCAMP 2」 above huge Japanese title text 「AI音楽 ブートキャンプ 2」; a gigantic gold metallic announcement across the middle reading 「開催決定!」; a date bar reading 「開催期間」 followed by 「5.2 SAT 土」 and 「5.4 MON 月」; a hashtag callout near the bottom reading 「参加はカンタン!! #AI音楽ブートキャンプ2 をつけて投稿するだけ!」; a lower encouragement line reading 「初心者も大歓迎! みんなで最高の音楽体験を!」; and 3 bottom feature captions with icons reading 「一緒に学ぶ 仲間とつながる」, 「AIで創る 新しい音楽体験」, and 「想いをカタチに 自分だけの1曲を」. On the left edge, add a vertical filmstrip with exactly 4 inset panels showing the same girl in music-related scenes: 1) performing on a stage before a crowd, 2) working at a music production desk with screens and equipment, 3) singing into a microphone, 4) playing an acoustic guitar. Add exactly 2 neon music-themed icon illustrations in the lower area: a tilted smartphone with a music note on the lower left and a glowing microphone with musical notes on the lower right. Make the text effects glossy, luminous, and embossed with gold and white highlights, with energetic streaks and spark explosions around the headline. The overall feeling should be inspiring, celebratory, futuristic, and emotionally uplifting, like a high-impact Japanese Golden Week music bootcamp ad for AI音楽ブートキャンプ 2.

entries.title: Anime AI Studio Girls at Sunset
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed anime-style illustration of a cozy creative studio at golden hour, showing 5 young women gathered around a cluttered wooden worktable, lit by warm sunset light through large windows, hanging pendant lamps, and string lights. The mood is stylish, intelligent, playful, and slightly chaotic, like a startup loft mixed with an artist workspace. In the left foreground, a tall woman with long wavy auburn hair wears a white daisy flower crown and a sleeveless rust-red dress with a belt; she stands closest to camera and holds up a handwritten paper sign that reads exactly: Claude is asking for your permission, with a small heart doodle. Behind and to the right of her stands a second woman with platinum-blonde twin ponytails, a black gothic mini dress, black thigh-high stockings, and large headphones around her neck; she poses confidently with one hand on her hip near an open laptop covered in stickers, prominently featuring a large X logo. In the center background stands a petite girl with very long straight black hair and a dark navy dress, reserved and quiet, positioned in front of a wide monitor displaying a glowing Gemini star logo on a dark screen. To the right of center, a glamorous woman with a short black bob and earrings leans over the desk in a fitted red floral cheongsam-style dress, looking toward the papers and laptops. On the far right, a fifth woman with messy light-brown hair in a loose bun wears an oversized open shirt over a cropped white T-shirt with the OpenAI knot logo and casual pants, leaning over the table with one hand braced on the surface and the other near a drawing tablet. The room should contain 2 laptops visible on the desk, 1 central monitor, 3 mugs, 2 sticky notes, 1 paper sign, 1 notebook page titled "Plans", and many scattered creative objects like pens, cables, books, papers, and cans. The first laptop is covered with stickers including a large X logo; the second laptop has an OpenAI logo. The desk includes a black mug with a moon-and-text design, a white mug that says "Good answer takes time.", a white cup with an orange sunburst logo, an energy-drink can, a clear plastic drink cup, a closed notebook, loose handwritten notes, and a tablet on the far right. One sticky note says "You got this" with a heart, and another says "One step at a time" with a tiny flower. The notebook page on the desk reads "Plans" and lists 3 items: "1. World peace", "2. More coffee", "3. Nap", with a small cat doodle. The environment should include bookshelves, framed prints, potted plants, warm wood textures, and wall decor with visible posters and signs, including "Anthropic", "Kindness intelligence", "DO GOOD BUILD COOL SHIT", and a neon-style sign that says "focus fuel". Use cinematic composition, rich amber and sepia tones, intricate linework, soft painterly shading, detailed fabrics and hair, subtle glow on screens, and a polished modern anime illustration aesthetic. No blur, no distortion, no extra people, and no duplicated objects.

entries.title: Barcelona Transfer Poster for Saka
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic football transfer announcement poster for Bukayo Saka joining FC Barcelona. Use a vertical 4:5 sports-poster composition with a deep electric blue and crimson red color grade, high contrast lighting, cinematic shadows, subtle glow, and premium social-media graphic design styling. Center a large chest-up portrait of the player wearing the 2024/25 FC Barcelona home shirt with Spotify sponsor, facing forward with a serious confident expression. Behind him, place a much larger low-opacity side portrait of the same player on the right side as a background layer, tinted dark blue. Add a huge faint FC Barcelona crest spanning the middle background, blended into the red-blue gradient. At the very top center, place 2 club identifiers: the FC Barcelona crest and above it a small vertical red-and-blue striped motif. On the upper left, include the text "MÉS QUE UN CLUB" in small gold uppercase letters. On the left lower-middle, create a bold typographic name stack with 2 lines: small gold uppercase first name "BUKAYO" above very large white condensed sans-serif "SAKA". Below that, add 2 welcome lines in uppercase: "BENVINGUT" in white and "AL BARÇA" in red. Add a gold handwritten-style signature reading "B. Saka" with the number "7" beneath it. In the foreground near the lower center, place a full-body action pose of the same player running forward with arms stretched wide in celebration, wearing the same Barcelona kit, navy socks, light boots, and a white wrist wrap. At the bottom, show a stylized illuminated view of Spotify Camp Nou curving across the width of the poster in dark blue with red highlights, with small visible stadium text "SPOTIFY CAMP NOU". In the bottom left corner, include 2 small lines of text: "FC BARCELONA" in gold and "2024/25" in red. Add a small gold sleeve detail on the right shoulder area. Keep the layout clean, layered, modern, and aspirational, like an elite club transfer reveal graphic. Use sharp photo-illustration compositing, realistic fabric texture, glossy highlights, and polished poster finish.

A museum-grade, high-end mural inspired by the "Crying Dragon" of Nikko Toshogu Shrine, painted on a circular dome ceiling. The composition is strictly centered, viewed from a worm's-eye perspective, creating a powerful sense of sacred architectural depth.

entries.title: Tweet Screenshot With Handwriting Match
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A realistic dark-mode social media post screenshot styled like X/Twitter on a black interface. At the top left is a small blurred circular profile photo beside the display name Pratham with a blue verification badge, and the handle @Prathkum underneath. At the top right is a rounded white Subscribe button plus two small interface icons. The tweet text in large white sans-serif type reads: ChatGPT Images 2.0 can match your handwriting. Below it is a side-by-side comparison image made of 2 notebook photos separated by a narrow black vertical gap. Both photos show an open lined notebook page shot from above under dim indoor lighting with soft shadows near the bottom edge. The left notebook page is mostly blank except for 2 handwritten lines in neat blue cursive at the top that say: match my hanawriting ana write a poem for me.. Keep the misspellings and punctuation exactly as written. The right notebook page shows the same first 2 handwritten lines at the top, followed by a handwritten poem in matching blue cursive handwriting filling the page in 4 stanzas. The poem text reads exactly: between the pages, quiet dreams, where ink becomes the stars, i write what my heart means, and let it heal the scars.

the world may move so fast, but here, time slows its pace. in every line i've made to last, i find a softer space.

some days are clouds, some days are sun, but i keep showing up. with every word, i'm not alone- my pen is my cup.

so here's to thoughts, both big and small, to hopes, to fears, to me. i'll keep on writing through it all, and set my spirit free. The handwriting should look natural, slightly uneven, and convincingly human, with blue ballpoint pen texture. At the bottom left of the post, include a small sparkle icon and the words "Made with AI". Preserve the look of a genuine mobile app screenshot with realistic spacing, rounded image corners, crisp UI typography, and subtle screen-capture softness.
entries.description: A realistic social media screenshot showing a handwriting-matching notebook comparison, useful for generating viral AI demo post mockups.

entries.title: Stacked Corridor Model Comparison
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A side-by-side comparison image presented as two stacked documentary-style photographs of the same cramped old Chinese apartment corridor, framed by a black filmstrip border with white sprocket holes on both left and right edges. The top half is labeled GPT-image-2 in large bold white sans-serif text centered near the top, and the bottom half is labeled Nano Banana 2 in the same style. Create a gritty, nostalgic, cinematic scene in a long, narrow shared hallway of a worn residential building from the late 20th century, with peeling paint, stained walls, faded propaganda posters and old newspapers on the walls, dark wooden doorways, hanging towels and laundry, a damp concrete floor, and daylight coming from a window at the far end. In the upper scene, show exactly 4 people: 1 adult standing at the left cooking over a small stove on a wooden table with visible steam, 1 adult man sitting deeper in the corridor beside an electric fan, 1 child crouching in the center playing near a basin on the wet floor, and 1 adult woman seated at a small table on the right writing or reading; include enamel mugs, metal pots, stools, buckets, thermos containers, and cluttered household items. In the lower scene, show exactly 4 people again: 1 adult woman at the left cooking at a stove with smoke rising, 1 adult man seated on the right in a bamboo chair leaning over a tabletop fan, 1 child crouching in front writing on paper on a low stool, and 1 distant adult figure near the back window; add more visible corridor clutter including a bicycle front wheel at lower left, wash basins, baskets, thermoses, shelves, shoes, and hanging clothes. Keep the camera straight-on and centered to emphasize the corridor depth, with realistic human proportions, candid slice-of-life behavior, muted aged colors, soft natural light, high detail, photojournalistic realism, and a subtle difference in arrangement between the top and bottom scenes while preserving the same overall environment and mood.

entries.prompt: A cinematic vertical poster of Sam Altman styled like a futuristic football superstar campaign image, waist-up portrait, centered, arms crossed, wearing a plain dark navy or black crewneck sweater, confident and calm posture, looking slightly off-camera. Place him inside a dramatic high-tech stadium or arena at night with bright floodlights glowing from the upper left, dark steel architecture overhead, and a cool blue sci-fi atmosphere. Add floating particles and light debris in the air for energy and motion. Surround the subject with futuristic AI interface graphics: 1 glowing wireframe cube icon on the left side, 1 luminous digital brain or neural-network globe on the right side, and multiple transparent holographic dashboard screens with charts and data panels behind him. At the bottom, add the title text THE FUTURE in very large metallic white uppercase letters, with the word "THE" smaller above the main word, and add the tagline Built with Intelligence below in smaller spaced-out sans-serif text. Include faint hexagonal HUD linework near the lower corners and a glowing horizontal light streak cutting through the title area. entries.prompt: A brightly lit Japanese television variety show set with two young female idols standing side by side behind a small white podium, framed in a medium shot from about waist-up. Both wear matching light gray school-uniform-style blazers with silver buttons, white dress shirts, gray striped ribbon ties, and coordinated name tags pinned to their left chest, with subtle lace detail visible at the waistline. The woman on the left has dark brown to black hair styled in a side braid draped over her right shoulder, hands clasped together in front of her chest, and a slightly angled body posture facing right. The woman on the right has long dark wavy hair falling over both shoulders and rests both hands lightly on the top of the podium. Their faces are obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks. The background is a colorful, dense TV studio design: on the left, a tall pink glitter panel filled with repeating white icons including hearts, triangles, snowflake-like flowers, and tree silhouettes, bordered by ornate gold trim; in the center, a vivid red-orange vertical panel with partial white lettering behind the presenters; on the right, a yellow wall with metallic geometric decorations and a large curved brown mosaic arch studded with small reflective squares. Include 3 visible on-screen text areas: a top-left show logo in Japanese reading 日向坂で会いましょう in a playful blue-and-white badge, a top-right headline banner in Japanese with two lines reading ガッツリ褒められ隊を攻略せよ!『褒め褒めストラックアウト』 in bold white and blue outlined text, and a lower-left black placard with red border containing Japanese text and a large score reading 9 pt. The left name tag reads 1 member name in Japanese, 高瀬 愛奈, and the right name tag reads 1 member name in Japanese, 小坂 菜緒. Render it as a crisp broadcast screenshot with vivid studio lighting, saturated colors, realistic fabric texture, authentic Japanese TV graphics, and a polished entertainment-program look.

entries.title: Inter Milan Transfer Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical football transfer announcement poster for Erling Haaland joining Inter Milan, designed in a dark, high-contrast black and electric-blue palette with a gritty cinematic sports-graphic style. The composition features 2 layered portraits of the same player: one oversized close-up bust in the upper center-left, turned in profile and looking upward, showing slick blond hair tied into a short bun with shaved sides; and 1 mid-body action portrait in the lower center, wearing the club's blue-and-black striped home jersey and raising one index finger upward in a victory gesture. Use a muscular athletic build, intense heroic presence, rim lighting, deep shadows, textured skin detail, and glossy hair highlights. The jersey should include a white sponsor wordmark across the chest, a small white swoosh-style logo, the round club crest, and a tricolor shield patch. Behind the player, place a huge glowing circular Inter-style emblem graphic as a backdrop. Add 3 visible club logos total: 1 small logo at the top right, 1 large fabric flag logo at the bottom left, and 1 crest on the shirt. At the bottom center, include a night view of a modern football stadium with bright floodlights, blending into painterly blue smoke and brush-stroke effects. Across the center, place the player surname in huge rough hand-painted lettering, partially obscured by the figure, plus a large handwritten-style number 9 on the right. Add 8 text elements around the design: top center small text "INTER MILAN"; upper left stacked name text with the player name and a blue "9"; left-middle slogan "NATO PER SEGNARE"; right side vertical text "I M INTER"; right-middle slogan "FORZA INTER PER SEMPRE"; lower right city text "SAN SIRO"; lower right small text "MILANO ITALIA"; bottom center small text "1908" and "LA BENEAMATA". Also add 1 white signature scribble near the upper-left portrait. The background should be a layered collage of black grunge textures, blue ink splashes, scratches, smoke, and radial light, with a premium social-media sports poster finish, hyper-detailed, sharp, energetic, and poster-ready for a football meme or fan transfer reveal.

entries.title: AC Milan Mbappé Transfer Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical football transfer-announcement poster for AC Milan featuring Kylian Mbappé as the sole star, designed like a premium sports social media graphic. The composition has 2 views of the same player: a huge back-facing upper-body portrait dominating the top-right background, showing the back of the black-and-red striped AC Milan jersey with the name across the shoulders and the large number 10, and a full-body action pose in the foreground running toward the viewer with one hand raised and index finger pointing upward. The player is a young Black male athlete with a close-cropped haircut and powerful build. He wears a modern AC Milan home kit: black and red vertical striped shirt, black shorts with the number 10, black socks, dark football boots, visible Puma logos, the AC Milan crest, and the chest sponsor text "Emirates Fly Better." Use a black, crimson, and deep red palette with intense contrast, smoky atmosphere, glowing red haze near the ground, scattered embers, faint scratches, and cinematic rim lighting. In the background place 3 major graphic elements: the red-tinted gothic Duomo di Milano cathedral silhouette on the left, a large glowing AC Milan circular crest on the right, and oversized semi-transparent numerals "10" behind the running figure. Add editorial typography integrated into the poster: at the top left put "AC MILAN" with "1899" beneath it and a small club crest, on the left center stack the first name small above a very large tall-serif last name reading "MBAPPÉ", beneath that add a red handwritten signature-style scribble, and on the upper right edge place the vertical slogan "SEMPRE SEMPRE MILAN". The style should feel like elite football poster design, transfer reveal campaign art, glossy, aggressive, modern, photorealistic with graphic-design compositing, ultra-detailed fabric texture, dramatic shadows, and a high-end Champions League promo aesthetic. --ar 9:16

entries.title: Juventus Yamal Transfer Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical football poster for Yamal in a Juventus transfer-announcement style, ultra-detailed, high-contrast, black-and-white with metallic gold accents, gritty premium sports graphic design. The composition has 2 visible portraits of the same young male footballer with dark brown skin and short tight curly hair: one large upper-body rear three-quarter portrait dominating the top half, wearing a glossy white Juventus jersey with the name YAMAL printed large across the back, head turned slightly left so one ear and partial cheek are visible; and one full-body action pose in the lower center, arms spread wide while running or celebrating, wearing the modern Juventus home kit with black-and-white vertical stripes, white shorts with the number 19, white socks, and light-colored boots with a subtle pink accent on the sole. Keep the face areas softly obscured and non-detailed. Use a dark moody background with layered architectural imagery of Turin, including 3 landmark elements: a faint domed historic building on the left mid-background, a tall tower resembling Mole Antonelliana on the lower right, and a shadowy stadium structure across the lower middle. Add 3 Juventus logos: one small white logo at the top left, one large translucent logo integrated into the upper right background, and one medium white logo at the bottom right. Add bold typography and editorial layout elements: the word YAMAL set vertically in huge white condensed sans-serif letters along the left side, small vertical gold text reading "JUVENTUS FOOTBALL CLUB" beside it, gold text on the right reading YAMAL above the large gold number "19", a gold signature scribble below, the slogan "FINO ALLA FINE" stacked in gold on the lower left, "JUVENTUS" in small white text beneath it, and small coordinate text at the bottom left reading "45.0703° N, 7.6869° E" and "TORINO, ITALIA". The jersey on the action figure should include visible sponsor and badge details: Juventus crest with 3 stars, Adidas logo, Jeep sponsor, a circular tricolor badge on the chest, and a black sleeve patch reading "azimut". Add energetic white paint streaks and brush slashes in 3 main areas: upper right, lower center near the kicking leg, and subtle scratches on the left edge. Include marble-like black texture panels, gold star accents, faint chevrons, and smoky atmosphere. Lighting should be cinematic with rim light on the player, glossy fabric highlights, sharp contrast, and a premium transfer-poster aesthetic suitable for a social media football announcement.

entries.title: Tradition and Science Colgate Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a polished square advertising image for Colgate Sensation White, split vertically into two equal halves with a glowing divider line in the center, showing a side-by-side contrast between tradition and modern science. On the left half, place an elderly African woman seated behind a pale marble tabletop in a warm, earthy interior with carved wooden wall panels and a clay pot in the background. She wears a richly patterned traditional rust-orange and gold wrap dress with layered bead necklaces and bracelets, and has short gray natural hair. She holds a natural chewing stick near her mouth in a calm, dignified pose. Curve the French headline text above her head in large warm golden-yellow letters: "Depuis toujours." On the right half, place a young African child seated behind the same tabletop in a sleek modern blue interior with soft glowing lights and vertical gold accents. The child wears a vivid traditional-modern outfit: a copper-brown tunic with bright blue patterned front panel and gold trim, with neat braided hair, and holds a Colgate toothbrush near the mouth. Curve the French headline text above the child in large bright blue letters: "Pour toujours." At the bottom center, spanning both halves and placed prominently on the marble table, show exactly 2 Colgate Sensation White toothpaste boxes stacked slightly offset, with one matching toothbrush resting on top. The packaging must be highly legible and realistic, featuring the red Colgate logo and blue-white Sensation White branding. Add a bold white French tagline centered along the bottom edge: "Le meilleur de la tradition, la force de la science". Use cinematic commercial lighting, premium product-photography realism, rich skin tones, balanced symmetry, and a visual story of heritage meeting innovation.
entries.description: This prompt generates a premium split-screen toothpaste advertisement contrasting ancestral dental care and modern brushing for brand campaigns or social media marketing.

entries.title: Split Style Artistic Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
The painting contains only one face: that of an elegant young female model with little grin. The line that runs from her hair parting to seamlessly split her face in half is designed to look like violently torn paper. The painting is perfectly, completely and forcibly divided into two parts by one flowing lines that resemble tears in the paper:
-Left side: Futuristic elegant pop art style with strategic cutie smile subtly.
-Right side: Hyper realistic beautiful natural style with smiling subtly.
-Right side: Her beautiful natural upper-body is drowned by totally beautiful marine-blue geometric halftone circles. style.

The background is futuristic dreamy. The entire screen is effectively bright and maintains natural vividness. The high resolution, fine details, and soft blur are reminiscent of an electron microscope.

entries.title: Anime Roses and Books End Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy anime end-card illustration of a relaxed young woman sitting sideways in a whimsical library of roses and books, surrounded by floating petals and open books. She has vivid purple hair in a high ponytail tied with a black scrunchie, loose bangs, small gold earrings, and a tiny gold hair clip reading "AI" near her bangs. Her face is mostly obscured by a soft rectangular blur, but the composition still treats her as the central heroine. She wears a turquoise T-shirt with large white text AITuber, an oversized pastel windbreaker in icy blue with pink paint-splatter accents, and pale denim shorts. She holds 1 red rose in her right hand and 1 dark blue hardcover book in her left hand titled Roses & Books. Pose her lounging casually with one leg extended and one bent, like a stylish anime ending-card key visual. The setting is an ornate fantasy reading nook with 2 towering stacks of books framing her on the left and right, entwined with blooming rose vines in red and pink. Include exactly 6 clearly readable book spines or covers with decorative serif titles: "Poems & Books", "Roses & Books", "Dreams", "Memories", "Letters", and "Language of Flowers". Add 1 takeaway coffee cup at the lower left with the printed phrase Read. Write. Bloom.. Place 1 open notebook with a pen in the foreground near her legs, showing a rose sketch and notes, plus 1 additional open illustrated botanical book at the lower right. In the upper area, include exactly 4 floating open books and several loose pages drifting in the air. Behind her, create a bright arched window revealing a pastel fairytale city with a cathedral-like spire against a clear sky-blue background. Fill the whole image with scattered red and pink rose petals, sparkles, soft painterly light, decorative floral details, and richly colored book covers in navy, pink, and cream. Use polished anime illustration styling, highly detailed linework, luminous pastel highlights, romantic fantasy atmosphere, balanced symmetrical framing, and the feel of a commemorative spring book-and-rose themed visual for Sant Jordi Day.
entries.description: A polished anime-style commemorative illustration of a girl surrounded by roses and books, ideal for festive key visuals, social posts, or end-card art.

entries.title: Nostalgic Chinese Family Living Room Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid early-2000s family snapshot inside a modest Chinese living room, photographed with the look of a consumer digital camera. In the foreground left, a middle-aged woman in a soft mauve knit sweater sits on a patterned carpet facing slightly toward the camera. In the midground center, a middle-aged man in dark clothes crouches in front of a wooden TV stand, adjusting a silver DVD or VCD player. In the foreground right, a small girl wearing a pink sweater and jeans kneels on the carpet playing with a colorful plastic toy vehicle. Their faces are intentionally blurred or obscured. Behind them is a bulky CRT television showing black-and-white static. The room is filled with lived-in details: a large red Chinese character poster reading "福" on the wall, a hanging wall calendar below it, 4 framed family photos around the TV area, a lace cloth draped over the television, a tall shelving unit on the right holding stacked VHS tapes, books, and media cases, and a potted plant on top of the shelf. On the left side, part of a bed or daybed with pale bedding and pillows is visible. Add a bold red overlay in the top-left corner that says "AI生成". Add an orange camcorder-style date stamp in the bottom-right corner reading "2003. 12. 28". Natural indoor daylight, slightly muted colors, documentary realism, nostalgic domestic atmosphere, cluttered but warm home interior, imperfect composition, authentic snapshot aesthetic, 4:3 aspect ratio.

entries.title: Viral Tweet Menu Before-and-After
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic dark-mode social media screenshot styled like an X/Twitter post on a black interface. At the top left is a profile avatar, the display name Deedy with a blue verification badge, and the handle @deedydas. On the top right is a large white Subscribe button and small interface icons. The post text reads Bring real menus to life with pictures of the food. Below the caption is a side-by-side comparison image of 2 menu pages placed on a warm wooden tabletop. The left page is a minimalist fine-dining menu on white paper with sparse elegant typography, the restaurant name Nari in teal handwritten script near the top right, small section headings for first course and second course, and a short list of dish names with prices in a clean editorial layout. The bottom left of the page says "Thai. Inspired." in loose script, and a small boxed chef's pick note appears at the lower right. The right page is a transformed illustrated menu version of the same restaurant, keeping the same restaurant name in teal script at the top and the subtitle "Thai Inspired. Bold flavors. entries.title: Chinese Calligraphy Dark Fantasy Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark, cinematic Chinese ink-wash fantasy illustration centered on the large black calligraphy character "安" painted in bold expressive brushstrokes across a glowing full moon-like white disc in the background. In the lower center-right foreground, show 1 lone East Asian warrior-scholar figure in side profile facing left, with a loose messy topknot, stray windswept hair strands, and a long shredded black robe dissolving into smoke and ink. The figure feels solemn, ghostly, and dramatic, standing amid stormy mist and swirling black watercolor clouds. The palette is nearly monochrome charcoal, black, ash gray, and cold white, with very sparse deep crimson accents. Include 4 visible pagoda structures: 2 small distant pagodas on the right side, 1 pagoda reflected inside a large broken mirror shard at bottom left, and 1 taller pagoda near the upper right emerging from fog. Surround the composition with 5 prominent shattered glass or mirror fragments: 1 large triangular shard at bottom left, 1 tall shard near the upper center, 1 large vertical shard at upper right, 1 small hanging shard below it, and 1 large curved shard at bottom right, plus a few tiny splinters. In 1 shard near the left side, include the partial reflection of a human face. Add 1 red seal stamp with Chinese characters near the left side beneath the large calligraphy. Use splattered ink textures, torn paper-like edges, dripping red marks, and layered smoke to create an eerie wuxia-horror atmosphere. High contrast lighting, painterly mixed-media style, textured brushwork, poster-like composition, ultra-detailed, moody, mystical, and elegant.

entries.title: Surreal Neon Japanese Megacity Overlook
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper-detailed ultra-high-resolution vertical illustration of a surreal Japanese futuristic megacity at night, viewed from a very high, steep downward angle through a cramped canyon of buildings, as if standing on a dark hillside alley or rooftop overlook. Keep the composition 9:16 and dramatic, with a deep plunging perspective into an immense glowing urban basin packed with tightly layered low rooftops, narrow streets, elevated walkways, and towering skyscrapers fading into the distance. Frame the scene with dense foreground architecture on both sides: on the upper left, a large glowing red paper lantern sign with bold black Japanese characters hanging from an old wooden eave; on the right, a tall building facade with many lit windows and several vertical neon signs; across the image, tangled overhead utility wires and poles cut through the view. The city below should feel overcrowded yet mesmerizing, blending retro Showa-era alleyway aesthetics with cyberpunk futurism. Use a rich, graphic painterly style with strong black inky linework, bold cel-shaded shapes, and luminous neon accents, preserving a Midjourney-like cinematic beauty while adding much finer environmental detail. Dominant colors are blazing orange and amber window light, saturated crimson and scarlet signage, deep violet night sky, hot magenta highlights, and electric cyan accents. Populate the lower city with countless tiny readable micro-scenes implied through silhouettes and lit windows: festival processions in the streets, nightlife crowds, exhausted salary workers, hidden gang figures in side alleys, dancers in entertainment lanes, students studying in apartment windows, arguing couples, gamers at glowing screens, and many other small human stories embedded throughout the architecture. Emphasize the contrast between urban splendor and emotional isolation, overcrowded boredom and decadent beauty, with a satirical undertone about meaningless modern life. The image must remain aesthetically harmonious despite the density, with crisp small details visible everywhere, glowing signage in Japanese, layered depth, atmospheric haze, and a surreal, slightly oppressive but beautiful mood.

entries.prompt: A Japanese listing-ad style landing page hero banner for a fictional law office and tax accountant office, designed like a bold web advertisement with four equal vertical panels across the top and a strong call-to-action area across the bottom. The top row contains exactly 4 service panels, each with a colored header bar, a photo-realistic stock-photo image, and a colored caption bar at the bottom. Panel 1 is red and labeled 「刑事事件」 at the top, showing a close-up of two hands gripping dark prison bars against a black background; the bottom red caption reads 「逮捕・訴訟に即対応!」 in large bold white Japanese text. Panel 2 is blue and labeled 「交通事故」 at the top, showing a realistic rear-end car crash with two damaged dark-colored sedans on a city street in daylight; the bottom blue caption reads 「慰謝料・示談もお任せ!」 in large bold white Japanese text. Panel 3 is green and labeled 「相続税」 at the top, showing an elderly couple seated at a table consulting with a suited professional, with papers and a small house model visible; the bottom green caption reads 「税相続対策をしっかりサポート!」 in large bold white Japanese text. Panel 4 is orange and labeled 「離婚問題」 at the top, showing a distressed woman sitting indoors with her head resting on one hand; the bottom orange caption reads 「慰謝料・親権の悩みを解決!」 in large bold white Japanese text. Make the four panels touch edge-to-edge with clean white dividers, each panel occupying the same width, and use highly saturated primary colors with glossy ad-design styling. Beneath the four panels, create a cream or light beige background footer area. On the left side, place a smaller black subheadline in Japanese: 「法律相談・税務相談なら」. Centered below it, place the large main office name in metallic gold gradient bold Japanese lettering with a slight bevel effect: 「〇〇法律事務所・税理士事務所」. Add thin black horizontal divider lines above and below the main office name. On the lower right, place a large glossy red rounded rectangular button with a bright gradient and white bold Japanese text reading 「無料相談受付中!」. The overall style should feel like a Japanese legal and tax services LP main visual from a listing ad: corporate, urgent, trustworthy, commercial, photo-based, clean grid layout, bold typography, high contrast, and realistic brochure-quality compositing.

entries.title: Chibi Catgirl at Yokohama Stadium
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cute anime chibi girl walking toward the camera on the tree-lined pedestrian approach outside YOKOHAMA STADIUM, shown in a realistic modern Japanese city photo background under bright midday sunlight with a blue sky peeking through the trees. The stadium fills the upper background with its large white structural beams and a dark blue sign reading YOKOHAMA STADIUM. On the right side, there are 2 tall blue vertical banners on lampposts with a stylized B logo and welcome text for Yokohama Stadium, plus 2 smaller matching blue banners farther down the walkway. The paved plaza is wide and open, with 2 short black bollards visible in the foreground-left area, green hedges and mature trees along both sides, and small pedestrians scattered in the distance for scale. In the center foreground, place 1 super-deformed catgirl character composited naturally into the scene: petite chibi proportions, oversized head, soft anime shading, pale skin, long slightly tousled dark hair with bangs, fluffy cat ears, and a small black cat tail. She wears an oversized forest green hoodie that falls like a short dress, black low-cut shoes, and 1 small black crossbody bag with a flap and tiny charm hanging from it. She is holding 1 wrapped burger or sandwich with both hands near her mouth as if eating while walking. Her pose is slightly pigeon-toed and casual, one leg crossing in front of the other, giving a shy adorable feeling. Use a whimsical contrast between highly realistic street photography and a polished anime sticker-like character with clean outlines and subtle shadowing on the pavement. Keep the face centered but obscured by a large square mosaic blur censor block.
entries.description: This prompt generates a realistic stadium walkway scene with a composited anime chibi catgirl, ideal for playful location-based character art or social media visuals.

entries.title: Vintage Diner Menu Board Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, replace the train interior scene with a straight-on, documentary-style photograph of a classic American diner counter wall. Remove the person, window reflection, thermos, and book entirely. Keep the image photorealistic and naturally lit, with warm tungsten bulbs across the top and wood-paneled walls. Add a large black letter-board menu with white block letters as the main subject, framed in metal above an open kitchen pass. Include 6 menu sections with these exact headings and items: BREAKFAST with 5 items (TWO EGGS TOAST 4.95, BACON & EGGS 6.50, HAM & EGGS 6.75, OMELET 7.25, BISCUITS & GRAVY 5.50); GRIDDLE with 4 items (SHORT STACK 4.25, PANCAKES 5.25, FRENCH TOAST 5.75, WAFFLE 5.95); SANDWICHES with 5 items (BLT 5.50, TUNA MELT 6.25, GRILLED CHEESE 4.50, CLUB SANDWICH 7.50, HAMBURGER 6.00); SIDES with 5 items (HASH BROWNS 2.50, BACON 2.95, SAUSAGE 2.95, TOAST 1.50, PIE 3.25); DRINKS with 5 items (COFFEE 1.25, TEA 1.25, MILK 1.50, ORANGE JUICE 1.75, SODA 1.50); and a DAILY SPECIAL line reading CHICKEN FRIED STEAK 8.25. Below the menu, show a stainless service opening and countertop with diner details including 2 condiment bottles, 1 napkin dispenser, and 1 shaker in the foreground. Wide horizontal composition, centered, realistic textures, slightly nostalgic roadside-diner mood.

entries.title: Kawaii Bunny Garden Neon Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy kawaii 3D render in a lush flower garden at night, filled with glowing pink neon graphics and soft sparkles. In the center, a small doll-like girl is shown from behind, with long silky blonde hair and a white bow headband, wearing a pastel blue pinafore dress over a pink puff-sleeve blouse with white trim. She gently reaches up to touch the mouth of a large white rabbit character standing in front of her. The rabbit has oversized upright ears, glossy black eyes, rosy cheeks, and a cute plush-like face, and wears a light blue uniform-style jacket with a tiny gold badge over a white body. Surround them with dense greenery, daisies, and abundant pink blossoms in the foreground and background. Across the top, place large glowing Korean neon text reading 가특하구나~ in bright pink bubble lettering with a soft halo. Include exactly 7 additional neon or UI-style decorative elements: 1 heart-shaped sign at the upper left with the word CUTE, 1 neon star sign on a white cabinet at the upper right, 1 glowing heart outline near the rabbit on the right, 1 retro pink computer-style floating window on the left with tiny toolbar details and a central heart graphic containing the text you're so precious, 1 large glowing heart outline at the bottom left, 1 pink handheld virtual pet device at the bottom right showing a tiny bunny sprite, and 1 small glowing crystal heart near the device. Add soft bloom, glossy highlights, magical glitter particles, pink rim lighting, shallow depth of field, toy-photography styling, and a nostalgic cute internet aesthetic with pastel pink and blue as the dominant palette.

entries.title: Satirical Expensive Supplements Cartoon
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean, square editorial cartoon in flat vector style with soft shading and bold outlines, on a light gray background. The scene is a satirical medical office consultation about overpriced supplements that do not work. At the top left, a huge three-line Spanish headline in bold sans-serif reads: "Suplementos" in dark teal, "costosos" in orange, and "que no funcionan" in dark teal, with a small orange sparkle accent and an orange underline swoosh beneath the headline. At the top right, add a social handle and website in dark teal: "@elnutridice" and "elnutridice.com". Along the far left edge, place a vertical orange credit line that reads "Imagen creada en: ia.elnutridice.com". In the foreground, show a wooden desk covered with large stacks of green cash, with many loose bills flying through the air around the characters. On the right, a smug male doctor in a white lab coat over teal scrubs sits behind the desk, holding a thick stack of money in one hand and gesturing casually with the other. His face is deliberately blurred or censored with a rectangular blur block. On his coat, a badge or patch reads "SALUD Y COMISIONES". In front of him on the desk is a dark teal nameplate with a dollar symbol and the Spanish text "TU SALUD, MI NEGOCIO". Behind him on the wall, include a framed certificate that reads "CERTIFICADO DE COMISIONES", plus a small shelf with 3 visible items: 2 teal binders and 1 small potted plant. On the left, a female patient with long dark brown hair and a teal long-sleeve shirt sits facing the doctor, one hand raised in frustration. Her face is also blurred or censored with a rectangular blur block. Add a speech bubble above her saying: "Doc, ese suplemento carísimo que me mandó no me sirvió para nada." Add a speech bubble above the doctor saying: "A mí sí me sirvió." On the lower left corner of the desk, place a supplement bottle labeled "SUPLEMENTO PREMIUM" with an orange price mark "$$$$". Next to it, place a clipboard with a prescription sheet showing a large "Rx" and the text "SUPLEMENTO PREMIUM". Also include 2 small potted plants total in the image: 1 on the floor or lower left beside the desk and 1 on the rear shelf. Use a humorous, critical, social-media infographic tone, balanced composition, crisp typography, high readability, and polished modern vector illustration aesthetics.
entries.description: This prompt generates a square Spanish-language editorial cartoon mocking commission-driven doctors and overpriced ineffective supplements for social media posts or health-awareness content.

entries.title: Dragon Queen at Burning Sunset
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic dark fantasy portrait of a silver-haired dragon queen standing in the foreground on blackened volcanic rubble, with an enormous black dragon looming protectively behind her. The woman wears an intricate floor-length black gown with armored detailing on the bodice and shoulders, long fitted sleeves, a high structured collar, and a heavy dark cape trailing to the right. Her hair is platinum silver, extremely long, loose, and wavy, glowing softly in the firelight. Her face is intentionally obscured and indistinct, with no clear facial features. The dragon fills most of the background, with 2 large outstretched wings framing the scene, dense charcoal scales, many sharp horns and facial spikes, glowing amber eyes, and a massive curved neck arcing above the woman. Set in a ruined medieval city with burned stone towers and crumbling structures on both sides, active fires on the ground, drifting embers, smoke, and a blazing orange sunset sky with stormy clouds. Low-angle heroic composition, epic scale contrast between human and beast, ultra-detailed textures, photorealistic fantasy realism, dramatic rim lighting, fiery orange and black color palette, moody atmosphere, sharp focus on the queen and dragon, blockbuster poster aesthetic. Add the text Pollo.ai in clean white sans-serif near the upper right.

entries.title: Boca Juniors Welcome Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical football transfer announcement poster in Boca Juniors colors, designed like a polished social media graphic. Show a half-body portrait of Paulo Dybala wearing the modern Boca Juniors home jersey, dark royal blue with a wide gold chest band, gold shoulder stripes, Adidas logo on the right chest, CABJ crest on the left chest, and "betsson" sponsor across the yellow band. The player is centered slightly to the right, cropped from upper torso to top of head, with short dark hair and athletic build, turning his head slightly to his left while pointing with his right index finger directly at the club crest on his chest. Do not show facial details clearly; keep the face obscured or out of focus. Use a deep blue textured stadium-themed background with glowing highlights and subtle grunge overlays. In the lower left background, include La Bombonera stadium facade with visible signage reading "LA BOMBONERA" and "CLUB ATLÉTICO BOCA JUNIORS." Add small floating gold confetti particles throughout the scene for celebratory energy. Place a large CABJ shield logo in the upper right. Typography must be bold and poster-like: at the top left in small gold uppercase text, "BIENVENIDO A LA BOMBONERA"; below it a small gold star; then a huge stacked headline on the left with "BIENVENIDO" in tall white condensed uppercase and "DYBALA" in oversized gold condensed uppercase. Below the name, add smaller white uppercase text reading "PAULO DYBALA," flanked by thin gold lines and a small gold star. At the bottom, place a thin gold horizontal line across the width and centered gold uppercase text reading "| JUGADOR DE BOCA |" with a gold star beneath it. Use high contrast, glossy sports-poster lighting, rich navy and gold color grading, sharp fabric detail, and an elite club announcement aesthetic.

entries.prompt: A cinematic low-angle photo of a medium-sized tan dog sitting proudly on a patterned tile floor inside a rustic old bar, wearing an oversized brown leather cangaceiro-style hat decorated with multiple metal star emblems and stitched details. The dog is centered in the frame, looking slightly upward with a calm, noble, almost heroic expression. Behind the dog is a long dark wooden bar counter on the right and a wall densely lined with many glass liquor bottles and hanging glasses, creating a cluttered authentic tavern atmosphere. On the left side, show a small wooden table, 2 wooden chairs, a dark doorway, worn walls, exposed beams, and 2 visible bare hanging light bulbs. Use warm amber indoor lighting, rich brown and golden tones, realistic textures, shallow depth of field, documentary-style realism, sharp focus on the dog, softly blurred background, wide cinematic composition, and a humorous but dignified mood. The image should feel like a Brazilian countryside bar portrait of a dog dressed like a regional folk hero.

entries.title: Anime Schoolgirl on the Moon
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed anime illustration of a teenage schoolgirl sitting on a rocky lunar surface in outer space, viewed from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle. She has very long flowing silver-white hair with two round odango buns on top and loose strands streaming dramatically to the right as if in low gravity or solar wind. Her face is obscured by a plain rectangular censor block in a muted beige-gray color, centered over the entire face. She wears a Japanese-style school uniform: a white long-sleeve blouse, a dark navy sleeveless sweater vest, a small green ribbon bow at the collar, a gray pleated skirt, white knee socks, and brown loafers. She is seated on the edge of a moon rock with one hand braced behind her and the other resting near her side, legs angled forward in a relaxed pose. The background is a deep star-filled black sky with the planet Earth glowing in the upper right, showing the Asia-Pacific region, with a soft sunbeam entering diagonally from the top right. The moon terrain is bright gray and heavily textured with craters and jagged rocks. Include exactly 3 pieces of lunar equipment: 2 metallic boxy panels or instrument cases on the left side of the foreground and midground, and 1 small rover or antenna-like device on the lower right. Lighting is cinematic and cool, with bright rim light on the hair and soft highlights on the uniform and legs. Render in polished modern anime key visual style, ultra-clean linework, luminous hair strands, subtle depth, and a wistful sci-fi mood.

entries.title: Dual Exposure Sports Graphic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
[PERSON NAME]. 
Act as a high-end sports graphic designer creating a conceptual tribute poster. The style is a complex "dual exposure photo-grid composite" with mixed-media textures.
CENTRAL STRUCTURE (THE VESSEL):
The central focus is a large-scale, high-contrast black and white portrait silhouette of [PERSON NAME]. This main portrait acts as the container.
THE GRID FILL & TEXTURES (MIXED MEDIA):
The interior of the silhouette is populated by a dense "photo mosaic grid" of action shots from the person's career.
CRITICAL TEXTURE INSTRUCTION: Do not just paste flat photos. Apply artistic textures to various grid cells to create a tactile, collage feel. Use effects like:
Halftone Dots: Comic-book style raster patterns on some cells.
Fabric/Embroidery: Subtle thread or canvas textures suggesting a jersey or patch.
Film Grain: Heavy noise on specific high-contrast action shots.
COLOR STRATEGY:
The base is Monochrome B&W. Use selective color overlays (relevant to the team/flag) ONLY on specific grid cells to create a rhythm.
TYPOGRAPHY & BRANDING (STRICT MICRO-SCALING):
Top Left (The Name): Write "[PERSON NAME]" strictly using the font Inter Semibold.
Kerning: Tight negative kerning (-4%).
Size: SMALL and discreet. It must occupy MAXIMUM 20% of the canvas width. Do NOT make it large or loud.
Top Right (The Symbol): Place the primary logo (Team/Brand/Flag).
Size: VERY SMALL. It must occupy MAXIMUM 10% of the canvas width.
COMPOSITION & BACKGROUND:
Background: Off-white or light grey with a visible high-quality paper or concrete texture. It should not be flat digital white.
Alignment: Center the figure perfectly. Maintain wide negative space around the object.
entries.description: A sophisticated prompt for creating a mixed-media sports tribute poster using silhouette containers, photo-mosaic grids, and tactile textures like halftone dots and film grain.

entries.title: Influencer Holding Floating Profile Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean lifestyle portrait for a social-media cover image: a stylish young East Asian woman with long wavy black hair sits on a light beige sofa in a bright pastel living room, wearing a light blue and white tweed jacket and matching skirt with pearl buttons over a white top. She holds both hands up in a presentation pose, palms flat and facing upward, as if supporting a floating rectangular profile card. The card is a large white creator-profile panel positioned above her hands on the left side of the frame, with 1 circular black-and-white avatar portrait, 1 bold display name reading Dan Koe, 1 handle line reading @DanKoeTalks, 1 stats line in Chinese showing subscriber and video counts, 1 short bio sentence reading If you want harsh truths, read my letters... 更多, 1 website link line reading letters.thedankoe.com followed by Chinese text indicating one more link, and 1 dark rounded subscribe button labeled 订阅. The woman faces the camera with a polished influencer aesthetic, her expression neutral and friendly. The composition is vertical, centered on her seated pose, with the profile card clearly legible and visually balanced over her hands. The background is softly blurred and elegant, with pale blue walls, geometric wall decor, a shelf with small plants, and soft natural daylight. High-end photography style, bright airy tones, Xiaohongshu cover design, minimal, premium, realistic skin and fabric texture, shallow depth of field.

entries.title: Pug Running on Alpine Trail
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bright, high-resolution outdoor action photograph of a small pug running toward the camera on a narrow rocky hiking trail through an alpine meadow. The dog is centered slightly low in the frame, mid-stride with one front paw lifted, mouth open, tongue out, ears perked, and an excited expression, wearing a navy blue chest harness. The trail curves gently back into rolling green hills and is bordered on both sides by dense wildflowers and grasses, including visible clusters of blue, purple, yellow, white, and pink blooms. In the distance, place 3 tiny hikers on the trail for scale. The background features a dramatic panoramic mountain range with 4 prominent snow-capped peaks, rugged rocky faces, and patches of glacier under a clear vivid blue summer sky with a few thin wispy clouds. Use crisp natural daylight, vibrant but realistic colors, deep depth and clarity from foreground flowers to distant mountains, eye-level low-angle perspective, documentary travel photography style, sharp focus on the running dog, and a joyful adventurous hiking mood.
entries.description: This prompt generates a vibrant travel-style action photo of a happy pug running along a flower-lined mountain hiking path, ideal for adventure, pet, and nature campaign visuals.

entries.title: Summer McCafé Mountain Road Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a premium vertical fast-food lifestyle advertisement in a polished commercial photography style, designed like a summer campaign poster for McDonald's and McCafé. Show a glamorous young woman with softly blurred, unidentifiable facial features sitting confidently on the hood of a sleek red sports car parked on a winding mountain road at golden hour. She has long wavy auburn hair glowing in warm sunset backlight, wears a dark green satin bomber jacket with gold detailing, a white camisole, high-waisted burgundy pants, and black ankle boots with heels. Her pose is relaxed and stylish, one leg bent and one extended forward, while she holds out a clear plastic cup of iced coffee with a straw and visible McDonald's golden arches branding toward the camera. Scatter red roses across the car hood around her, and place 1 McDonald's paper takeout bag on the right side of the hood. Use a dramatic canyon or hillside background with warm sunlight, soft haze, cinematic depth of field, and a luxurious aspirational road-trip mood. Include floating red flower petals in the air. Compose the layout as a high-end ad with the model centered slightly right and large promotional typography on the left. Add exactly 3 large headline lines in the upper left: "SIP.", "SAVOR.", and "SUMMER." with the first 2 in bold white and the third in bold golden yellow. Below that, add the subheadline: "Refresh your drive with McCafé." with "McCafé" highlighted in yellow. Add exactly 3 circular feature icons stacked vertically on the left with short captions: "PREMIUM McCAFÉ ICED COFFEE", "WORLD FAMOUS FRIES", and "QUALITY YOU CAN TASTE". Place the McDonald's golden arches logo with the text "i'm lovin' it" in the top right. Add a small lower-left tagline reading "Good days start here." with "start here." in yellow. Create a bold yellow bottom banner spanning the width, divided into 3 content areas: left area reads "SUMMER SAVINGS" and "ENJOY EXCLUSIVE OFFERS"; center area includes a McDonald's app icon and the text "DOWNLOAD THE APP FOR DEALS NEAR YOU"; right area reads "FOLLOW US @MCDONALDS" with social icons. Use brand-accurate red and yellow accents, glossy product styling, realistic lighting, sharp editorial retouching, shallow depth of field, luxury commercial ad composition, and mobile-first poster proportions.
entries.description: A polished vertical fast-food campaign image showing a stylish woman on a red sports car holding iced coffee, ideal for recreating premium summer mobile ads for restaurants or beverage brands.

entries.title: Photographed MIDI Piano Score Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A top-down realistic photograph of a single white sheet of printer paper placed on a light wood desk, showing a computer-generated music score. The page is centered horizontally with slight perspective and soft natural indoor lighting, minimal shadows, and a clean document-print look. At the top center, print the title "kura.mid - CH05 Piano" in a plain sans-serif font. Below it is a piano staff system rendered in standard black music notation with a treble clef and 4/4 time signature, designed to look like an automatically converted MIDI excerpt rather than carefully engraved sheet music. On the far left of the first system, include the instrument label "CH05 Piano". Show exactly 5 horizontal systems of notation on the page, beginning with measure numbers 18, 21, 25, 29, and 33 at the left edges of the systems. Near the first system, include a tempo marking with a quarter-note symbol equals 120. Fill the staves with dense, slightly awkward but plausible black notes, accidentals, stems, slurs, and rests, with many sharp signs and repeated short-note figures in the upper register, visually resembling piano transcription from MIDI. The first 3 systems should be long and nearly full width; the 4th system should also be long; the 5th system should be short, occupying only the left portion of the page. Keep the notation legible but somewhat mechanically spaced. Use a clean white page with wide margins and no handwritten marks, no colored elements, no extra graphics, just the printed score sheet photographed on a desk.
entries.description: This generates a realistic overhead photo of a printed piano sheet-music page converted from a MIDI file, useful for mockups, music-tech visuals, or document-style illustrations.

entries.title: Dreamlike Shanshui Woman Silhouette
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamlike vertical Chinese ink-and-wash fantasy illustration of a woman's side-profile silhouette merged with a vast shanshui landscape, with the facial area obscured by a plain soft-edged rectangular block in warm taupe beige. Her long flowing dark hair turns into swirling brushstroke ribbons, mountain ridges, mist, and clouds, filling the upper left with elegant motion. Inside the silhouette, create a layered classical Chinese landscape with towering blue-green mountains, drifting fog, cascading waterfalls, 4 traditional pagodas nestled among cliffs, 1 arched stone bridge crossing a narrow river, 1 tiny boat with a lone figure beneath the bridge, and stylized pine trees scattered across the peaks. Add 5 white cranes in flight across the upper half of the image and several small drifting petals. Place pink cherry blossom branches in 4 distinct clusters: one woven into the upper-left hair mass, one blooming near the bridge, one large cluster rising from the lower left, and one sparse flowering branch near the upper right. Use a warm sunrise glow from the upper right with a pale golden sun disk, luminous mist, parchment-textured negative space, and a refined palette of teal, indigo, ivory, blush pink, and soft gold. The composition should feel ethereal, poetic, elegant, and highly detailed, blending feminine portrait silhouette art with ancient Chinese landscape painting. Add vertical calligraphy on the lower right reading 山水如梦 with 2 red seal stamps beneath it. Ultra-detailed, painterly, airy atmosphere, delicate linework, watercolor and ink textures, cinematic depth, premium wall-art aesthetic.

entries.title: Cyber Streetwear Manga Splash Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dynamic manga-style action illustration of a single androgynous young woman shot from a dramatic low angle, as if the viewer is beneath her while she drops or steps forward through an explosive burst of ink and debris. She has a short platinum-blonde bob haircut with long side-swept bangs partly covering one side of her face, pale skin, and a cool, rebellious streetwear aesthetic. Her face is obscured by a simple light-gray rectangular censor block. She wears 5 main clothing items: an oversized black hooded jacket with bright cyan geometric markings on the sleeve and inner lining, a fitted white tank top, loose black cargo-style pants with straps and zipper details, a black belt with a hanging cyan tag, and chunky white-and-black sneakers with small cyan accents. Add extra accessory details including dangling straps, buckles, and street-tech trims. Her pose is relaxed but dominant, one knee raised toward the viewer, torso leaning back slightly, one hand tucked into a pocket, jacket flaring outward in motion. The composition should feel aggressive and kinetic, with a monochrome palette of black, white, and gray, punctuated by vivid electric cyan paint slashes. Fill the background with explosive abstract brushwork, ink splatter, speed lines, torn black shards, and chaotic manga energy radiating outward from behind her. High contrast, gritty texture, rough inked linework, painterly splashes, urban dystopian anime key visual, extremely detailed fabric folds, stylish editorial framing, wide cinematic composition.

entries.title: Anime Pop-Art Protest Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bold anime pop-art poster of a tall white-haired male sorcerer in a dark navy high-collar coat, shown from the waist up, facing forward in a confident pose with his left hand raised close to the camera making a peace sign. His face is partially obscured by a rectangular blur/censor block centered over the eyes and nose area, while his spiky silver-white hair fans outward dramatically above a dark blindfold or visor. Place a huge comic speech bubble across the top with the exact text LUDDITES ALWAYS LOSE! in heavy black all-caps sans-serif lettering. Use a vivid blue background filled with dense red and orange radial speed lines exploding outward from behind the character, creating a dynamic manga cover feel. Emphasize thick ink outlines, cel-shaded anime rendering, posterized contrast, and a slightly warped vintage-comic print look. The composition should be vertical, tightly cropped, high energy, rebellious, graphic, and meme-like, with the silver white hair, dark navy coat, and bright blue with red-orange radial lines dominating the palette.
