entries.title: Anime Pop Sphynx Cat Outing Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vibrant anime-pop poster style selfie illustration of a young person carrying a Sphynx cat in a black front pet sling while holding a tan leash high in one hand. The person has short messy black hair, round glasses, and wears a black hoodie or dark oversized jacket; the face is intentionally obscured by a centered square blur block. The cat is the clear focal point in the lower center, a hairless pale pink Sphynx with very large ears, bright blue eyes, detailed skin folds, and a cozy brown knitted sweater with a collar. Use a dynamic upward selfie angle, with the raised fist and looping leash occupying the upper right. The background is a dense, celebratory amusement-park or festival scene rendered in explosive saturated colors, with electric blue dominating, plus confetti, paint splashes, stars, comic-style stickers, and playful signage. Include exactly 1 large Chinese headline at the top reading 带皮子出去玩 in oversized chunky bubble lettering with thick white outline and multicolor fill, exactly 1 pink paw-print icon near the headline, exactly 2 yellow exclamation marks near the raised hand, exactly 1 speech-bubble sticker on the left reading GO!, exactly 1 speech-bubble sticker on the right reading YEAH, exactly 1 paw-print speech bubble near the lower left, and exactly 2 pink heart icons near the cat. Make the composition feel energetic, cute, and chaotic, with bold cel-shaded outlines, glossy highlights, textured brush strokes, posterized lighting, high contrast, and a richly detailed neon comic aesthetic.

entries.title: Dust-Drawn Symbol on Car Hood
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic close-up of the hood of a dark blue or black car parked outdoors, covered in a thick layer of beige-brown dust and pollen. In the center of the hood, a large clean emblem-like shape has been finger-drawn through the dust, revealing the glossy paint underneath. The symbol is a circular logo with 8 segmented bars around a raised circular center: 1 wide curved segment across the top, 3 horizontal bar segments on the left side, 3 horizontal bar segments on the right side, and 1 wide angled segment across the bottom. A realistic adult human hand with dirty fingernails rests on the lower right area of the hood, as if it has just finished drawing the symbol. Show streaks, smudges, and finger-trace texture in the dust around the edges of the design. entries.title: Musk Writing Chinese Calligraphy
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic editorial-style photograph of Elon Musk standing at a scholar's writing desk in a traditional Chinese study, leaning forward and writing Chinese calligraphy with a brush on a long horizontal white scroll. He wears a dark navy blazer over a black shirt, with a wristwatch visible, and his expression is focused and serious. The room is warm and elegant, with wooden bookshelves filled with books in the background, several rolled scrolls standing upright near the shelf, a carved wooden chair, a traditional lattice window on the left letting in soft natural daylight, and a hanging ink landscape painting on the wall. On the desk are 4 distinct calligraphy tools and materials: 1 rectangular black ink stone with ink, 1 brush rest area, 1 long wooden paperweight, and 1 large sheet or scroll of paper covered with bold black Chinese characters from the poem 《满江红》. The composition is a medium full-body indoor shot from the front-left angle, with the brush touching the paper, shallow depth of field, rich wood tones, subtle cinematic contrast, documentary realism, high detail, authentic Chinese literati atmosphere, and carefully rendered ink brush lettering.
entries.description: A realistic cultural portrait of a well-known figure practicing Chinese brush calligraphy in a traditional study, suitable for editorial, social media, or concept-image generation.

entries.title: Polaroid of Japanese Class Graduation Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic instant film Polaroid photo lying flat on a light wooden tabletop, photographed from directly above. The instant print has a thick white border with a wider bottom margin and slight natural wear, with the photo area showing an indoor Japanese high school classroom group portrait. Inside the photo, about 35 graduating students in dark school uniforms are gathered in 4 loose rows in front of a green chalkboard, posing casually and tightly packed together. Most are teenage boys in black gakuran-style jackets or dark blazers with white shirts and ties, and several teenage girls wear dark blazers with blue plaid skirts. One girl near the front left stands out in a white cardigan and blue plaid skirt. Many students hold up peace signs, some crouch in front, and a few sit or recline on the wooden floor in the front row. Faces are intentionally obscured with soft square mosaic blurs, but the overall feeling is candid, nostalgic, and celebratory. On the chalkboard, hand-drawn Japanese graduation messages in chalk include large central text reading "3年B組" and celebratory doodles and writing around it such as graduation-themed congratulations. The classroom has white walls, a round wall clock above the chalkboard, a fluorescent ceiling light fixture, and subdued indoor lighting. The image should feel like a slightly dim early-2000s or 2010s snapshot with mild grain, soft focus, authentic flash photography, and natural color fading, emphasizing a sentimental end-of-school memory preserved as a physical instant print.
entries.description: This prompt generates a nostalgic realistic instant-film photograph of a Japanese high school class group portrait, ideal for school memory, graduation, or retro snapshot visuals.

entries.title: Boxing Impact Chat Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic smartphone screenshot of a dark-mode chat interface in Chinese, minimalist and modern, with a charcoal black background and lots of empty space. Near the upper right is a single rounded dark-gray message bubble containing the white Chinese text 拳击手被击中的瞬间. Below and to the left is one large embedded photo with rounded corners, occupying most of the lower-left half of the screen. The embedded photo shows the exact instant in a professional boxing match when one boxer lands a hard straight punch flush on the other boxer's face. Two shirtless male boxers with muscular, sweaty bodies are inside a ring under arena lights. The boxer on the right is seen mostly from the back and side, extending his right arm fully across the frame; his back and shoulder muscles are sharply defined, and he has short dark hair and tattooed arms. He wears a white boxing glove with blue trim, and the glove is smashing into the left boxer's face. The boxer on the left is recoiling from the impact, his head snapping sideways, with a spray of sweat and water droplets exploding outward around his head. He has a heavily tattooed left arm and chest, a black glove raised near his torso, and black trunks with large gold letters reading VICTOR across the waistband area. The ring ropes are red and white, with visible branding including PBC, and the dark blurred arena background includes bright signage reading RODRIGUEZ VS. The action photo should feel like a frozen high-speed sports photograph, dramatic, crisp, and photorealistic. Over both fighters' faces are 2 rectangular mosaic-blur censor blocks, one on each face. Add small mobile UI overlay details on the image: the Chinese word 编辑 in white at the bottom-left corner of the photo and a circular share/upload icon at the bottom-right corner. Overall composition should look exactly like a casually shared AI-generated image shown inside a messaging app screenshot, clean, believable, and highly realistic.

entries.title: Foreign Clerk in County Phone Shop
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic documentary-style smartphone photo inside a small county-town mobile phone shop in China, showing a candid sales interaction at the counter. A tall foreign man, about Russian, stands behind a glass display case wearing a black jacket and a blue employee lanyard with badge, holding a smartphone in both hands as if introducing it to a customer. His face is deliberately blurred into a soft rectangular mosaic for privacy. In the foreground, a middle-aged Chinese male customer in a black jacket is seen from behind and slightly to the side, facing the clerk. The store is cramped, brightly lit, and visually cluttered with authentic retail details. Behind them are large smartphone brand posters and lightbox ads, including 2 major phone brand ads: vivo and oppo. There are 4 prominent Chinese promotional signs visible: a red overhead banner about buying phones and carrier service, a blue vertical installment-payment sign mentioning 0 down payment and 0 interest, a blue trade-in subsidy sign mentioning 1000 yuan, and a small counter sign promoting a Xiaomi model with a 6999 price. The glass counter contains multiple display phones, with 4 clearly visible upright demo phones on stands, plus scattered brochures and accessories beneath the glass. Add dense shelves of boxed accessories and hanging decorations in the background, with slightly messy composition, harsh indoor shop lighting, mild lens distortion, and the rough, unpolished realism of a casually taken phone snapshot. The mood should feel mundane, local, and faintly surreal because the foreign clerk appears completely integrated into an ordinary Chinese mobile phone store.

entries.title: Xiaomi SU7 Exploded View Chat Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A sleek Chinese social-media style screenshot on a dark charcoal black interface, minimalist and premium, with a large rounded rectangular image card placed in the lower left-center and a small rounded chat bubble in the upper right. The overall canvas is mostly empty dark space, giving a clean tech presentation feel. At the top left of the main area, show one line of bold white Chinese text reading: "换成小米汽车,我做一张更像发布会级别的整车爆炸分解图。" In the upper right, include a single gray rounded speech bubble with white Chinese text: "小米汽车的产品拆解图". Below, display one featured poster-like infographic card with rounded corners and a glossy black background. Inside that card, create a highly polished exploded-view automotive product presentation for a turquoise Xiaomi SU7 electric sedan, shown in dramatic three-quarter front view, with the car body separated into many components suspended around the chassis. The hood is open, trunk lid lifted, four side doors detached and floating outward, front bumper and fascia separated, headlights isolated, interior exposed, and major mechanical and structural modules arranged neatly in layers beneath and around the body. The visual style should resemble a premium launch-event keynote slide: cinematic studio lighting, realistic reflections, sharp detail, dark background, subtle blue highlights, and precise technical composition. In the upper left of the infographic card, place large white Chinese title text in three lines: "小米汽车 SU7", "产品拆解图", "科技跨越,人车合一". Add an orange square Xiaomi-style logo in the upper right corner of the card. Surround the car with 14 Chinese callout labels connected by thin white leader lines, identifying visible parts and systems. On the left side, include 6 labels for features such as integrated closed front fascia, LED headlights, front trunk design, high-voltage battery, front motor assembly, front double-wishbone suspension, and Brembo four-piston brake caliper. On the right side, include 8 labels for features such as electric tailgate, through-type taillight, frameless doors, hidden door handles, rear motor assembly, rear motor specs, all-aluminum alloy chassis, five-link rear suspension, and Michelin performance tires. Beneath the exploded car body, clearly show the battery pack, front and rear drive units, suspension subframes, wheel assemblies, braking components, front and rear seats, center console parts, underbody panels, and structural floor elements, all separated and floating in a carefully organized exploded arrangement. entries.title: Classical Chinese Scholar with XAI Motif
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A refined Chinese ink-painting style portrait on aged parchment, composed like a classical literati hanging scroll with muted sepia, tan, charcoal, and faded indigo tones. In the center stands a scholarly male figure in flowing dark blue-black Hanfu robes with intricate gold-patterned trim and wide cream inner sleeves, posed front-facing with a dignified stance. His face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blurred block, while his hair is dark, wavy, and neatly styled. He holds a stitched traditional-style book against his chest with a vertical cover inscription that includes the large Latin letters "XAI" and 4 Chinese text columns beneath it. His other hand rests on an ornate armillary sphere set on a carved pedestal at the lower left. Behind him is a monumental shanshui landscape of 1 mountain range, layered mist, rocky peaks, and drifting clouds, rendered with fine brushwork in an old master style. In the upper right sky area, place 1 bold modern "XAI" logo with the stylized emblem above the letters, and to the far right include 1 slender rocket launching upward beside a launch tower, with smoke billowing into the clouds, blending futuristic aerospace imagery into the classical scene. On the upper left, add 1 vertical column group of Chinese calligraphy title text in black ink, plus 1 smaller vertical signature line and 2 red seal stamps beneath it. The overall effect should fuse ancient Chinese scholar portraiture with space-age technology and AI symbolism, highly detailed, elegant, balanced, and slightly satirical, with the texture of antique paper and the composition of a museum-quality scroll painting.

entries.title: Ancient Scholar AI Safety Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A refined sepia-toned illustration in the style of an ancient Chinese scholarly portrait fused with modern AI branding, on aged parchment paper with visible grain and ink-wash texture. Centered is a half-body portrait of a curly-haired male scholar inspired by Democritus, seated behind a wooden desk and wearing layered traditional robes in muted blue-gray and brown with intricate trim. His face is intentionally obscured by a flat rectangular block in a brown skin-tone color, creating an anonymized or redacted look. He holds 1 calligraphy brush upright in his right hand, while his left hand rests on the table. In the upper center-right, place the Claude logo with a rust-orange sunburst emblem and the word "Claude" in dark serif lettering. On the upper left, add a large vertical title in Chinese, "德米斯圖", with 1 vertical column of smaller Chinese calligraphy text beside it reading: "以語言為媒,理解為舟,助人洞見,推動協作,造福人類,安全可信,通往更美好的未來。" Add a smaller vertical signature line on the far left reading "甲辰春寫" with 2 red seal stamps below it. The background shows a classical Chinese landscape painting with distant mountains, a small pavilion on a cliff, mist, and dense bamboo leaves framing the upper right and right edge, plus dark pine branches on the lower left.

The wooden desk fills the lower third and contains exactly 8 distinct object groups: 1 brush pot holding 4 brushes on the left, 1 stack of 4 stitched books with Chinese titles on the spines reading "人工智慧概論", "機器學習原理", "負責任的 AI", and "對齊與價值觀", 1 ink stone or ink dish near the center-left, 1 central parchment diagram sheet, 1 small dark cube seal near the bottom left with Chinese characters on two visible faces, 1 framed placard on the right, 1 rolled scroll at the bottom right, and 1 tabletop surface with visible wood grain. The central parchment diagram should show a circular node labeled "AI 安全 Safety" connected to 6 surrounding nodes labeled "準確", "可靠", "有益", "透明", "對齊", and "隱私", with delicate cloud motifs around the diagram. The framed placard on the right should read "AI 安全原則" as a header and list 4 bullet points in Chinese: "減少災難性風險", "尊重人類價值觀", "確保系統可控", and "促進長遠福祉". The rolled scroll at the bottom right should display the phrase "以謹慎之心 創造未來".

Use a balanced composition, scholarly calm mood, highly detailed ink linework, subtle watercolor shading, antique museum-print aesthetics, and a restrained palette of parchment tan, ink brown, faded blue, and muted charcoal. The overall feeling should be an intellectual tribute poster blending classical East Asian literati painting, philosophical portraiture, and contemporary AI safety themes.

entries.title: Ancient Scroll Scholar Riding Dragon
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An ancient Chinese ink-and-wash style portrait on aged tan parchment, composed like a classical hanging scroll. A scholarly East Asian man in flowing gray-blue robes sits side-saddle atop a long serpentine Chinese dragon emerging through swirling clouds. His face is intentionally obscured by a flat rectangular blur block in parchment-brown tones. He has short dark curly hair and wears layered traditional robes with ornate patterned trim, a dark sash belt, and two modern OpenAI knot emblems worked into the costume: one printed on the chest and one on a round hand fan he holds upright in his right hand. His left hand rests near the dragon's mane as if holding the creature steady. The dragon is large and detailed, with blue-green scales, a pale underbelly, reddish-brown mane and fin accents, antler-like horns, whiskers, bared teeth, and a fierce expressive face in the lower left foreground, while its body coils upward to the upper right. Surround the figures with mist, stylized clouds, and steep craggy mountain peaks fading into the background. Add a vertical column of black Chinese calligraphy at the upper left and 3 red seal stamps near the lower part of the inscription area. The palette is muted, dusty, and antique: parchment beige, faded teal, moss green, smoky gray, sepia, and rust. Overall feeling: mythical, scholarly, dignified, slightly surreal, blending classical Chinese scroll painting with subtle modern AI iconography. Highly detailed brushwork, weathered paper texture, elegant composition, no border, full-frame vertical artwork.

entries.title: Low-Angle Anime Bunny Girls in Ruins
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dynamic anime-style low-angle illustration of two young women in rabbit-themed bodysuits, viewed from below as if the camera is tilted upward and they are looking slightly down toward the viewer. The left girl has blonde hair in short twin pigtails with curled ends, large red bunny ears, and a glossy bright red high-cut bodysuit with puff sleeves, long opera gloves, a sweetheart-shaped chest panel, and 4 round silver button-like discs on the front. The right girl has long straight brown hair, pale bunny ears, and a glossy white and pale pink version of the same bodysuit design, also with puff sleeves, long gloves, sweetheart chest panel, and 4 round silver discs. Both have slim builds, long legs, expressive wide anime eyes, and mildly surprised, curious expressions as they glance toward each other and slightly toward the viewer. Their hands hang loosely at their sides, almost touching in the center. Place them in front of a vast ruined cathedral or decayed grand stone building with broken arches, skeletal metal framework, shattered windows, and crumbling debris, rendered as a soft-painted anime background. Use a dramatic Dutch angle and strong perspective so the architecture leans with the camera tilt and the characters feel towering and close to the lens. Bright blue sky with large white clouds behind the ruins. Clean cel shading on the characters, painterly detailed background, crisp line art, vibrant but slightly weathered color palette, cinematic composition. Add 3 text elements in the upper right area as graphic design overlay: small uppercase text "ARINKO AGENTS", large bold Japanese text "平和島", and a large white handwritten signature-like script overlapping the background.

entries.title: Goth Anime Girl at Playground Bar
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed anime-style illustration of a pale goth girl in a colorful urban playground, shown in a close medium shot as she leans forward and bites a horizontal metal bar with a mischievous, slightly defiant expression. She has long straight jet black hair with blunt bangs, vivid red eyes, and a delicate face with a small mouth partly pressed against the bar. Her hair is decorated with 3 geometric hair clips on the right side: 1 red triangle clip, 1 blue angular clip, and 1 small gold ring clip. She wears multiple ear piercings including several studs and dangling industrial-style earrings. Her outfit is a black techwear-goth ensemble with 5 visible key pieces: 1 cropped black jacket with red and blue accent stripes, 1 black choker, 1 strappy black top or dress with front buckles, 1 wide black belt with metal hardware, and 1 hanging waist chain. Her sleeves are long and oversized, with white stripe details on one forearm. Both hands grip the bar, one near her mouth and one farther to the side, creating an intimate confrontational pose. The setting is a playground with bright primary-colored equipment: blue posts, red connectors, yellow and red climbing bars, and a patterned rubber floor made of bold geometric blocks in blue, red, yellow, white, and black. In the background are dark green trees and a dramatic graphic sky with large flat shapes in red, orange, blue, black, and white, plus circular sun-like dots, giving the whole scene a posterized pop-art look. Include 1 vertical warning sticker on the left blue post with Japanese text and a small caution icon. Use crisp cel shading, sharp linework, slight glitchy texture accents, ultra-saturated colors, high contrast, a moody cyber-goth fashion vibe, and a dynamic composition centered on the girl's intense gaze and the metal bar.

entries.title: Three Floral Chickens Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A whimsical studio portrait of 3 full-body chickens standing side by side against a clean light gray seamless background, centered with soft diffused lighting and subtle shadows beneath their feet. Each chicken is sculpted entirely from layered flower petals and blossoms while keeping realistic chicken anatomy, skinny scaly legs, clawed feet, beaks, wattles, and combs. The left chicken is cream and ivory colored, fluffy and rounded, decorated with pale white blossoms and tiny sprigs of baby's breath, with oversized round googly eyes and a surprised, innocent expression. The center chicken is dusty pink and blush colored, built from dense overlapping petals and medium flower heads, with a long drooping pink comb falling over one eye, a stern intense expression, and floral detailing around the neck and body. The right chicken is vivid orange, amber, and golden yellow, made of marigold-like petals and warm autumn flowers, with narrowed sleepy eyes, a tall red-orange comb, and a grumpy unimpressed expression. Emphasize intricate botanical texture, handcrafted floral sculpture realism, playful character design, high detail, sharp focus, symmetrical lineup composition, and a cute surreal fine-art aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a cute surreal studio image of three chickens made entirely of flowers, ideal for whimsical art prints, social media visuals, or decorative concept imagery.

entries.title: AI Chat Screenshot with Ad Design Grids
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark-mode mobile chat interface screenshot showing two separate Japanese prompt-and-result exchanges about AI-generated ad design. The background is nearly black. There are 2 large rounded light-gray chat bubbles aligned to the right, each containing Japanese text. The first bubble says: 「日本語の幼稚園の広告画像を、トンマナ違いで4種類並べて画像生成して。プロデザイナーが作ったトレンドのデザインで。アスペクト比は16:9」. Beneath it is 1 rounded rectangular generated image preview showing a 2x2 grid of kindergarten advertisement variations in soft pastel colors. In the top-left panel, show a bright, airy ad with a close-up photo of a young child in profile at right, soft sunlight, cream and pale green tones, handwritten-style Japanese headline text on the left, small circular badges near the bottom, and floral accents. In the top-right panel, show an energetic outdoor ad with 4 children running under a blue sky, bold Japanese headline text, teal and yellow graphic accents, and a yellow circular callout. In the bottom-left panel, show a modern kindergarten campus building with a grassy yard and children playing, with a large white speech-bubble-shaped text area on the left and muted green-beige abstract shapes. In the bottom-right panel, show an illustrated large green tree with children and parents underneath, sky-blue background, warm family-friendly Japanese copy, and soft rounded decorative shapes. Add 1 small gray circular overlay button labeled 「編集」 at the lower-left corner of this preview and 1 small semi-transparent circular upload/share icon at the lower-right corner. Under this first preview, include 4 small interface icons in a row: copy, thumbs up, thumbs down, and more options. Lower on the screen, show the second right-aligned light-gray chat bubble with this Japanese text: 「日本語の健康食品の広告画像を、トンマナ違いで4種類並べて画像生成して。プロデザイナーが作ったトレンドのデザインで。アスペクト比は16:9」. Beneath it is a second rounded rectangular generated image preview showing a 2x2 grid of health food advertisement variations. In the top-left panel, show a clean wellness ad in white and pale green with a woman touching her neck, Japanese headline text about inner balance, several circular benefit icons, and price text. In the top-right panel, show a dramatic black-and-gold supplement ad with a dark pouch package, glowing gold particles, luxury serif-style Japanese text, and a bold red-orange price tag reading 980円. In the bottom-left panel, show a soft pink beauty supplement ad with translucent floral or crystalline textures, pastel packaging, delicate Japanese copy, circular info badges, and feminine cosmetic styling. In the bottom-right panel, show a natural green juice ad with a tall glass of green smoothie, fresh vegetables in the background, a green-and-white product box, clean Japanese health copy, and a circular yellow callout. Add 1 small gray circular overlay button labeled 「編集」 at the lower-left of this second preview and 1 small semi-transparent circular upload/share icon at the lower-right. The overall image should feel like a realistic smartphone app screenshot of an AI image-generation chat, with generous spacing between the 2 conversations, rounded corners, crisp Japanese typography, and a premium contemporary UI.
entries.description: This generates a realistic dark-mode mobile chat screenshot showing two Japanese AI prompts and two 2x2 grids of polished ad design variations, useful for illustrating generative design capabilities.

entries.title: Whiteboard Marker Anime Sketch
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic photograph of a whiteboard with a highly detailed green dry-erase marker drawing of a samurai with a messy topknot and facial hair, hands clasped in prayer. The character is drawn in a detailed manga sketch style, shown in profile with eyes closed, wearing a traditional kimono with a katana tucked into his belt. To the left of the character, handwritten text in all-caps reads "VAGABOND" with "MUSASHI" written directly below it. The whiteboard has a glossy surface with realistic light reflections and glare on the left side, and a thin metallic frame is visible at the bottom edge, giving the impression of an authentic classroom or office environment.

entries.title: Vintage Arcade Repair Flash Photography
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vintage, late 90s amateur flash photograph of a young man repairing an arcade machine. He is kneeling on a dark, patterned arcade carpet, looking back over his shoulder directly at the camera with a neutral expression. He wears a dark short-sleeved t-shirt, baggy blue jeans, chunky white sneakers, and a dark baseball cap. The lower front panel of the arcade cabinet is wide open, exposing its complex internal electronics, including a tangle of wires, green circuit boards, a large speaker, and metal cooling fans at the base. The side of the cabinet features vibrant pink, black, and white graphics with the text "Dancing Stage" and the brand "KONAMI". The setting is a dimly lit arcade interior with other glowing game cabinets visible in the blurred background. A screwdriver lies on the carpet near the man's knee. The image features harsh direct flash lighting, a slightly grainy film texture, deep shadows, and a nostalgic Y2K aesthetic.

entries.title: Goth Girl on Unicorn Ride
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid, realistic photograph of a young goth woman with pale skin, long straight black hair with bangs, heavy black eyeliner, and black lipstick. She has a deadpan expression, looking directly at the camera while sitting on a children's coin-operated unicorn ride. She is wearing a black lace-trimmed tank top, black arm warmers, layered necklaces including a choker, black lace tights, and chunky black platform boots with buckles. A large black shoulder bag hangs from her arm. The ride is a white unicorn with a pink mane, gold horn, and purple hooves, mounted on a purple base with a small sticker reading "50¢ PER RIDE". The setting is outside a store with a tan cinderblock wall. To the left is a glass door reflecting a person, a brown trash can, and a white sign with red text reading "NO PARKING FIRE LANE". To the right is a blue vending machine. Overcast, natural daylight.

 ]

}

entries.title: Two Women Shopping in a Vintage Store
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic candid photograph of two Asian women shopping together inside a densely packed vintage clothing store. The woman on the left has brown hair tied back and is wearing a white ribbed crop top and distressed denim shorts, carrying a cream shoulder bag. She is holding up a dark blue satin souvenir jacket with intricate gold embroidery on a wooden hanger. The woman on the right has her hair in a messy bun and is wearing a white graphic t-shirt tucked into high-waisted blue jeans, looking admiringly at the jacket. They are standing in a narrow aisle flanked by overflowing racks of colorful garments, with more clothes hanging from the ceiling. The scene features warm, slightly dim ambient lighting with a shallow depth of field blurring the background.

entries.title: Song Dynasty Social Media Feed
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: "Song Dynasty Social Media Feed", a humorous fusion of ancient and modern interface design style. The image simulates a mobile social media interface, but the content is entirely Song Dynasty scenes. The profile picture is a portrait of a Song Dynasty scholar. Username: "Su Shi SuShi_Official". Posted content: "Just arrived in Huangzhou; exiled but in a decent mood. Made Dongpo Pork myself today, the taste is amazing. Recipe attached:". The attached picture is a close-up of Dongpo Pork in a traditional fine-brush painting style. Like list: "Huang Tingjian, Qin Guan, Foyin and 126 others". Comment section: "Wang Anshi: Hehe", "Sima Guang: Still that same flavor". Interface elements like the like icon are replaced with Song Dynasty patterns. Status bar shows "Great Song Mobile 5G" and "Third Year of Yuanfeng". The color scheme is a mobile dark mode paired with elegant Song Dynasty tones. A masterpiece of historical and social media collision.
entries.description: A creative prompt that imagines what a social media feed would look like during the Song Dynasty, featuring Su Shi.

entries.title: Japanese Bookstore Interior
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic interior view of a bustling Japanese bookstore. The scene is illuminated by warm overhead lighting that reflects off the polished wooden floor. In the foreground, large wooden display tables are stacked high with books, many featuring anime-style illustrated covers facing outward. Above the shelves, prominent hanging signs display Japanese text, including a red sign on the left reading 新刊コーナー and a blue sign on the right reading 旅行ガイド. A central hanging directional sign points towards different sections. Tall wooden bookshelves packed tightly with colorful spines line the walls, creating deep aisles. In the mid-ground, a woman in a green top browsing stands looking at the shelves. The atmosphere is cozy, inviting, and highly detailed.

entries.title: Retro 3D Claymation Desk Setup
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vibrant, cute 3D claymation-style illustration of a retro yellow desktop computer setup on a desk. The central yellow CRT monitor displays a teal screen with the Microsoft Windows 98 logo and 7 desktop icons labeled 'My Computer', 'Online Services', 'My Documents', 'Outlook Express', 'Internet Explorer', 'Connect to the Internet', and 'Recycle Bin', plus a bottom taskbar with a 'Start' button and a clock reading '5:49 PM'. The monitor has a yellow sticky note reading 'Be Happy' and a small yellow bird perched on top. The computer base is labeled 'CREATIVE PC'. In front is a yellow mechanical keyboard labeled 'KBD-98' with orange and cream keys, and a yellow mouse labeled 'MS'. To the left is a green desk lamp, a smiling potted cactus, a blue floppy disk labeled 'FUN STUFF', and a blue mug reading 'COFFEE TIME!' with a smiley face. To the right are 2 stacked books (green 'WINDOWS 98 MANUAL', blue 'INTERNET EXPLORER') and 2 smiling balloons (orange and yellow). The foreground features a green cutting mat, a yellow pencil, a green tape dispenser labeled 'TAPE IT!', 2 crayons, a pink sticky note reading 'Take a Break!', and a white notepad with a 5-item 'TO DO LIST': '1. Be Awesome', '2. Play More', '3. Call Mom', '4. Eat Snacks', '5. Smile :)'. The background wall has a green and cream clock, a white poster reading 'HAVE A NICE DAY!' with a smiling sun and 'Do Your Best!', and 3 additional sticky notes: a yellow one reading 'Dream Big Work Hard!', a pink one reading 'You've Got This!', and a green one reading 'Meeting 10:00 AM!'.

entries.title: Two Men Celebrating at a Restaurant
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid, warm-toned photograph of two men sitting at a table in a dimly lit upscale restaurant at night. On the left is a man with dark hair wearing a dark grey crewneck sweater. On the right is a man with glasses and receding curly dark hair wearing a dark blue sweater over a collared shirt. They are celebrating enthusiastically, mouths wide open cheering, clasping one hand together while raising their other fists in triumph. The table is covered with a white tablecloth and features two menus with the text "THE GREENE", water glasses, a glass of red wine, and a small lit candle in a ribbed glass holder. The background shows blurred restaurant interiors and dark windows with distant city lights, creating an intimate and joyful atmosphere.

entries.prompt: A hyper-realistic, intense, over-the-top illustration of three elderly people in a fiery, apocalyptic setting. In the foreground, two elderly DJs are intensely scratching on detailed turntables while screaming aggressively. On the left is an elderly woman with purple hair in a top bun. On the right is an elderly man with spiky blonde punk hair and sunglasses. Between them in the background is a massive erupting volcano surrounded by roaring flames, flying sparks, and smoke. Looming at the top center of the image is a third elderly man with white hair and a beard, wearing a purple hoodie with the word "KAMI" faintly visible, shouting with his hands raised making two-finger gestures against a backdrop of dark stormy clouds. Across the center of the image, hovering in front of the volcano, is large, jagged, neon graffiti-style text reading "DJBBA" in vibrant blue, green, and pink colors. The overall lighting is dramatic, illuminated by the intense orange and yellow glow of the fire.
entries.description: Generates an over-the-top, fiery illustration of elderly people aggressively DJing in front of an erupting volcano, perfect for humorous album covers or event posters.

entries.title: Coca-Cola Zipper Worlds Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a premium conceptual beverage advertisement for Coca-Cola on a vertical 4:5 canvas. Center a chilled red aluminum soda can, front-facing, covered in realistic condensation droplets, with a silver pull tab and rim visible at the top and the classic white script logo across the can; include the smaller can text "ORIGINAL TASTE." The background is a seamless saturated red studio backdrop with luxury commercial lighting and a soft product shadow. A large metallic zipper runs horizontally across the image and wraps around the can at mid-height, with detailed interlocking teeth and a central zipper pull in front of the can; the zipper opens the scene into two contrasting worlds: on the left, a warm orange sunset over a calm water horizon with a small distant city skyline silhouette, and on the right, a cool blue snowy alpine landscape with frosted pine trees and mountains. The zipper seam should curve organically like a wave, visually implying the can contains magical worlds inside. Add minimal white ad copy: at the top center write open happiness, with "happiness" in bold; near the bottom center write real magic is inside, with "inside" in bold; place a small white Coca-Cola logo beneath it. Use hyper-realistic FMCG product photography, crisp macro details, glossy reflections, balanced red-orange-blue color contrast, Apple-level minimalist composition, Cannes Lions conceptual advertising style, no extra objects, no people, no watermark.
entries.description: A high-end conceptual soda advertisement showing a chilled can unzipped to reveal contrasting warm and icy worlds inside.

entries.title: Sunrise Beach Swimsuit Magazine Snapshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please refer to the character in the attached image. Create a 4-page swimsuit snapshot series featuring the same character as the lead. The setting should be a magazine-style snapshot collection with a beautiful sunrise where the swimsuit style and expressions change. Ensure that each page features a distinct swimsuit color, pattern (e.g., polka dots, floral, plaid, solid), and shape, with matching accessories.

Page structure:
1. Gentle smile, natural loose hair flowing in the wind.
2. Energetic smile, ponytail, lively atmosphere.
3. Calm expression, sidelong glance, half-up or asymmetrical hairstyle.
4. Serious expression looking directly at the camera, moist eyes, curled or updo hairstyle.

Ensure poses and compositions are varied: standing, sitting, walking, looking back, close-ups, wide shots, and rear views. Include headings, catchphrases, and short text on the photos to create a magazine aesthetic. The overall mood should be like spending time together at a beautiful sunrise beach.
entries.description: A structural prompt for generating a 4-page magazine-style snapshot series of a character at the beach during sunrise with varied poses and outfits.

entries.title: Satirical AI Mascot Lounge Debate
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a polished 3D cartoon editorial scene in a cozy modern interview lounge, formatted as a wide 16:9 image. Two anthropomorphic AI-logo mascot characters sit facing each other in beige upholstered armchairs around a round wooden coffee table. On the left, a black rounded-square mascot body with a large white OpenAI knot logo on its front has black tube arms and legs, white gloved hands, and oversized white sneakers; it is gesturing with one raised index finger as if making a point. entries.title: Fortune Telling Omikuji Card Generator
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use this character to produce a "weekly fortune omikuji image."

Important: The content must be completely different every time. Results should be randomly generated and should not depend on past context or the content of the reference image.

Do not use the reference image as-is; change the situation, composition, expression, pose, background, props, and layout design to match this specific fortune result.

For the overall fortune, use standard luck rankings found in Japanese omikuji culture.

Place the overall fortune result prominently at the top of the screen.

The text design should be fun and information-rich, mixing elements of traditional Japanese fortunes, magazine horoscopes, variety shows, social media images, and internet memes.

The character should speak their reaction or thoughts on the fortune result using speech bubbles.

The content of the speech bubbles, facial expressions, energy levels, and reactions must change every time.

Include multiple fortune categories.

For each category, add a small cut-out illustration of a "yuru-fuwa" (soft/cuddly) chibi-style character.

The fortune categories, content, layout, color scheme, font styles, and amount of information must change every time.

Include "X (formerly Twitter) luck" as well.

Overall Atmosphere:

- Cute, soft/fluffy, slightly quirky - Something people want to share on social media - Feels like a horoscope page at the back of a magazine - Heisei to Reiwa internet culture - High information density - Looks great in screenshots

Important: Significantly vary the fortune content, text, chibi character actions, layout, specific jokes, and overall vibe every time.

Do not repeat the same pattern.

Negative Elements:
Avoid accurate dates, days of the week, calendar notations, real-world time information, specific schedules, incorrect date generation, broken number representations, nonsensical date text, or unreadable calendar UI.

entries.title: Handwritten Breakfast Photo Annotations
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Using REFERENCE_0 as the base breakfast photo, transform it into a stylish social-media morning breakfast post. Keep the actual meal, plate, cup, and tabletop composition essentially the same, but remove the decorative sticker row at the bottom: exactly 6 sheep stickers and 1 pizza sticker must be gone. Add a warm, magazine-like food-photo finish with slightly cleaner lighting and sharper appetizing detail.

Overlay casual white handwritten Japanese annotations directly on the photo, as if drawn with a marker pen, with thin arrows, dotted circles, hearts, underline strokes, and one cloud-shaped callout. Use exactly 10 visible annotation text groups:
1. Large top-left headline: 朝のトーストアート*
2. Small subtitle under it: チーズと野菜のとろ〜りピザトースト
3. Left cloud callout about onion and melted cheese: 「シャキシャキ玉ねぎと とろけるチーズが 最高の相性!♡」
4. Small note near the green pepper with a dotted circle: 「ピーマンのほろ苦さがアクセントに◎」
5. Note pointing to the banana: 「バナナで自然な甘みをプラス♡」
6. Circular note near the egg: 「たんぱく質で一日を元気に!」
7. Note pointing to ketchup on the toast: 「ケチャップはたっぷりめがおいしいよね!」
8. Bottom-left motivational handwritten message with pink underline and heart: ちゃんと食べて、今日もごきげんにいこう。
9. Bottom-center note pointing to the toast crust: 「こんがりトーストにチーズがとろ〜り♡」
10. Bottom-right note pointing to the fruit bowl: 「フルーツとナッツでさっぱり&カリッといいバランス♪」

Style constraints: make the handwriting look natural, playful, and hand-drawn; keep all text legible in white except the pink underline and heart accent at bottom left. Do not add any new food items, people, logos, watermarks, borders, or extra stickers.

entries.title: Good Morning Bird VTuber Frame
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a bright square VTuber "good morning" social media frame in a soft anime watercolor style, with a wide open center-right area of clear blue sky for placing a character or photo. The scene is a cheerful spring morning landscape viewed from a leafy garden: sunlit green branches and small white blossoms frame the top-left and left edge, with glowing lens flare, drifting petals, white feathers, and scattered green leaves across the sky. Add exactly 7 birds: 3 small birds perched on a flowering branch at left-middle, colored blue, white, and yellow; 3 birds perched on a rustic wooden sign at bottom-left, a brown sparrow, a pale yellow cockatiel with orange cheeks, and a blue budgerigar; and 1 swallow flying in the upper-right sky. In the upper-left, place elegant white hand-lettered script reading Good Morning!, decorated with tiny leaves and sparkles, with a teal ribbon underneath containing the Japanese text 素敵な一日になりますように♪. At the bottom-left, make a weathered wooden plank sign wrapped with small flowers, vines, a white laurel motif, and a feather, with white script text Bind Week and a smaller date line 5.10 (Sat) - 5.16 (Fri). The background should show a soft distant town, lake or river, and pale mountains under fluffy white clouds, with daisies and yellow flowers blooming in the lower-right foreground. Use a fresh pastel palette, airy composition, high detail, gentle sunlight, clean decorative typography, and leave the center of the sky mostly uncluttered for overlay use.

[top part: fridge magnet icon] extract the most recognizable main elements from the real photo in the bottom half. transform this architectural/subject element into a simple "fridge magnet style character icon." 1. retain core outlines and iconic features; 2. clean, simple design like a travel souvenir magnet; 3. slight 3d effect and drop shadow; 4. sharp edges with white or light-colored strokes; 5. moderate simplification of details; 6. icon centered in the upper-middle of the top section; 7. icon size small and exquisite with significant white space. [background color] extract the primary, most memorable color from the photo for the top half background (e.g., clothing color or strong environment color). the color should be solid, saturated, and clean like a postcard. no gradients or complex patterns. [typography] add a line of elegant english handwritten text below the icon: "spicycandy" [overall aesthetic] high-end travel photography card: real photo + minimalist magnet icon + primary color background + light typography. refreshing, clean, bright, with a city wandering vibe. emphasis on recognition, color memory, and travel atmosphere. [avoid] ordinary collages, complex top halves, extra decorations, altering the bottom photo, gibberish text, excessive cartooning, oversized icons, or text overlapping the main subject. social media post city

entries.title: Playful Oeuf Mayo Food Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a stylish overhead three-quarter food photography scene on a matte beige stone tabletop, showing exactly 2 plated soft-boiled eggs with homemade mayonnaise-style yellow sauce and parsley garnish: one serving on a large glossy black textured round plate in the foreground right, and one serving on a plain off-white round plate in the background left. Each egg is upright, coated with rich golden yellow sauce pooling at the base, sprinkled with fine green parsley and black seasoning flecks. Add playful thin white hand-drawn doodle overlays as if sketched on top of the photo: exactly 2 chef-character outlines around the eggs, with the foreground egg drawn as a cute chef holding a whisk and wearing a chef hat, and the background egg drawn with a chef hat and raised spatula; include exactly 1 whisk, exactly 1 spatula, exactly 2 chef hats, exactly 12 small flower doodles, exactly 8 sparkle/star doodles, and several dotted whimsical flight trails curling across the tabletop. Use natural indoor restaurant lighting, realistic smartphone food-photo texture, shallow shadows, warm neutral color grading, a designer-kitchen social media aesthetic, and no visible text. Customize the dish as soft-boiled egg with homemade oeuf mayo sauce, garnish as parsley, foreground plate color as glossy black, background plate color as off-white, and doodle color as white.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Reimagine the full image as a whimsical handcrafted folk-art illustration filled with playful doodle aesthetics. Replace the original colors with a fresh, vibrant palette featuring bold contrasting tones and cheerful accents. Convert every object and detail into simplified flat forms with soft irregular outlines, textured brush-like fills, and an intentionally imperfect handmade appearance, as if sketched and colored on clean white paper with markers and paint pens. entries.title: Embroidered Cozy Bird Living Room
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a highly realistic macro photograph of a finished hand-embroidery piece in a round wooden embroidery hoop on a rustic wooden craft table, showing a cozy living-room scene stitched on natural beige linen. The embroidery should look tactile and dimensional, with visible satin stitches, long-and-short stitches, French knots, raised thread texture, slight imperfections, and warm handmade charm. The scene contains exactly 8 embroidered pet birds: a large yellow cockatiel sitting in a plush red armchair holding knitting needles, a blue-and-white budgie nestled beside it reading a tiny illustrated magazine, two small birds perched on a wooden bench in the background, two small birds sitting together on a blue sofa reading, one green-and-orange lovebird standing at lower right holding a pink handheld vacuum with little blue motion lines, and one small black-and-gray crested bird at the bottom center. The miniature embroidered room includes a red armchair, a blue sofa, a wooden bench, a desk with tiny bottles, two framed wall pictures, a potted plant, hanging plants, a small orange pendant lamp, pink curtains, a sketched window, a few musical notes, and fine pencil-like construction lines visible on the fabric. Surround the hoop with realistic embroidery supplies: a wooden tray of pastel thread bobbins at the upper left, a paper thread color chart at the upper right, ornate embroidery scissors on the right, a needle and metal thimble at the lower right, green floss at the bottom, and a small note card at lower left with Japanese handwriting. Use warm natural daylight, shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the hoop, cozy craft-room atmosphere, earthy colors, and a charming whimsical style that makes the entire illustration appear as if it has been embroidered from a text prompt.

entries.title: Hand-drawn Photo Annotation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Modify the photo: Please observe the elements in the photo and add meaningful hand-drawn style annotations for each object. Fill in the objects in the photo (e.g., pizza, soda). [Drawing Rules]: • Use thin hand-drawn lines like white brush strokes • One-stroke style, casual, slightly uneven • Add outlines around objects • Use arrows or dotted lines for visual guidance. [Text Rules]: • Handwritten font (Japanese cute style) • Short sentences, like self-muttering • Diary-like tone with a hint of emotion. [Annotation Rules]: • Drinks -> Taste, temperature, mood (e.g., refreshing, slightly sweet, just right) • Food -> Texture, deliciousness (e.g., soft, super delicious) • Space -> Atmosphere (e.g., very relaxing, love this feeling) • Overall -> A summary sentence (e.g., Today is a bit happy~). [Decoration]: • Moderately add elements like steam, sparkles, hearts, stars, and small emojis. Do not over-decorate, preserve white space.
entries.description: A specialized prompt for adding cute, hand-drawn annotations and handwritten notes to photos, creating a Japanese diary aesthetic.

entries.title: Dark Neon Carousel Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a square 1:1 social media carousel cover with a premium dark tech aesthetic on a nearly black background. Use huge bold uppercase condensed sans-serif typography aligned left in stacked lines reading "60 CLAUDE PROMPTS EVERY BEGINNER NEEDS", with the words "60" and "BEGINNER" in vivid glowing orange and the remaining words in bright white. Add exactly 4 thin white corner crop marks, one in each corner, plus a small page indicator at the top right reading "01 / 12". Overall style: high-contrast black, neon orange glow, clean editorial grid, sharp modern startup branding, minimal futuristic UI details, crisp typography, professional carousel thumbnail design.

entries.title: Playful Cartoon Sketch Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Analyze the uploaded image and maintain the original subject, composition, and lighting. Do not change the identity or facial structure of the main character. Add playful hand-drawn graphic elements that interact directly with the subject in the image. The drawings should mimic, follow, or exaggerate the existing shapes, gestures, or movements - such as drawing lines around the pose, extending arms or legs, adding motion lines, or creating imaginary elements that "interact" with the subject. 

Step 2:
Transform the entire image into a cute cartoon illustration in a soft, vibrant, and playful cartoon style. Maintain the original scene and character details while applying a vibrant, cute, and playful cartoon look.
entries.description: A two-step prompt for transforming an uploaded photo into a vibrant cartoon illustration with hand-drawn graphic elements.

The background features a giant rotating neon astrolabe, floating purple-pink digital star maps, and cyber-purple neon particles. entries.title: Hand-Drawn Interactive Doodles
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Analyze the uploaded image and preserve the original subject, composition, and lighting. Do not alter the identity or structure of the main subject. Add playful, hand-drawn doodles that interact directly with the subject in the image. The doodles should mimic, follow, or exaggerate the shapes, gestures, or motion present-such as outlining poses, extending limbs, adding motion lines, or creating imaginative elements that "respond" to the subject.(2)

Ensure the doodles feel naturally integrated into the scene, as if they were drawn on top of the photo with intention. Use a sketchy, imperfect, hand-drawn style with organic lines, slightly uneven strokes, and a casual illustrated feel. Include whimsical handwritten text elements placed around the image. The text should match the mood or implied context of the scene, with a playful and spontaneous tone.(3) 

Avoid fixed phrases-generate context-aware, creative, and humorous text that fits each unique image. Maintain a balanced composition so the doodles enhance the image without overwhelming the original subject. Keep the overall aesthetic fun, expressive, and social-media-ready. High resolution, clean overlay, vibrant yet natural color harmony.

entries.title: 90s Retro Film Driving Shot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An intense, high-energy vintage film close-up shot. The camera is placed immediately in front of the windshield, creating a dynamic wide-angle perspective. The character (based on the uploaded image) is driving a retro convertible along a California highway; the car's color is random but stylishly coordinated with the character's vibe. The subject is laughing . The foreground features blurred hands gripping the steering wheel (heavy bokeh), keeping the sharp focus strictly on the facial expression. The aesthetic is high-saturation, strong contrast, sun-drenched, with a distinct retro film grain texture and a 90s editorial look.

entries.title: Dewy Nemophila Sunrise Macro

entries.title: Botanical Plant Dye Canvas Painting

entries.title: Interactive Photo Doodles
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Analyze the uploaded image and preserve the original subject, composition, and lighting. Do not alter the identity or structure of the main subject. Add playful, hand-drawn doodles that interact directly with the subject in the image. The doodles should mimic, follow, or exaggerate the shapes, gestures, or motion present-such as outlining poses, extending limbs, adding motion lines, or creating imaginative elements that "respond" to the subject.

Ensure the doodles feel naturally integrated into the scene, as if they were drawn on top of the photo with intention. Use a sketchy, imperfect, hand-drawn style with organic lines, slightly uneven strokes, and a casual illustrated feel. Include whimsical handwritten text elements placed around the image. The text should match the mood or implied context of the scene, with a playful and spontaneous tone.

Avoid fixed phrases-generate context-aware, creative, and humorous text that fits each unique image. Maintain a balanced composition so the doodles enhance the image without overwhelming the original subject. Keep the overall aesthetic fun, expressive, and social-media-ready. High resolution, clean overlay, vibrant yet natural color harmony.

entries.title: Hand-Drawn Doodles Overlay
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Transform the uploaded image by keeping the subject exactly as they are-preserve their identity, pose, composition, and lighting without any distortion or alteration. Build on top of the original photo by adding expressive, hand-drawn doodles that interact playfully with the subject. Let the illustrations respond to the scene, trace or exaggerate gestures, extend movement, highlight contours, or introduce imaginative elements that feel connected to what's happening in the frame. The doodles should feel intentional, as if they were sketched directly onto the image in a spontaneous yet thoughtful way. Use a loose, imperfect drawing style with slightly uneven strokes, organic lines, and a casual, sketchbook-like vibe. Incorporate handwritten notes or captions around the image that match the mood or narrative-keep them witty, context-aware, and naturally playful rather than generic. Make sure the added elements complement the photo instead of overpowering it. Aim for a visually balanced composition with a clean, high-resolution finish and colors that blend harmoniously with the original scene.

entries.title: Vibrant Fusion Street Food Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: 1. A vibrant fusion street-food scene where a sizzling plate of smoky fried rice biryani blends aromatic spices with golden grains, beside a rich, slow-cooked mutton dish glistening with gravy. Steaming hot momos sit in a bamboo basket, releasing curls of fragrant steam, while a chilled mint mojito sparkles with ice, fresh mint leaves, and lime slices. The setting is a lively night market under warm lights, with colors, textures, and aromas colliding into a bold, modern culinary fusion aesthetic. 2. An eye-catching food scene featuring a delicious spread of fast food and refreshing drinks: a juicy pizza with melted cheese, a stacked burger with crispy lettuce and sauce, a bowl of steaming noodles, golden crispy fries, a chilled mojito with mint and lime, and fresh slices of juicy watermelon. The setting is vibrant and colorful, with soft lighting, high detail, and a modern aesthetic, arranged beautifully on a wooden table, top-down view, ultra-realistic, 4K quality.

entries.title: 3D Cat Mascot Marche Stall
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image as the brand and character base, transform the flat logo into a warm, cute 3D promotional image for a first-time marche food-stall appearance. Keep the same white cat mascot identity, yellow forehead patch, round yellow chest accent, smiling closed-eye expression, handmade hot dog shop theme, and the shop name R-GARDEN*Sui. Place the mascot full-body in front of a cozy wooden festival stall at night, rendered as a soft plush toy character. Add a wooden arched shop sign across the top with the Japanese headline 手作りホットドッグのお店, the shop name, and small hot dog / coffee-bean style decorative icons inspired by the reference border. Give the mascot two food props: 1 hot dog in one paw and 1 spiral tornado potato skewer in the other. Add warm string lights, a striped awning, condiment bottles, shallow depth of field, and a friendly market-event atmosphere. Include exactly 2 chalkboard menu signs in front of the stall: left sign labeled Hot Dog with a hot dog doodle, and right sign labeled Tornado Potato with a spiral potato doodle. Use a cinematic square composition, golden lighting, high-detail 3D rendering, and an inviting SNS/event advertisement feel.

The final image should be healing, pleasing, and colorful, full of innocent childlike imagination.

entries.title: Anime Hiker Over Scenic Mountain View
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the base landscape, remove all YAMAP branding, date, route, and metric overlay text, then transform the scene into a polished anime-style travel illustration while preserving the mountaintop viewpoint over the city, lake, distant mountains, hazy sky, and green forested foreground. Add one foreground character: a young anime hiker viewed from behind/three-quarter back, standing on an old stone castle-wall lookout and gazing over the scenery. Give the character long aqua-blue hair in a high ponytail with a blue ribbon and star hair ornament, a light blue hiking shirt, beige cargo hiking pants, brown hiking boots, fingerless gloves, and a large dark hiking backpack. Add exactly 4 visible gear/accessory elements on or near the character: 1 rolled sleeping mat strapped to the backpack, 1 dangling blue star charm, 1 small blue bird-like companion perched near the shoulder, and 1 small hiking pouch/strap detail. Add weathered stone blocks under the character and soft blurred green leaves in the lower foreground for depth. Keep the composition scenic and peaceful, with bright morning light, gentle atmospheric haze, crisp anime linework on the character, and a softly detailed semi-realistic background. Do not include any text, logos, UI, or watermark.
entries.description: Transforms a mountain-view travel photo into a clean anime hiking illustration with a foreground character and no app overlays.

entries.title: French AI Newspaper Front Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic close-up editorial photograph of a French newspaper front page laid slightly diagonally on a dark tabletop, designed like a polished national daily. The masthead is a large blue rectangle with white newspaper lettering reading Le Parisien and a thin red underline. The dominant central headline, in oversized bold black serif type, reads ChatGPT Vs Gemini : Le match des images. Directly underneath, a smaller italic serif subheadline in French reads Deux intelligences artificielles s'affrontent dans une bataille visuelle sans précédent. In the center of the page, place a wide rectangular feature image showing exactly 2 futuristic boxing gloves colliding from left and right: the left glove is dark graphite and black with subtle glowing circuit patterns, the OpenAI knot logo near the wrist, and the word ChatGPT in bright white; the right glove is metallic silver-blue with luminous blue circuitry and the word Gemini in glowing blue-white. The gloves meet in the middle dramatically, lit like a high-end tech advertisement. Surrounding the main story are exactly 4 smaller newspaper teaser blocks: 2 at the top corners and 2 stacked in the right sidebar, each with dense French placeholder-style article text, thin divider lines, small page references such as "Pag. 2" or "Page 4", and some blue all-caps section tags like "LE AMIT", "LE PARISIEN", and "CONFIANTS". Add another line of italic serif text below the image repeating the visual-battle theme. Use authentic newspaper layout proportions, crisp print texture, black ink on off-white newsprint, subtle paper creases, and soft natural lighting for a believable photographed front page.
entries.description: A realistic newspaper front page featuring a dramatic ChatGPT-versus-Gemini headline and boxing-glove illustration, ideal for editorial mockups about AI competition.

entries.title: Chibi Kids Playing on Exercise Balls
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cute anime-style chibi illustration of 3 children playing indoors on large exercise balls on a rainy day at home, in a bright cozy living room full of houseplants. Center the scene on 1 black-haired chibi child with messy tousled dark navy-black hair, large violet eyes, and a calm slightly pouty expression, lying forward and hugging a blue exercise ball with both arms while one leg stretches out behind. On the left, show 1 black-haired chibi child with short twin pigtails sitting on a pink exercise ball, wearing a white T-shirt with a small dark rectangular logo and olive cargo pants, hands resting on the ball. On the right, show 1 blonde chibi child with a fluffy short bob, large amber-orange eyes, and a big cheerful smile, sitting on a yellow exercise ball with both arms spread wide in excitement. All 3 children are barefoot and wear casual white T-shirts and rolled olive or khaki cargo pants. The room has soft daylight coming through a large window, with lush green potted plants around the window and corners, a wooden shelf on the left with 2 stuffed toys visible, framed botanical wall art, and colorful interlocking foam floor mats in pastel pink, yellow, blue, and purple. Use warm natural lighting, soft shading, polished digital anime rendering, rounded proportions, oversized heads, expressive eyes, gentle highlights, and a playful wholesome mood.

entries.title: Emotional Hand-Drawn Annotations
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use the uploaded photo as the main base image.

Based on the coffee, drinks, desserts, plates, props, table setting, and overall composition shown in the image, create an aesthetic and emotional result that naturally reflects the real elements in the photo. Do not add any people. Stay true to the actual types of food and drinks, their arrangement, and the atmosphere captured in the original image.

Then, carefully observe each element in the photo and add hand-drawn style annotations that match each subject:

Use white pen-style sketch lines with a rough, slightly uneven, hand-drawn feel

Include object outlines, arrows, and dotted lines to guide visual flow

Add short handwritten English notes in a casual, introspective, emotional tone

For drinks: describe taste, temperature, and mood

For desserts: describe texture and flavor

For the space: describe the ambiance

Include a short overall summary of the scene

Subtly incorporate small details like steam, sparkles, hearts, or tiny emotive symbols

Maintain a clean, spacious layout with an Instagram story or magazine memo-like aesthetic

The final result should look like an emotionally styled version of the original photo, without forcing in any elements that don't naturally belong to it
entries.description: Transforms a lifestyle or food photo into an emotionally-toned magazine layout featuring hand-drawn white ink annotations and casual notes.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的社交快照条目《Emotional Hand-Drawn Annotations》。 关键词：magazine。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

entries.title: Playful Hand-Drawn Doodle Overlays
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Analyze the uploaded image and preserve the original subject, composition, and lighting. Do not alter the identity or structure of the main subject. Add playful, hand-drawn doodles that interact directly with the subject in the image. The doodles should mimic, follow, or exaggerate the shapes, gestures, or motion present-such as outlining poses, extending limbs, adding motion lines, or creating imaginative elements that

"respond" to the subject.

Ensure the doodles feel naturally integrated into the scene, as if they were drawn on top of the photo with intention.

Use a sketchy, imperfect, hand-drawn style with organic lines, slightly uneven strokes, and a casual illustrated feel.

Include whimsical handwritten text elements placed around the image. The text should match the mood or implied context of the scene, with a playful and spontaneous tone.

Avoid fixed phrases-generate context-aware, creative, and humorous text that fits each unique image. Maintain a balanced composition so the doodles enhance the image without overwhelming the original subject. Keep the overall aesthetic fun, expressive, and social-media-ready. High resolution, clean overlay, vibrant yet natural color harmony.
entries.description: An instruction set for adding interactive, sketchy doodles and whimsical text to an existing photo while preserving the original subject's identity.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的社交快照条目《Playful Hand-Drawn Doodle Overlays》。 可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

entries.title: Neon AI Video Workflow Dance Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-energy cyberpop promotional poster for an AI video workflow, featuring 5 young female dance performers in a confident K-pop-inspired formation on a futuristic neon stage. The center performer stands slightly forward with hands on hips, wearing a white asymmetrical crop top and a dark blue sequined mini skirt, long light brown wavy hair, athletic slim build. Flanking her are 2 performers in matching black leather crop tops and black leather shorts, also hands on hips, long dark hair, bold stage styling. On the far left is 1 performer in a pink corset-style sleeveless top and white pleated mini skirt. On the far right is 1 performer in a fitted white cropped jacket and white mini skirt. All 5 women wear glamorous concert styling, bare legs, and statement necklaces, with strong stage confidence and symmetrical spacing. Behind them, enormous Chinese headline text dominates the upper half: 影片工作流, rendered in oversized metallic white 3D block letters with hot pink and purple neon glow, glossy highlights, and beveled edges. Beneath the headline are 6 workflow labels in glowing capsule boxes, split into two groups: left side 3 labels "策划", "拍摄", "剪辑"; right side 3 labels "调色", "特效", "输出". The background is a dark concert-like sci-fi environment with radiant purple laser beams, starburst lens flares, magenta light streaks, and a reflective glossy floor mirroring the figures and lighting. Use a wide cinematic composition, centered poster layout, ultra-saturated magenta-violet palette, polished commercial key art, dramatic rim lighting, high contrast, glossy skin highlights, and a sleek AI-generated entertainment marketing aesthetic. Make it look like a bold social media cover image for a one-stop AI music video production pipeline.
entries.description: This prompt generates a flashy neon Chinese promo poster with 5 female performers and workflow text, ideal for social posts or ads about AI video production.

entries.title: Astronaut on a Red Desert World
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic wide shot of a lone astronaut standing on a rocky ledge and facing away from the camera, looking out across an immense red desert plain on a Mars-like planet. The astronaut is centered in the lower middle of the frame, wearing a realistic white EVA spacesuit with subtle gray panels, a life-support backpack, heavy boots, and dark gloves; the helmet is not visible from the front because the figure is seen from behind. The landscape is vast and barren, covered in rust-red dust, scattered stones, and low rock formations, with a rugged cliff edge on the left foreground, sparse rocky mounds across the middle distance, and hazy mountain ranges stretching along the far horizon. Use soft warm peach and terracotta tones, thin atmospheric haze, and gentle late-afternoon light that casts a long shadow behind the astronaut's feet. The mood is solitary, awe-filled, and exploratory, like the opening frame of a sci-fi film about first contact with an alien world. Photorealistic, high detail, ultra-wide composition, natural cinematic color grading, epic scale, minimalism, no buildings, no vehicles, no text, no HUD, no other people.

entries.title: Gothic Android Warrior Cathedral Key Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic dark fantasy anime illustration in a ruined gothic cathedral, vertical composition. Show a lone female android-like warrior from behind, centered slightly low in frame, kneeling or sitting back on her heels on a reflective stone floor. She has extremely long flowing silver white hair spreading across the floor and air, a sleek black blindfold visor covering her eyes, and a black high-cut gothic combat dress with elegant straps, long black opera gloves, and thigh-high black boots. Her physique is slim and graceful. She holds 1 large ornate sword upright in front of her, with both hands resting on the hilt, the blade planted on the ground like a memorial. The sword has a dark blade and a decorative gold ring-like guard near the handle. The atmosphere is solemn, tragic, and reverent. Place 3 tall pointed arched windows in the background, glowing with cold white backlight through haze and dust. Include 4 stone angel statues total: 2 larger angels in the left background and 2 in the right background, partially obscured by fog and darkness. Fill the air with drifting ash, snow-like particles, black debris fragments, and a few faint orange embers near the floor. Use dramatic volumetric light rays, soft bloom, smoky mist, high contrast, and a desaturated palette of charcoal gray, silver, blue-gray, and black. The scene should feel like a memorial after a battle, highly detailed, ultra-polished, melancholic, ethereal, and game key art inspired by NieR:Automata. Add 1 vertical Japanese title inscription near the lower left reading 儚き夢と共にあれ, with 1 small vertical English subtitle beside it reading NieR:Automata.

entries.title: 1998 Rural School Shop Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly realistic documentary-style photo of a 1998 rural elementary school gate-side convenience stall in northern China, shot like an ordinary family snapshot on slightly faded film. The scene shows an old single-story village storefront with a weathered white plaster wall over a low brick base, two dark wooden window frames, and a long sloped roof covered in aged reddish clay tiles. In the center, the shop window is open as a sales counter, and exactly 10 primary-school boys are crowded tightly around it with their backs and profiles facing the camera, eagerly buying snacks and stationery. The children wear mismatched late-1990s school clothing: track jackets in red, blue, purple, and yellow, loose pants, worn sneakers, and simple sweaters, with natural unposed body language. One additional boy stands apart on the right, wearing a red-and-white jacket and blue pants, looking toward the stall beside exactly 1 old black bicycle leaning against the wall. On the left side of the building sits exactly 1 small wooden handcart with two wheels. In the lower left foreground there is a small pile of loose bricks, and near the children are a few rough stones on the dirt ground. The wall has a hand-painted black signboard with large faded Chinese characters reading 小卖部, and beneath it several handwritten price lines in Chinese such as pencils, erasers, exercise books, and diaries, including prices like 5 jiao, 2 jiao, 1.2 yuan, and 1.5 yuan, all painted in an uneven rural style. To the right of the signboard is exactly 1 faded poster or calendar picture pinned to the wall. The background includes bare winter trees and hints of village houses, with a dusty unpaved lane extending to the right. Lighting is soft overcast daylight, colors are muted and slightly yellowed, the image has mild grain, subtle blur, and authentic late-1990s consumer-film texture. Composition is straight-on and medium-wide, with the whole storefront visible and the children forming the focal point. Emphasize historical authenticity, rural poverty, believable architectural wear, no modern objects, no clean design, no stylization, no cinematic glamour, just a truthful candid photograph of a countryside school-side shop from rural China.

entries.title: Instagram Story with Annotations
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Imagine a stylish live-action cafe.
Place dishes suited for the setting, such as cute desserts, lunch, and coffee, on the table.

The subject features an anime character appearing in the live-action space, using a character sheet as a reference.
Poses are random.
Real-time toon rendering quality. Clear cel-shaded edge lines, contrast between anime-style highlights and shadows, 3DCG-based but with a hand-drawn anime texture. Skin has a matte cel-painted look, hair has high-gloss highlight bands, and eyes feature multi-layered gradients.

Analyze elements of the background and character poses, then add hand-drawn annotations to those analyzed elements.
Japanese hand-drawn characters (using hiragana and kanji) and thin hand-drawn lines made with a white pen.
Use arrows and dotted lines to create visual guidance toward specific elements.
The final image should be in an Instagram Story style, designed to look like a direct memo written on a photo.

entries.title: Hand-Drawn Annotated Food Diary Style
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Generate a photo of steak and dessert in the style of a British steakhouse. It should look like it was taken with a smartphone and suitable for posting on Instagram. No people. Then, observe the elements appearing in the photo and add meaningful hand-drawn annotations to each element. [Drawing Rules] - Thin hand-drawn lines as if drawn with a white pen - Rough, slightly uneven single-stroke style - Add outlines as if tracing the outer periphery of objects - Use arrows or dashed lines to create visual guidance [Text Rules] - English handwritten text - Short, self-talking comments - Tone is "diary, single word, emotional connection" [Comment Generation Rules] - Drink -> Taste, temperature, mood (e.g., refreshing, gentle sweetness) - Food -> Texture, deliciousness (e.g., moist, best) - Space -> Atmosphere (e.g., relaxed, good time) - Overall -> Single word summary (e.g., too happy~) [Decoration] - Moderately add steam, sparkles, hearts, small emojis, etc. - Do not overdo it, leave "white space" [Finished Style] - Instagram story style, rough magazine note style - Fashionable and relaxed atmosphere
entries.description: A complex, multi-layered prompt for creating Instagram-style food photography with artistic hand-drawn notes and stickers.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的社交快照条目《Hand-Drawn Annotated Food Diary Style》。 关键词：fashion、phone camera。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。
