entries.title: China May Day Rail Travel Infographic
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a polished Xiaohongshu-style Chinese travel infographic poster in a soft watercolor map aesthetic, square format, showing a five-day high-speed-rail travel route through China. Large brush-calligraphy headline at the top left: 五一出行计划. Directly below it, a green ribbon subtitle with white Chinese text: 广州→湖南→武汉→北京. Add a smaller line of Chinese text under the subtitle: "一路向北·发现中国之美". The background is a pale illustrated map of central and northern China in beige and light sage green, with faint mountain textures, soft rivers, and subtle floral decoration in the corners. A vertical curved railway line runs from the bottom center upward to the top center, connecting 4 cities with orange-red location pins and bold red Chinese city names. The 4 cities are, from bottom to top: 广州, 湖南, 武汉, 北京. Along the route, place small white high-speed train icons on the track and 3 green travel-time labels: "广州→湖南 高铁约2.5小时", "湖南→武汉 高铁约1.5小时", and "武汉→北京 高铁约4.5小时". Near each city, include a scenic collage or illustrated landmark cluster: Guangzhou with a modern skyline and Canton Tower; Hunan with green mountains and cultural scenery; Wuhan with Yellow Crane Tower and historic architecture; Beijing with the Forbidden City / imperial palace architecture. Add small scenic tag labels near the city illustrations reading "花城广州·美食之都", "山水湖南·人文荟萃", "江城武汉·英雄之城", and "中国首都·历史与现代交融". Under the main title, show exactly 4 minimalist icon badges with short Chinese labels, evenly spaced in one row: a camera icon labeled "精选景点", a train icon labeled "高铁直达", a suitcase icon labeled "轻松出行", and a star icon labeled "美食推荐". Around the map, place 4 rounded rectangular itinerary cards with green headers, cream backgrounds, and photo thumbnails. Each card must contain day-by-day plans, a starred section for recommended attractions, and a starred section for recommended food. The 4 cards are: 1) top right card titled "北京|2天", with exactly 2 day rows, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo; 2) right middle card titled "武汉|1.5天", with exactly 2 day rows, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo; 3) left middle card titled "湖南|2天", with exactly 2 day rows, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo; 4) bottom left card titled "广州|1天", with exactly 1 day row, exactly 4 attraction thumbnails, and 1 food photo. Fill the itinerary text with compact Chinese travel-plan copy in a practical social-media infographic style. At the lower right, add a rounded notes panel containing exactly 2 sections with green titles: "行程亮点" and "出行小贴士". Under "行程亮点", list exactly 4 bullet points with small icon markers. Under "出行小贴士", list exactly 4 bullet points with small icon markers. Decorate the notes area with a small luggage illustration and a handwritten-style diagonal Chinese phrase in green, such as "出发吧!去感受春天的风景". At the bottom center, place a small rounded summary bar titled "行程总览", including exactly 4 summary items with icons: total duration "总时长:约6.5天", total distance "总里程:约2100公里", recommended transportation "推荐交通:高铁", and best travel period "最佳出行时间:4.29 - 5.5". In the bottom left foreground, place a large sleek white high-speed train angled diagonally upward, partially overlapping the border as a hero element. Add a calligraphic closing slogan near the train in Chinese: "最美的风景在路上 最好的时光在五一". Use an elegant olive-green, sage, beige, and warm red palette, combining traditional Chinese travel-poster charm with modern infographic clarity, crisp typography, soft shadows, rounded cards, realistic photo inserts, and clean editorial layout.
entries.description: A square Chinese social-media travel poster showing a five-day high-speed-rail itinerary from Guangzhou to Beijing, useful for Xiaohongshu-style trip planning graphics.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的社交快照条目《China May Day Rail Travel Infographic》。 关键词：editorial、realistic、city。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

entries.title: Open Notebook with French Handwritten Plans
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic overhead lifestyle photo of an open lined notebook lying on a dark wooden desk, shot in soft natural indoor light with warm neutral tones. The notebook fills most of the frame and is centered vertically, opened to two pages with neat black handwritten French notes, casual rounded handwriting, slight imperfections, a few doodles, and some crossed-out lines. Show a black ribbon bookmark hanging from the bottom center of the notebook. Include a partial stack of pale books or paper at the top left edge and a partial white mug entering from the top right corner. The pages should look cream-colored with faint horizontal ruling and a subtle center crease. On the left page, write the underlined heading "Plan articles blog" near the top, followed by exactly 6 bullet items: "Écris intro + pourquoi j'ai lancé le blog", "10 idées reçues sur le minimalisme" with the number 10 circled, "Ma routine du matin (version réaliste)", "Témoignages / retours lecteurs", "Outils que j'utilise au quotidien", and one crossed-out line reading "bons plans (liens affiliés)". Lower on the left page, add the underlined subheading "Idées à creuser :" followed by exactly 3 bullet items: "article sur les achats impulsifs", "parler d'argent sans tabou" with a small star doodle nearby, and "digital declutter : par où commencer ?", plus one additional fully crossed-out handwritten line beneath them. At the bottom left, draw a large cloud-shaped outline containing the text "Objectif : publier 2x/mois et rester authentique !" and add a small heart doodle near the lower right corner of the left page. On the right page, write the underlined heading "Routine matin idéale" at the top, then exactly 6 schedule lines: "6h30 : réveil (sans tel !!)", "6h40 : eau citron + respiration", "6h50 : 10 min de lecture", "7h05 : écriture / gratitude", "7h20 : sport / yoga / marche", "7h45 : douche + préparation", and then "8h15 : focus boulot" lower down with a hand-drawn star doodle to its right. Beneath that, add the underlined subheading "Pensées du jour :" and the quote across 3 lines: "La discipline, c'est choisir entre", "ce que tu veux maintenant et", "ce que tu veux vraiment.", with a small heart doodle below. At the bottom right, add the underlined subheading "À ne pas oublier :" followed by exactly 3 bullet items: "appeler la banque", "prendre rdv médecin", and a crossed-out "annuler abo salle (trop cher)". Keep the composition clean, minimal, and believable, like an authentic productivity journal or blog planning notebook photographed casually from above.
entries.description: This prompt generates a realistic top-down desk photo of an open notebook filled with handwritten French planning notes, ideal for productivity, lifestyle, or blog-themed visuals.

entries.title: Dogs Carrying Giant Bone by the Sea
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A whimsical painterly illustration of a vintage turquoise station wagon driving along a coastal road, shown in clean side profile against a simple blue sky and calm ocean horizon. On the roof, tied down with 4 visible tan ropes, is an absurdly oversized white dog bone, rough-textured and sculptural, longer than the car itself. Inside the car are 4 dogs total: 1 golden-brown dog in the driver's seat with one paw on the steering wheel, 2 golden-brown dogs sitting in the middle and rear windows looking outward, and 1 white-and-brown dog at the back with its head tilted slightly up. Use thick expressive oil-paint brushstrokes, soft impasto texture, slightly naive folk-art realism, gentle humor, and a minimalist composition with the car centered horizontally. The road is dark in the foreground with a thin sandy strip near the water, and the palette is dominated by sky blue, sea blue, faded turquoise, cream white, and warm brown. Bright daylight, no text, no extra objects, serene but funny road-trip mood.

entries.title: Futuristic EV Racing Through City Night
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic nighttime automotive action shot of a futuristic electric sports coupe racing through a modern downtown city, viewed from a low rear three-quarter tracking angle. The car is a sleek Audi concept vehicle with a glossy white body, black roofline, dark tinted windows, extremely wide rear tires, illuminated rear light bar, and glowing tron branding centered on the back. The rear lower section is partially transparent or open, revealing advanced electric drivetrain and battery hardware with metallic detail and cool blue illumination. Add flowing pale gray and blue side graphics on the doors and rear quarter panels for a concept-car look. The vehicle is driving fast on a wet multi-lane urban expressway, with strong motion blur in the asphalt, lane markings, and surrounding buildings. The background is filled with tall glass office towers at night, hundreds of bright window lights, scattered red aircraft warning lights on rooftops, and streaking traffic lights in the distance. Include reflections along a barrier or wall on the far left edge to emphasize speed and camera motion. Lighting is cool, high-contrast, and moody, with blue-white highlights, glossy reflections on the road, and a premium sci-fi luxury aesthetic. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, long-exposure feel, dynamic tracking shot, sharp focus on the car while the city environment blurs from speed.

entries.title: Seaside Cafe Event Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a lively Chinese event poster with a warm, trendy coffee-shop aesthetic, photographed from inside a seaside cafe looking out through large floor-to-ceiling windows at palm trees, a bright blue sky, outdoor seating, and a Ferris wheel in the distance. The composition should feel like a candid lifestyle scene combined with energetic graphic design. In the foreground, place a dark wooden table with 1 open laptop centered near the bottom, 1 takeaway coffee cup with a black lid on the right side of the table, 1 black bag on the left, and 1 short stack of books near the left edge. Use a sunlit, slightly golden afternoon atmosphere with reflections on the glass and a relaxed vacation vibe.

Overlay bold poster graphics in a collage style using torn paper, brushstroke paint, stickers, and taped note-paper elements. The main headline on the upper left should be huge, hand-painted Chinese calligraphy in dark brown and orange, reading "疯狂星期四", with a small yellow tag near it that reads "第11期", and an even smaller top-left badge reading "活动预告" with a tiny megaphone icon. Beneath the main headline, add a green brushstroke banner with the text "下周四,不见不散!", and below that a smaller line in parentheses: "(五一长假前最后一期)".

Add 2 torn notebook-paper cards: 1 in the upper right and 1 in the lower left. The upper-right note should contain a short invitation paragraph in Chinese, neatly typeset in black and orange text, reading: "让我们海边小聚,远眺摩天轮,吹吹海风,和 App & AI Builder 们一起聊聊产品、远程生活与创作。" and include a small orange heart doodle in the bottom-right corner of that note. The lower-left note should list 3 info blocks with icons and orange section headers: "时间", "地点", and "说明". Under "时间", write "2026年04月23日 (星期四)" and "12:00 ~ 18:00". Under "地点", write "南山区·前海石公园·福叁咖啡". Under "说明", write "无需报名,随时来吧!".

Across the middle-right area, place a large playful white script-style slogan with a dark outline, angled slightly upward, reading "喝咖啡、随意交流 海边散步,主打一个 Chill~". Add 1 illustrated coffee cup sticker next to this slogan on the right. Use energetic orange paint splashes and sketch doodles around the headline and notes to make the poster feel youthful and spontaneous.

At the bottom, place a wide off-white torn-paper footer strip containing 3 feature blocks laid out horizontally. Block 1: a snowflake-like icon with the text "舒适环境" and smaller text "空调 + 宽敞桌椅". Block 2: a Wi‐Fi icon with the text "电网无忧" and smaller text "WiFi + 插座". Block 3: larger orange handwritten text "期待与你 海边相遇!" with a blue underline flourish and a tiny heart doodle. The overall design should mix real photography and graphic poster elements, with strong contrast, brush lettering, scrapbook textures, cafe lifestyle realism, and a fashionable AI-generated social-media event-poster look.
entries.description: A vibrant Chinese promotional poster for a casual seaside coffee meetup, useful for social event announcements, community gatherings, and lifestyle marketing.

entries.prompt: A clean corporate parody graphic on a plain light gray background, centered horizontally, styled like an official Microsoft product banner. On the left, show a layered cluster of 4 overlapping Microsoft Office-like app icons with glossy 3D depth and soft shadows: 1 large blue square tile in front with a bold white capital letter P, 1 orange rounded rectangle behind it at the upper left with a white pie-chart symbol, 1 white document sheet in the middle with a folded top-right corner, three blue horizontal text lines and a blue bar chart at the bottom, and 1 green spreadsheet tile behind on the right with a white grid pattern. On the right side, place the word Microsoft in small dark gray sans-serif type above a large product-name line that reads Power harassment Ex. Render the large title in a Microsoft-style multicolor gradient spanning warm orange-red into purple-blue and cyan, with a crisp modern sans-serif look. Keep the composition minimal, wide, and balanced, with lots of empty space, resembling a polished tech company branding image or fake software logo announcement.

entries.title: Handwritten Cafe Photo Annotations
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Using the provided reference photo as the unchanged base, add an emotional Instagram-style handwritten annotation overlay in thin white ink, as if written directly on the image. Do not change the croissant, coffee, table, lighting, crop, or background; only add typography, underlines, arrows, small doodle marks, and a heart.

Overlay style: casual Japanese hand lettering, warm cafe diary mood, slightly imperfect strokes, white chalk/paint-pen look, with thin arrows pointing to the croissant and cup. Keep the writing readable but natural, with varied sizes and spacing.

Add exactly 9 discrete handwritten text blocks:
1. Large top-left headline: 朝のごほうび, with double underline and small sparkle strokes.
2. Smaller line beneath it: 焼きたての香りで 今日がはじまる。, with a long curved underline.
3. Left-middle note pointing toward the croissant: バターの香り、ふわり.
4. Lower-left note pointing to the croissant tip: "先端まで きれい".
5. Center note pointing to the glossy top: "表面の照りが たまらない".
6. Upper-right note pointing to the croissant layers: "さくっと 軽い層".
7. Bottom-center note with underline near the plate: "この立体感が好き".
8. Lower-right note pointing to the coffee cup: "やさしい一口".
9. Bottom handwritten closing phrase: なんでもない朝が、少し好きになる。♡, underlined.

Composition: place most writing in the empty darker wall/window area and around the food without covering the main croissant too heavily. Use curved arrows, dotted emphasis marks, wavy underlines, and small decorative strokes to connect notes to the croissant and coffee. Avoid adding any logos, borders, stickers, or extra objects.
entries.description: Adds warm Japanese handwritten diary-style notes, arrows, and doodles over a cafe food photo for Instagram-style sharing.

entries.title: Chinese VPS Comparison Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a clean modern Chinese tech blog cover in a wide 16:9 layout with a soft light-gray background, rounded-corner canvas, and minimalist dashboard aesthetic. On the left, place a small rounded category pill near the top with a yellow dot icon and the text "VPS 实测 · 购买参考". Below it, set a very large bold dark navy Chinese headline in two stacked lines: "DMIT涨价之后" and "我把搬瓦工". Under the headline, add a short yellow underline accent and then a medium-gray subheading reading "先看重点再下单". The typography should feel premium, editorial, and highly legible, with strong contrast and generous spacing. On the right, show a floating desktop-app style server monitoring panel with a white card body, subtle shadow, rounded corners, and a pale beige browser top bar with three small circular window buttons. The panel header should read "BandwagonHost - CN2 GIA", with a smaller line underneath "洛杉矶 · CN2 GIA" and a green status label "运行中", plus on the top-right a small clock icon and the text "运行时长 27 天". Inside the panel, include exactly 5 metric cards across the top row labeled "CPU" showing "12%", "内存" showing "28%", "硬盘" showing "18%", "带宽" showing "1.2 Mbps", and "延迟(本地)" showing "156 ms", each with a small teal icon and a thin teal progress bar. Below, place a large line chart card on the left titled "稳定性(近 7 天)" with a top-right annotation "可用性 99.92%", a teal fluctuating line, a vertical scale from 97% to 100%, and date labels from "05-13" through "05-19". To the right of the chart, add a specs card titled "配置摘要" listing exactly 5 rows: "CPU 2 vCPU", "内存 2 GB", "硬盘 40 GB SSD", "流量 1 TB/月", and "系统 CentOS 7.9 64bit". In the lower-left area overlapping between the text block and the dashboard, add a smaller white recommendation card with rounded corners and shadow. Its title line should include a yellow bookmark icon and read "购买参考 · 重点看这几项". Inside, list exactly 4 rows: "线路质量 CN2 GIA", "稳定性 ★★★★☆", "性价比 中上", and "适用场景 建站 / 中转 / 轻应用". Add soft decorative elements in the background: a pale mint abstract rounded shape in the bottom-left corner, a faint dotted mint pattern above it, and a light dotted curved connector line arcing from the left text area toward the top of the dashboard, with a small yellow dot on the curve. Place a small rounded yellow name tag in the bottom-right corner of the canvas with the text "小墨同学". Use a restrained palette of dark navy, teal, yellow, white, and light gray, with crisp vector-style rendering, subtle shadows, spacious composition, and a polished AI-generated editorial cover look for a VPS comparison article.
entries.description: A polished wide-format Chinese tech article cover featuring a bold headline, a server monitoring dashboard, and recommendation cards for VPS comparison content.

entries.title: Out the Window meme comic prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create an "Out the Window" meme-style four-panel comic titled "How to Improve Development Efficiency with AI? 如何借助 AI 提升开发效率?", featuring dialogues in speech bubbles. 

--ar 9:16

Characters:

- Boss: Asian male wearing a suit, with neatly parted hair.
- Employee Xiaoming: Male, wearing a blue checkered shirt.
- Employee Xiaohong: Female.
- Employee Xiaohu: Female, Asian, straight bangs hairstyle, wearing red-framed glasses.

Panel Descriptions:

- Top panel (single wide panel):
 The boss asks during a meeting: "How can we use AI to improve development efficiency? 我们要如何借助 AI 提升开发效率?"

 Three employees sit listening.

- Second panel (single wide panel):
 Each employee responds individually:

 - Xiaoming: "We use AI to write unit tests. 我们用 AI 写单元测试"
 - Xiaohong: "We use AI for code reviews. 我们用 AI 做代码审查"
 - Xiaohu: "Vibe Coding。"

- Third row (two panels):
 - Left panel: The boss looks furious.
 - Right panel: Employee Xiaohu is humorously kicked out of a high-rise window.

entries.title: Handwritten French Poem on Paper
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic 16:9 close-up photograph of a sheet of slightly textured white paper resting diagonally on a medium-brown wooden table, viewed from a shallow overhead angle. On the paper, a short French poem is handwritten neatly in elegant cursive with vivid blue ink. The title at the top center reads Pigeon. Beneath it are exactly 4 lines of handwriting, centered and evenly spaced: Oiseau à la grise robe,, Dans l'enfer des villes, "À mon regard tu te dérobes", and "Tu es vraiment le plus agile." Keep the handwriting graceful, legible, and natural, like careful fountain-pen calligraphy by hand rather than typography. Soft warm indoor lighting, subtle shadows along the paper edges, visible paper grain, and a simple uncluttered composition focused entirely on the handwritten poem.

entries.title: Surreal Octopus Burger Fine Dining Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark, moody fine-dining restaurant scene photographed with direct flash and a slightly unsettling surreal-horror tone. Center the composition on a plated gourmet sandwich that looks like a realistic octopus used as the filling: a glossy golden-brown sesame burger bun on top of a fleshy pink-purple octopus body with detailed veins, pores, suction cups, wrinkled skin, and several visible tentacles protruding from the sides and front. The creature should appear cooked yet disturbingly lifelike, with one bulbous eye-like form visible on the left side and clustered holes and texture on the right side, creating an uncanny bio-organic appearance. The sandwich sits on a large round white ceramic plate with a pool of yellow butter-like or oily sauce spreading beneath it and a few small reddish droplets mixed into the sauce. In the foreground-left background place a small white dish holding a pat of butter. On the dining table include exactly 6 visible drinking glasses: 2 large red wine glasses, 3 tall white-wine or champagne-style stem glasses, and 1 dark beer glass at the right edge. In the back center place 1 small lit candle in a gold-toned holder and 1 small clear vase with white flowers. Use a white tablecloth, very dim ambient lighting, warm candle glow, strong camera flash reflections on the glassware, shallow casual snapshot framing, and a bizarre upscale restaurant presentation that feels grotesque, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, and intentionally shocking.

entries.title: Oriental Fantasy City Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Flat illustration, high-end oriental fantasy style city poster design, vertical 9:16 composition. The layout uses a diagonal + S-shaped flow extending from the bottom left to top right. The background is deep black grading down to intense dark red, creating strong warm-cool contrast and spatial depth with faint stardust and grain texture. In the center, a flowing golden energy line winds through like a flame, extending upward from the base, featuring fluid texture, particle effects, and gradient highlights, with subtle energy debris and volumetric light.

Within the golden flow, the architectural landmarks of Guangzhou emerge layer by layer: the Canton Tower is the visual core with prominent proportions, surrounded by the Zhujiang New Town skyline, Liede Bridge, and modern Lingnan architectural elements. Buildings are rendered using "fine line drawing + golden luminous blocks," with clear outlines and rich details, appearing to float in a void against the golden halo, creating a surreal spatial hierarchy with slightly fogged backgrounds for added depth.

At the bottom of the frame is an oriental white-haired female figure with flowing hair like mist, naturally connecting and merging with the golden light. Her hair is translucent with gradient light effects; she has a graceful posture, eyes closed, and a serene expression, holding a bouquet of colorful flowers dotted with shimmering particles, symbolizing the spiritual connection between people and city energy. Character details are moderately simplified to emphasize the overall design.

Lighting is concentrated on the golden flow, buildings, and character outlines, creating intense chiaroscuro and visual focus. The overall atmosphere is grand, mysterious, imbued with oriental mythology, and slightly healing. Colors use black and dark red as a base with brilliant gold as the main visual emphasis. The gold has rich light-dark layers, complemented by small areas of high-saturation floral colors, maintaining a sophisticated and restrained aesthetic.

Integrated text and layout: Centered Songti font at the top reads "Guangzhou · China," followed by smaller text "2026/04/20" and "LIYUE" below. Text uses pale gold or soft warm white, unified with the overall lighting. High-quality details, cinematic lighting, rich volumetric and particle details, clean image without noise, ultra-high 8K resolution, commercial-grade poster quality.

entries.title: Handwritten Japanese Study Notes
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A top-down photorealistic image of an open lined notebook resting on a smooth wooden desk. A dark green HB pencil with a silver ferrule and white eraser lies diagonally on the desk to the right of the notebook. The notebook pages are filled with neat, handwritten text in pencil, resembling a student's study notes. On the left page, the top left corner reads 2024年5月20日(月) above 国語 「枕草子」. Below this is a rectangular boxed heading reading 清少納言のものの見方, followed by exactly three bulleted sentences: one about valuing the changes in nature and seasons, one about finding beauty and amusement in small everyday things, and one about being honest with one's senses while having a sense of humor. Further down is a cloud-shaped border containing a heading translated as 'Words that left an impression', followed by a famous classical quote about spring mornings and a brief explanation below it marked with an arrow. On the right page, the top section has the heading 〈現代とのちがい〉 with exactly two bulleted points: one noting that the perception of seasons is much more delicate than today, and another stating that the perspective is sensory and poetic. This is followed by an arrow pointing to a concluding thought about wanting to cherish this sensibility. Below this is another cloud-shaped border containing a heading translated as 'Summary' and a short paragraph about how the 1000-year-old text still resonates today and the importance of carefully observing nature. At the bottom right of the page, there is a small, simple line drawing of a leafy plant stem next to a scalloped thought bubble containing the text 感性をみがくって、素敵なことだなあ。. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting the texture of the paper and the graphite pencil marks.
entries.description: A photorealistic top-down view of an open notebook with handwritten Japanese study notes and a pencil, useful for educational or aesthetic mockups.
